**Key Roles \& Responsibilities**
* Lead overall project planning, execution, monitori
data.jd_text:
**Role Summary**
 Overall responsible for execution, cost, schedule, quality, and HSE performance of the Wind Project. Acts as the single point of accountability for project delivery and client interface.
   

  

**Key Roles \& Responsibilities**
* Lead overall project planning, execution, monitoring, and completion in line with contract terms.
* Coordinate cross\-functional teams (Engineering, Construction, Procurement, QA/QC, HSE, Commissioning).
* Ensure project delivery within approved budget and schedule.
* Manage client, consultant, and stakeholder interfaces effectively.
* Ensure compliance with statutory, environmental, and safety standards.
* Develop risk management and mitigation strategies.
* Review and approve project progress reports and financial updates.
* Promote continuous improvement, innovation, and team development.


**Experience**
 Minimum 10 years in Project Management of energy projects (wind/solar/thermal/hydro), with at least 5 years in construction of wind plants of similar capacity.
   

  

**Education**
 Bachelor’s degree in electrical/mechanical/civil engineering; PMP/IPMA or equivalent certification preferred.

data.title: Executive Assistant to President & Managing Director, International Operations
data.raw_snippet:
**We Put the World on Vacation**
 Travel \+ Leisure Co. is the world’s leading vacation ownership and travel membership company, with a dynamic and growing portfolio of resort, travel club, and lifestyle travel brands. Our dedicated associates help the company achieve its mission to put the world on
data.jd_text:
**We Put the World on Vacation**
 Travel \+ Leisure Co. is the world’s leading vacation ownership and travel membership company, with a dynamic and growing portfolio of resort, travel club, and lifestyle travel brands. Our dedicated associates help the company achieve its mission to put the world on vacation. Innovation and growth keep our work interesting and fun. Every day is a chance to learn something new and turn vacation inspiration into exceptional experiences for millions of travelers worldwide.
   

  

 Join
 **Travel \+ Leisure Co.** 
 and contribute to our mission of making holiday dreams come true by providing high\-level executive support to the President and Managing Director, International Operations.
   

  

 This role requires a proactive, discreet, and detail\-oriented professional who can confidently manage daily operations, communications, and logistics at the executive level. You’ll collaborate closely with our Administrative Assistant in Bundall, Queensland and work alongside the broader EA team to ensure seamless coordination and executive support.
   

  

**How You'll Shine**
* Act as the primary liaison and gatekeeper for the President \& Managing Director, International Operations.
* Manage email inbox, complex calendar, and global travel logistics
* Draft, proofread, and format executive\-level documents and communications
* Coordinate meetings, agendas, minutes, and follow\-up actions
* Organise bi\-annual Executive Offsites and company events
* Handle expense reports, approvals, and board communications
* Support VIP travel, guest logistics, and internal/external liaison
* Maintain organisational charts, passwords, and system access records
* Coordinate YPO\-related communications and meetings
* Provide flexible support outside standard hours when required


**What You’ll Bring**
* Proven experience supporting senior executives (C\-suite or SVP level)
* Ability to manage sensitive, confidential matters with professionalism
* Strong time management, multitasking, and prioritisation skills
* Fluency in both Arabic and English
* Advanced MS Office skills; shorthand and minute\-taking are essential
* Excellent interpersonal, written, and verbal communication skills
* A team player with a customer\-first mindset and a strong work ethic
* Willingness to travel occasionally for events and executive support


**How You'll Be Rewarded**
* Professional development funding
* Discounted hotel stays across Australia, Fiji, and New Zealand
* Great career development opportunities
* Birthday Leave


**Where Memories Start with You**
 Hospitality is at the heart of all we do at Travel \+ Leisure Co. Here, you’ll find an inclusive environment where we deliver excellence and take time to have fun, celebrate together, and support one another. We're always looking ahead to what’s next and how we can strengthen our business, its neighboring communities, and the customer experience. Join our global team and build a career where memories start with you.
   

  

 We are an equal opportunity employer, and all applications will be considered for employment without attention to their membership in any protected class. If you require any reasonable accommodation to complete your application or any part of the recruiting process, please email your request to MyCareer@travelandleisure.com, including the title and location of the position for which you are applying.

data.title: Director Engineering MEP Support - MEA
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
**Position Statement**
 As highly established Director of Engineering Support, you will work closely with the Senior Director to develop, to develop, manage and implement sustainable engineering solutions, and drive engineering excellence across all MEP disciplines, as well as fi
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
**Position Statement**
 As highly established Director of Engineering Support, you will work closely with the Senior Director to develop, to develop, manage and implement sustainable engineering solutions, and drive engineering excellence across all MEP disciplines, as well as fire and life safety standards for all Brands. Your role will support Hilton’s expansion across the MEA region, with a key focus on Egypt and Pakistan. You will provide expert advice to the Hilton project management team, external design consultants, and owners on new developments, Property Improvement Plans, refurbishments, and adaptive reuse projects.
   

  

**Position Summary**
 This role will consist, but not be limited to assisting the Senior Director of Engineering Support with:
   

  

* Supporting Hilton’s growth across the MEA region, maintaining strong knowledge of local codes and effectively implementing and delivering projects in region.
* Developing and implementing engineering and fire life safety standards for all Hilton brands across EMEA, including coordinating with Brand Managers to establish location‑specific requirements and overseeing the creation of tailored Design and Construction Standards in collaboration with Hilton’s regional design and construction teams.
* Maintaining and updating all engineering\- and fire\-life‑safety‑related Design and Construction Standards annually, ensuring Project Managers have access to the latest versions.
* Reviewing building engineering services drawings for multiple brands and countries to ensure compliance with construction brand standards across new developments, Property Improvement Plans, refurbishments, adaptive reuse initiatives, and Hilton Capex projects.
* Champion the regional sustainability vision by shaping strategic goals and driving impactful environmental initiatives.
* Collaborating with the Area Operations Engineering team to assess the performance of newly opened hotels, using operational feedback to refine and enhance future design schemes.
* Driving technical excellence by applying deep knowledge of Hilton’s engineering design guidelines and identifying opportunities for continuous improvement.
* Ensuring all technical specifications remain current and are clearly reflective of the latest technology and brand standard requirements.
* Maintaining an understanding of brand standards and local code requirements, communicating code variances and their implications to the Senior Director.
* Developing strategies and directions for engineering processes, procedures, and reporting.
* Supporting the execution of strategic plans and internal/external communication of key engineering messages.
* Managing the cross\-functional coordination between AD\&C and other internal departments to ensure alignment and seamless project delivery.
* Conducting with project designs, construction visits and testing and commissioning witnessing of systems in region.


**What will I be doing?**
**Planning Activities**
* Research Local Codes and help to identify business opportunities for Hilton to support Development pipeline.
* Research new technologies and developing new innovations for the business and presenting quarterly to Senior Director of Engineering.
* Manages objectives for the department, communicating across functions and clearly manages all design reviews for the department, planning project visits and status reporting across all assigned projects
* Travel and site inspections and team meetings.
* Arranging knowledge CPDs for the wider Engineering team.
* Considering the needs of other business functions and planning for changes to Standards / updates to meet these visions.


**Organizing Activities**
* Establishes priorities and supporting the wider Engineering team members ensuring optimum allocation of resources to support projects.
* Works with key stakeholders and departments structuring activities and resources so overall objectives are met.
* Communicates management plans and project activities and ESG goals clearly in reports.
* Evaluates and streamlines business processes to maximize efficiency and effectiveness.
* Manages cross\-functional links to other Technical Services (Architecture and Construction) departments.
* Adheres to measurements of engineering performance standards to ensure overall effectiveness.
* Develop plans to implement long term goals for ESG and AD\&C department.
* Reviews current external professional teams and looks to enhance the support network across the region, developing organisations that support the department’s needs.


**Directing Activities**
* Implements and manages departmental processes and procedures to ensure strategies and directives are carried out effectively.
* Oversees the development and administration of the agreed engineering standards.
* Communicates important information to team members.
* Influences department members to achieve department objectives.
* Executes organisational directives and encourages achievement of goals through motivation, communication and leadership.
* Manages third parties, identifies vendors and monitors cost and quality of service.
* Leverages effective partnerships with third parties and internal constituents.
* Advises management on progress and advises on key performance issues.
* Conduct detailed design reviews.
* Report on reviews.
* Visit projects and conduct site inspections and issuing detailed reports on quality and progress.
* Witnessing commissioning and undertaking checks for signing off on engineering systems.
* Report writing, Project Overviews and Final Project Sustainability reporting.
* Presenting ESG initiatives and new technologies in an executive format.


**Controlling Activities**
* Oversees proper controls and systems to ensure compliance with the agreed engineering standards.
* Ensures established performance standards are met for department or project.
* Assesses actual performance to ensure success and takes corrective actions.
* Ensures business plan is followed and achieved providing feedback as necessary.
* Enforces policies and procedures to improve overall operations and effectiveness.
* Operates within prescribed budget parameters.


**Other Activities**
* Contribute to multi\-skilled projects.
* To be aware of business and commercial opportunities for Hilton.
* To conduct competitor and industry analysis and produce reports and recommendations to enhance Hilton’s design standards.
* To conduct market trends in engineering and analysis new routes forward for Hilton to enhance guest experience, drive energy efficiencies and drive value.
* All other job duties as assigned.


**What are we looking for?**
**To successfully fill this role, you should maintain the attitude, behaviours, skills, and values that follow:**
* Excellent MEP Design knowledge and practice with project management involving witnessing and commissioning on systems.
* Excellent Sustainability knowledge in design.
* Very good understanding of regulations within MEA and infrastructure challenges across the region.
* Excellent communication skills both verbally and in writing reporting to Senior members of the business and to external stakeholders.
* Strong Ability to analyse departmental financial data.
* Excellent interpersonal skills to build trust and confidence to motivate and influence others
* Demonstrates the highest standards of ethical behaviour and absolute discretion with sensitive information.
* Ability to take initiative to identify, prioritise and implement actions required to achieve functional goals
* Very strong problem\-solving skills including ability to address any issue in collaboration with others, identify and prevent potential problems and develop problem solving skills in others.
* Ability to work well under pressure and effectively handle multiple and concurrent demands.
* Ability to collaborate with others and act in an objective manner to stay on track to achieve common goals.
* Very strong in design engineering skills and ability to quickly learn new programs and train others.
* Excellent project management skills including ability to manage details through to completion and ensure deadlines are met.
* Capable of conversing with both technical and non\-technical parties.
* Experience working in multi\-cultural and international settings.
* Experience in dealing with developers, Owners and other corporate clients.
* An understanding of and working knowledge of the Middle East regulations and standards.
* Proficiency with Word, PowerPoint, Excel, AutoCAD.


**Qualifications**
**Required Qualifications**
* University degree in Mechanical and Electrical Engineering or similar Construction related discipline or extensive experience in lieu.
* Recognised professional qualification in Engineering or similar Construction related discipline.
* Substantial work experience in property, engineering design and / or construction related roles including significant experience in related advanced hotel development and construction related experience ideally within an international hotel group.
* Ability to speak, write and communicate fluently in both Arabic and English.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Advanced degree preferred.
* Substantial experience within the hospitality industry and in a similar role.
* In\-depth knowledge of hotel and general leisure engineering systems and design
* Supervisory experience greater than 5 years.
* Project Management experience.
* Excellent understanding of fire, life and safety systems, preferably experience in applying NFPA, main UAE standards and building and Fire Codes.
* An excellent understanding and working knowledge of Middle East standards.
* MEP Design background.
* On site practical experience including testing and commissioning.


**What will it be like to work for Hilton?**
 Hilton is the leading global hospitality company, spanning the lodging sector from luxurious full\-service hotels and resorts to extended\-stay suites and mid\-priced hotels. For nearly a century, Hilton has offered business and leisure travelers the finest in accommodations, service, amenities and value. Hilton is dedicated to continuing its tradition of providing exceptional guest experiences across its global brands. Our vision “to fill the earth with the light and warmth of hospitality” unites us as a team to create remarkable hospitality experiences around the world every day. And, our amazing Team Members are at the heart of it all!
   

  

**Work Locations**
 Hilton \- Regional Office \- Dubai
   

  

**Schedule**
 Full\-time
   

  

**Brand**
 Hilton Corporate
   

  

**Shift**
 Day Job
   

  

**Job Level**
 Director
   

  

**Job**
 Engineering, Maintenance and Facilities
   

  

 Job Details
   

  

 Role Level: Director Work Type: Full\-Time Country: United Arab Emirates City: Dubai Company Website: http://stories.hilton.com Job Function: Information Technology (IT) Company Industry/
   

  

 Sector: Hospitality
   

  

 What We Offer
   

  

**About The Company**
 Searching, interviewing and hiring are all part of the professional life. The TALENTMATE Portal idea is to fill and help professionals doing one of them by bringing together the requisites under One Roof. Whether you're hunting for your Next Job Opportunity or Looking for Potential Employers, we're here to lend you a Helping Hand.
   

  

 Report
   

  

 Disclaimer: talentmate.com is only a platform to bring jobseekers \& employers together. Applicants are advised to research the bonafides of the prospective employer independently. We do NOT endorse any requests for money payments and strictly advice against sharing personal or bank related information. We also recommend you visit Security Advice for more information. If you suspect any fraud or malpractice, email us at abuse@talentmate.com.

* Experience in dealing with developers, Owners and other corporate clients.
* An understanding of and working knowledge of the Middle East regulations and standards.
* Proficiency with Word, PowerPoint, Excel, AutoCAD.



  





**Qualifications** 




  





**Required Qualifications** 



* University degree in Mechanical and Electrical Engineering or similar Construction related discipline or extensive experience in lieu.
* Recognised professional qualification in Engineering or similar Construction related discipline.
* Substantial work experience in property, engineering design and / or construction related roles including significant experience in related advanced hotel development and construction related experience ideally within an international hotel group.
* Ability to speak, write and communicate fluently in both Arabic and English.



  





**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Advanced degree preferred.
* Substantial experience within the hospitality industry and in a similar role.

* Excellent understanding of fire, life and safety systems, preferably experience in applying NFPA, main UAE standards and building and Fire Codes.
* An excellent understanding and working knowledge of Middle East standards.

 Full\-time

* Own the annual, quarterly, and monthly marketing calendar, ensuring all activities are synchronized.

data.jd_text:
**Marketing Operations \& Planning**



* Own the annual, quarterly, and monthly marketing calendar, ensuring all activities are synchronized.
* Lead weekly planning and performance meetings to review data and pivot strategies in real\-time.
* Translate high\-level business priorities into structured campaign and launch plans.
* Create clear briefs for the Specialists and maintain full visibility across all timelines, deliverables, and deadlines to ensure flawless execution.



**Strategic Leadership \& Budget Management**



* Own the marketing budget, allocation, forecasting, and ROI; forecast growth trajectories and reallocate spending based on performance.
* Develop a holistic strategy that balances aggressive performance marketing with long\-term brand building.
* Drive execution across existing and new territories, navigating multi\-lingual requirements (Arabic) and territory\-specific regulatory awareness.



**Growth, Media Buying \& Performance**



* Supervise the execution of PPC, Paid Social, Affiliate, and SEO.
* Direct strategies that lower Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) while increasing Lifetime Value (LTV) through attribution modeling and robust testing.
* Championing a test\-and\-learn culture across offers audiences, and channels to find new avenues for scale.



**4Brand, PR \& Offline Integration**



* Ensure a cohesive narrative across digital ads, website, app, retail environments, and events.
* Lead PR initiatives, media opportunities, and executive thought leadership to build brand authority.
* Manage ATL/BTL activities including print, radio, retail activations, and physical event presence.



**Customer Lifecycle \& Retention**



* Oversee the full customer journey from initial awareness to long\-term retention.
* Guide CRM, email automation, loyalty initiatives, and subscription growth to drive repeat purchase behavior and maximize customer value.



**Team Leadership \& Cross\-Functional Collaboration**



* Lead and mentor the two Senior Marketing Specialists, ensuring KPI accountability and supporting their professional development.
* Work closely with Sales, Operations, and Customer Service to ensure marketing initiatives align with inventory levels, delivery capabilities, and customer experience.



**Agency \& External Partner Management**



* Manage agencies, freelancers, developers, photographers, and media partners.
* Own all external briefs, timelines, budgets, and the final quality of all outsourced output.



**Collaboration with Creative Director**



* Partner with the Creative Director on brand vision and high\-level approvals.
* Take full ownership of execution and delivery so the Creative Director remains in a non\-operational, visionary capacity.


 Requirements
   

  

* Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business Administration, Communications, or a related field. An MBA or relevant postgraduate qualification is an advantage.
* 6\+ years in a senior marketing role, with proven experience in team management and P\&L ownership.
* Ability to think long\-term while maintaining a "startup" agility to execute daily.
* Deep understanding of performance marketing stacks, CRM, and analytics platforms.
* Exceptional brief\-writing and interpersonal skills to manage both internal teams and external vendors.
* E\-commerce experience is essential
* Subscription\-based business model is a strong advantage

data.raw_snippet:

**About The Job**
data.jd_text:
Kricket
   

  

* Emirates Hills


 Head of Operations – F\&B (Multi\-Brand / Multi\-Site)
   

  

 Join us as Head of Operations. Lead multiple F\&B brands, own new site openings, build strong GMs, and turn standards into flawless day\-to\-day execution across the UAE.
   

  

**About The Job**
 Location: UAE
   

  

 Reports to: Regional Director of Operations
   

  

 Department: Operations
   

  

 Industry: Hospitality / Food \& Beverage
   

  

 Employment Type: Full\-time
   

  

**Role Purpose**
 The Head of Operations is responsible for the day\-to\-day operational leadership and execution across multiple F\&B brands and sites. This role ensures that all venues operate in line with brand standards, meet commercial targets, and are fully supported through new site openings, stabilisation, and BAU operations.
   

  

 The role exists to provide operational depth, consistency, and delivery capability, allowing the Regional Director of Operations to focus on regional strategy, senior stakeholders, and long\-term growth.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Operational Execution (Core Focus)**
* Lead the day\-to\-day operational performance across all brands and locations
* Ensure consistent delivery of service standards, guest experience, and brand execution
* Act as the primary operational escalation point for General Managers
* Drive operational discipline, accountability, and performance management


**New Site Openings \& Mobilisation**
* Lead the operational execution of new site openings, from pre\-opening through stabilisation
* Manage operational readiness including staffing, training, SOP implementation, and systems
* Work closely with PMO to support structured handover from project delivery into BAU
* Support soft openings, ramp\-up strategies, and post\-opening performance reviews


**International Brand Execution**
* Support the delivery of international and licensed brand standards at site level
* Ensure GMs are trained, compliant, and audit\-ready
* Act as the operational link between brand guidelines and on\-the\-ground execution
* Escalate brand risks, deviations, or operational challenges to the Regional Director


**People Leadership**
* Directly manage and mentor all General Managers
* Support GM capability development, succession planning, and performance improvement
* Partner with HR on recruitment, onboarding, and training execution
* Build a strong operational leadership culture focused on ownership and results


**Commercial \& Financial Performance**
* Support delivery of site\-level P\&Ls through operational controls
* Drive labour productivity, cost discipline, and margin performance
* Ensure menus, pricing, and promotions are executed as approved
* Identify operational improvements that enhance profitability and efficiency


**Governance \& Standards**
* Ensure strict adherence to group SOPs, controls, and governance frameworks
* Support audits, readiness reviews, and compliance requirements
* Maintain strong food safety, H\&S, and licensing standards across all sites
* Ensure clean reporting and escalation into the Regional Director of Operations


**Required Experience \& Profile**
* 8 \- 12\+ years senior F\&B operations experience
* Proven experience opening multiple F\&B sites
* Experience operating multi\-brand portfolios, including international or licensed brands
* Strong people leadership and execution mindset
* Commercially aware and operationally hands\-on
* Experience working within structured SOP / governance environments
* UAE / GCC experience preferred


**Success Measures**
* Smooth, on\-time site openings and stabilisation
* Consistent operational performance across sites
* Strong GM capability and retention
* Controlled labour and operating costs
* Positive brand audit and guest experience outcomes

data.title: Strategic Executive Assistant to the MD
data.raw_snippet:
Our client is looking for an experienced Strategic Assistant to the Managing Director to be based in Dubai, UAE.
 



  





 As a strategic assistant, you will work directly with the Managing Director of the company. You will collaborate with different teams to make sure strategies/projects are on
data.jd_text:
Our client is looking for an experienced Strategic Assistant to the Managing Director to be based in Dubai, UAE.
 



  





 As a strategic assistant, you will work directly with the Managing Director of the company. You will collaborate with different teams to make sure strategies/projects are on track and help guide the company in the right direction. Additionally, support the MD in decision making and ensure seamless delivery by providing strategic inputs and market intelligence around new challenges and opportunities. Overall, you play a pivotal role in keeping things run efficiently and ensure the focus is on the business goals
 



  





  





**Duties and responsibilities:** 



* Act as a liaison between the Managing Director, Senior leadership and external agencies regarding operations, project updates, proposals, planning and employee well\-being.
* Establish reporting mechanism between different business entities \& MD’s office and ensure



 continued operations across different businesses and geographies.
 


* Build business review metrics/indicators, collect reports, analytics on business performance and periodic review
* Ensure business continuity and sustainability by actively supporting the MD with insights \&



 mechanisms to improve performance and bringing robustness in the business
 


* Perform \& present detailed data analysis on performance, market research, business plan \&



 scorecards and any other business intelligence to the company board
 


* Identify, strategize \& execute the initiatives and special projects as directed by the Managing Director.
* Conduct \& analyse an extensive market study \& provide insight on the trends and opportunities to leverage new services that aligns \& enhances the organization’s strategic goals.
* Collaborate with executives in decision\-making, program management and implementation of various organization\-level initiatives.
* Propose, build, and nurture collaborative partnerships with external stakeholders/agencies



  





  





**Education \& Skills required:** 



* Graduate in Finance/ Engineer in Electrical/Electronics and/or Masters (Major in
* Strategy/Finance) from one of the Premium B Schools (ISB, IIM \- A, IIM \- C or IIM \-B)
* 4 to 5 years of experience preferably in Automobile industry
* Prior work experience in a start\-up firm is preferred
* Strong stakeholder management, interpersonal \& influencing skills and organising skills
* Excellent communicator in written and verbal form.
* Analytical thinking and data\-driven decision\-making capabilities
* Exposure in business analytics and reporting is a plus
* Hands on experience in reporting \& statistical tools is required
* Proficient with MS Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook) and familiarity with project



 management tools

**Role Overvi
data.jd_text:
**Director, Data Center Platform Delivery (Lifecycle \| Process \| Systems)**




 Role Focus: Process, Workflow \& Playbooks
 



 Location: Dubai (preferred, remote can be discussed)
 



 Relocation: Open to global candidates
 



 Seniority: Director \- Senior Director
 



  





**Role Overview**




 A global data center developer is seeking a senior leader to codify and standardize the end‑to‑end data center development and operations lifecycle. This role focuses
 **on turning complex new‑build delivery into a repeatable playbook** 
 \- defining processes, workflows, governance, and systems from early planning through design, construction, commissioning, and steady‑state operations to support scalable growth.
 








**Key Responsibilities**




**1\) Day Zero \- Planning \& Strategy** 



* Standardize processes for site selection, feasibility, and early‑stage decision‑making
* Integrate commercial, regulatory, sustainability, and risk inputs into structured workflows



  





**2\) Day One \- Design \& Construction Enablement** 



* Establish design and construction governance, stage gates, and delivery workflows
* Ensure builds are optimized for operability, modularity, and long‑term scalability



  





**3\) Day Two \- Operating Model \& Readiness** 



* Define operational processes, KPIs, and governance for reliability, maintenance, and capacity
* Enable data‑driven and analytics‑led operations



  





**4\) Lifecycle Playbooks \& Workflow Integration** 



* Map and streamline workflows across planning, procurement, build, commissioning, and handover
* Create repeatable playbooks and operating models for multi‑site deployment



  





**5\) Systems \& Digital Enablement** 



* Define and implement lifecycle systems (project controls, asset/facilities, capacity, commissioning)
* Drive integration between design, build, and operations platforms



  





**6\) Governance \& Scale** 



* Embed risk management, compliance, and change control into workflows
* Drive continuous improvement as the platform expands








**Candidate Profile**



* Strong background in data centers, mission‑critical infrastructure, or large‑scale platforms
* Proven experience building processes, workflows, and operating playbooks
* Exposure across planning, design, build, commissioning, and operations
* Systems‑oriented, structured, and comfortable operating across technical and executive stakeholders
* Successfully expanded new build data center to new region/territory
* **Current/Prior working experience in a data center developer / operator (core requirement)**



  





**Working Model**



* Preferred: Based in Dubai
* Alternatives: Remote or Thailand‑based
* Relocation support available



  





 If you are interested, kindly apply with your updated English CV, detailing your relevant Data Center experience. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
 



  





**Contact: Keith Ng (Lic. No R2093574 / EA No. 16S8194\)**

data.title: Service Account Delivery Manager_Algeria based
data.raw_snippet: G\+D makes the lives of billions of people around the world more secure. We create trust in the digital age with integrated security technologies in three business areas: Digital Security, Financial Platforms and Currency Technology. We have been a reliable partner for our customers for over 170 yea
data.jd_text:
G\+D makes the lives of billions of people around the world more secure. We create trust in the digital age with integrated security technologies in three business areas: Digital Security, Financial Platforms and Currency Technology. We have been a reliable partner for our customers for over 170 years with our innovative solutions for SecurityTech! We are an international technology group and traditional family business with over 14,000 employees in 40 countries. Creating Confidence is our path to success. Trust is the basis of our co\-operation within G\+D.
   

  

 The whole world trusts us when it comes to physical or digital currencies. We increase the security and efficiency of the cash cycle in collaboration with central banks and the entire currency industry. As the market leader in advanced currency management, would you like to join us in shaping the future of payments?
   

  

**Scope and Purpose:**
* The Service Account Delivery Manager is responsible for overseeing and managing all service\-related aspects from the implementation, to the maintenance\-phase of G\+D Solution projects, providing input in regards to service delivery to other project stakeholders in the offer phase, ensuring service readiness, supporting a seamless hand\-over of the customer solution to the service delivery engine to ensure a smooth start the service operation with the site acceptance and overseeing the delivery in the after sales phase.
* This role is critical in defining the service delivery strategy that complements the overall project objectives, managed by the Service Offer Manager and Solution Project Manager. The Service Account Delivery Manager ensures that the services are implemented and meet the highest standards of quality and efficiency, ultimately enhancing customer satisfaction and project success.
* The role requires close collaboration with Service and Solution Sales.


**Roles \& Responsibilities:**
* Offer Phase: Service Delivery Model Definition: Develop and define a comprehensive service delivery model tailored to the project's specific needs and customer requirements. Providing input for service related costing. Collaborate with Service Offer Manager in Service Sales to ensure alignment between the service models, service pricing and the overall project deliverables. 3rd Party Service Supplier and Service Subcontractor Selection: Directing requirements for a supplier selection to ensure timely delivery of services and compliance with contractual terms in cooperation with the regional Subcontractor Manager. Identify and evaluate potential subcontractors who can meet the project's service requirements in alignment with the 3rd Party Service Product Manager and the regional Subcontractor Manager. Support the selection process, owned by Purchasing department, based on criteria such as capability, cost, quality, and reliability.
* Implementation Phase: Backup Service Related Tasks: Interface Management for all service related aspects between onsite teams (Field Service) and remote teams (Care Center, Service Sales, Service Backbone Operation) during the buildup phase. Initiating back\-to\-back agreements with suppliers according to the defined service delivery model for each solution element. Establish delivery processes based on decided legal setup for Order Management, 3rd Party services, Training and adaptation services in cooperation with Service Backbone Operation, leveraging standard wherever possible. Assure optimized service inventories in cooperation with Service Backbone Operation Subcontractor Contract Creation: Providing technical input for drafting and finalizing contracts with selected subcontractors, ensuring all service specifications and quality standards are clearly defined. Work closely with 3rd Party Service Product Manager, regional Subcontractor Manager, Legal and Purchasing department to ensure contracts are comprehensive and protect the interests of the organization. Ramp\-up of Service Employees: Oversee the recruitment and onboarding process for service team members. Ensure that service teams are appropriately staffed to meet project demands and timelines. Trainings for Service Employees: Identify skill gaps and develop training programs to enhance the competencies of service employees (internal and external), leveraging the G\+D Training Curriculum wherever possible. Coordinate and oversee the execution of training sessions, ensuring that all service employees are equipped with the necessary skills and knowledge. Trainings for Customers: Identify training needs for customers. Coordinate and oversee the execution of training sessions, ensuring that the customer is trained for all relevant components. Leverage the G\+D Training Curriculum and Global Training infrastructure wherever possible. Coordination of Installation Related Tasks: Coordinate, plan and manage the installation of the G\+D Solution in close alignment with the Solution Project Manager. Oversee the onsite service teams to ensure that installations are completed on time and meet all quality standards. Site Acceptance Related Tasks: Ensure the successful transition from project to maintenance phase for all service related tasks. Manage the handover of responsibilities from the solution to the service team Reporting and Documentation: Maintain comprehensive documentation of all service processes and adjustments made during implementation phase. Provide input to project reports on service status, challenges, and achievements. Feedback and Improvement: Plan and conduct with reached SAT (Site Acceptance Test) the project closure process including the required lessons\-learned activities.
* Warranty and after warranty phase Service Initialization: Monitoring the closure of open items from project phase to completely hand\-over the solution into a maintenance phase. Assist the Field Service, Support and Backbone Operation teams during Hyper Care phase. Implement continuous improvement initiatives to enhance service quality and customer satisfaction. Performance Management: Coordination of all activities needed to deliver committed service scope with high performance. Customer Management: Interface to the customer for technical discussions. Manage customer escalations and drive timely solution deliveries using the entire backup organization. Single Point of Contact: Overall coordination of delivering committed scope with respective delivery units (Field Service, Support, Training, Repair, Order Management, Adaptation) Contract Renewal: Support Service Sales during contract negotiation and renewal phase Setting Up and providing Service Fulfillment and commercial related Contract reporting based on committed scope Key Performance Indicators \- KPI (generic), individual targets will be agreed yearly Financials (To succeed financially, what should we deliver to our stakeholders?) Target Margin per annum overachieved \[%] \+ \[€] Operational (To satisfy our shareholders and customers, what business processes should we excel at?) Project completion within scope, timeline and quality Field Service and Support Delivery – Global KPIs Customer Satisfaction (To achieve our vision, how should we appear to our customers?) Successful Site Acceptance (SAT) Customer Satisfaction (C\-SAT) Index


**Requirements:**
* Personality / Skills / Professional Qualification \& Experience
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, or a related field
* Certification in Project Management
* Ability to lead and manage teams, to administer relationships as well as influence and manage subcontractors and suppliers effectively
* 10\+ years experienced in Automation systems and projects and technically proficient in Automation systems
* Proven track record in setting up services in complex, multi\-OEM projects \>5 years of experience in managing service delivery teams, including subcontractor selection, and contract management
* Extensive experience in dealing with customers and suppliers, including handling escalations and negotiations
* Ability to provide input on technical requirements and service specifications to meet service concept designs, cooperating with procurement, legal and sales teams
* Demonstrated ability to coordinate activities to deliver high service performance consistently
* Excellent interpersonal and communication skills to interact with customers, team members, and other stakeholders
* Fluency in written and spoken English and French

data.jd_text:
**Who are we?**
**When you think of food delivery in the MENA region, we’d be pretty surprised if talabat didn’t pop into your mind first! Since delivering our first order in Kuwait in 2004, we’ve grown quite a lot over the past 17 years.**
**Today, we deliver hundreds of millions of food orders, grocery items and other products per year, to our customers in nine countries throughout the region with more than 3,000\+ employees! Our food delivery business works with over 27,000 brands and almost 50,000 branches, while our q\-commerce concept, talabat mart, now delivers groceries to customers in Bahrain, Egypt, Jordan, Kuwait, Oman Qatar, and the UAE in 30 minutes or less!**
**Our philosophy is to make sure we do what is right for our ecosystem \- our customers, our partners, our people, our riders, and the communities in which we operate. Our \#techforgood program allows our customers a safe and convenient way to contribute to important causes in their community through donating to local and international charities directly on talabat with a focus on food insecurity in the region. Since its inception in 2020, we have facilitated the donation of well over 1 million meals to those in need, as well as donated over $1\.5 million to charity with the help of our partners and customers. talabat is part of Delivery Hero, the global leader in online food delivery and q\-commerce.**
**As Talabat continues to grow and keep ahead of the curve we have launched our very own end\-end grocery service across the MENA region: tMart**
**Job Description**
 As a
 **Coordinator** 
 supporting the Performance Team, you'll play a pivotal role in managing day\-to\-day activities, coordinating cross\-functional schedules and projects, developing preliminary insights, and supporting the Managing Director in daily tasks.
   

  

**What’s on the menu?**
* Support in Managing Day\-to\-Day Activities:
* Assist in monitoring and improving UAE NFV performance metrics across functions.
* Assist in extracting and manipulating data from various sources, including databases and


 spreadsheets, to support analytical tasks and reporting requirements.
   

  

* Provide preliminary insights and analyses to assist in decision\-making processes.
* Coordination and Support:
* Assist in managing schedules and communications for the Managing Director.
* Handle tasks such as organizing meetings, preparing agendas, and documenting minutes.
* Coordinate cross\-functional projects and initiatives to enhance operational efficiency.
* Performance Improvement:
* Collaborate with the team to monitor performance, identify performance gaps and raise flags as needed.
* Assist in implementing performance improvement plans to enhance overall efficiency.


**Qualifications**
**What are we looking for?**
* Bachelor's Degree in a relevant field
* 2\-3 years of experience in the food/grocery tech industry is highly preferred.
* Proficiency in Google Suite tools such as GDoc, GSheet, GSlides, GForms, etc.
* Strong communication skills in English with the ability to effectively outline and present ideas.
* Experience in stakeholder management, with the ability to manage different types of


 stakeholders effectively.

data.title: Senior Manager- Delivery
data.raw_snippet:
**Who We Are** 




 Welcome to TELUS Digital — where innovation drives impact at a global scale. As an award\-winning digital product consultancy and the digital division of TELUS, one of Canada’s largest telecommunications providers, we design and deliver transformative customer experiences throug
data.jd_text:
**Who We Are** 




 Welcome to TELUS Digital — where innovation drives impact at a global scale. As an award\-winning digital product consultancy and the digital division of TELUS, one of Canada’s largest telecommunications providers, we design and deliver transformative customer experiences through cutting\-edge technology, agile thinking, and a people\-first culture.
 



 With a global team across North America, South America, Central America, Europe, and APAC, we offer end\-to\-end expertise across eight core service areas: Digital Product Consulting, Digital Marketing Services, Data \& AI, Strategy Consulting, Business Operations Modernization, Enterprise Applications, Cloud Engineering, and QA \& Test Engineering.
 



 From mobile apps and websites to voice UI, chatbots, AI, customer service, and in\-store solutions, TELUS Digital enables seamless, trusted, and digitally powered experiences that meet customers wherever they are — all backed by the secure infrastructure and scale of our multi\-billion\-dollar parent company.
 



  





**Location and Flexibility:** 




 The
 **Senior Manager, Delivery** 
 is an integral part of our Dubai team at TELUS Digital. This is an onsite (in\-office) role, located in Dubai, UAE, with travel expected within the GCC.
 



**The Opportunity** 




 As a
 **Senior** 
**Manager, Delivery** 
 , you will be a core member of our Middle East team, accountable for leading end\-to\-end delivery across complex, multidisciplinary engagements. Acting as the primary client\-facing lead, you will own the overall program narrative, ensure alignment between strategy, design, and execution, and drive clear decision\-making with senior stakeholders. You will orchestrate cross\-functional teams across Engineering, Product, Strategy, Research, and Design to deliver high\-quality outcomes, while establishing strong, trusted client partnerships on the ground. This role requires both hands\-on program leadership and the ability to challenge, shape, and guide clients to achieve meaningful impact.
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Act as a core founding team member of TELUS Digital in the Middle East, partnering closely with the Managing Director to build and scale the regional delivery capability, including ways of working, governance, and team culture.
* Own end\-to\-end delivery across engagements, acting as the single point of accountability for client outcomes, quality, timelines, and overall program success.
* Serve as the primary client\-facing lead, building strong, trusted relationships with senior stakeholders and confidently guiding, challenging, and influencing client decisions.
* Drive the overall product vision and program narrative, ensuring a clear and compelling connection between research, strategy, design, and execution.
* Lead multidisciplinary teams across Engineering, Product, Strategy, Research, and Design, ensuring tight alignment, accountability, and seamless collaboration across practices.
* Establish and enforce strong delivery governance, including clear cadences, decision\-making frameworks, escalation paths, and approval mechanisms to maintain momentum and clarity.
* Lean on your deep client services experience to drive effective decision\-making on complex issues of scope, design, architecture, and process.
* Create and continuously evolve the integrated TELUS Digital project plan, aligning stakeholders around priorities and driving focused, convergent execution.
* Identify risks early and proactively course\-correct, ensuring issues are surfaced, understood, and resolved before impacting delivery or client confidence.
* Engage directly with clients on a regular basis, managing day\-to\-day interactions, scope, and overall relationship, with an expectation of meaningful on\-site presence during key phases of delivery.
* Proactively build and deepen relationships across client stakeholders and functions, expanding engagement beyond initial points of contact to strengthen influence, unlock opportunities, and drive long\-term partnership growth.



**Qualifications** 



* 7\+ years of experience in digital delivery, product, program, or consulting roles within a client services environment, leading complex, client\-facing engagements.
* Experience delivering multidisciplinary digital products from discovery through UX design, implementation, and deployment for large enterprise clients.
* Proven ability to manage complex programs involving multiple senior client stakeholders, driving alignment, decisions, and outcomes.
* Strong blend of business, user experience, and software delivery acumen, with the ability to connect strategy, design, and execution.
* Excellent communication skills, with experience structuring and leading workshops, working sessions, and executive\-level discussions.
* Ability to align and mobilize clients and third\-party partners around shared goals and delivery outcomes.
* Strong technical problem\-solving skills, with the ability to diagnose and clearly communicate system, integration, and delivery issues (e.g., APIs, client vs backend, bug management).
* Experience leading and mentoring cross\-functional teams across product, engineering, design, and QA.
* Experience building and expanding relationships across multiple client stakeholders and functions.
* Comfortable operating in fast\-paced, ambiguous environments with a high degree of ownership and accountability.
* Experience or interest in leveraging AI tools within delivery, product, or operational workflows.



**Bonus Points** 



* Experience working in the Middle East for 5\+ years, with a strong understanding of regional business culture, stakeholder dynamics, and operating environments.
* Professional experience within a leading consulting firm or digital agency, delivering large\-scale digital or transformation programs.
* Industry experience in Financial Services and/or Telecommunications.
* Experience leading or operating within Agile environments, including applying or scaling Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban, etc.)
* Relevant certifications (e.g., CSM, CSPO, PMP, SAFe).
* Proficiency in both English and Modern Standard Arabic.



  





**Equal Opportunity Employer** 




*At TELUS Digital, we are proud to be an equal opportunity employer and are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace. All aspects of employment, including the decision to hire and promote, are based on applicants’ qualifications, merits, competence, and performance without regard to any characteristic related to diversity.* 




 We will only use the information you provide to process your application and to produce tracking statistics. Since we do not request personal data deemed sensitive, we ask you to abstain from sharing that information with us.
 



 For more information on how we use your information, see our Privacy Policy.

data.title: Head of Experience Delivery Management
data.raw_snippet:
**Keeta** 
 is an independent brand of Meituan, the world's largest tech\-driven retail company. We are revolutionizing the food delivery space as a dynamic and innovative global platform, leveraging cutting\-edge technology to provide fast, reliable, and seamless food delivery experiences. With the
data.jd_text:
**Keeta** 
 is an independent brand of Meituan, the world's largest tech\-driven retail company. We are revolutionizing the food delivery space as a dynamic and innovative global platform, leveraging cutting\-edge technology to provide fast, reliable, and seamless food delivery experiences. With the mission
 **"We help people eat better, live better,"** 
 Keeta launched in 2023 and has rapidly expanded across key regions, including Hong Kong and now the Middle East and Brazil.
 



  





 Are you passionate about revolutionizing customer service in the takeaway industry? Do you have a knack for designing seamless service journeys that cater to users, merchants, and riders alike? If so, we have an exciting opportunity for you!
 



  





 We’re looking for a strategic, execution\-focused leader to drive the evolution of our global customer service experience. In this role, you’ll own the end\-to\-end service journey—building scalable capabilities, optimizing cost and efficiency, and delivering measurable impact.
 



  





**What You’ll Do** 




**1\. Drive Performance Excellence** 



* Own key outcomes across cost, efficiency, and customer experience.
* Ensure initiatives are implemented with strong follow\-through and deliver visible, measurable, and scalable results.



**2\. Lead Cross\-Functional Execution** 



* Manage complex, cross\-team projects across Product, CE Operations, and Regional teams.
* Align stakeholders on priorities and targets, allocate resources effectively, manage trade\-offs, and proactively mitigate risks to ensure on\-time delivery.
* Act as the owner of execution, ensuring initiatives are delivered with speed and quality.



  





**Why Keeta?** 



* Innovation\-Driven: Keeta uses the advanced technology solutions to disrupt the traditional food delivery landscape, making every order smarter and faster.
* Fast\-Growing \& Dynamic: Keeta is expanding quickly, offering endless opportunities for personal and professional growth.
* Global Impact: Join a company that’s transforming the way people enjoy food, impacting communities around the world.



  





**What We are looking for** 



* Bachelor’s degree or above
* 10\+ years of experience in product operations, strategy, or service operations
* Strong analytical skills with a focus on problem\-solving and root cause analysis (SQL proficiency preferred)
* Proven ability to drive execution in complex, fast\-paced environments
* Strong ownership, resilience, and ability to work under pressure
* **Fluency in both English and Chinese is mandatory**



  





 Ready to make an impact? Apply now \& let’s shape the future together!
 



**Location: Beijing, China** 




 Interested? Apply now
 



 \#Keeta \#FoodDelivery \#HeadOfExperience \#CustomerExperience \#ServiceDelivery \#OperationsLeadership \#Hiring \#Southeast Asian

data.title: Senior Conference Producer - Education Conference & Exhibition
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose:**




 The Senior Conference Producer will be involved in the development and execution of their own events, to ensure each Strategic and Technical agenda meets dmg’s market leading global standards.
 



  





 Working as part of the global dmg Education team, which comprises of co
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose:**




 The Senior Conference Producer will be involved in the development and execution of their own events, to ensure each Strategic and Technical agenda meets dmg’s market leading global standards.
 



  





 Working as part of the global dmg Education team, which comprises of conferences, exhibitions and online products, you will be involved in all aspects of the strategy and execution of your conferences, including support on commercial structure, identifying sponsors, partners, potential hosts, as well as programme creation and development, on\-site management and speaker liaison to ensure the successful smooth running of the conferences, and that exceptional service is delivered to our customers and clients.
 



  





 This role is key to the success of the growth and development of our business, it is heavily focussed on year\-round content and the programme development of our global conferences but also covers other areas of conference management. Working alongside commercial, marketing, PR, data \& digital, operations teams, you will report directly to the VP for Asia, working on a major new business launch that will become an international large\-scale event.
 



  





 This is an exciting and highly varied role that will demand intellectual autonomy, creativity and an ability to think beyond the standard commercial conference ‘conveyor belt’ production cycle. The primary aim will be to help dmg create a long\-term reputation for excellence in the Asian Education market, driving forwards our ambitions to be the most respected provider of Education conferences in the world.
 



  





**Key Accountabilities:**




**Conference Production and Content Strategy**



* Support and manage the strategic conference, from research through to onsite delivery.
* Conduct in\-depth research with senior global public and private sector stakeholders to create compelling programmes at the highest level of commercial viability for both sponsorship and delegate sales.
* Source, qualify and liaise with the Conference Chair/s, Knowledge Partners and Steering Committee members to determine a strategic plan for conference themes, topics, session chairs, and optimum speakers.
* Recruit highly esteemed leading experts, industry representatives, regulators, government representatives, and other relevant speakers to the programme faculty.
* Manage the technical call for papers process, creating topics and managing the execution and delivery of targets with technical committee members and internal teams.
* Work closely with the Marketing team to develop digital content\-marketing campaign ideas.
* Support the VP with content strategy.
* Work with the Event Director to target key industry stakeholders, including Ministers, IOCs, IECs, NOCs, Global Leaders, to positively influence them regarding the value / positioning of our events.
* Assist in the development of effective mailing lists by contacting people both inside and outside the company who have access to the names of potential delegates, and ensure such information is communicated to the marketing team.



**Conference Project Management**



* Establish key relationships with partners and industry stakeholders, develop content strategies in accordance which our partners’ objectives.
* Develop current and prospective customer insights and relationships as part of the overall account management strategy for each event.
* Key account management and customer relationship development, to grow and establish each event as a leading brand.
* Use your industry expertise, industry relationships and Steering Committees to shape our marketing content messaging, brand marketing \& positioning and generate press releases.
* Maintain close links with management to ensure that they are constantly aware of the status of events through weekly reports.



**Product Delivery and Management**



* Conduct telephone and in\-person research with potential attendees within the target market for each event to develop programme agendas.
* Join sales calls and meetings with existing and potential clients to commercially contribute to the growth of the portfolio and find new market opportunities for speakers, moderators, partners.
* Recruit highly esteemed leading experts, industry representatives, regulators, government representatives, and other relevant speakers to your programme faculty.
* Assist in the maintenance of constant, correct and timely liaison with speakers throughout the duration of the event \- onsite conference fulfilment.
* Research and provide strategic information required to market/promote each conference.
* Assist with queries from potential delegates and assist in adopting positive actions to help sell delegate places and sponsorship.
* Work closely with the operations team to ensure delivery of a first\-class onsite conference experience for attendees.



**dmg Asia Portfolio Support**



* Ensure content and associated narrative alignment between Asia’s portfolio and dmg’s flagship events.
* Create a playbook for managing the technical call for papers process across the portfolio, creating topics and managing the execution and delivery of targets with technical committee members and internal teams.
* Prepare speaker liaison playbook to ensure all speaker preparation and requirements are taken care of.
* Work closely with the operations team to ensure delivery of a first\-class onsite conference experience for attendees for all shows.
* Attend conferences to promote Asia’s portfolio, gather market intelligence, as well as network with potential speakers and delegates to establish and maintain relationships pre\- and post\- conference.



**Job Context:**




**Relationships \- Internal:** 




 • Will report to the senior management on day\-to\-day issues.
 



 • Senior management – contact with VP and Event Director to ensure content strategies are fully integrated and all respective staff are aware of processes.
 



 • All internal functions Commercial, Data \& Digital, Marketing \& PR, HR, Finance and Operations.
 



**Relationships \- External:** 




 • Education value chain.
 



 • Event hosts when applicable.
 



 • Senior individuals/C\-suite professionals on Governing Bodies.
 



 • Associations \- Industry and Sector specific.
 



 • Knowledge Partners.
 



 • Steering Committees.
 



 • International government representatives.
 



 • Trade ambassadors.
 



**Qualifications, Experience, \& Skills:**




  





 • Passionate, dedicated, and knowledgeable about developing smart, profitable, and industry\-leading conferences and with a proven and comprehensive experience of applying efficient and effective processes to your own successful conference portfolio.
 



 • You will demonstrate the ability to simultaneously manage a portfolio of international event products.
 



 • You will show how you are able to create leading\-edge marketing and sales campaigns.
 



**Skills and Behavioural Competencies**




 • Minimum 5 \- 7 years conference production experience.
 



 • Excellent networking and information gathering abilities.
 



 • Engaging, professional and diplomatic demeanour.
 



 • Comfortable conducting regular phone calls and meetings with a range of senior industry figures.
 



 • Strong teamwork skills to ensure the efficient running of content team.
 



 • Self\-disciplined and able to work both independently and as part of a team.
 



 • Problem solver with the ability to break down complex concepts, make logical comparisons, and identify underlying patterns and connections.
 



 • Agile learner with the ability to develop in\-depth technical knowledge on diverse topics and an understanding of key commercial drivers underlying your products.
 



 • Resilient, with a strong desire to succeed.
 



 • Experience in the Education industry is a strong asset.
 



 You should be open to international travel, as required by the job role.
 



**dmg events is an equal opportunity employer. If you have not had feedback from us within 14 days, please consider your application as unsuccessful for this round.**

data.title: Interface Stakeholder Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
 WSP in the Middle East is currently hiring for an Interface \& Stakeholder Manager – Aviation Projects to join our team in KSA/ UAE. The Interface \& Stakeholder Manager will be responsible for managing all project interfaces across aviation ‑ sector stakeholders, including gove
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 WSP in the Middle East is currently hiring for an Interface \& Stakeholder Manager – Aviation Projects to join our team in KSA/ UAE. The Interface \& Stakeholder Manager will be responsible for managing all project interfaces across aviation ‑ sector stakeholders, including governmental authorities, airport operators, contractors, consultants, utility providers, and internal technical teams. The role ensures seamless coordination, clear communication, and the timely resolution of interface issues that may affect programme delivery. It also involves developing and implementing structured stakeholder engagement plans to maintain alignment, avoid conflicts, and support smooth project execution. The Manager will provide regular reporting to the Project Director, highlighting interface risks, dependencies, and mitigation strategies critical to the success of the aviation programme.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead and manage all interface activities across aviation stakeholders (government bodies, airport operators, contractors, consultants, utilities, and internal teams).
* Establish and maintain effective communication channels to ensure seamless coordination between all project parties.
* Identify, track, and resolve interface issues that could affect project progress, technical delivery, or schedule performance.
* Develop, implement, and maintain structured Stakeholder Engagement Plans to ensure alignment throughout all project phases.
* Facilitate interface workshops, coordination meetings, and technical discussions with project stakeholders.
* Liaise with regulatory authorities and airport operators to ensure compliance with aviation and infrastructure requirements.
* Prepare regular interface status reports and provide interface ‑ risk updates to the Project Director and leadership team.
* Maintain a comprehensive interface register, ensuring risks, dependencies, and actions are clearly documented and managed.
* Support integration between design, procurement, and construction teams, ensuring all disciplines are aligned.


 Promote a collaborative working environment across multidisciplinary teams
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Project Management, or a relevant field.
* 20\+ years of experience in interface management, stakeholder management, or project coordination within large ‑ scale aviation or major infrastructure projects.
* Experience working with airport authorities, regulatory bodies, or large PMC/consultancy organisations (highly preferred).
* Strong technical understanding of aviation infrastructure, design processes, construction interfaces, and multi ‑ party coordination.
* Proven track record resolving complex interface issues in fast ‑ paced project environments.


 Imagine a better future for you and a better future for us all.
   

  

 Join our close\-knit community of talented individuals who share your passion for making a positive impact. Our global team includes more than 69,000 employees, working together to make a difference in communities both close to home and around the world.
   

  

**With us, you can** 
 . Apply today.

data.title: Account Manager
data.raw_snippet: As a Manager, Global Account Management, you will contribute to Sirva's success by working closely with the Vice President of Account Management and Global Account Management team to develop, maintain and shape client partnerships and enhance the client and customer experience. You will be a trusted
data.jd_text:
As a Manager, Global Account Management, you will contribute to Sirva's success by working closely with the Vice President of Account Management and Global Account Management team to develop, maintain and shape client partnerships and enhance the client and customer experience. You will be a trusted advisor to the client and collaborate with them on identifying best practices within the talent mobility industry. The position works closely with client contact(s) to provide seamless customer service and maximize Sirva's value to the client.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Client Consulting and Issue Resolution (50%)**
* Provide communication link between Sirva and the Client regarding relocation issues, household good issues, service level agreements and projects.
* Acts as a trusted advisor to the client and collaborates with them on identifying best practices within the talent mobility industry.
* Plays a key role in identifying solutions and resolving client issues across the client team and/or in partnership with other operational divisions.
* Exercise solid business judgment while making decisions and addressing transferee/assignee and client issues.


**Collaboration with Global Account Management (20%)**
* Assist with upselling and overall project management, including the management and calculation of client SLA results.
* Provide support, as requested, with client implementations.
* Collate and validate data and content for Client Reviews and Governance meetings.
* Work with the account management team to establish delivery of strategic account plans with understanding and recognition of all global and regional requirements.
* Works collaboratively with the Account management and the client team to understand the client delivery requirements and drive client profitability and revenue growth.


**Internal Consulting (20%)**
* Works with the Customer Experience teams to help educate on client policies and preferences.
* Collaborates with internal teams, management and VP/Director, Global Account Management to ensure client performance metrics are implemented, maintained, measured and achieved.
* Partner with local business development teams to support acquisition of new business
* Oversees VIP moves internally to ensure they are successful for the customer and Sirva.


**Reporting (10%)**
* Collaborates with Analytics team to ensure successful delivery of client reporting.
* Serves as a consultant for all client divisions/departments who need assistance with reporting such as: volume, performance metrics, relocation and assignment costs, budgeting and accrual.
* Keeps clients informed of available client reports and new products and services, and helps to encourage and ensure understanding and increased usage of the available tools and products.
* Works closely with the Digital IT team to help them enable effective client self\-service applications and processes and provides assistance with the implementation of new digital functionality to client contacts.


**Qualifications And Preferred Skills**
* 3\-5 years of equivalent customer relationship management work experience required
* Strong organizational skills
* Strong verbal, written communication and presentation skills (English and Arabic preferred).
* Able to think critically and proactively solve issues
* Strong client relationship Skills
* Excellent critical thinking skills with an understanding of data analytics and interpretation
* Global business experience a plus
* Proficient with productivity and reporting applications e.g. Microsoft Office (Word, PowerPoint, Excel, Teams), etc.
* Interest in growing revenue in client accounts through upselling products and services


**Education/Experience**
* Bachelor’s degree preferred
* Experience in global mobility or similar customer service roles with a focus on client relationships


**Line Management Responsibility**
* NO

data.title: Tax & Legal Services - Connected Tax Compliance & Managed Services - Senior Manager / Director
data.raw_snippet:
**About Us**
 With offices in 152 countries and nearly 328,000 professionals, we are one of the world’s leading professional services networks, helping organisations and individuals create lasting value through Assurance, Tax and Advisory services. For over 40 years, we have contributed to the Middl
data.jd_text:
**About Us**
 With offices in 152 countries and nearly 328,000 professionals, we are one of the world’s leading professional services networks, helping organisations and individuals create lasting value through Assurance, Tax and Advisory services. For over 40 years, we have contributed to the Middle East’s transformation journey, partnering with governments and businesses to deliver sustainable solutions. Today, more than 12,000 of us across Bahrain, Egypt, Iraq, Jordan, Kuwait, Lebanon, Libya, Oman, Palestine, Qatar, Saudi Arabia and the UAE are shaping the region’s future.
   

  

**Line Of Service Overview**
 At PwC, our people in tax services focus on providing advice and guidance to clients on tax planning, compliance, and strategy. These individuals help businesses navigate complex tax regulations and optimise their tax positions.
   

  

**Business Unit Overview**
 In indirect tax at PwC, you will focus value\-added tax (VAT), goods and services tax (GST), sales tax and other indirect taxes. Your work will involve providing advice and guidance to clients on indirect tax planning, compliance, and strategy, helping businesses navigate complex indirect tax regulations and optimise their indirect tax positions.
   

  

**How You’ll Contribute**
* Support the Middle East CTC Leader in executing the regional CTC growth and GTM strategy.
* Lead pipeline growth, targeting, and winning of CTC and tax transformation opportunities.
* Lead client presentations, RfP responses and compose compelling proposals for tax pursuits to drive strategic wins.
* Act as a senior client\-facing advisor, leading end\-to\-end CTC/MS engagements.
* Deliver end\-to\-end CTC/MS and operating model transformation solutions.
* Provide tax technical expertise and leadership across tax compliance and transformation engagements.
* Oversee engagement delivery, quality, and client experience.
* Confidently articulate and present technology\-enabled compliance solutions to clients.
* Business development and Go\-to\-market execution.
* Lead, coach, and develop the core CTC/MS delivery team.


**What You’ll Bring**
* Senior Manager or Director\-level experience in professional services or a complex in\-house tax environment.
* Strong experience in tax transformation, Compliance/advisory, and operating model design.
* Solid tax technical background.
* Proven track record of winning client work, leading RfPs, and presenting to senior stakeholders.
* Proposal writing, RFP responses and pursuits.
* Strong understanding of tax technology, data, and ERP environments.
* Strong client relationship management, communication, and presentation skills.
* Collaborative leadership style with the ability to influence across teams and geographies.
* Commitment to developing people and building high\-performing teams.


**How You’ll Make a Difference**
 At PwC Midde East, we expect all our people to embody the skills and behaviours of The PwC Professional framework, helping us deliver on our strategy while growing and developing as leaders at every level.
   

  

**Why You’ll Love Working at PwC**
 At PwC Middle East, you’ll find more than just a job \- you’ll build a meaningful career, supported by rewards and benefits that help you thrive. We offer competitive pay, comprehensive benefits, and programs that promote well\-being, balance, and personal growth. You’ll have access to continuous learning, digital upskilling, and a collaborative environment that values innovation, mentorship, and diversity. Are you ready to make a difference by applying your unique perspective and talents? You can grow exponentially here. Discover more about
 **Life at PwC Middle East.**
