data.title: Head of  BOS Integrated Services Hub 1
data.raw_snippet:
**About This Opportunity**
 Ericsson is looking for a Head of Integration Services Hub1 within Service Line (SL) Business and Operations Systems (BOS) as a key leadership role part of BOS Delivery Excellence, responsible for leading the service excellence. The role focuses on services business pre\-
data.jd_text:
**About This Opportunity**
 Ericsson is looking for a Head of Integration Services Hub1 within Service Line (SL) Business and Operations Systems (BOS) as a key leadership role part of BOS Delivery Excellence, responsible for leading the service excellence. The role focuses on services business pre\-sales and overlooks integrated delivery models setup including System Integration, Application Development \& Maintenance , and IT Managed Services.
   

  

 This role reports to the Head of SL BOS Delivery Excellence for MEMA and will be part of BOS Delivery Excellence Leadership team.
   

  

 What You Will Do:
   

  

* Lead BOS service excellence, managing team of senior services professionals.
* Accountable for services engagement and pre\-sales including target topline and profitability.
* Responsible for aligning with Solution Area on Services GTM and drive services offering build up , presales and delivery engagements for the EMEA region.
* Secure service delivery readiness through competence planning inline with business and portfolio evolution.
* Senior People Manager of own unit and a senior Leader across matrixed organization extending to solution line professionals in other CU BOS, BOS solution lines and SD/SDU units.
* Adopt, position and expand integrated service delivery offerings; with focus on customer value realization, delivery efficiency, and adapting to different commercial models.
* Champion delivery efficiency initiatives in collaboration with program management, CU BOS SL and SD/SDU.
* Set Individual Performance and Development goals for members with regular check\-ins.
* Responsible for team dimensioning; and Cost Center Responsible to deliver over\-Absorption target and required Utilization/Billability.
* Drive a Knowledge Sharing and Asset building culture across their community.
* Instill a culture of add\-on sales and customer value maximization.


 What You Will Bring:
   

  

* 12\+ years of experience in telecom industry with leadership track record in professional services including system integration, application development \& maintenance, and IT managed services.
* Deep understanding of BOS portfolio including products and services.
* University degree in ICT/Engineering. A graduate degree such as an MBA is a plus.
* Strong People Manager track record leading Senior Team members and leading Leaders.
* Deep Telecom knowledge including understanding of Telecom networks, OSS \& BSS components and familiarity with TmForum (eTOM, SID, TAM)
* Advanced experience with IT Systems and Integration
* OSS and BSS full stack integrations and surrounding ecosystems
* API management \& microservice architecture
* Cloud\-Native \& Platform transformation
* Data analytics, AI/ML applications in service operations
* In depth knowledge of different SDLC methodologies including Agile, Waterfall and DevOps approaches.
* Proven experience with MS IT and ADM related frameworks – ITIL, COBIT \& SAFe
* Demonstrated experience leading cross\-functional highly matrixed and globally distributed teams.
* Recommended certifications (external): ITIL, Lean Six Sigma, PMP
* Recommended certifications (internal): MSCOO, ICT PD JS8 GIAP certification
* Strong consultative, presentation, and communication skills
* Proven track record to deliver results within a time sensitive and high\-pressure environment.
* Highly proficient collaboration skills
* Solid ability to communicate effectively at executive levels.
* In\-depth knowledge of running Organizational and Solution Level Governance.
* Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus.


 Note: There are a total of 4 Head of Integration Services Hub vacancies with the same responsibility and skills requirements.
   

  

 Ericsson South Africa recruits in line with its Employment Equity plan and will therefore give preference to suitably qualified candidates who are members of designated groups. Would you like to take a tour to “Life at Ericsson MEA”, visit short video Click Here
   

  

**Why join Ericsson?**
 At Ericsson, you´ll have an outstanding opportunity. The chance to use your skills and imagination to push the boundaries of what´s possible. To build solutions never seen before to some of the world’s toughest problems. You´ll be challenged, but you won’t be alone. You´ll be joining a team of diverse innovators, all driven to go beyond the status quo to craft what comes next.
   

  

**What happens once you apply?**

data.jd_text:
Job description:
   

  


**About the Company:** 




 At Almosafer Travel \& Tourism Co, we’re not just part of the travel industry, we’re helping shape its future.
   

 As Saudi Arabia’s leading travel company, we serve millions across every segment of the travel and tourism ecosystem.
   

 Rooted in our name “Almosafer,” meaning the traveler, we strive to make every journey seamless, personal, and purposeful. Our diverse platforms and services are built to deliver enriching experiences that reflect the spirit of Saudi Arabia and the wider region.
   

 We’re united by a bold vision:
   

 To be the undisputed leader in travel services, fostering lasting connections and setting new benchmarks for excellence in the Kingdom and beyond.
   

 Our team across Saudi Arabia and the wider region blends deep cultural understanding with forward\-thinking innovation, shaping a new standard for travel in the region. 
 



**About the Role:** 




 The Product Manager is responsible for gathering and challenging business requirements and translating them into solutions with the guidance of our Head of Salesforce Product. The Product Manager has experience implementing Salesforce.com functionality and acts as a knowledgeable liaison between business stakeholders and developers.
 



 The role requires close collaboration with business stakeholders, implementation teams, integration/development teams, and quality assurance teams to ensure successful delivery and continuous enhancement of the Salesforce ecosystem.
 



**Responsibilities:** 



* Act as a consultant to the business with advanced knowledge of Service Cloud, Sales Cloud, and Salesforce Community
* Translate business requirements into user stories and well\-architected solutions that leverage Salesforce platforms and products
* Provide detailed level\-of\-effort estimates and articulate benefits and risks of proposed solutions
* Collaborate with and manage Salesforce Developers to define appropriate technical strategies and designs
* Stay up to date with new Salesforce products, releases, and technical capabilities
* Work closely with cross\-product teams to understand the impact of broader initiatives on Salesforce
* Lead daily stand\-ups and manage backlog grooming processes
* Coordinate with business and technical teams to ensure smooth project and enhancement delivery



**Profile Requirements:** 



* B.S. Degree in Computing or a related field with at least 5 years of overall professional experience, including a minimum of 3 years in Product Management and 2 years as a Salesforce Developer and/or Software Engineer
* Salesforce Certified Platform Administrator and Salesforce Certified Platform App Builder (Salesforce Service Cloud Consultant certification is desirable)
* Domain experience in IT / CRM with strong knowledge of Salesforce Service Cloud, Sales Cloud, and Experience Cloud environments
* Hands\-on experience with declarative functionality, Flow, Triggers, APEX, Lightning Web Components (LWC), Aura Components, migration tools, and SOQL
* Experience working in Agile environments using Jira and Confluence, including large call center implementations
* Travel and tourism industry experience is desirable
* Proficiency in Arabic and English with the ability to manage multiple initiatives in a fast\-paced environment



**Being You @ Almosafer:** 




 At Almosafer, our teams work with purpose, clarity, and a shared commitment to doing things the right way. Whether you're building platforms, supporting travelers, or shaping strategy, your work connects to something bigger. Across functions and locations, we value accountability, trust, and collaboration \- and we create the structure and space for you to contribute meaningfully from day one.
 



 Here, you will find:
 



 A purpose\-led workplace where your ideas can create real impact
   

 Ongoing learning and development to help you grow with intention
   

 Recognition that celebrates your wins, both big and small
   

 A community built on trust, curiosity, and shared momentum
 



 No matter where your journey started, at Almosafer, you will find space to grow, connect, and contribute meaningfully.

**About The Company**

 , the company is expanding its footprint across the

 region. It is focused on building strategic partnerships, delivering high\-quality solutions, and driving sustainable growth through innovation and customer\-centric engagement.
   

  

 Position Overview
   

  

 The
 **Business Development Manager (BDM)**

 **MEA market** 
 , reporting to the
 **CEO / BU Head** 
 depending on seniority. The role exists to build the market from scratch, develop strategic accounts and ecosystem partners, and drive revenue through geographical expansion and acquisition of new business opportunities. This is a leadership position requiring both technical and commercial acumen to establish and grow regional operations.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Own and execute plans to achieve order booking and revenue goals.

 Why Consider this Opportunity?

data.title: Senior Sales Engineer
data.raw_snippet: A leading multinational company is seeking to recruit a dynamic and results\-driven Field Sales professional to join their team in the UAE. This is a critical role for someone with a hunter sales profile and a strong network in the UAE’s oil \& gas, marine, and industrial markets. The role offers an
data.jd_text:
A leading multinational company is seeking to recruit a dynamic and results\-driven Field Sales professional to join their team in the UAE. This is a critical role for someone with a hunter sales profile and a strong network in the UAE’s oil \& gas, marine, and industrial markets. The role offers an exciting opportunity to drive business growth and strengthen regional presence as part of a global team.
 



  





**Senior Sales Engineer** 




**(Based in Dubai, United Arab Emirates)** 




  





**Your Role:** 
 Reporting to the Business Head in UAE, you will be responsible for identifying new business opportunities, developing key accounts, and driving revenue growth in the UAE. You will represent high\-quality technical solutions aimed at various industrial sectors – one of them being Oil and Gas, working closely with both customers and internal teams to ensure successful delivery and client satisfaction. This is an individual contributor role with no team to manage — success will come from disciplined prospecting, strong field activity, product demonstrations, and converting opportunities into approvals and orders.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Build pipeline from scratch: identify prospects, open new accounts, drive product approvals and close orders personally.
* Develop opportunities with companies supporting major Oil \&Gas operators, EPCs and service providers, as well as marine yards and industrial service workshops.
* Identify and pursue project opportunities linked to applications such as high\-pressure systems, hose assemblies/kits, safety reels, industrial safety solutions and related engineered products.
* Spend most working days in the field, customer visits to workshops, yards, job sites and service companies.
* Carry samples/demo kits as required; conduct product demonstrations and engage directly with technicians and end users.
* Operate with structured territory planning and aim for 4–5 quality customer/prospect meetings per day.
* Provide technical consultation and solution selling support to customers.
* Run technical presentations/training sessions to build application understanding and trust.
* Coordinate closely with internal teams to ensure responsive follow\-up, quotations, documentation and customer satisfaction.
* Maintain full CRM adoption for lead management, pipeline tracking, forecasting and account mapping.
* Track competitor activity and market trends to strengthen positioning and prioritisation.



  





**Your Profile:** 



* **Engineering qualification (Diploma/Bachelor’s)**
* **Minimum 3 years of technical sales experience in UAE market.**
* **New client development experience ideally in industrial products/solutions sold into Oil and Gas, Marine, Data Centers.**
* **Strong evidence of “hunter” performance: opening new accounts, developing project\-based business and delivering growth.**
* **Good working knowledge of hydraulics / pneumatics, hoses and connecting components (or closely related industrial product categories).**
* Comfortable with a lean setup and high ownership \- execution\-first, field\-oriented, not title\-driven.
* Strong communication and presentation skills across both site\-level and decision\-maker audiences.
* Good communication skills in English.
* Willing to travel within UAE frequently.
* Entrepreneurial mindset, strong communication, and negotiation skills.



  





**Our Offer:** 



* Join a globally established organization with ambitious growth plans in the region.
* Be part of a collaborative and agile work environment.
* Competitive compensation package.



  





 If you are a motivated and a strategic sales professional ready for a fresh challenge, we invite you to apply with your CV. All applications will be treated in strict confidence.
 



**Comaea Consulting** 




**www.comaeaconsulting.com**

data.title: Manager- Customer Service
data.raw_snippet:
**Role Summary**
 The Customer Service Manager (CSM) is responsible for the day\-to\-day performance and stability of customer service operations in a fast\-paced fintech environment. This role requires a hands\-on, data\-driven leader with experience managing high\-volume call centre and digital su
data.jd_text:
**Role Summary**
 The Customer Service Manager (CSM) is responsible for the day\-to\-day performance and stability of customer service operations in a fast\-paced fintech environment. This role requires a hands\-on, data\-driven leader with experience managing high\-volume call centre and digital support operations, capable of translating operational data into actionable insights. The CSM will drive service performance through queue management, capacity planning, root cause analysis (RCA), and Voice of Customer (VoC) insights, while working closely with internal teams and outsourced partners to deliver consistent, compliant, and high\-quality customer outcomes.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Strategy \& Insights (CSM Level)**
* Analyse customer service performance metrics including SLA, FCR, CSAT, NPS, AHT, backlog, abandonment, and repeat contacts
* Identify trends and drivers behind performance movements and translate them into clear operational actions
* Lead root cause analysis (RCA) for key issue types (e.g. remittance status checks, escalations, repeat contacts)
* Own and contribute to Voice of Customer (VoC) insights, highlighting recurring customer pain points and improvement opportunities
* Provide structured, insight\-led updates to the Head of Customer Service and senior stakeholders.


**Operational Service Delivery**
* Manage day\-to\-day customer service operations across voice, tickets, email, and in\-app support channels
* Oversee high\-volume call centre operations, ensuring queue health, responsiveness, and service stability
* Monitor ticket backlogs, ageing, and abandonment rates, taking corrective action where required
* Manage escalations, including coordination with internal teams and third\-party partners
* Lead and participate in daily stand\-ups to track performance, risks, and priorities


**Capacity Planning \& Workforce Management**
* Track service demand versus available capacity by channel and product
* Identify capacity gaps and support short\-term and medium\-term workforce planning
* Monitor agent productivity, utilisation, and adherence
* Support SLA and KPI discussions with outsourced partners using data\-backed insights


**CRM \& Process Discipline**
* Ensure consistent and accurate use of the CRM, including: a) Ticket logging and categorisation b) Status updates and escalation handling c) Routing and workflow adherence
* Maintain strong data hygiene to support reliable reporting and analysis
* Identify process inefficiencies or system gaps based on hands\-on operational experience


**People Leadership \& Team Enablement**
* Provide hands\-on coaching and real\-time guidance to agents and team leads
* Reinforce service quality standards, communication best practices, and escalation protocols
* Act as a first point of support for complex or sensitive customer cases
* Foster a culture of accountability, continuous improvement, and customer focus


**Requirements**
* Proven experience managing high\-volume call centre and digital support operations, ideally within fintech, banking, or financial services
* Strong data and analytical skills, with the ability to interpret performance metrics and drive actions
* Hands\-on experience with CRM systems (ticketing, routing, reporting)
* Experience leading RCA and VoC analysis to drive service and process improvements.
* Strong stakeholder management skills, including collaboration with Product, Tech, Risk, and outsourced partners.
* Ability to operate effectively in a fast\-paced, regulated environment Desirable.
* Experience working with outsourced BPO partners.
* Exposure to fintech products such as payments, wallets, lending, or merchant services.
* Understanding of regulatory and compliance considerations in customer service operations. Success Measures
* Improved SLA, FCR, CSAT, and abandonment performance
* Reduced backlog and ageing tickets.
* Clear, actionable RCA and VoC insights influencing operational improvements.
* Stable and predictable day\-to\-day service delivery.
* Improved agent productivity and consistency

data.title: Relationship Manager - Wealth Management (UAE National)
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose** 



* To support the Bank’s business strategy by acquiring and managing high\-net\-worth (HNW) clients. The role requires a UAE National Relationship Manager with a strong background in wealth management, capable of delivering tailored financial solutions, enhancing client relationsh
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose** 



* To support the Bank’s business strategy by acquiring and managing high\-net\-worth (HNW) clients. The role requires a UAE National Relationship Manager with a strong background in wealth management, capable of delivering tailored financial solutions, enhancing client relationships, and contributing to the growth of the Bank’s HNW client base.
* The role is required to acquire/ transfer HNW clients’ portfolios to Emirates Investment Bank to generate fee income and Assets Under Management (AUM).
* The role must work closely with team leaders, Head of Business Development and Investment Advisors to ensure client product suitability is maintained as per the internal policies.



  





**Key Accountabilities** 




**Client Acquisition and Revenue:** 



* To source new qualified clients for Wealth Management business based on the business plan submitted at the time of on\-boarding.
* To ensure generation of net fee income through the sale of Investment products and to generate the required Assets under Management (AUM).
* To maintain regular contact with the client including regular face\-to\-face meetings and maintain call reports of all client activities.
* To profile the clients’ risk and return aspirations and work with Investment Advisors to maintain client risk profile suitability at all times.
* To increase assets under management of existing clients and develop the relationship.
* To provide and maintain, on an ongoing basis, a monthly report, figures, forecasting and any other records which may be required by the Team Leader to keep up\-to\-date records of sales \& performance.
* To do account planning with Team Leader and Head of Distribution and Investment Advisors to understand the needs of the client and provide appropriate financial solutions to the client.
* To ensure consistent service delivery is maintained at all touch points for clients.
* To continuously provide feedback on competitive activities to the Product and Business team to track market developments.
* To attend regular product trainings and to be updated with the financial market developments.
* To safeguard the Bank’s reputation by ensuring ethical and professional behavior is maintained at all times.
* To maintain superior client service levels by pro\-actively meeting the clients on regular basis and pre\-empting any possible client complaints and concerns.



  





**Client Portfolio Management:** 



* To maintain and enhance new and existing relationships with key and prospective clients to ensure business continuity and growth.
* To provide regular updates to the Head of Business Development/ Wealth Management on performance of the portfolio accounts and on key market updates which may impact client attrition.
* To analyse the client’s financial standing to assess the credit risk for the client and ensure that the credit quality of the portfolio is not compromised.
* To recommend/reject or approve credit facilities, within prescribed limits, after a comprehensive analysis of the client’s net worth and proposed financial standing.
* To ensure provision of high quality and timely service to clients.



**Internal Collaboration:** 



* To monitor service level agreements and manage the coordination with other departments to meet client service expectations.
* To engage with key stakeholders including on\-boarding team, credit, operations, technology, and treasury to deliver a timely and effective level of client experience.



**Regulatory and Compliance:** 



* To ensure that the client being on\-boarded is of good reputation and financial standing and will maintain proper financial and KYC documentation at all times.
* To ensure customer documentation is complete and in line with the Bank’s requirements.
* To help service coordinators in resolving documentation and other client\-related discrepancies.
* To adhere to a robust control framework, ensuring communications with clients meet internal control standards and external regulatory requirements.
* To ensure clients’ KYC and risk profile are reviewed regularly as per compliance policy, and is updated with any new changes in clients’ financial status.
* To ensure risk assessment of the client portfolio is maintained by personally reviewing all proposals, identifying, and assessing all risk inherent in credit exposures.
* To ensure all compliance/ credit and AML queries are answered within 48 hours.
* To ensure all internal and external trainings are attended and CPD hours are completed.



  





**Qualification \& Experience** 



* Overall, 10\-15years of experience in Banking and minimum 5\-10 years of experience in Wealth Management/ Private Banking/ Asset Management.
* Proficient in MS Office.
* CISI qualification

data.location: Sharjah, Sharjah Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
**Job Purpose**
 The GCS Head of Foundation Stage leads the strategic development, delivery, and continuous improvement of Early Years provision (FS1 and FS2\) within a British curriculum framework. The role ensures high\-quality teaching, learning, and assessment in line with th
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
**Job Purpose**
 The GCS Head of Foundation Stage leads the strategic development, delivery, and continuous improvement of Early Years provision (FS1 and FS2\) within a British curriculum framework. The role ensures high\-quality teaching, learning, and assessment in line with the Early Years Foundation Stage Curriculum (EYFS) and UAE regulatory expectations, fostering a safe, nurturing, and stimulating environment where all children thrive.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Leadership and Management**
* Lead and manage the Foundation Stage team, promoting a culture of high expectations, collaboration, and continuous improvement.
* Develop and implement the EYFS curriculum and strategic plan aligned with whole\-school priorities.
* Line manage FS teachers and support staff, including performance management, coaching, and professional development.
* Contribute to whole\-school leadership as a member of the GCS Primary Leadership Team.
* Ensure compliance with UAE regulatory requirements (SPEA/MOE) and safeguarding standards.


**Teaching and Learning**
* Ensure high\-quality, play\-based and inquiry\-led teaching across FS1 and FS2 in line with EYFS principles.
* Monitor planning, teaching, and assessment to ensure consistency, progression, and challenge for all learners.
* Champion best practice in early years pedagogy, including continuous provision, child\-initiated learning, and effective adult interactions.
* Support staff in meeting the needs of all learners, including EAL, G and T and students of determination.


**Curriculum and Assessment**
* Oversee the planning, implementation, and review of a broad, balanced, and engaging EYFS curriculum.
* Ensure robust baseline, formative, and summative assessment systems, including accurate tracking and moderation.
* Analyse data to inform teaching, intervention, and strategic planning.
* Ensure smooth transition processes into and out of the Foundation Stage.


**Safeguarding and Wellbeing**
* Promote and maintain the highest standards of safeguarding and child protection.
* Ensure a safe, inclusive, and nurturing learning environment that supports children’s wellbeing and development.
* Work closely with the GCS Designated Safeguarding Lead and inclusion team to support vulnerable students.


**Parental Engagement**
* Develop strong partnerships with GCS families, ensuring clear communication about children’s progress and wellbeing.
* Lead parent workshops, meetings, and transition events.
* Address parental queries and concerns in a professional and timely manner.


**Operational Management**
* Oversee day\-to\-day organisation of the Foundation Stage, including timetabling, staffing, and resource allocation.
* Ensure learning environments (indoor and outdoor) are stimulating, well\-resourced, and aligned with EYFS best practice.
* Manage budgets and resources effectively.


**Person Specification**
**Qualifications And Experience**
* Bachelor’s degree in Education or related field; EYFS specialism preferred
* Qualified Teacher Status (QTS) or equivalent
* Minimum 5 years’ teaching experience, including Early Years
* Proven leadership experience within EYFS or Primary settings
* Experience in a British curriculum international school (desirable)


**Personal Attributes**
* Passion for early years education
* Resilient, adaptable, and solution\-focused
* Collaborative and culturally aware
* High level of professionalism and integrity


 This role offers an exciting opportunity to lead and shape outstanding Early Years provision within a dynamic international school environment in a leading world class educational provider GEMS.
   

  

**Skills**
**Skills and Competencies**
* Strong knowledge of EYFS framework and early childhood development
* Ability to lead, motivate, and develop a high\-performing team
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
* Data\-informed approach to school improvement
* Commitment to safeguarding and student wellbeing


**GEMS Education is committed to safeguarding and promoting the welfare of all of its students and staff. A UK\-enhanced DBS or equivalent police check is a pre\-requisite for all appointments.**
 Education
   

  

 Foundation Stage

data.title: Head of AI & Automation
data.raw_snippet:
**Competitive Salary** 




  





 Charterhouse is currently working with a leading global private capital investor that is undergoing a major step\-change in its use of AI and automation. With offices across the UK, USA, UAE and other global hubs, the firm runs a high performance, investment led
data.jd_text:
**Competitive Salary** 




  





 Charterhouse is currently working with a leading global private capital investor that is undergoing a major step\-change in its use of AI and automation. With offices across the UK, USA, UAE and other global hubs, the firm runs a high performance, investment led environment and is now ready to bring its AI capability fully in house.
 



 As part of this transformation, we are exclusively supporting the appointment of a Head of AI \& Automation. This will be the firm’s first dedicated AI hire (Individual Contributor) and a pivotal role in shaping how the organisation will operate in the years ahead.
 



  





 The Head of AI \& Automation is a practical, high‑impact role that will take charge of the firm’s AI, automation and data efforts. The focus isn’t on building complex machine‑learning systems from scratch, but on choosing the right tools, setting them up properly and making sure they’re used effectively across the business. The four points of focus for this individual will be AI Implementation \& tooling, training, Adoption \& Change Management, Workflow Automation \& Integration \& Governance \& Vendor Management.
 



  





 The Head of AI \& Automation will step into a setup that already has a clear technical foundation, working prototypes and a prioritised roadmap created with an external consultancy. The role is to turn these into real, everyday solutions which includes driving delivery, training teams, managing vendors and helping the wider organisation adopt new ways of working.
 



 The position will be reporting directly to the CEO/COO and working closely with IT, investment teams, portfolio operations and external partners, this position plays a central role in how the firm evolves its operations.
 



  





 Our client is seeking a commercially minded AI practitioner with following qualifications:
 


* Deep fluency across modern AI tools, LLMs, RAG/search, and automation platforms.
* Experience leading AI adoption and change management in complex environments (preferably PE, financial services or professional services).
* Strong understanding of cloud environments (Azure preferred), data architecture and secure enterprise tooling.
* Proven ability to translate business needs into practical, high value AI workflows.
* Excellent communication skills with the ability to coach senior stakeholders and high performing teams.
* Strong judgment around governance, risk, confidentiality and responsible AI deployment.
* A hands\-on, high\-output working style suited to a fast\-paced global organisation.
* Excellent communication skills in English is essential.

data.title: Regional Head of Operations - Real Assets ME
data.raw_snippet:
The Apex Group was established in Bermuda in 2003 and is now one of the world’s largest fund administration and middle office solutions providers.
   

  

 Our business is unique in its ability to reach globally, service locally and provide cross\-jurisdictional services. With our clients at the he
data.jd_text:
The Apex Group was established in Bermuda in 2003 and is now one of the world’s largest fund administration and middle office solutions providers.
   

  

 Our business is unique in its ability to reach globally, service locally and provide cross\-jurisdictional services. With our clients at the heart of everything we do, our hard\-working team has successfully delivered on an unprecedented growth and transformation journey, and we are now represented by over circa 13,000 employees across 112 offices worldwide.Your career with us should reflect your energy and passion.
   

  

 That’s why, at Apex Group, we will do more than simply ‘empower’ you. We will work to supercharge your unique skills and experience.
   

  

 Take the lead and we’ll give you the support you need to be at the top of your game. And we offer you the freedom to be a positive disrupter and turn big ideas into bold, industry\-changing realities.
   

  

 For our business, for clients, and for you
   

  

**REGIONAL HEAD OF OPERATIONS – CLOSE ENDED (MIDDLE EAST)**
**Location: UAE**
**About Apex:**
 The Apex Group is a global financial services provider with over 13,000 employees across 85 offices globally. We look to recruit bright, articulate, and numerate employees who are not afraid of a challenge and are prepared to work hard and love what they do.
   

  

 Every employee plays a part in making Apex who we are today and the more we grow, the more important that becomes. Whatever your career path or specialism, Apex provides a global platform to allow you to thrive.
   

  

**The role:**
 Apex Group has created a regionalised operational organisation structure, divided into sub\-product segments, that enables Apex to sustain service delivery levels of the highest standards and maximize productivity and efficiencies.
   

  

 In this position you will be responsible for the end\-to\-end operational performance of the closed\-ended funds business in the different countries within the Middle East region, reporting to the Regional head of Fund Solutions – MEAIM.
   

  

 You should have extensive experience in the administration of close\-ended funds. You should have a proven track record of demonstrating your knowledge of fund accounting and a proven track record in leading multi\-jurisdictional operational platforms.. The role requires a strong combination of operational leadership, client delivery excellence, commercial awareness and transformation capability.
   

  

**Technical Tasks:**
* Oversee and lead the end\-to\-end delivery of the fund accounting service for close\-ended funds, ensuring accuracy and compliance with fund governing documents and regulatory guidance.
* Provide leadership on complex client and operational matters requiring senior judgment.
* Ensure full adherence to the prevailing control environment.
* Be a leading participant in the continuous development of our operating processes and procedures.
* Be an escalation point for technical queries from all stakeholders in your region.
* Oversee the timely completion of all audits.
* Ensure local teams’ adherence to regulatory compliance and underlying reporting.


**Tasks/Responsibilities:**
* Translate strategy into an operational plan for delivery of service and provide guidance to ensure consistent organisational leadership and day\-to\-day business running.
* Ensure effective implementation of the operating model with ownership for both onshore and offshore components, work closely with other regional functional leads across operations and wider CRM and Product teams.
* Implement agreed best practices while striving for continuous improvement.
* Develop and foster client relationships and ensure we exceed their expectations and are their provider of choice.
* Team collaboration across multiple jurisdictions globally including global operations centres and ensure that client deliverables are being met.
* Monitoring of actual versus target hours per fund/client and action as required. Ensure there is a continuous drive to improve our efficiency.
* Contribute to the achievement of regional financial and operational performance targets.
* Ensure effective \& timely resolutions to any errors identified.
* KPI’s to be consistently above the specified target for each team in your region (accuracy, timeliness, and delivery)
* Team capacity planning and full awareness of incoming pipeline, including ownership of hire requests.
* People management with a focus on development, motivation, and succession planning/talent management.
* Identify training needs within your teams in the region and interact with our training department.
* Manage employee performance and salary review process.
* Partner with the relevant Country Head, HR lead and senior leadership team to implement effective strategies for employee engagement and retention.
* Ensure adherence to all internal and external audit standards.
* Ensure stakeholder awareness, engagement, and support through effective and timely communication.
* Actively support Groups strategy, plans, and values, contributing to the achievement of a high\-performance culture.
* Demonstrate visible leadership and promote collaboration and accountability across the multi\-jurisdictional teams.
* Develop, maintain and role model a culture that is open to change and innovation, and supports collaboration, respect, and accountability.
* Maintain knowledge of industry trends.


**Skills Required:**
* Bachelor or Master level degree.
* Strong accountancy knowledge, a professional designation such as CA, CPAA, or ACCA etc., would be an asset.
* Solid experience working with private markets / closed\-ended fund structures across multiple jurisdictions.
* Extensive practical experience, 15\+ years of fund accounting work experience.
* Experience managing a large team / managing regional or multi\-location teams.
* Extensive experience working with external clients and an ability to inspire confidence.
* Excellent communication skills and proficiency in English (both verbal and written).
* Motivated, bright, and diligent individual who is driven to meet deadlines \& targets.
* Attention to detail and ability to work on multiple projects.
* A team player who is genuinely motivated by improving our service and teams.
* An ability to think critically and objectively while having strong organizational and stakeholder management skills.
* Ability to resolve complex issues in a timely manner.
* Advanced level MS Excel, proficient with MS Word, MS PowerPoint.
* A detailed understanding of the various fund types covered by this role (Private Equity, Real Estate, Credit \& Venture Capital).


**What you will get in return:**
* A unique opportunity to be part of an expanding large global business and to lead teams across different locations.
* A friendly, co\-operative, and supportive environment.
* Exposure to many different fund types and a wide variety of clients.

data.raw_snippet:
**Position Overview**
**Details of the role and how it fits into the team**
 Institutional Cash and Trade (ICT) is part of Deutsche Bank’s Corporate Bank and a leading provider in payments (\#1 EUR clearer) and trade finance solutions for Financial Institutions across the globe. ICT’s product offeri
data.jd_text:
**Position Overview**
**Details of the role and how it fits into the team**
 Institutional Cash and Trade (ICT) is part of Deutsche Bank’s Corporate Bank and a leading provider in payments (\#1 EUR clearer) and trade finance solutions for Financial Institutions across the globe. ICT’s product offering includes cross border payments, FX solutions, liquidity management and trade finance \& lending. Our international team is based in \>25 countries and covers clients across :140 markets. We set industry trends by being a thought leader and acting as the clients’ Global Hausbank advisor and solution provider.
   

  

 To expand our client coverage beyond top tier commercial banks and central banks across the globe, we are looking for a Client Sales Manager Fintech to join our organization effective immediately.
   

  

**What we will offer you:**
 A healthy, engaged and well\-supported workforce is better equipped to do their best work and, more importantly, enjoy their lives inside and outside the workplace. That’s why we are committed to providing an environment with your development and wellbeing at its center.
   

  

**You can expect:**
* Life Insurance
* Accidental Death Insurance
* Permanent Partial Disability Insurance
* Private Medical Insurance for you, your spouse and dependent children
* Flexible working arrangements
* 30 days of annual paid leave, plus public holiday \& Flexible Working Arrangement
* DB contributions to DIFC Employee Workplace Savings (DEWS)


**Your key responsibilities:**
* You are responsible for driving the MENA FinTech sales strategy to meet ambitious revenue objectives through new client acquisition including targeted sales and marketing campaigns
* You build comprehensive and lasting client relationships with MENA FinTech clients and prospects to win their cross\-border payments business and drive further cross\-sell
* You collaborate effectively with Product Management, Technology and Corporate Cash to drive the development of targeted client solutions based on client demand and market feedback
* You represent ICT at industry forums and client seminars as a subject matter expert for FinTechs and cross\-border payment solutions
* You manage effectively KYC/AML risk for your respective FinTech portfolio to ensure full compliance with laws and regulations as well as internal risk appetite, polices \& procedures
* You report directly to the Head of Fintech Sales for Cash \& Trade Finance and are directly responsible for sales / P\&L


**Your skills and experience:**
* Degree from an internationally renowned university, combining technical engineering education with business\- or strategic management qualification.
* Proven ability to bridge client objectives, regulatory requirements and core technology delivery. Prior hands\-on experience in technology or digital delivery roles (e.g. engineering, solutions design, system integration) strongly preferred.
* Ability to translate regulatory expectations into operating models, technology controls, dashboards, and reporting mechanisms, and to engage confidently with internal and external regulatory stakeholders.
* Strong expertise in cross border payments and liquidity management solutions. Formal training or certification in data analytics, AI for business, agile product management or service design.
* Proven experience operating in regulated financial services environment, including AML, KYC, sanctions screening or financial crime framework.
* A team player and highly motivated leadership personality who wants to succeed and drive the business forward
* Fluent in English, other languages a plus


**How we’ll support you:**
* Flexible working to assist you balance your personal priorities
* Coaching and support from experts in your team
* A culture of continuous learning to aid progression
* A range of flexible benefits that you can tailor to suit your needs
* Training and development to help you excel in your career


**About us and our teams:**
 Deutsche Bank is the leading German bank with strong European roots and a global network. click here to see what we do.
   

  

**Deutsche Bank \& Diversity**
 Our values define the working environment we strive to create – diverse, supportive and welcoming of different views. We embrace a culture reflecting a variety of perspectives, insights and backgrounds to drive innovation. We build talented and diverse teams to drive business results and encourage our people to develop to their full potential. Talk to us about flexible work arrangements and other initiatives we offer.
   

  

 We promote good working relationships and encourage high standards of conduct and work performance. We welcome applications from talented people from all cultures, countries, races, genders, disabilities, beliefs and generations and are committed to providing a working environment free from harassment, discrimination and retaliation.

data.raw_snippet:
**About Yassir**
 Yassir is the leading super app in the Maghreb region, transforming how daily services are delivered. Operating across 45\+ cities in Africa and beyond, Yassir offers ride\-hailing, last\-mile delivery, and is rapidly expanding its financial services ecosystem to enable users to pa
data.jd_text:
**About Yassir**
 Yassir is the leading super app in the Maghreb region, transforming how daily services are delivered. Operating across 45\+ cities in Africa and beyond, Yassir offers ride\-hailing, last\-mile delivery, and is rapidly expanding its financial services ecosystem to enable users to pay, save, and borrow digitally.
   

  

 With a global, distributed tech team and a fast\-scaling product organization, Yassir is building a multi\-vertical platform serving millions of users across emerging markets.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 We are looking for a
 **Head of Product** 
 to lead product strategy and execution across one or more key verticals.
   

  

 This role will be responsible for defining the product vision, leading a team of product managers, and driving end\-to\-end product delivery at scale. The ideal candidate combines strong product thinking, business acumen, and leadership experience in fast\-paced, high\-growth environments.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
****Product Strategy \& Vision****
* Define and drive the product vision aligned with Yassir’s overall business strategy
* Own the product roadmap across multiple product lines or value streams
* Identify opportunities for growth, monetization, and market expansion


****Leadership \& Team Management****
* Lead, mentor, and scale a team of Product Managers and Product Leaders
* Establish strong product culture focused on ownership, impact, and accountability
* Partner closely with Engineering, Design, Data, and Business teams


****Execution \& Delivery****
* Ensure high\-quality, timely delivery of product initiatives across squads
* Drive outcome\-based roadmaps (KPIs, OKRs, business impact)
* Oversee prioritization, trade\-offs, and resource allocation


****Cross\-functional Collaboration****
* Work closely with Heads of Engineering, Design, and Business stakeholders
* Align product initiatives with company\-wide objectives and regional needs
* Act as the key product representative in leadership discussions


****Customer \& Market Focus****
* Champion customer\-centric product development and discovery
* Leverage data, research, and feedback loops to inform decisions
* Understand local market nuances across multiple geographies


****Product Operations \& Governance****
* Define product processes, frameworks, and best practices
* Improve product development lifecycle and team efficiency
* Ensure clear product governance and decision\-making frameworks


**Requirements**
* 10\+ years of experience in Product Management
* 5\+ years in leadership roles managing Product Managers or product teams
* Proven experience building and scaling products in fintech, marketplaces, or super apps
* Strong experience in multi\-sided platforms (e.g., users, merchants, partners)
* Track record of delivering products from 0 → 1 and scaling to maturity
* Deep understanding of data\-driven product development
* Experience working in high\-growth, fast\-paced environments
* Strong stakeholder management and communication skills


****Nice to Have****
* Experience in emerging markets (Africa, MENA, or similar)
* Experience managing multi\-country product organizations


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

data.raw_snippet:
Job Title: Nursing Supervisor / Head Nurse
 



 Department: Nursing Services Department
 



 Reports To: Medical Director
 



 Location: Enaya Home Nursing Services
 



 Job Summary
 



 The Nursing Supervisor is responsible for overseeing the daily operations of the nursing department, ensurin
data.jd_text:
Job Title: Nursing Supervisor / Head Nurse
 



 Department: Nursing Services Department
 



 Reports To: Medical Director
 



 Location: Enaya Home Nursing Services
 



 Job Summary
 



 The Nursing Supervisor is responsible for overseeing the daily operations of the nursing department, ensuring the delivery of high\-quality patient care, and maintaining compliance with healthcare standards and regulations. The role involves leadership, coordination, clinical supervision, and staff development.
 



 Key Responsibilities
 



 1\. Administrative Duties
 



 Plan, organize, and supervise nursing services within the department.
 



 Prepare and manage staff duty schedules and ensure adequate shift coverage.
 



 Conduct performance evaluations and provide feedback to nursing staff.
 



 Participate in recruitment, orientation, and onboarding of new nurses.
 



 Handle staff concerns, conflicts, and disciplinary actions when necessary.
 



 2\. Clinical Supervision
 



 Ensure implementation of nursing care standards and best practices.
 



 Monitor patient care delivery and support staff in managing complex cases.
 



 Oversee proper administration of medications and treatments.
 



 Ensure compliance with infection control policies and safety protocols.
 



 3\. Quality \& Patient Safety
 



 Ensure adherence to quality standards and accreditation requirements.
 



 Review incident reports and participate in root cause analysis.
 



 Promote a culture of patient safety and continuous improvement.
 



 Ensure accurate and timely nursing documentation.
 



 4\. Staff Development \& Training
 



 Identify training needs and organize continuous education programs.
 



 Provide coaching, mentoring, and professional development support.
 



 Conduct competency assessments for nursing staff.
 



 5\. Communication \& Coordination
 



 Collaborate with physicians and multidisciplinary teams.
 



 Act as a liaison between nursing staff and management.
 



 Address patient and family concerns related to nursing care.
 



 Participate in meetings and communicate updates to staff.
 



 6\. Resource Management
 



 Ensure availability of medical supplies and equipment.
 



 Monitor and control the use of resources to minimize waste.
 



 Report maintenance issues or shortages promptly.
 



  





 Qualifications
 



 Bachelor's Degree in Nursing (BSN) — Master's preferred.
 



 Valid nursing license (e.g., DHA / MOH / DOH).
 



 Minimum 3–5 years of clinical experience, with at least 1–2 years in a supervisory role.
 



 Skills \& Competencies
 



 Strong leadership and decision\-making skills.
 



 Excellent communication and interpersonal abilities.
 



 Ability to manage teams and resolve conflicts effectively.
 



 Knowledge of healthcare regulations and quality standards.
 



 Problem\-solving and critical thinking skills.
 



 Working Conditions
 



 May require shift work, weekends, or on\-call duties.

data.title: Sales Manager - Middle East
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose**
 Reporting to the Head of Sales the Regional Sales Manager is a key role within the global sales team. The role holder will be responsible and accountable for the development and delivery of the Sales Development Strategy for Lawson Fuses in The Middle East, including delivery of ass
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose**
 Reporting to the Head of Sales the Regional Sales Manager is a key role within the global sales team. The role holder will be responsible and accountable for the development and delivery of the Sales Development Strategy for Lawson Fuses in The Middle East, including delivery of associated plans.
   

  

 We are looking for a commercially driven individual, who is passionate about developing and sustaining productive customer relationships to build the customer base and resultant sales order channels and pipelines. This role provides the opportunity to forge strong links with the management and R\&D teams to influence future market propositions for Lawson Fuses based on customer and market intelligence.
   

  

 The role holder will be responsible for driving sales development across The Middle East by finding, recruiting and developing new channel/wholesale partners, winning utility contracts and direct selling to established OEMs in the region.
   

  

 This is a dynamic, customer facing role that will require the candidate to travel across the region observing local protocols whilst understanding the route to market in each individual region.
   

  

 Job Context
   

  

 The position will be responsible for developing sales revenue for Lawson Fuses Limited across the Middle East region by
   

  

* Finding and recruiting distribution partners to stock and sell the Lawson Fuses range of products
* Working with current agents (or recruiting new agents) to participate in Distribution Network Operator (DNO) tenders for Low Voltage fuses
* Working directly with Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEM’s) who manufacture and supply package substation equipment that utilise LV fuses in their distribution panels
* Work with Lucy colleagues in the region to ensure greater bandwidth of contacts whilst undertaking a joint approach to business opportunities that will increase group revenue


 Job Dimensions
   

  

* This role is pivotal to the long\-term growth of the business as we plan to double our current turnover
* The sales team consists of 6 people whom the role holder will need to proactively work with
* The region is defined as the Middle East, the role holder will work outside of this remit on a case\-by\-case basis
* The business has manufacturing sites in the UK and India, the role holder will work proactively with both sites and their teams to ensure customer service is achieved for the Middle East customer base


 Key Accountabilities
   

  

**These Will Include**
* Develop, implement and drive the overarching Sales Development strategy for the Middle East in conjunction with the Head of Sales
* Explore, qualify and develop sales channels in the region
* Understand and adapt to the different working practices across the region to ensure compliance with local business practice
* Work with the regional DNO’s on LV Fuse tender opportunities either directly or via local agents
* Work with regional OEM’s to develop relationships and direct sales opportunities
* This is a hands\-on role which will require significant time being spent developing business and managing key accounts
* Generate customer and market data to enable the R\&D teams to develop market offerings that are not currently in the Lawson Fuses product portfolio
* Plan and budget annual sales revenue generation across the region
* Generate weekly/monthly business reports to cover activities and sales revenue across the region
* Meet and exceed KPIs and sales targets


**Qualifications, Experience \& Skills**
* Qualification in Business Management, Business Administration or Sales and Marketing
* Proven ability to build and maintain customer relationships across the Middle East region taking into consideration the differing business management and relationship styles
* Strong commercial acumen
* Significant knowledge and application of sales development best practices, including customer qualification and segmentation
* Strong demonstrable record of successful conversation from opportunity to secured revenue streams
* Proactively pursue new business and sales opportunities
* Solve problems for clients and customers by developing innovative and tailored sales solutions
* Proven ability to adapt sales approaches when working with the different customer bases
* Highly developed presentation and communication skills
* Expert level negotiation, influencing, objection handling and closing skills
* Sales forecasting experience, with proven ability to set aggressive yet achievable targets
* Understand margin generation across the product range to ensure the product offering is never undersold
* Experience within the electrical industry
* High\-level proficiency with MS Office programs
* High proficiency in English both verbal and written
* High proficiency in Arabic both verbal and written
* Must be able to travel freely across the Middle East region in the markets identified in any business plans


**Behavioural Competencies**
* Team Player
* Capacity to work independently
* Passion and drive
* Competitive spirit
* Professionalism
* Willingness to travel to meet customer needs


 Values: Demonstrate and live by our values:
   

  

* We support and respect each other
* We collaborate
* We continually improve
* We ‘can do’

data.title: Portfolio Director - MENAT Account Lead (Banking Client)
data.raw_snippet:
**About the Role:**
  

 The Portfolio Director / MENAT Account Lead is a senior leadership position based in Dubai, responsible for the success of CBRE's partnership with a global financial services client across the Middle East, North Africa, and Türkiye (MENAT) region. The role covers the client'
data.jd_text:
**About the Role:**
  

 The Portfolio Director / MENAT Account Lead is a senior leadership position based in Dubai, responsible for the success of CBRE's partnership with a global financial services client across the Middle East, North Africa, and Türkiye (MENAT) region. The role covers the client's leasehold and freehold portfolio spanning 9 markets: Algeria, Bahrain, Egypt, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Türkiye, and UAE.
   

  

 This is a dual\-mandate role. You will serve as the
 **single point of contact** 
 for the client's regional senior stakeholders within the client corporate real estate function, and you will simultaneously lead a team of 5 Portfolio Managers (based in Dubai and Cairo) delivering end\-to\-end portfolio management services. You are accountable for all CBRE activities and outcomes in the region \- from transaction execution to governance, compliance, and strategic alignment.
   

  

 This is a
 **Player/Mentor** 
 role \- you will be hands\-on in driving complex transactions while coaching and developing your team to deliver at the highest standard. The ideal candidate combines deep transactional expertise with the leadership maturity to elevate those around them.
   

  

 You will report directly to the Regional Account Lead for ASP \& MENAT (Hong Kong) and indirectly to the Global Account Lead (London).
   

  

  

**What You'll Do:**
  

**Account Leadership \& Client Partnership**
  

* Act as the primary regional relationship owner with the client's senior stakeholders, serving as a second\-level escalation point after Portfolio Managers.
* Understand the client's business drivers and translate them into real estate strategies and solutions.
* Lead annual account reviews and present performance insights, strategic recommendations to the client.
* Ensure full compliance with the Global MSA and all contractual reporting requirements.
* Own regional governance, performance tracking, stakeholder engagement, and strategic alignment with the global account team.


  

**Portfolio Strategy \& Transaction Management**
  

* Develop and implement portfolio strategies aligned with the client's goals, including portfolio optimisation, cost reduction, and risk mitigation.
* Prepare, recommend, and execute portfolio\-wide transaction strategies \- acquisitions, disposals, lease renewals, and lease amendments.
* Ensure disciplined transaction lifecycle management: project initiation, scope definition, prioritisation, and adherence to client\-driven milestones.
* Manage critical dates and ensure all lease obligations are met across the MENAT portfolio.
* Where required, engage and oversee third\-party brokers in accordance with Global MSA terms and conditions.


  

**Financial Management \& Reporting**
  

* Oversee account financials including budgeting, forecasting, and P\&L management for the MENAT region.
* Manage the OPEX budget related to the client's portfolio (rents, government rates, service charges, etc.).
* Review, analyse, and interpret financial templates to enable informed client decision\-making.
* Deliver regular reporting and data\-driven insights to support the client's strategic priorities.


  

**Team Leadership \& Development**
  

* Lead, mentor, and manage the performance of a team of 5 Portfolio Managers.
* Provide guidance and coaching to develop team capability and ensure consistent delivery standards.
* Design and implement training programmes and continuous improvement initiatives across the account team.


  

**Operational Excellence \& Innovation**
  

* Drive innovation and continuous improvement across all service lines in the region.
* Manage, review, and abstract contractual terms from property documentation; ensure all property records and tracking tools are accurate and current.
* Optimise operational processes for maximum efficiency within the account portfolio.
* Ensure integration and interlock between service lines \- Portfolio Management, Project Management, Facility Management, Data Management, and Finance/Accounting \- for aligned delivery.


  

**What You'll Need:**
  

* Minimum 10 years of experience in commercial real estate, with a strong transactional and estates management background \- you should be equally comfortable negotiating a complex lease restructuring as you are setting regional strategy.
* Demonstrated experience managing P\&L, budgets, and financial reporting at a regional level.
* Proven track record in stakeholder management at senior/executive level.
* Excellent communication and presentation skills (written and verbal in English).
* Strong analytical capability \- ability to interpret data and deliver concise, actionable insights.
* Highly organised, detail\-oriented, and process\-driven.


  

**What Will Set You Apart:**
  

* Experience leading and developing diverse, multi\-cultural teams across multiple geographies, including team members with varied professional backgrounds, nationalities, and working languages.
* Strong commercial acumen and deep knowledge of MENAT real estate markets.
* Experience working on large\-scale, multi\-market outsourced real estate accounts (banking/financial services sector preferred).
* Familiarity with global MSA/framework agreement structures and KPI\-driven service delivery.
* Arabic language skills are an advantage.


  

**WHAT WE OFFER:**
  

* A senior leadership role within one of CBRE's most established and sophisticated global client accounts.
* The opportunity to shape real estate strategy for a major international bank across 10 MENAT markets.
* A platform for career growth within CBRE's global corporate occupier business.
* Specialist training and professional development to support your progression.


  

**Why CBRE**
  

 When you join CBRE, you become part of the global leader in commercial real estate services and investment that helps businesses and people thrive. We are dynamic problem solvers and forward\-thinking professionals who create significant impact. Our collaborative culture is built on our shared values \- respect, integrity, service and excellence \- and we value the diverse perspectives, backgrounds and skillsets of our people. At CBRE, you have the opportunity to chart your own course and realize your potential. We welcome all applicants.
   

  

  

**Applicant AI Use Disclosure**
  

 We value human interaction to understand each candidate's unique experience, skills and aspirations. We do not use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to make hiring decisions, and we ask that candidates disclose any use of AI in the application and interview process.
   

  

**OUR VALUES IN HIRING**
  

 At CBRE, we are committed to fostering a culture where everyone feels they belong. We value diverse perspectives and experiences, and we welcome all applications.
