data.jd_text:
This role has been designed as ‘’Onsite’ with an expectation that you will primarily work from an HPE office.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge\-to\-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.
   

  

**Job Description**
***Job Family Definition:***
 Leads customer engagement to ensure that it meets all scope, time, budget and quality expectations, through planning, controlling and managing customer projects. Manages corporate, customer and third party vendor efforts to plan, sell and implement solutions to customer problems. Responsible for business as well as team management.
   

  

**Job Family Definition For Mgr, Progr Mgmt Office**
 Responsible for establishing and maintaining the portfolio and project management environment based upon Policies, Standards, Customer Engagement Roadmap and Global Method. May perform responsibilities as a member of an Engagement Program Management Office (EPMO) or as a business unit leader with responsibility for a portfolio of customer projects.
   

  

**Management Level Definition**
**Unique mastery** 
 and recognized authority on relevant subject matter knowledge including technologies, theories and techniques. Contributes to the development of innovative principles and ideas. Successfully operates in the most complex disciplines, in which the company must operate to be successful. Provides highly innovative solutions. Leads large, cross\-division functional teams or projects that affect the organization's long\-term goals and objectives. May participate in cross\-division, multi\-function teams. Provides mentoring and guidance to lower level employees. Routinely exercises independent judgment in developing methods, techniques and criteria for achieving objectives. Develops strategy and sets functional policy and direction. Acts as a functional manager within area of expertise but does not manage other employees as a primary job function.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Manages customer project delivery.
* Revenue as detailed in Impact section.
* Very large/ complex/ multiple regions or global.
* High/ very high risk.
* High/very high complexity legal and commercial issues.
* Manages project financials including P\&L.
* Meets or exceeds SOAR approved budgets.
* Provides reliable financial forecasts to the management.
* Manages business development Identifies and develops new opportunities with client Supports early qualification and opportunity assessment for large and complex opportunities Acts as opportunity manager for high risk deals.
* Manages client relationships.
* Manages complex multi\-function and/ or global delivery relationships with senior and executive ("C" level) client management.
* Communicates the direct value our capabilities will provide to our business partners and customers.
* Manages project team.
* Manages internal as well as external resources with a team size greater than 40 people.
* Mentors and encourages skill development of project team members through others.
* Provides detail performance review input and development recommendations for key contributors.
* Mentors others, providing a role model and support for individual development.


**Education And Experience Required**
* First level university degree.
* Advanced degree preferred.
* 10 years experience in project management or in like roles/businesses.


**Knowledge And Skills**
 The candidate should have previous experience in managing technical infrastructure projects:
   

  

* HPE products implementations (Servers, storage, and Aruba)
* Data centre relocation projects.
* Data centre Migration projects (Physical to virtual and Virtual to Virtual)
* Data centre migrations to cloud
* Disaster recovery implementations
* SAP HANA Implementations
* SAP Application migrations to SAP HANA
* Candidate should also demonstrate an in\-depth knowledge of key operational policies, processes and methodologies applicable to project management.
* PMP Certification is a plus


**Additional Skills**
 Accountability, Accountability, Active Learning, Active Listening, Bias, Business Growth, Change Management, Client Expectations Management, Coaching, Creativity, Critical Thinking, Cross\-Functional Teamwork, Customer Centric Solutions, Customer Relationship Management (CRM), Design Thinking, Empathy, Follow\-Through, Growth Mindset, Intellectual Curiosity (Inactive), Long Term Planning, Managing Ambiguity, Process Improvements, Project and Program Management (Inactive), Project Management Office (PMO), Project Management Tools {\+ 5 more}
   

  

**What We Can Offer You**
**Health \& Wellbeing**
 We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.
   

  

**Personal \& Professional Development**
 We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.
   

  

**Unconditional Inclusion**
 We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.
   

  

**Let's Stay Connected**
 Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.
   

  

 \#saudiarabia
   

  

 \#operations
   

  

**Job**
 Services
   

  

**Job Level**
 Master
   

  

 HPE is an Equal Employment Opportunity/ Veterans/Disabled/LGBT employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, or any other protected category, and all decisions we make are made on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. Our goal is to be one global team that is representative of our customers, in an inclusive environment where we can continue to innovate and grow together. Please click here: Equal Employment Opportunity.
   

  

**Hewlett Packard Enterprise is EEO Protected Veteran/ Individual with Disabilities.**
 HPE will comply with all applicable laws related to employer use of arrest and conviction records, including laws requiring employers to consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories.
   

  

**No Fees Notice \& Recruitment Fraud Disclaimer**
*It has come to HPE’s attention that there has been an increase in recruitment fraud whereby scammer impersonate HPE or HPE\-authorized recruiting agencies and offer fake employment opportunities to candidates. These scammers often seek to obtain personal information or money from candidates.*
*Please note that Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), its direct and indirect subsidiaries and affiliated companies, and its authorized recruitment agencies/vendors
 **will never charge any candidate a registration fee, hiring fee, or any other fee in connection with its recruitment and hiring process.** 
 The credentials of any hiring agency that claims to be working with HPE for recruitment of talent should be verified by candidates and candidates shall be solely responsible to conduct such verification. Any candidate/individual who relies on the erroneous representations made by fraudulent employment agencies does so at their own risk, and HPE disclaims liability for any damages or claims that may result from any such communication.*

data.title: Senior Commercial Project Manager - Saudi Arabia/Riyadh
data.raw_snippet:
Senior Commercial Project Manager – Saudi Arabia
   

  

 Siemens strongly believes in the value of a Digital Portfolio, hence Smart Infrastructure combines Digital Power Distribution and Digital Building Infrastructure technologies. Our Digital Portfolio will enable our customers to enjoy occupant
data.jd_text:
Senior Commercial Project Manager – Saudi Arabia
   

  

 Siemens strongly believes in the value of a Digital Portfolio, hence Smart Infrastructure combines Digital Power Distribution and Digital Building Infrastructure technologies. Our Digital Portfolio will enable our customers to enjoy occupant’s intuitive buildings which are comfortable, safe, secure and energy efficient.
   

  

 Smart infrastructure from Siemens intelligently connects energy systems, buildings and industries to adapt and evolve the way we live and work. We work together with customers and partners to build an ecosystem that intuitively responds to the needs of people and helps customers to better use resources. It helps our customers to thrive, communities to progress and supports sustainable development.
   

  

 Join our Smart Infrastructure Buildings division as Senior Commercial Project Manager – and help us re\-imagine the world by finding solutions and making the world a smarter place for tomorrow.
   

  

**Your Role – International, Challenging And Future\-Oriented!**
* Perform Commercial Project Management activities and tasks for the assigned Projects Portfolio.
* Drive end to end commercial execution, business performance planning and ensure alignment of portfolio performance with organization goals.
* Oversight of commercial execution across projects and contracts, ensuring alignment with KPIs (Revenue, Billing Plans, Cashflow and Margins)
* Contract \& Claim management with clients and subcontractors
* Driving \& monitoring of project KPIs (Revenues, Cashflows, Billing Plans etc.)
* Ongoing project Performance Monitoring (calculation and plan vs actual deviations)
* Ensuring timely cleanup of balance sheet and aging commitments costs
* Evaluation of Risks \& Opportunities, risk mitigations and reporting
* Monitoring and evaluation of plan, actual \& committed costs, and identification \& corrections of discrepancies
* Processing of purchase orders, sales orders, debit \& credit notes, and invoicing in SAP
* Bills verification with reference to agreed terms \& conditions
* Maintaining progress \& payment records of subcontractors
* Follow up of accounts receivable
* Ensuring compliance of policies \& procedure of documentation required for smooth processing of subcontractors' payments
* Coordination with treasury for bonds, guarantees, letter of credits etc
* Planning \& monitoring of procurements and equipment shipping schedules


**Your Qualifications And Skills – Digital And Solid!**
* Minimum Graduation in Accounting, Finance or Relevant Fields
* Minimum 7 Years, Past Siemens experience is a big plus
* Good understanding of IFRS, FRG, Accounting Standards
* Experience in SAP is must
* CPM@Siemens certification is a plus
* Excellent Communication Skills, Interpersonal Skills, Ability to work under high pressure with very close deadlines
* Fluency in English \& Arabic


**What else do you need to know?**
 As a world leader in developing and producing the most advanced engineering technologies, we improve lives and further human achievements worldwide, while also protecting the climate \- all thanks to our employees. Working with us, you have the foundation to develop personally and professionally. We give you the chance to do something significant, that benefits society and human progress. We give you the chance to create a difference.
   

  

 Diversity at Siemens is our source of creativity and innovation. Having different types of talent and experiences makes us more ambitious and better prepared to respond successfully to the demands of the Society. Therefore, we value the candidates that reflect the Diversity that we enjoy in our Company. Please find more information at www.siemens.com
   

  

 At Siemens we are always challenging ourselves to build a better future. We need the most innovative and diverse Digital Minds to develop tomorrow‘s reality. Find out more about the Digital world of Siemens here: www.siemens.com/careers/digitalminds
   

  

 We are looking forward to receiving your online application.
   

  

 Please note: Only complete applications can be considered in the selection process.

data.title: KSA Building & Infrastructure Director
data.raw_snippet:
**Location \-** 
 Al Khobar/Riyadh
   

  

**Role Overview**
 The KSA Buildings \& Infrastructure (B\&I) Director is responsible for leading, growing, and elevating Bureau Veritas’ B\&I portfolio across the region. This strategic leadership role oversees the full product line performance—shaping th
data.jd_text:
**Location \-** 
 Al Khobar/Riyadh
   

  

**Role Overview**
 The KSA Buildings \& Infrastructure (B\&I) Director is responsible for leading, growing, and elevating Bureau Veritas’ B\&I portfolio across the region. This strategic leadership role oversees the full product line performance—shaping the long‑term vision, delivering the annual P\&L, and ensuring excellence across all operations.
   

  

 The Director drives topline and gross margin delivery in close partnership with regional leadership, steering commercial strategy, optimizing delivery models, and ensuring high‑quality, efficient, and client‑centric execution. The role leads multidisciplinary teams across
 **Asset Management, Infrastructure Technical Inspections, Project \& Program Management, Environmental Services, and Commissioning** 
 , ensuring cohesive, high‑value solutions for clients.
   

  

 The Director also strengthens BV’s market presence across major sectors including
 **Hospitality, Entertainment, Tourism, Mega Projects, Developers, Contractors, Government Authorities, Urban Development, Smart Cities, Transportation Infrastructure, and Aviation** 
 , building trusted relationships and expanding BV’s impact on safe, sustainable, and resilient built environments.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Develop and implement the regional B\&I growth strategy aligned with regional and global Product Line priorities.
* Drive portfolio expansion, commercial performance, and market penetration across all B\&I service domains.
* Lead the annual budgeting cycle and manage end‑to‑end P\&L accountability for revenue, sales, and gross margin.
* Ensure delivery quality in line with BV’s Operational Excellence standards and performance KPIs.
* Oversee regional commercial activities and support major pursuits, tenders, and key account development.
* Build and maintain strategic relationships with key customers across priority sectors.
* Lead operational governance through structured meetings, reviews, and performance follow‑up.
* Coach and develop teams, drive a high‑performance culture, and lead recruitment and performance assessments.
* Collaborate with Product Line and Area leadership to build a strong B\&I talent pipeline.
* Uphold BV’s Core Values, Code of Ethics, and the 3 Absolutes.
* Ensure rigorous compliance with BV procedures for technical governance, risk, and quality.


**Core Competencies**
**Leadership \& Strategy**
* Strategic thinker with strong decision‑making, accountability, and change‑leadership capability.
* Effective people leader who empowers teams and navigates matrix environments with ease.


**Commercial \& Client Excellence**
* Strong commercial acumen and ability to drive growth across diverse B\&I markets, including Transportation Infrastructure and Aviation.
* Skilled at long‑term client relationship development and key account management.


**Operational Excellence**
* Proven ability to ensure consistent quality, compliance, and operational performance.
* Experience managing complex, multi‑disciplinary programs.


**Technical \& Market Insight**
* Solid understanding of B\&I service lines including inspections, commissioning, and asset management.
* Strong knowledge of regional standards, regulations, and industry dynamics across built‑environment and infrastructure sectors.


**Personal Attributes**
* High integrity, resilient, client‑centric, with strong communication and stakeholder influence.

data.title: Project Manager

HanmiGlobal Saudi is seeking an experienced and dedicated
 **Project Manager** 
 to lead our project initiatives to successful completion. The ideal candidate will possess a strong background in project management within the construction sector, with a proven ability to deliver projects on time and
data.jd_text:
HanmiGlobal Saudi is seeking an experienced and dedicated
 **Project Manager** 
 to lead our project initiatives to successful completion. The ideal candidate will possess a strong background in project management within the construction sector, with a proven ability to deliver projects on time and within budget. As a Project Manager, you will oversee the entire project lifecycle, from inception through planning and execution, ensuring all project objectives align with client requirements and organizational goals.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Plan, execute, and oversee multiple projects, ensuring adherence to timelines, budgets, and quality standards
* Develop comprehensive project plans, including scope, schedules, resource allocation, and risk management strategies
* Lead project teams, provide direction, and motivate members to achieve project goals
* Maintain continuous communication with clients, stakeholders, and team members, providing updates on project status and addressing concerns promptly
* Identify potential risks and develop mitigation strategies to ensure project success
* Ensure compliance with all regulatory requirements and company policies throughout the project lifecycle
* Conduct regular project reviews and prepare reports for senior management


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Construction Management, or a related field
* Minimum 10 years of experience in project management, with at least 5 years in a managerial role within the construction industry
* Project Management Professional (PMP) certification is preferred
* Strong knowledge of project management methodologies, tools, and software
* Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills
* Proficient in budget management and forecasting.

The ideal candidate will bring extensive experience in project planning, cost control, schedule management, and risk mitigatio
data.jd_text:
JASARA PMC is seeking an accomplished Senior Project Controls Manager to lead our project controls team and drive the successful delivery of complex infrastructure projects. The ideal candidate will bring extensive experience in project planning, cost control, schedule management, and risk mitigation, ensuring projects are completed efficiently and in alignment with client objectives.
   

  

 As a key leader within JASARA PMC, you will collaborate closely with multidisciplinary teams to develop and implement robust project control strategies. Your insights and leadership will be instrumental in maintaining project integrity and optimizing resource allocation.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Develop, implement, and maintain project controls frameworks and processes
* Establish project baselines and monitor progress against schedule, scope, and budget
* Prepare comprehensive reports detailing project status, forecasts, and performance metrics
* Assess risks and develop mitigation plans to ensure project continuity
* Coordinate with project managers, engineers, contractors, and stakeholders to ensure alignment and timely communication
* Coach and mentor project controls personnel to foster professional growth
* Ensure adherence to industry standards and company policies


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Construction Management, or a related discipline
* Over 18 years of experience in project controls, with at least 5 years in a senior managerial role
* Proficient in project management software such as Primavera P6, MS Project, Aconex and cost control tools
* Strong knowledge of project management principles, cost estimating, scheduling, and risk management
* Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills
* Ability to analyze complex project data and make informed decisions
* Experience working in luxury hospitality or mixed use or construction projects preferred

 We are looking for a motivated and detail\-oriented Junior Project Manager to support the delivery of mission\-critical projects for public sector and large enterprise clients in Saudi Arabia. In this role, you will assist in managing Digital Infrastructure initiatives, inc
data.jd_text:
**About the Role:** 




 We are looking for a motivated and detail\-oriented Junior Project Manager to support the delivery of mission\-critical projects for public sector and large enterprise clients in Saudi Arabia. In this role, you will assist in managing Digital Infrastructure initiatives, including Cybersecurity, Digital Transformation, Digital Networks, and Data Centre projects.
 



  





 This is a client\-facing position where you will be expected to demonstrate a proactive, client\-first mindset, while contributing to high\-quality project delivery, clear communication, and continuous improvement.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Support the end\-to\-end management of digital infrastructure projects, from planning and scoping to execution and delivery.
* Work closely with senior project managers and stakeholders to gather requirements and ensure alignment with business and regulatory needs.
* Maintain accurate project documentation, including schedules, reports, and risk logs.
* Assist in preparing client\-facing dashboards and reports highlighting KPIs, timelines, and project status.
* Help build and maintain strong client relationships, supporting communication throughout the project lifecycle.
* Contribute to the preparation of status updates, progress reports, and presentations.
* Support alignment of projects with strategic initiatives such as Saudi Vision 2030\.
* Track project timelines, budgets, and resources, ensuring tasks are completed on schedule.
* Assist in identifying project risks and support the development of mitigation plans.
* Work within Agile, Waterfall, or Hybrid project management methodologies as required.



  





**Qualifications \& Skills:** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology or a related field.
* Fluent in Arabic and English (spoken and written).
* Basic understanding of cybersecurity, networking, data centres, and digital transformation concepts.
* Strong organizational skills with high attention to detail.
* Good communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to work in a team environment.
* Analytical thinking and problem\-solving abilities.
* Eagerness to learn and grow within a fast\-paced project environment.



  





 If you are passionate about technology and eager to build a strong foundation in project management while shaping the digital future of Saudi Arabia, we welcome your application.
 



  





 Send your CV to: careers@3mdata.tech

data.title: Test Director
data.raw_snippet:
We are looking for
 **a Senior Test Delivery Manager / Test Program Director** 
 to lead the quality engineering and testing delivery for a large\-scale telecom transformation program. The role requires strong leadership in managing complex testing portfolios, large, distributed teams, and multi\-ve
data.jd_text:
We are looking for
 **a Senior Test Delivery Manager / Test Program Director** 
 to lead the quality engineering and testing delivery for a large\-scale telecom transformation program. The role requires strong leadership in managing complex testing portfolios, large, distributed teams, and multi\-vendor ecosystems, while ensuring delivery excellence and financial discipline.
   

  

 The leader will be responsible for end\-to\-end test strategy, delivery governance, demand management, and resource optimization, while driving AI\-first quality engineering practices to improve productivity, predictability, and business outcomes.
   

  

 This role will work closely with client leadership, program directors, architecture teams, and delivery partners to ensure quality objectives are achieved across all releases in the transformation program.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Test Program Leadership**
* Own and drive the overall testing strategy and execution for a large telecom transformation program.
* Lead testing across multiple transformation workstreams.
* Establish quality governance frameworks aligned with program milestones and release plans.
* Manage large, distributed testing teams and multiple vendor partners.
* Ensure testing delivery meets fixed bid contractual commitments related to scope, cost, timelines, and quality.
* Drive cost optimization, productivity improvement, and margin protection through automation and AI\-led efficiencies.
* Manage program\-level testing budgets, forecasting, and resource utilization.
* Establish strong governance for scope management, change control, and risk mitigation.


**Demand Management \& Resource Planning**
* Manage testing demand across multiple workstreams and releases in alignment with program priorities.
* Lead capacity planning, resource forecasting, and skill\-based allocation to ensure optimal utilization.
* Establish structured resource scheduling models aligned with release cycles and delivery milestones.
* Collaborate with leadership teams to address demand\-supply gaps, ramp\-up planning, and skill transformation initiatives.


**AI\-First Quality Engineering**
* Drive adoption of AI\-enabled testing across the testing lifecycle.
* Leverage AI agents and intelligent automation to accelerate testing cycles and improve quality.
* Define AI adoption roadmap for quality engineering within the program.
* Build a highly automated testing ecosystem across functional and non\-functional testing.
* Drive shift\-left and shift\-right quality practices to enable faster feedback loops.


**Stakeholder \& Client Engagement**
* Act as the primary QA leader interfacing with senior client stakeholders.
* Provide strategic guidance on quality engineering practices and transformation initiatives.
* Facilitate program\-level quality reviews, defect governance forums, and release readiness discussions.
* Provide executive dashboards and quality insights to program leadership.


**Risk \& Quality Management**
* Establish proactive mechanisms for risk identification, quality assurance, and defect prevention.
* Implement predictive quality metrics and analytics using AI\-based insights.
* Ensure strong governance for all testing lifecycle activities.


**Experience**
**Required Skills \& Experience**
* 18\+ years of experience in Quality Engineering and Testing
* 8\+ years managing large transformation programs
* Experience delivering complex telecom programs under fixed bid or outcome\-based models
* Proven leadership managing large, distributed QA teams (100\+ resources)
* Telecom Domain Expertise and AI \& Modern Testing experience
* Strong program governance and stakeholder management
* Experience managing multi\-vendor delivery environments
* Expertise in demand management, capacity planning, and workforce scheduling
* Proven ability to drive quality transformation initiatives
* Strong background in Agile delivery

data.title: Assistant Project Manager - Tamheer
data.raw_snippet: **Join Nice One as an Assistant Project Manager – Tamheer to support project delivery, coordinate cross\-functional activities, and contribute to successful execution of programs. This role is open to all candidates and supports diversity and inclusion. The ideal candidate is organized, communicativ
data.jd_text:
**Join Nice One as an Assistant Project Manager – Tamheer to support project delivery, coordinate cross\-functional activities, and contribute to successful execution of programs. This role is open to all candidates and supports diversity and inclusion. The ideal candidate is organized, communicative, and eager to learn within a fast\-paced project environment.**
**Primary Responsibilities – Support Planning, Coordination, And Delivery**
* Assist Project Managers in day\-to\-day project activities, including scheduling, task tracking, and status reporting to ensure projects stay on scope, on time, and on budget.
* Coordinate with internal teams (design, development, product, marketing, operations) and external vendors to collect updates, resolve dependencies, and escalate risks or issues as needed.
* Maintain and update project documentation such as project plans, timelines, meeting minutes, action logs, risk registers, and change requests to ensure accurate records and transparency.
* Prepare clear, concise status reports and presentations for stakeholders, summarizing progress, milestones, and next steps; support PMs in stakeholder communications.
* Support resource coordination and capacity planning by tracking assignments, availability, and dependencies across teams to help optimize delivery.
* Assist with project financial tracking, including budget monitoring, invoice coordination, and basic expense reconciliation in line with company processes.
* Contribute to project governance by helping schedule and prepare for key meetings (kick\-offs, steering committees, retrospectives) and ensuring follow\-up on action items.
* Support continuous improvement by collecting process feedback, documenting lessons learned, and helping implement standard operating procedures and best practices.
* Perform ad hoc project tasks as required, demonstrating flexibility and a solutions\-oriented approach to support timely delivery.


**Qualifications And Skills – Organized Communicator With a Learning Mindset**
* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Project Management, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience; Tamheer participants are encouraged to apply.
* 0–2 years of experience in project coordination, project support, or a related role; internships or academic project experience are valued.
* Strong organizational skills with attention to detail and the ability to manage multiple tasks and priorities concurrently.
* Clear written and verbal communication skills; comfortable preparing status updates, meeting notes, and stakeholder\-facing materials.
* Proficiency with common collaboration and productivity tools (e.g., Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, project management tools such as Jira, Asana, or Trello).
* Basic understanding of project management principles, timelines, and deliverables; familiarity with Agile and Waterfall methodologies is a plus.
* Problem\-solving attitude with the ability to identify issues, propose practical solutions, and follow through to resolution.
* Reliable, punctual, and able to work both independently and as part of a collaborative team.


**Personal Attributes – Curious, collaborative, and growth\-oriented**
* Eager learner who seeks feedback and development opportunities to grow into greater project responsibility.
* Collaborative team player who builds constructive relationships and supports cross\-functional working.
* Detail\-oriented and dependable with strong follow\-through on assigned tasks and commitments.
* Adaptable under changing priorities and comfortable working in a fast\-paced environment.
* Professional and inclusive approach that values diverse perspectives and equitable participation.


**Benefits And Work Conditions – Development\-focused And Supportive**
* Competitive salary with opportunities for progression and performance\-based recognition.
* Tamheer program support and mentorship to build practical project management experience and career pathways.
* Hybrid working model offering both in\-office collaboration and remote flexibility, subject to role and location.
* Access to professional development, training, and on\-the\-job learning to support certification and skill growth.
* Health and other employee benefits consistent with company policy and local labor regulations.
* Inclusive workplace that values equal opportunity and welcomes applicants from all backgrounds.


**How to Apply – Start your project management career at Nice One** 
 To apply, submit your resume and a brief cover letter via our online recruitment portal. Please include your city of residence, relevant experience, and a short summary of why you’re interested in project management and the Tamheer placement. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and look forward to reviewing your application.

data.title: Project Manager
data.raw_snippet:
****Job Brief:****

*This role serves as the central "nerve center" for our KSA operations, ensuring that opportunities across our diverse Agility global portfolio are tracked, managed, and accelerated.* 




*You will bridge the gap between high\-level government engagements and operational executi
data.jd_text:
****Job Brief:****

*This role serves as the central "nerve center" for our KSA operations, ensuring that opportunities across our diverse Agility global portfolio are tracked, managed, and accelerated.* 




*You will bridge the gap between high\-level government engagements and operational execution. You will be responsible for maintaining a "single source of truth" for our pipeline, managing complex stakeholder relationships within the Saudi ecosystem, and ensuring that leadership has the data\-driven insights needed to make critical decisions.*



**Requirements**
**Job Responsibilities:**
* Pipeline \& Opportunity Management: Build and rigorously maintain the KSA Opportunity Tracker (via Power BI or Excel). Monitor the status, ownership, timelines, and dependencies for all regional projects.
* Stakeholder \& Government Liaison: Track engagements with key KSA entities. Document next actions and ensure no follow\-up is missed.
* Performance Reporting: Prepare monthly leadership updates and visual dashboards that translate complex data into actionable insights for the executive team.
* Operational Accountability: Follow up directly with Operating Companies (OpCos) to ensure meeting actions and deadlines are met. Act as the primary "enforcer" of project timelines.
* Risk Mitigation: Proactively identify and flag delays, resource bottlenecks, or strategic risks before they impact delivery.
* Knowledge Management: Ensure seamless continuity of project data and strategic relationships during priority shifts or team transitions.


**Your Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Engineering, or a related field. An MBA is a plus.
* Certification: PMP, PRINCE2, or equivalent project management certification is highly preferred.
* 3\-6 years of project management experience, preferably within a conglomerate, consulting firm, or logistics/infrastructure sector.
* Regional Expertise: Deep understanding of the KSA business landscape and the Vision 2030 framework. Familiarity with the working styles of Saudi government ministries  and working in international organizationsis essential.
* Native or professional fluency in English and Arabic is required to navigate government documentation and internal reporting.


**Your Proficiencies**
* Leadership and Management skills
* Data Visualization: Advanced proficiency in Power BI and Excel (lookups, pivot tables, and dashboard creation).
* Strategic Thinking: Ability to see the "big picture" across multiple business units (Logistics, Aviation, Ventures) while maintaining attention to detail.
* Influence \& Communication: Strong interpersonal skills to hold senior leaders accountable for deadlines without direct reporting authority.
* Agility: Ability to thrive in a fast\-paced environment where priorities shift based on government mandates or market opportunities.

data.title: Construction Project Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
 The role involves planning and managing projects by developing schedules, budgets, and objectives, while ensuring timely delivery within scope and cost. It includes coordinating internal teams, vendors, and stakeholders to support smooth execution and technical feasibility. The
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 The role involves planning and managing projects by developing schedules, budgets, and objectives, while ensuring timely delivery within scope and cost. It includes coordinating internal teams, vendors, and stakeholders to support smooth execution and technical feasibility. The position requires monitoring progress and performance, managing risks, resources, and changes, and using appropriate tools to track and improve outcomes.
   

  

 Additionally, the role focuses on controlling costs, ensuring compliance with safety and quality standards, and resolving issues effectively. Regular reporting to management, maintaining project documentation, and providing technical support to team members are also key responsibilities, along with adhering to company policies and performing any additional assigned duties.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Manage the development and implementation of project plans, schedules, budgets, and objectives.
* Monitor and control project progress and performance.
* Coordinate internal resources and third parties/vendors for the flawless execution of projects. Ensure that all projects are delivered on\-time, within scope and within budget.
* Developing project scopes and objectives, involving all relevant stakeholders and ensuring technical feasibility.
* Analyze project risks and develop strategies to mitigate them. Ensure resource availability and allocation.
* Use appropriate verification techniques to manage changes in project scope, schedule and costs.
* Measure project performance using appropriate systems, tools and techniques.
* Report and escalate to management as needed.
* Coordinate with stakeholders and team members to ensure project objectives are met.
* Monitor project costs and ensure cost efficiency.
* Provide regular reports on project progress and performance.
* Manage changes to the project scope, schedule, and costs.
* Ensure compliance with project safety and quality standards.
* Identify and resolve project issues. Create and maintain comprehensive project documentation.
* Provide technical guidance and support to team members.
* Informs themselves of the relevant Quality, Environmental, Safety and Occupational Health Policies, Manuals and Procedures in place within Hill International, and ensures continued compliance with these requirements while employed by Hill.
* Perform other duties as assigned by the line manager/supervisor.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in engineering from an accredited university.
* Minimum 15 years experience in large\-scale infrastructure or city development projects.
* Experience of major government and/or semi\-government program and projects implementations.
* Extensive Experience in the project management of water and wastewater works.
* Knowledge of professional project management processes and procedures.
* Experience of implementing a zero accident philosophy.
* A record of engagement with government entities / utility providers.
* Excellent organizational and communication skills.
* Knowledge of project management software and tools.
* Ability to work independently and manage multiple projects.
* A record of engagement with government entities / utility providers. Proven track record of successful project management.
* Ability to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

data.title: Program Manager, Amazon Customer Excellence System, Amazon Now
data.raw_snippet:
**Description**
 Do you pioneer? Do you enjoy breaking down and solving complex problems for the benefit of a quickly expanding customer base, focusing first on our customer and working backwards? Do you want to be part of a newly formed organization that is designing and launching new business mode
data.jd_text:
**Description**
 Do you pioneer? Do you enjoy breaking down and solving complex problems for the benefit of a quickly expanding customer base, focusing first on our customer and working backwards? Do you want to be part of a newly formed organization that is designing and launching new business models across MENA? If so, Amazon Global Specialty Fulfillment operations is looking for an experienced leader with a strong record of achieving results. We are looking to hire an Program Manager in KSA to join the team that redefines Ultra\-fast grocery operation and help us build and grow this new service for our customers. This is your chance to make history.
   

  

 Our overall mission is simple: we want Amazon to be the place where our customers can find, discover and buy anything online. Whatever our customers want, we will find the means to deliver it. With your help, Amazon will continue to enable people to discover new worlds and implement innovation.
   

  

 Program Managers are focused on leading Ultra Fast Grocery Last Mile improvements made on behalf of Amazon customers, to drive into standardization efforts, act as liaisons with other departments, provide process skills to the UFG under the roof and Last mile station, provide SME support for UTR, routing and OTR planning, support UTR/LM Kaizen Events in their areas of expertise, and to run and coordinate cross\-functional projects for successful implementation across the UFG Amazon Now Stores.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 As a key link between local operations and country business teams you will help drive innovation, test new ideas and ensure that best practices are being followed safely.
   

  

 Six key areas that you’ll always focus on include Safety, People, Quality, Customer Experience, Productivity, Costs and Environment.
   

  

* Supporting project execution working accross multiple function in the org.
* Should be able to amicably resolve issues during passionate discussions between various functions.
* Should be able to hold respective functions accountable for their deliverables.
* Partner closely with RoW countries to implement/share best practice
* Maintaining Health and Safety standards within your remit area, while promoting an inspiring Health and Safety culture on\-site,
* Be accountable for operational leadership by measuring performance, offering feedback, and providing development support.
* Drives continuous improvement projects to optimize operations and improve productivity to meet and exceed business objectives; works on strategic projects that have total building and network\-wide impact.
* Strategic planning for the next three, six and twelve months, with a particular focus on peak\-season planning.
* Write and articulate leadership updates, MBRs and QBRs.
* Establishes objectives and metrics for safety, quality, productivity, and customer experience
* Provide you team with the tools needed for success while driving improvements in productivity and efficiency through data\-driven decisions and analytical problem\-solving.


**Basic Qualifications**
* Experience with program management spanning planning, execution and project delivery
* Experience in team management
* Experience working in a fast\-paced, rapidly changing operations environment


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience implementing lean principles and process improvement in an operational environment


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- Afaq \- Warehouse Branch \- J02

Master\-Works is on the lookout for a skilled Project Manager to join our dynamic team. As a pivotal player in our organization, you will oversee project execution, guide teams towards achieving project goals, and ensure that we consistently deliver exceptional value to our clients. Your leadership will be instrumental in harmonizing project activities and stakeholder expectations in our fast\-paced environment.

* Define project scope, goals, and deliverables in collaboration with senior management and stakeholders
* Develop detailed project plans, ensuring resource availability and allocation
* Lead cross\-functional project teams, acting as the main point of contact for all project\-related communication
* Track project performance and promptly resolve issues, risks, and changes through effective communication
* Prepare and deliver regular project updates to stakeholders, including high\-level summaries and detailed reports
* Foster a culture of collaboration and creativity within your project teams
* Implement and manage project changes and interventions to achieve project outcomes
* Evaluate project performance after completion and identify areas for improvement in future projects


**Requirements:**

* 4\+ years of proven experience in project management, with a track record of successfully delivering projects on time and within budget
* Strong knowledge of project management methodologies and tools (e.g., Agile, Scrum, Waterfall)
* Superior leadership and team management skills, with the ability to inspire and mentor others
* Excellent problem\-solving skills and the capacity to make sound decisions under pressure
* Strong organizational and multitasking abilities
* Exceptional communication skills, both verbal and written, with a keen attention to detail
* PMP certification or equivalent is a plus
* Familiarity with the latest industry trends and technologies


 If you are passionate about project management and eager to contribute to innovative solutions, we encourage you to apply for the Project Manager position at Master\-Works.

data.jd_text:
**Job Title:** 

 Senior Project Manager
 




**Company:** 
 HAD – Comunications and Information Technology
 



**Job Summary:** 




 We are seeking an experienced Project Management with a background in computer science or related field to oversee the planning, coordination, and execution of our technology projects. As a Senior Project Manager, you will be responsible for ensuring the successful delivery of projects within scope, budget, and timeline. You will collaborate closely with cross\-functional teams, including software developers, engineers, designers, and stakeholders, to drive project progress and achieve desired outcomes.
 



  





  





**Responsibilities:** 




  





**\-Project Planning and Execution:** 



* Define project scope, objectives, and deliverables in collaboration with stakeholders.
* Develop detailed project plans, including timelines, resource allocation, and budget estimates.
* Coordinate and manage project activities, ensuring adherence to timelines and quality standards.
* Monitor project progress, identify risks, and proactively implement mitigation strategies.
* Facilitate effective communication and collaboration among project team members.



**\-Stakeholder Management:** 



* Engage and communicate with project stakeholders, providing regular updates on project status.
* Manage expectations, address concerns, and negotiate project priorities and deliverables.
* Collaborate with stakeholders to define project requirements, ensuring alignment with business goals.



**\-Team Leadership:** 



* Lead and motivate project teams, fostering a collaborative and productive work environment.
* Assign tasks, provide guidance, and monitor individual and team performance.
* Facilitate effective decision\-making, conflict resolution, and problem\-solving within the team.



**\-Risk Management:** 



* Identify project risks, assess their potential impact, and develop risk mitigation plans.
* Proactively address issues and obstacles that may impact project progress or outcomes.
* Ensure compliance with relevant regulatory requirements and security standards.



**\-Quality Assurance:** 



* Implement quality assurance processes to monitor and ensure the delivery of high\-quality software solutions.
* Conduct project reviews and post\-implementation evaluations to identify areas for improvement.
* Drive continuous process improvement initiatives to enhance project management methodologies.



  





**Requirements:** 



* Bachelor's degree in computer science or a related field.
* **3 – 5 years of practical experience** 
 in Project management.
* Proven experience as a Project Manager.
* Strong understanding of software development life cycle (SDLC) and project management methodologies.
* Proficiency in project management tools and software (e.g., JIRA, Trello, ClickUp, MIRO).
* Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.
* Ability to effectively manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving abilities.
* PMP or other project management certifications are a plus.

data.jd_text:
In a world of possibilities, pursue one with endless opportunities. Imagine Next!
   

  

 At Parsons, you can imagine a career where you thrive, work with exceptional people, and be yourself. Guided by our leadership vision of valuing people, embracing agility, and fostering growth, we cultivate an innovative culture that empowers you to achieve your full potential. Unleash your talent and redefine what’s possible.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Parsons is looking for an amazingly talented
 **Project Manager (Saudi National)** 
 to join our team!
   

  

**What You'll Be Doing**
* Plans, directs, supervises, and controls the execution of all business, technical, fiscal, and administrative functions of the assigned project.
* Forecasts monthly revenue, labor costs, ODCs, and gross profit for the term of the project.
* Develops and manages the budget; oversees the profitability of the project.
* Responsible for project invoicing and billing including all accounts receivable and accounts payable.
* Oversees establishment of Project Management Plan, Health and Safety Plan, Quality Assurance/Quality Control Plan, and other documents as required.
* Establishes the project requirements for all areas of the project and monitors the draft and final deliverables for adherence to these criteria.
* Assigns responsibility for executing project plans to key subordinates after careful assessment of how to utilize their qualifications and strengths.
* Monitors and negotiates changes to the scope of work with the client and key subcontractors.
* Markets and secures additional work with client.
* Maintains client relationships and rapport with potential teaming partners.
* Develops career development plans with all direct reports and identifies and coordinates training needs and requests for their staff.
* Identifies the staffing plan for projects and pursuits.
* Responsible for employee performance including recognition and disciplinary efforts.
* Serves on a committee or board for professional organizations that meet our objectives.
* Attends key conferences for networking and brand exposure.
* Submits abstracts to key conferences and encourages presentations from staff.
* Discusses the qualifications required of the key project positions with senior leadership.
* Collaborates with the office facilities staff to address project office space requirements.
* Works with other managers, project engineers, and discipline leads to develop budgets, schedules, and plans for the various elements of a project.
* Works with the key project individual to devise and execute actions plans to rectify potential cost overruns or delays, or to accommodate significant changes to the scope of work; advises the client and company management of changes.
* Responsible for maintaining current and timely change orders.
* Promotes technical and commercial excellence on the project through application of Quality Assurance processes.
* Monitors and reports to management on the progress of all project activity within the program, including significant milestones and any conditions, which would affect project cost or schedule.
* Acts as the Company representative with the client and selected subcontractors during the program execution.
* May participate in negotiations with regulatory agencies and in public meetings in support of clients.
* Establishes weekly meetings to review project status and formulate action items.
* Participates in proposal development on project pursuits, client meetings and client presentations.
* Identifies business development opportunities, marketing events, and maintain current knowledge of project pipeline for key clients.


**What Required Skills You'll Bring**
* Ability to meet Parsons’ project management certification requirements
* Effective leadership skills with ability to perform in a management capacity
* Excellent written and oral communications skills
* Thorough knowledge of industry practices and regulations
* Knowledge of current technology and how it can be effectively utilized on projects


**What Desired Skills You'll Bring**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering or related technical/business field
* \+12 years of related work experience
* Broad general technical and business background


 Parsons equally employs representation at all job levels no matter the race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy), national origin, age, disability or genetic information.
   

  

 We truly invest and care about our employee’s wellbeing and provide endless growth opportunities as the sky is the limit, so aim for the stars! Imagine next and join the Parsons quest—APPLY TODAY!
   

  

 Parsons is aware of fraudulent recruitment practices. To learn more about recruitment fraud and how to report it, please refer to https://www.parsons.com/fraudulent\-recruitment/.

data.title: Project Director
data.raw_snippet: JASARA PMC is seeking a strategic and experienced Project Director for Construction to lead our ambitious projects in Saudi Arabia. As a recognized leader in the construction management sector, JASARA is dedicated to excellence and innovation in delivering large\-scale projects that align with the K
data.jd_text:
JASARA PMC is seeking a strategic and experienced Project Director for Construction to lead our ambitious projects in Saudi Arabia. As a recognized leader in the construction management sector, JASARA is dedicated to excellence and innovation in delivering large\-scale projects that align with the Kingdom's Vision 2030\. In this role, you will oversee the entire lifecycle of complex construction projects, ensuring they meet the highest standards of quality, safety, and efficiency.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Provide overall direction and leadership to project teams, ensuring clarity of objectives and effective communication throughout all project phases
* Develop comprehensive project plans that align with strategic business goals and client expectations
* Manage project budgets, timelines, and resources, ensuring projects are completed on time and within budget
* Collaborate with stakeholders, including clients, contractors, and regulatory bodies, to foster relationships and ensure compliance
* Oversee risk management processes and proactively address potential issues that could impact project delivery
* Conduct regular site visits and meetings with teams to monitor progress, address challenges, and maintain project momentum
* Prepare and present detailed project reports to senior management and stakeholders, highlighting key performance indicators and progress updates


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in Civil Engineering, Construction Management, or a related discipline; a master's degree is preferred
* Minimum of 22\+ years of experience in construction management, with at least 5 years in a leadership role overseeing large\-scale projects
* Proven track record of successfully delivering complex construction projects from inception to completion
* Strong leadership skills with the ability to influence and manage diverse teams effectively
* In\-depth knowledge of construction methodologies, project management principles, and relevant legal regulations
* Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills
* Proficient in project management software and tools
* Professional certifications such as PMP, or equivalent, are highly desirable


**Benefits**
 Project benefits:
   

  

* Company accommodation (single occupancy)
* Company transportation
* Meals
* Laundry

 As Technical Project Director, you are responsible for overseeing and leading the successful delivery of large\-scale, complex spatial planning and master planning projects. You will manage all aspects of project execution, from project planning and budgeting to execution and cl
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 As Technical Project Director, you are responsible for overseeing and leading the successful delivery of large\-scale, complex spatial planning and master planning projects. You will manage all aspects of project execution, from project planning and budgeting to execution and client delivery, ensuring that projects are completed on time, to scope, and within budget.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead the end\-to\-end planning, execution, and delivery of multiple large\-scale projects, ensuring alignment with client objectives and business goals.
* Oversee multi\-disciplinary technical and design teams, including subcontractors, ensuring clear communication and effective collaboration
* Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, stakeholders, and project partners to ensure high levels of satisfaction and project success.
* Act as the primary point of contact and escalation for clients on projects
* Ensure project processes and deliverables meet HSEQ and technical compliance standards and requirements
* Monitor and report on project progress, ensuring adherence to timelines, budgets, and quality standards.
* Technically contribute to, review and approve project deliverables, ensuring alignment with client expectations and specifications.
* Identify and mitigate project risks, managing issues proactively and implementing corrective actions as needed.
* Provide regular project updates to senior management, stakeholders, and clients, managing expectations and ensuring transparency.
* Mentor and develop project management team members, fostering a culture of excellence and continuous improvement.


**Qualifications**
* Spoken and written Arabic language skills
* Understanding of transport, infrastructure, environmental, and economic discipline areas given the cross\-disciplinary nature of spatial planning projects.
* Experience in undertaking quality assurance processes and major project reviews, to ensure outputs meet client expectations and WSP quality requirements
* Understanding and evidence of application of data\-driven analytical processes, tools and software
* Skilled in preparing technical and commercial proposals

 Join our close\-knit community of talented individuals who share your passion for making a positive impact. Our global team includes more than 69,000 employees, working together to make a difference in communities both close to home and around the world.
   

  

**With us, you can. Apply today.**

data.jd_text:
**Description**
 We are seeking an experienced Senior Program Manager to lead the Amazon Marketplace Experience Transformation (AMET) function for Delivery Associates (DAs) and Delivery Service Partners (DSPs) across Africa, Middle East, and Turkey. In this critical role, you will be based in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, focusing on local operations while developing and executing the regional strategy. You will leverage multiple listening channels to identify experience priorities, consolidate feedback, and work cross\-functionally to address key improvement opportunities. This position requires exceptional stakeholder management and strategic thinking to create meaningful programs that enhance the overall driver and DSP experience across diverse markets.
   

  

 Your expertise in program management, strategy development, and influence without authority will be essential as you partner with external entities to create impactful campaigns, present strategies to senior leadership, and drive initiatives that transform the delivery partner experience. You will serve as the strategic voice for delivery partners, ensuring their needs are represented in business decisions while balancing operational excellence and partner satisfaction
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Develop and execute the strategic roadmap for delivery partner experience across Africa, Middle East, and Turkey, while maintaining focused implementation in Saudi Arabian operations.
* Collect and analyze insights from multiple listening channels to identify experience priorities, then work cross\-functionally with operations teams, ACES, and DEX teams to address structural challenges within established SLAs.
* Draft comprehensive strategy documents and present recommendations to senior leadership, driving alignment and securing resources for key initiatives.
* Establish and manage partnerships with external entities to create campaigns and benefits for Delivery Associates and DSPs, including organizing annual partner meetings and launching ignite events throughout the region.
* Lead country expansion efforts and new program launches within AMET, ensuring consistent implementation of best practices while adapting to local market needs.


**Basic Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of program or project management experience
* Experience using data and metrics to determine and drive improvements
* 5\+ years of owning program strategy, end to end delivery, and communicating results to senior leadership experience
* Bachelor's degree
* Experience in English\-language communication skills, both written and verbal
* Experience in Arabic\-language communication skills, both written and verbal


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 2\+ years of driving process improvements experience
* Master's degree, or MBA in business, operations, human resources, adult education, organizational development, instructional design or related field


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- Afaq \- Warehouse Branch

data.title: Project Director
data.raw_snippet:
**Role Summary**
 The Project Director will provide executive leadership for the end‑to‑end delivery of a major project under a PMC (Project Management Consultancy) model. This role oversees program and project management governance, directs multidisciplinary teams, ensures EPC contractor compliance
data.jd_text:
**Role Summary**
 The Project Director will provide executive leadership for the end‑to‑end delivery of a major project under a PMC (Project Management Consultancy) model. This role oversees program and project management governance, directs multidisciplinary teams, ensures EPC contractor compliance, and drives project performance across all phases. The Project Director will establish and implement project management policies, procedures, and systems while maintaining rigorous oversight of schedules, budgets, quality, safety, and risk. This position is responsible for ensuring that all deliverables meet the project objectives and international best‑practice standards.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
****Program \& Project Management Leadership****
* Develop and oversee the implementation of program/project management policies, procedures, methodologies, and best practices
* Assess capacity and capability needs for successful PMC delivery and recommend improvements
* Provide daily leadership, guidance, and direction to the PMC team across all disciplines


****Systems \& Controls****
* Oversee the development, configuration, and deployment of Program Management Information Systems (PMIS) across the project
* Ensure robust project controls are in place, including cost, schedule, risk, and quality systems


****Performance Oversight****
* Lead regular project review meetings to monitor performance, identify issues, and drive corrective actions
* Prepare and present weekly and monthly project status reports for internal and external stakeholders
* Continuously evaluate EPC contractor performance to ensure compliance with approved execution plans, procedures, and contract requirements


****Deliverable Management****
* Ensure an approved, comprehensive list of project deliverables is established and maintained
* Monitor deliverable issuance to ensure timely submission, multidisciplinary review, and prompt return of comments
* Verify that the EPC contractor's plans and procedures are adequate and effectively support project delivery


****Stakeholder \& Interface Management****
* Manage communication and coordination between the client, EPC contractor, consultants, and PMC teams
* Ensure issues are escalated and resolved efficiently to maintain progress and alignment


**Qualifications \& Requirements**
****Education****
* MSc/BSc in Civil Engineering, Architecture, or a related field
* Highly preferred: Chartered Engineer (CEng or equivalent)


****Experience****
* 20\+ years of experience in large\-scale construction and development projects
* Solid background working within PMC environments
* Proven experience in:
+ High\-end residential projects
+ Commercial buildings
+ Mosques
+ Parking structures
+ Roads and highways
+ Infrastructure
+ Mixed\-use developments


****Competencies****
* Strong leadership and team management skills
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management
* Deep understanding of project controls, PMIS, and international standards
* Proven ability to manage EPC contractors on complex, multidisciplinary projects

data.jd_text:
**About Flat6Labs**
 Flat6Labs is the leading entrepreneurship platform in emerging markets, empowering entrepreneurs to build, launch, and grow transformative ideas through acceleration programs, ecosystem development, and tailored innovation services.
   

  

 For more information, visit www.flat6labs.com.
   

  

**About The Role**
 The
 **Flat6Labs Program Manager \| KSA** 
 oversees the operations and processes of the program's startups, designing and implementing effective business strategies to position the program as a high\-quality, leading ecosystem development initiative both locally and internationally. The role focuses on building relationships, establishing partnerships with local and international stakeholders, and ensuring program excellence.
   

  

 The Program Manager is also responsible for managing the program team, leading the startup selection process, and tracking the progress of participating startups, while providing both virtual and on\-ground support when required.
   

  

**This is a one\-year contract role based in KSA.**
**Main Responsibilities:**
* Develop, drive, and implement the program strategy and cycles.
* Establish effective project management and monitoring mechanisms to ensure timely delivery.
* Provide periodic progress reports to management.
* Ensure the Flat6Labs process is followed and well communicated to all team members.
* Identify partnership opportunities and oversee the establishment of local and international collaborations.
* Manage the program budget and supervise financial control of spending and procurement.
* Build and maintain a network of support partners, including financial, non\-financial, and development agencies.
* Define business objectives and goals in coordination with management and ensure their successful execution.
* Report program and startup status to key stakeholders in a timely manner.
* Effectively manage the program team, foster collaboration, and ensure orientation on Flat6Labs processes.
* Strengthen engagement with the local startup ecosystem by building partnerships and sourcing entrepreneurs in coordination with the Marketing team.
* Collaborate with Marketing to ensure the program and its events are well promoted locally and to maximize outreach to potential entrepreneurs.
* Build and sustain strong relationships within the regional entrepreneurial community.
* Lead and coordinate the full startup selection process, from application review to filtration, interviews, bootcamp shortlisting, and final Selection Committee presentations.
* Oversee training and mentorship programs, and recruit high\-quality mentors, trainers, and speakers.
* Manage and coordinate the online platform with internal and external teams, ensuring smooth setup of content, curriculum, CRM, and interface.
* Set goals and milestones for startups and monitor their progress closely.
* Support startups in structuring and refining their investor pitches and presentations.
* Nominate high\-potential startups for follow\-on funding opportunities.
* Supervise the planning and logistics of all program events, including preparing invitee lists and coordinating with potential investors and guests


**Requirements**
* Minimum 6\-8 years of experience in entrepreneurship, operations or business management
* Bachelor's Degree in business management or related discipline
* Excellent English \& Arabic language skills.
* Excellent communication skills
* Proactive and highly organized, with strong time management and planning skills
* Excellent command of productivity software, presentation, word processing \& number tools
* High attention to detail
* Highly energetic
* Strong Work Ethic


**Benefits**
* Get the chance to work with high potential for growth startups and bright entrepreneurs in the MENA region and from diﬀerent countries around the world
* Exposure to diﬀerent local, regional and international investors and VCs
* Engage in the buzzing startup community in the MENA region
* Work in an environment supporting creativity and proactivity, and be a part of a small dynamic team

data.title: Program Manager, Amazon Customer Excellence System, Amazon Now
data.raw_snippet:
**Description**
 Do you pioneer? Do you enjoy breaking down and solving complex problems for the benefit of a quickly expanding customer base, focusing first on our customer and working backwards? Do you want to be part of a newly formed organization that is designing and launching new business mode
data.jd_text:
**Description**
 Do you pioneer? Do you enjoy breaking down and solving complex problems for the benefit of a quickly expanding customer base, focusing first on our customer and working backwards? Do you want to be part of a newly formed organization that is designing and launching new business models across MENA? If so, Amazon Global Specialty Fulfillment operations is looking for an experienced leader with a strong record of achieving results. We are looking to hire an Program Manager in KSA to join the team that redefines Ultra\-fast grocery operation and help us build and grow this new service for our customers. This is your chance to make history.
   

  

 Our overall mission is simple: we want Amazon to be the place where our customers can find, discover and buy anything online. Whatever our customers want, we will find the means to deliver it. With your help, Amazon will continue to enable people to discover new worlds and implement innovation.
   

  

 Program Managers are focused on leading Ultra Fast Grocery Last Mile improvements made on behalf of Amazon customers, to drive into standardization efforts, act as liaisons with other departments, provide process skills to the UFG under the roof and Last mile station, provide SME support for UTR, routing and OTR planning, support UTR/LM Kaizen Events in their areas of expertise, and to run and coordinate cross\-functional projects for successful implementation across the UFG Amazon Now Stores.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 As a key link between local operations and country business teams you will help drive innovation, test new ideas and ensure that best practices are being followed safely.
   

  

 Six key areas that you’ll always focus on include Safety, People, Quality, Customer Experience, Productivity, Costs and Environment.
   

  

* Supporting project execution working accross multiple function in the org.
* Should be able to amicably resolve issues during passionate discussions between various functions.
* Should be able to hold respective functions accountable for their deliverables.
* Partner closely with RoW countries to implement/share best practice
* Maintaining Health and Safety standards within your remit area, while promoting an inspiring Health and Safety culture on\-site,
* Be accountable for operational leadership by measuring performance, offering feedback, and providing development support.
* Drives continuous improvement projects to optimize operations and improve productivity to meet and exceed business objectives; works on strategic projects that have total building and network\-wide impact.
* Strategic planning for the next three, six and twelve months, with a particular focus on peak\-season planning.
* Write and articulate leadership updates, MBRs and QBRs.
* Establishes objectives and metrics for safety, quality, productivity, and customer experience
* Provide you team with the tools needed for success while driving improvements in productivity and efficiency through data\-driven decisions and analytical problem\-solving.


**Basic Qualifications**
* 2\+ years of program or project management experience
* 3\+ years of Computerized Maintenance Management System program experience
* 3\+ years of maintenance planner/scheduler in industrial maintenance, manufacturing, or distribution industries experience
* 3\+ years of advanced Microsoft Word and Excel experience
* Bachelor's degree in relevant field, or 2\+ years of Amazon RME (BB/3P) full time experience
* Work a flexible schedule/shift/work area, including weekends, nights, and/or holidays


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Knowledge of Lean principles and DMAIC methodology
* Experience in MS Access and SQL
* Experience in requirement gathering and ability to write clear and detailed requirement document
* Experience using Microsoft Projects software
* Experience with material handling systems (MHS) installation, operation and maintenance
* Experience working in an analytical environment with cross\-functional teams


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
