**IT Director \- 3\-Month Project (Odoo Implementation \& Digital Transformation) \- Riyadh, Saudi Arabia** 




  





**About Talent at** 




 Talent at is a Saudi platform specialized in executive, professional, and technical talent acquisition and development. We connect exceptional talent wit
data.jd_text:
**IT Director \- 3\-Month Project (Odoo Implementation \& Digital Transformation) \- Riyadh, Saudi Arabia** 




  





**About Talent at** 




 Talent at is a Saudi platform specialized in executive, professional, and technical talent acquisition and development. We connect exceptional talent with ambitious organizations to accelerate growth and support Vision 2030\. Our focus is on enhancing the capabilities of organizations by providing them with the right talent. Located in Saudi Arabia, Talent at is committed to contributing to the nation's vision for a prosperous and sustainable future.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 Our confidential client is seeking an IT Director in Riyadh for a 3\-month project assignment to lead a critical digital transformation initiative with a strong focus on Odoo implementation, systems integration, and process digitization. The role requires a highly capable IT leader who can assess the current technology environment, drive the implementation or optimization of Odoo ERP, ensure smooth integration across business systems, and deliver practical transformation outcomes within a short project timeline.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




 You will lead the IT and digital transformation agenda during the project period, with direct responsibility for Odoo implementation leadership, integration readiness, technology alignment, and execution of high\-impact transformation priorities.
 



**\- Odoo Implementation Leadership:** 
 Lead the end\-to\-end implementation, enhancement, or stabilization of Odoo ERP across relevant business functions; align system design with operational and business requirements; ensure the project remains on track in terms of scope, priorities, and deliverables.
 



**\- Business Process Digitalization:** 
 Assess current manual and fragmented processes across departments and translate them into efficient digital workflows within Odoo or connected systems; drive practical process improvement through automation and better system usage.
 



**\- Systems Integration:** 
 Lead integration planning and execution between Odoo and other internal or external platforms, such as HR systems, finance tools, CRM, procurement systems, inventory, operations, third\-party applications, or reporting tools; ensure data flow, system accuracy, and operational continuity.
 



**\- Digital Transformation Roadmap:** 
 Develop and execute a focused 3\-month transformation plan covering quick wins, system priorities, integration milestones, and operational improvements; create a clear roadmap for post\-project continuation where needed.
 



**\- Technology Assessment \& Gap Analysis:** 
 Review the current IT and applications environment to identify system gaps, duplication, process inefficiencies, data issues, control weaknesses, and opportunities for digital improvement.
 



**\- Stakeholder Alignment:** 
 Work closely with business leaders, department heads, process owners, and vendors to capture requirements, align priorities, manage expectations, and ensure practical adoption of digital solutions.
 



**\- Vendor \& Implementation Partner Management:** 
 Manage Odoo partners, developers, system integrators, and other technology vendors; monitor execution quality, issue resolution, delivery timelines, and business alignment.
 



**\- Data Migration \& System Readiness:** 
 Oversee data readiness, migration planning, cleansing requirements, validation, and transition support to ensure the Odoo environment is reliable and fit for business use.
 



**\- Governance, Testing \& Go\-Live Readiness:** 
 Establish implementation discipline across system configuration, testing, UAT coordination, issue tracking, change control, user readiness, and go\-live planning.
 



**\- Change Management \& User Adoption:** 
 Support business adoption by driving communication, user alignment, training coordination, and practical handover to internal teams; help ensure the transformation effort translates into sustainable use.
 



**\- Executive Reporting \& Handover:** 
 Provide management with structured updates on implementation progress, transformation risks, integration issues, priorities, and final recommendations; deliver a clear end\-of\-project handover and next\-phase roadmap.
 



  





**Qualifications** 




 \- 10\+ years of IT leadership experience, including senior responsibility for enterprise systems, digital transformation, and business technology enablement.
 



 \- Proven hands\-on experience leading or managing Odoo implementation projects, including configuration oversight, business alignment, testing, and go\-live support.
 



 \- Strong expertise in system integration, application connectivity, APIs, data flow design, and cross\-platform process alignment.
 



 \- Demonstrated experience driving digital transformation initiatives, process automation, and technology\-enabled operational improvement.
 



 \- Strong understanding of ERP environments, business process mapping, data migration, user adoption, and project governance.
 



 \- Ability to operate both strategically and hands\-on within a short\-term, high\-impact project assignment.
 



 \- Strong communication and stakeholder management capability, with the ability to translate business needs into practical technology solutions.
 



  
 



**Preferred / Nice\-to\-have** 




 \- Experience in Saudi Arabia or GCC environments.
 



 \- Experience in manufacturing, construction, industrial, trading, distribution, or multi\-entity business environments.
 



 \- Knowledge of finance, supply chain, HR, procurement, operations, and inventory workflows within Odoo.
 



 \- Experience with third\-party integrations, middleware, APIs, reporting tools, and digital workflow automation.
 



 \- PMP, ITIL, ERP, Odoo, or digital transformation\-related certifications.
 



 \- Arabic and English communication capability.
 



  





**Success Metrics** 




 \- Odoo implementation priorities are clearly defined, structured, and progressed effectively within the project timeline.
 



 \- Key business processes are successfully digitized, improved, or stabilized through Odoo and related systems.
 



 \- Critical integrations are implemented, improved, or clearly designed for execution with minimal disruption.
 



 \- Business stakeholders receive practical, actionable technology solutions aligned to operational needs.
 



 \- Data readiness, system testing, and user adoption activities are managed effectively.
 



 \- The client gains better system visibility, stronger process control, and measurable digital transformation progress within the 3\-month period.
 



 \- A clear handover and transformation roadmap are delivered for the next phase after project completion.
 



  





**Equal Opportunity Statement:** 




 Talent at and our confidential client welcome applications from qualified candidates. Hiring decisions are made based on role requirements, skills, and experience.
 



  





**How to Apply** 




 If this sounds like the right opportunity for you, we'd love to hear from you. Please apply through the following link:
 



  






 https://www.careers\-page.com/talent\-at/job/4R8X3R9V

This pivotal role requires a visionary leader who can oversee and manage the design process for large\-scale projects, ensuring th
data.jd_text:
Qiddiya Investment Company is seeking a highly experienced Senior Director \- Project Director Design to lead the design aspects of our Strategic Development Unit (SDU). This pivotal role requires a visionary leader who can oversee and manage the design process for large\-scale projects, ensuring their successful delivery while maintaining alignment with Qiddiya's overall strategic objectives and brand vision.
   

  

 The Senior Director provides leadership in establishing and maintaining design and consultancy management framework, governance and operating model for QDC HQ team. Ensures the design processes are developed and rolled out to all Business units / sectors, supports delivery in BUs when required. Provides leadership for assigned HQ special projects accountable for meeting quality, time, budget and HSSE requirements.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Establish/update design and project management framework for all delivery methods (including Self\-Delivery, Delivery partner, CM, traditional etc.)
* Develop / update policies, processes, procedures, manuals and templates for design and consultancy (including PMC) for all projects and delivery methods
* Define governance process including detailed RACI matrix for all projects for Stages
* Support / coordinate with HQ Operations Director and Project Director (Delivery) in establishing governance and operational model for the complete program lifecycle
* Develop Design Strategy requirements and template to be applied for all projects and delivery methods
* Coordinate Technical / Peer review design management process and requirements with the Technical Director
* Develop/Update Health Safety Security and Environmental management requirements for the design phase including Design HSSE Reviews, co\-ordinate with HSE and Security Managers
* Develop/Update Sustainability management requirements for the design phase. co\-ordinate with Sustainability Managers
* Support MMC Director in establishing and overall MMC strategy and design integration process for all delivery models
* Support Procurement Director in establishing design and consultancy requirements and standards for prequalification and RFP processes. Participate when required in consultant selection process
* Support HQ Executive director in presentations and submittal for business line, project and budget approvals
* Accountable for delivery of special/assigned HQ projects including all approvals, reporting, management of internal and external stakeholders, financial closure and handover
* Accountable for compliance of special/assigned HQ projects with all QDC policies, processes, procedures and requirements, ensuring that the project meets HSE, budget, schedule and quality standards and requirements
* Support Business units in project delivery with peer reviews, consultant selection and management (when required), project audits to ensure compliance with established processes, procedures and standards for design and consultancy (including PMC)
* Coordinates input from Business units on the HQ management and governance framework processes and standards, updates documentation as part of the continuous improvement cycle
* Leads/support preparation of training materials required for the implementation of policies, processes and procedures, participates in training or presentations when required
* Participates in QDC Mentoring and Capability Building programs


 Applications closing on 22nd April 2026\.
   

  

**Requirements**
**Education**
* Bachelor's degree in architecture or engineering as minimum
* Master's Degree in related fields is preferred


**Specific Skills Required**
* Significant experience (5\+ years) in KSA within large‑scale developments or giga‑projects
* Thorough knowledge of procurement governance, strategic sourcing, and supply chain management principles
* Proven experience establishing procurement frameworks, policies, and assurance models for complex, multi‑project programs
* Strong understanding of multiple delivery models, including Self‑Delivery, Construction Management, Delivery Partner, and Traditional contracting
* Demonstrated experience in strategic and long‑lead procurement, market engagement, and supplier capacity management
* Proven leadership in providing central functional procurement services to internal Business Units and senior stakeholders
* Strong stakeholder management skills across executive leadership, project teams, CPU, consultants, contractors, and suppliers
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills
* High level of professionalism, judgment, and commercial acumen
* Strong problem‑solving and risk management capability
* Excellent time management and ability to operate effectively under pressure


**Experience**
* 20\-25 years' experience, of which at least 5 years have been in a senior leadership role within procurement, commercial, or supply chain functions on major programs or large‑scale developments


**Benefits**
 Offering a comprehensive compensation and benefits package.

data.title: Live Production Director
data.raw_snippet:
**Two Circles** 




 We are Two Circles. We are a Sports \& Entertainment Marketing business. We grow audiences and revenues. We do that by knowing fans best. We work with clients to help them understand \& influence what their fans are doing \- the way fans spend their money, the events that fans
data.jd_text:
**Two Circles** 




 We are Two Circles. We are a Sports \& Entertainment Marketing business. We grow audiences and revenues. We do that by knowing fans best. We work with clients to help them understand \& influence what their fans are doing \- the way fans spend their money, the events that fans attend, the channels fans respond to, the content fans watch and more. And we use the understanding this gives us to help our clients grow. Grow their audiences and grow their revenues \- both direct to consumer and business to business revenues. Our platforms and services are trusted by over 1000 clients globally, including the English Premier League, Red Bull, UEFA, VISA, the NFL, Nike and Amazon. We are over 1000 people, based out of 15 offices, and we deliver work for sports and entertainment businesses of all shapes and sizes all over the world.
 



 Our Media Rights \& Live Production (MRLP) business helps rights holders navigate today's fast\-changing media landscape. We provide data\-driven insights, package rights for market, and unlock new revenue streams. Through our Staylive platform, we power hundreds of streaming services, and our live production department offers remote solutions and content curation that help rights holders reach new audiences.
 



 We are seeking a senior Live Production leader to oversee and elevate our editorial and broadcast delivery in Saudi Arabia.
 



 As Live Production Director, you will be the face of our production operations in the Kingdom \- a trusted partner to rights holders, federations, broadcasters and government stakeholders. You will ensure that every production delivered locally meets the highest standards of editorial integrity, storytelling, and technical execution.
 



 This role blends editorial oversight, live broadcast expertise, stakeholder leadership, and market representation.
 



**Key responsibilities:** 




**Editorial Leadership \& Market Insight** 



* Lead the editorial direction and output quality of all live productions in KSA.
* Apply strong understanding of the Saudi sports landscape and cultural context to shape storytelling and coverage priorities.
* Ensure live coverage reflects both global broadcast standards and local relevance.
* Oversee run\-of\-show development, content planning, and editorial workflows.
* Work closely with producers, commentators, technical and creative teams to elevate narrative quality and viewer engagement.
* Continuously assess and improve on\-air presentation, graphics integration, commentary standards, and overall production value.



**Operational \& Team Oversight** 



* Lead local production crews, freelancers, and technical vendors.
* Ensure production readiness: staffing, technical planning, compliance, and risk management.
* Drive operational reliability \- delivering on time, on budget, and to international broadcast standards.
* Support long\-term production capability development in KSA.


**Requirements**
* Demonstrated experience overseeing live broadcast delivery from planning through execution.
* Experience guiding the editorial direction and quality of live sports productions, with a good understanding of the Saudi sports landscape
* Strong understanding of live production workflows (OB, remote production, studio, commentary, graphics, post).
* Experience representing production teams externally with senior stakeholders.
* Fluent Arabic and English (required).
* Based in Riyadh or willing to relocate.

data.title: Technical Director - Urban Planning
data.raw_snippet:
**Overview**
 AtkinsRéalis are seeking an expert\-level Technical Director for the Strategic Planning department in Riyadh to play a pivotal leadership role in shaping the Kingdom's spatial and infrastructural future. This position is responsible for setting the strategic vision and technical direct
data.jd_text:
**Overview**
 AtkinsRéalis are seeking an expert\-level Technical Director for the Strategic Planning department in Riyadh to play a pivotal leadership role in shaping the Kingdom's spatial and infrastructural future. This position is responsible for setting the strategic vision and technical direction of planning and urban development initiatives, ensuring they align with Riyadh's'and Saudi Arabia's long\-term growth objectives and the broader goals of Saudi Vision 2030\. The director will oversee projects of major importance and very high profile which integrate land use planning, transportation systems, environmental sustainability, and smart city technologies into cohesive, forward\-thinking urban frameworks.
   

  

 We are looking for a seasoned professional with exceptional presentation skills, proven ability to manage complex stakeholder relationships—including challenging clients—and a strong track record of bringing multidisciplinary teams together to deliver transformative outcomes. Due to the high profile of projects, we are seeking individuals with more than 20\+ years of experience and extraordinary leadership capabilities.
   

  

 Your role
   

  

* Lead the technical direction and strategic planning of very high\-profile urban development projects across Riyadh and KSA.
* Manage multidisciplinary teams including planners, architects, engineers, and GIS specialists, fostering collaboration and alignment.
* Oversee the design, review, and approval of regional and local plans, metropolitan land, zoning regulations, and land use strategies.
* Collaborate with government agencies, private developers, and international consultants to ensure alignment with national and regional planning frameworks.
* Ensure compliance with local regulations, environmental standards, and international best practices.
* Provide expert guidance on infrastructure integration, mobility planning, smart city technologies, and public realm enhancements.
* Represent the department in public forums, stakeholder meetings, and policy discussions with confidence and clarity.
* Act as a unifying force across teams and stakeholders, ensuring seamless coordination and delivery of strategic objectives.
* As a senior leader, the Technical Director will manage multidisciplinary teams and coordinate with government agencies, private sector stakeholders, and international consultants. They will be instrumental in guiding the preparation and implementation of local and regional plans, strategy plans, city plans and visions, structure plans, zoning regulations, and guidelines.
* The role demands a deep understanding of urban dynamics, regulatory environments, and the socio\-economic factors influencing urbanization in the Gulf region, particularly within the context of rapid development and modernization.
* Beyond technical oversight, the Director will serve as a key advisor and public representative of the Strategic Planning department. They will champion innovation, advocate for sustainable and inclusive urban policies, and ensure that all planning efforts are grounded in data\-driven analysis and global best practices. This role requires a balance of visionary thinking, operational excellence, and the ability to navigate complex stakeholder landscapes to deliver transformative urban outcomes.
* You will be part of our tight\-knit strategic planning team which covers the MENA region and beyond. We work in very close collaboration with other departments and sectors and pride ourselves on the inclusive and collaborative environment.


**About You**
* Master's degree in Regional and Urban Planning.
* Minimum 20 years of experience in urban planning, with at least 5 years in a senior leadership role.
* Extensive experience in planning and delivering major strategic plans at the national, regional, and local (city) levels—including comprehensive plans, regional strategies, structure plans, and long‑range spatial frameworks.
* Proven track record of managing large\-scale urban and regional development projects.
* Strong understanding of Saudi Vision 2030 and its implications for urban growth.
* Exceptional presentation and communication skills, with experience handling high\-stakes and challenging client interactions.
* Demonstrated ability to unite diverse teams and drive collaboration toward shared goals.
* Fluency in English required; Arabic proficiency is a plus.


 Rewards \& benefits
   

  

 Explore the rewards and benefits that help you thrive – at every stage of your life and your career.
   

  

**This Includes**
* Tax\-free salary.
* Life insurance coverage.
* Medical insurance.
* Annual leave balance.
* Company gratuity scheme.
* Discretionary bonus program.
* Annual flight contribution.
* Transportation \& housing allowances.
* Employee Wellbeing Program: 24/7 access to specialists in finance, legal matters, family care, personal health, fitness, and nutrition.


 Seize every opportunity to sharpen your skills, expand your expertise, and be recognized for the impact you make.
   

  

**About AtkinsRéalis**
 We're AtkinsRéalis, a world\-class engineering services and nuclear organization. We connect people, data and technology to transform the world's'infrastructure and energy systems. Together, with our industry partners and clients, and our global team of consultants, designers, engineers and project managers, we can change the world. We're committed to leading our clients across our various end markets to engineer a better future for our planet and its people.
   

  

 Find out more.

**Job Description**
 WSP in the Middle East are seeking an experienced Associate Director – Aviation to be based in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. The role supports the Aviation Director in leading the sector’s strategic growth, operational excellence, and project delivery across the Kingdom.
   

  

 The Associate Director will play a key role in business development, key client relationships, sector capability building, and oversight of major aviation projects, while ensuring quality, compliance, and alignment with WSP’s strategic objectives. The role also contributes to innovation, best practices, and continuous improvement across aviation programmes.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Strategic Leadership \& Sector Support
   

  

* Support the Aviation Director in driving the strategic growth and positioning of the aviation sector in KSA.
* Contribute to sector planning, market analysis, and identification of new aviation opportunities.
* Assist in shaping sector strategy in line with regional priorities, client needs, and WSP objectives.


 Business Development \& Client Engagement
   

  

* Support and contribute to business development activities, including pursuits, bids, and client presentations.
* Develop and maintain strong relationships with key aviation clients, authorities, and stakeholders.
* Provide senior input into proposals, fee strategies, and technical positioning.


 Project Oversight \& Delivery Excellence
   

  

* Provide oversight and strategic input on select major aviation projects, ensuring delivery excellence.
* Ensure projects meet quality, safety, compliance, and contractual requirements.
* Support project teams in managing risks, resolving issues, and achieving programme objectives.


 Technical Excellence \& Capability Development
   

  

* Promote best practices, innovation, and continuous improvement across aviation programmes.
* Support development of sector capability, including mentoring of senior staff and talent development.
* Contribute to knowledge sharing, lessons learned, and technical leadership within the aviation community.


 Governance \& Quality Assurance
   

  

* Ensure alignment with internal governance, operational procedures, and client expectations.
* Support assurance reviews, independent checks, and senior\-level decision making where required.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Architecture, Aviation, or a related discipline.
* Master’s degree or professional chartership is desirable.
* 15\+ years’ experience in the aviation or infrastructure sector, with significant exposure to large\-scale aviation programmes.
* Proven experience supporting or operating at senior leadership level (Associate Director / Director / Senior Manager).
* Strong Middle East experience, preferably Saudi Arabia (KSA).
* Skills \& Competencies
* Strong understanding of aviation sector clients, delivery models, and regulatory environments.
* Proven ability to manage senior stakeholders and client relationships.
* Commercial awareness with experience supporting bids, negotiations, and strategic pursuits.
* Strong leadership, communication, and decision\-making skills.

 client(s).

data.title: Product Delivery Manager - Offer Optimization
data.raw_snippet: Riyadh Air (RX), headquartered in the Saudi Capital, is the new national airline that’s shaping the future of flying. It seeks to lead the aviation industry by transforming Saudi Arabia into a global aviation and trade hub \- a digitally native airline that will connect the kingdom to more than 100
data.jd_text:
Riyadh Air (RX), headquartered in the Saudi Capital, is the new national airline that’s shaping the future of flying. It seeks to lead the aviation industry by transforming Saudi Arabia into a global aviation and trade hub \- a digitally native airline that will connect the kingdom to more than 100 destinations.
   

  

**About The Role**
 Are you a delivery\-focused technical leader with a passion for building next generation airline retailing capabilities?
   

  

 We are seeking a driven product delivery manager to oversee the operational delivery, integration, and readiness of Riyadh Air’s Offer Management platforms.
   

  

 In this role, you will guide the end to end execution of critical retailing capabilities, ensure alignment with digital and commercial strategies, and lead cross functional squads and vendors to deliver reliable, scalable, and future ready systems.
   

  

 You will manage the rollout of NDC compliant workflows and implement key offer Management functions such as continuous pricing, offer construction, optimization, order servicing, refunds, and disruption handling.
   

  

 You are expected to translate strategic roadmaps into clear delivery plans, establish operational readiness criteria, and ensure smooth technical integrations across multiple platforms.
   

  

 A core part of this role includes maintaining delivery discipline, managing risks and dependencies, coordinating Agile ceremonies, enforcing quality controls, and ensuring stable releases that meet Riyadh Air’s performance and SLA expectations.
   

  

 This is a unique opportunity to influence Riyadh Air’s commercial technology foundation and play a leading role in shaping a world class retailing ecosystem for one of the industry’s most ambitious airline startups.
   

  

**About You**
 Degree qualified, you will bring at least 8 years’ experience in enterprise product delivery or technology delivery, ideally within the airline or travel domain. Experience working with PSS transformation (Amadeus, Sabre, or similar) and Passenger Revenue Management platforms (PROS, Amadeus NRMS, Sabre RO) is highly desirable.
   

  

 You are expected to airline merchandising engines, ancillaries, bundling, and competitor pricing capabilities. Strong experience coordinating cross functional teams, managing vendors, and delivering technically complex integrations is essential.
   

  

 You will excel at converting strategy into structured delivery plans, maintaining RAID governance, driving Agile execution, and ensuring operational readiness across multiple delivery streams. Experience in managing technical checkpoints, quality gates, and integration dependencies will be key.
   

  

 Your ability to collaborate effectively, communicate clearly, manage complexity, and consistently deliver high quality outcomes will set you up for success in this role.
   

  

 This is your opportunity to shape the future of air travel. Bring your best and show us why you can own this position within Riyadh Air.
   

  

 Please submit your application by clicking on the Apply button. Our Talent Acquisition team will be reviewing applications shortly.

data.title: Senior Corporate Paralegal
data.raw_snippet:
**(based in KSA)**
**ENGIE** 
 is a major player in the energy transition, whose purpose is to accelerate the transition towards a carbon\-neutral economy. With 98,000 employees in 30 countries, the Group covers the entire energy value chain, from production to infrastructure and sales. ENGIE combin
data.jd_text:
**(based in KSA)**
**ENGIE** 
 is a major player in the energy transition, whose purpose is to accelerate the transition towards a carbon\-neutral economy. With 98,000 employees in 30 countries, the Group covers the entire energy value chain, from production to infrastructure and sales. ENGIE combines complementary activities: renewable electricity and green gas production, flexibility assets (notably batteries), gas and electricity transmission and distribution networks, local energy infrastructures (heating and cooling networks) and the supply of energy to individuals, local authorities and businesses. Every year, ENGIE invests more than €10 billion to drive forward the energy transition and achieve its net\-zero carbon goal by 2045\.
   

  

 ENGIE’s GCC country cluster consists of Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman and the United Arab Emirates, headquartered in Dubai. ENGIE KSA country cluster operates in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, headquartered in Riyadh. In both countries, we have activities in large scale power generation and water desalination, district cooling and energy services for B2B customers. Leveraging on its strong market position, ENGIE continues to develop its presence in power development through thermal and renewable energies, in the gas value chain and in energy efficiency services.
   

  

**Objectives of the Role**
 Provide support in the corporate and legal operations requirements in GCC\-KSA (primarily based in KSA but to also provide support to our corporate requirements in GCC to the extent required by the Corporate Team).
   

  

**Reporting line**
 The Senior Corporate Paralegal will report to the Corporate Counsel and Legal Operations Officer GCC.
   

  

**Job responsibility**
* Operational \& Government Liaison:
* Act as the primary point of contact for all KSA governmental and regulatory bodies, including the Ministry of Commerce, Saudi Business Centre, Ministry of Investment and General Authority for Statistics
* Manage the lifecycle of the companies’ MISA License, Commercial Registration and Municipality License to ensure proactive renewal and updates and prevent operational disruptions
* Maintain record, monitor and update, and administer changes (if needed) the company’s registry extracts, trade licenses and Articles of Associations in accordance with the KSA Companies Law
* Maintain record and administer changes in directorships tables to allow timely notification to local authorities, facilitate changes in bank signatories \& assisting in the maintenance of records
* Support and ensure timely processing of documentation, attestations, legalization stamps, authentications (notarization, legalization, seal of embassies etc) as needed in the region
* Provide administrative support to the Legal Department and the team in Dubai/GCC\-KSA office
* Ensure document control and maintain records by keeping an organized and up\-to\-date legal data management and filing system
* Assist to maintain the record and timely reporting of legal fees to accounts
* When feasible, provide corporate support on specific ad\-hoc legal documentation
* Organisational
* Participate in the Knowledge Management within the Legal Team
* Create and maintain up to date a database /charts containing, among others, key information about the entities and their directors: registration numbers, registered capital, directors, officers, residence of directors (for checking compliance with tax/local residency requirements)
* Maintain statutory books, including registers of members, directors and secretaries; maintain the register of shareholders and monitor changes in ownership of the company
* Ensure compliance with the UBO reporting requirements in Dubai/GCC\-KSA
* Update of any legislative changes in KSA and brief the regional Legal Team to address these changes
* Planning \& Delivery of Work
* Ensure that presentations, papers, notices, power of attorney to vote at the board and shareholder’s meetings, and resolutions of boards are prepared in time and in order and filed if required: e.g. accounts approval, director change considering tax requirements, delegation of authority change, power of attorney change, articles change
* Monitor all companies’ mandatory board meetings and annual general meetings; coordinate and liaise with board members, and shareholders of each entity as required
* Lodge required forms and annual returns with the relevant government agency
* Assist to prepare reportings, as required
* Manage the execution of legal documents by, including liaising with signatories based worldwide
* Stakeholder Engagements
* Ensure to create and maintain open communication with company’s GRO/PRO, secretarial paralegal/s and assistants of all GCC\-KSA entities to ensure smooth flow of information, identification of loopholes and process improvement opportunities
* Liaise with external regulators and advisers, such as lawyers, auditors, other external providers/advisers


**Internal Interfaces**
* Corporate Counsel and Legal Operations Officer \- GCC
* Legal Counsels
* Paralegals
* Ethics Legal Counsel


**External Interfaces**
* Contractual Counterparties
* Governmental Authorities
* External Corporate Service Providers


**Qualifications**
**Degree / Experience**
* 3\+ years of corporate practice or 5\+ years of senior paralegal practice in KSA (UAE\-Bahrain\-Oman exposure a plus).
* Corporate law firm experience and/or corporate practice in the energy infrastructure industry.


**Specific Knowledge / Skills**
* Corporate legal/paralegal background.
* Ability to provide sound legal advice in an independent way.
* Sound judgement.
* Ability to deal with complexity and multiple tasks.
* Organizational skills.
* Ability to work within a team of members from varying cultural backgrounds as well as with counterparts of varying cultural backgrounds.
* Ability to lead transactions independently with minimum supervision.
* Ability to maintain high levels of focused drive and energy, and meet the deadlines.
* Professional and ethical.
* Attention to details.


**Language**
* Excellent command of written and spoken English. Arabic is a plus.


**Location/travel**
* Riyadh, KSA.
* Flexibility to travel to Dubai and throughout the GCC.


 Business Unit: Support Functions In Geographies
   

  

 Division: SF In AMEA \- GCC \& Pak \- KSA
   

  

 Legal Entity: ENGIE Saudi Holding Company LLC
   

  

 Professional Experience: Skilled ( \>3 experience \<15 years)
   

  

 Education Level: Bachelor's Degree
   

  

 Company Name: ENGIE Saudi Arabia

data.title: Delivery Manager
data.raw_snippet:
The Delivery Manager is responsible for the end\-to\-end delivery of microwave and millimeter\-wave link deployments, ensuring projects are executed on time, within scope, and to telecom\-grade quality standards.
   

  

 This role sits at the intersection of engineering, operations, and customer d
data.jd_text:
The Delivery Manager is responsible for the end\-to\-end delivery of microwave and millimeter\-wave link deployments, ensuring projects are executed on time, within scope, and to telecom\-grade quality standards.
   

  

 This role sits at the intersection of engineering, operations, and customer delivery, working closely with internal teams, subcontractors, and telecom partners (e.g., Zain, Salam, STC) to ensure seamless rollout and operational readiness.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Project Delivery \& Execution
* Lead end\-to\-end deployment of MW and mmWave links across multiple projects
* Own delivery timelines, milestones, and resource planning
* Ensure on\-time, on\-budget execution of all assigned deployments
* Manage site readiness, installation, alignment, commissioning, and handover
* Field Operations Management
* Supervise field teams and subcontractors performing installations
* Ensure adherence to installation SOPs, safety standards, and quality benchmarks
* Validate proper grounding, surge protection (LPUs), and environmental compliance
* Resolve on\-site technical challenges during deployment
* Technical Oversight
* Ensure MW link performance meets design KPIs (throughput, latency, availability)
* Oversee link budget validation, LOS verification, and alignment accuracy
* Support troubleshooting of issues such as:
+ Throughput degradation
+ Interference / alignment issues
+ Power / PoE instability

* Coordinate with RF and product teams for escalations
* Stakeholder \& Customer Management
* Act as the primary delivery interface with telecom operators and enterprise customers
* Coordinate with partners (Zain, Salam, STC, etc.) on:
+ Site access
+ OAM onboarding
+ Acceptance testing

* Provide regular updates on project progress, risks, and mitigation plans
* Quality Assurance \& Acceptance
* Ensure deployments meet telecom\-grade acceptance criteria
* Drive site acceptance testing (SAT) and commissioning reports
* Maintain documentation including:
+ As\-built drawings
+ Link reports
+ Acceptance certificates

* Planning \& Scaling
* Contribute to scaling deployment operations for large\-volume rollouts (100s\-1000s of links)
* Improve processes, tools, and workflows for faster and more reliable delivery
* Work with planning teams on network design inputs and rollout strategy
* Tools \& Systems
* Utilize and support systems such as:
+ NMS
+ Ticketing systems (e.g., Remedy)
+ Project tracking tools

* Ensure proper reporting of KPIs, alarms, and field issues


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering, Telecommunications, or related field
* 5\-10\+ years of experience in:
+ Microwave (MW) or wireless network deployments
+ Telecom infrastructure projects

* Proven experience managing field deployments and subcontractors


**Technical Skills**
* Strong knowledge of:
+ Microwave and mmWave systems (6\-80 GHz, especially 60 GHz is a plus)
+ Link budgeting and RF fundamentals
+ Installation best practices (alignment, grounding, surge protection)

* Familiarity with:
+ IP networking basics (Layer 2/3, VLANs, QoS)
+ OAM and telecom integration processes
+ Fiber vs wireless backhaul architectures


**Soft Skills**
* Strong leadership and team management skills
* Excellent problem\-solving and decision\-making under pressure
* Clear communication with both technical and non\-technical stakeholders
* Ability to operate in fast\-paced startup and telco environments


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience working with telecom operators in Saudi Arabia
* PMP or equivalent project management certification
* Experience in large\-scale rollout programs


**KPIs / Success Metrics**
* On\-time project delivery rate
* Link performance vs design targets
* Number of successful site acceptances
* Deployment cycle time per link
* Customer satisfaction / operator feedback


**Benefits**
* Private Health Insurance
* Training \& Development
* Performance Bonus
* Compatitive salaries

data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
 WSP in the Middle East is currently seeking an accomplished and experienced professional to join our team as an
 **Associate Director – Building Services** 
 at our distinguished engineering consultancy, based in Riyadh, KSA.
   

  

 The successful candidate will assume a pivo
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 WSP in the Middle East is currently seeking an accomplished and experienced professional to join our team as an
 **Associate Director – Building Services** 
 at our distinguished engineering consultancy, based in Riyadh, KSA.
   

  

 The successful candidate will assume a pivotal role in providing leadership to the MEP (Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing) design team, contributing to business development activities, and ensuring the successful delivery of projects. We are specifically seeking an individual with a robust background in engineering consultancy, demonstrating substantial experience in MEP design. A minimum of 18 years of relevant experience is required, with a strong preference for candidates who have worked in the GCC region and successfully delivered projects in KSA.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 As an Associate Director in WSP, you are expected to be experienced and involved in the following:
   

  

* Nurture client relationship and engage in work winning. Create strong connections with existing clients and acquire new connections with impactful clients in KSA.
* Act as a WSP ambassador, representing WSP to clients and their representatives.
* Hands\-on experience in the operational delivery of small to medium size projects as an MEP leader or multidisciplinary leader for all engineering and architectural services including management of subconsultants.
* Lead and successfully deliver small to medium size project proposals, MEP or multidisciplinary. Closely communicate with clients to secure projects.
* Have excellent communication skills. Have strong presentation skills and the ability to create meaningful connections with clients, stakeholders and peers at WSP.
* Building Services technical leader that is well rounded in all MEP services and understand each discipline's main constraints, risks and opportunities
* Have excellent technical knowledge in mechanical or electrical building services and delivered several projects successfully to the client’s satisfaction. Have a deep understanding of standards, regulations and authority requirements and can provide tailored advice to our clients.
* Skilled in delivering different project market sectors (Commercial, Retail, Hospitality, etc.) and have a strong understanding of associated standard, authority requirements and sustainability requirements
* Develop the technical capability of the team. Identify weaknesses and support them to improve their performance and outcome proactively and constructively
* People leader, able to lead, inspire, engage, and develop a team.
* High financial acumen with experience in budget management, change management and accountability for project financial performance, having a track record of delivering project within agreed design fee.
* Deliver high integrity documentations with focus on quality and meeting client intent.
* Supporting Team Leaders / Head of Building Services on project reviews including Technical and Commercial activities.
* Responsible for project technical control and ensure that all designs are technically sound and meet the client brief.
* Check project team's work thoroughly and ensure it complies to standards, authority requirements and client intent. Work closely with team to ensure the work is coordinated and correct
* Experienced in resource management and leading a large project team. Able to assess team capability, distribute tasks and control the flow of work.
* Excellent risk management skills, able to raise, control and mitigate risk effectively and in a timely manner.
* Review project commercials along with the stage deliverables on monthly basis and report to the project director and Team Leaders.
* Project financial control, end of month reporting on project financial status, possible VOs, invoicing status, WIP and debt.
* Ensure project management procedure is followed as per company practice including QA.
* Reporting to the direct report on project technical and commercial performance. Keep the project team informed of key deliverables, deadlines, program, progress, issues, and changes.
* Review and endorse MEP design documents to ensure compliance with industry standards and regulations.
* Establishing and monitoring project key performance indicators (KPIs) for the project to comply with all company policies, procedures and guidelines.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in building services with a mechanical or electrical bias; master’s degree is a plus.
* Preferably Chartered with a reputable professional body (CIBSE, IET, etc.)
* Minimum of 18 years of experience in MEP design, with a multi\-disciplinary consulting engineering background.
* A high sense of ownership and accountability
* Proven leadership experience with the ability to inspire, develop and motivate a large team.
* Out of box thinking and problem solving.
* In\-depth knowledge of MEP codes, standards, and best practices.
* Experience working in the GCC region is highly desirable.


 Imagine a better future for you and a better future for us all.
   

  

 Join our close\-knit community of talented individuals who share your passion for making a positive impact. Our global team includes more than 69,000 employees, working together to make a difference in communities both close to home and around the world.
   

  

 With us, you can. Apply today.

**Director of Project Design Management**
 Want to work with the most sought\-after minds and most talked\-about projects? Your experience of Design Management in Engineering Consultancy might just make you our new Design Management Director.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Here at Buro Happold, expect the exceptional.**
 From the projects you will work on to the clients we work with. From career\-defining opportunities to an inclusive and diverse practice where we all contribute to a more equitable world. From our reputation to our relationships. Wherever your Buro Happold career takes you, it’ll be anything but ordinary.
   

  

**Your next role**
 Buro Happold has a clear strategic plan, strong learning culture and entrepreneurial mindset that will allow you to thrive.
   

  

 You’ll be part of something bigger than us all where sustainability, equity, social and performance outcomes matter. All of Buro Happold is committed to doing the right thing, even when that’s the hardest thing. This is a genuine opportunity to make impact \- and leave real legacy.
   

  

**Your key duties**
 The role entails providing strategic leadership to clients and overseeing major buildings and infrastructure projects across the Middle East. It also carries the accountability for the successful delivery of complex, multidisciplinary projects, ensuring the highest standards of quality, commercial performance, and client satisfaction. Acting as a trusted senior advisor, the director will be the primary client interface, working closely with local partners and regional leadership.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Strategic Project Delivery**
* Scope Management: Define and manage project scope to ensure alignment with client expectations and organisational objectives.
* Schedule Management: Oversee the development and governance of robust project programmes to achieve timely delivery.
* Quality Assurance: Establish and maintain quality control processes to ensure all deliverables meet internal and client standards.
* Financial Oversight: Provide strategic supervision of project budgets, financial performance, and risk management.
* Governance \& Commercial Control: Implement and uphold strong commercial and governance practices.


**Leadership**
* Client Engagement: Lead senior‑level client meetings and act as a trusted advisor.
* Mentorship: Coach and mentor senior staff, supporting succession planning and professional development.
* Design Leadership: Guide teams in resolving complex project challenges through integrated, multidisciplinary solutions.
* Service Growth: Identify opportunities to promote Buro Happold’s wider service offerings.
* Team Leadership: Foster a positive, high‑performance team culture in appointed Buro Happold project teams.


**Collaboration**
* Cross‑Discipline Working: Support collaboration across disciplines, regions, and business units to deliver exceptional outcomes.
* Knowledge Sharing: Contribute to the wider practice by sharing lessons learned, best practice, and thought leadership.
* Role Modelling: Champion collaborative behaviours and inclusive ways of working in appointed Buro Happold project teams.


**Technical \& Professional Excellence**
* Technology Integration: Advise on the strategic use of digital tools and project technologies to enhance delivery and client value.
* Deliverable Quality: Ensure all reports, presentations, models, and drawings are produced to the highest professional standards.
* Quality Compliance: Enforce compliance with Buro Happold’s internal quality management systems.
* Professional Development: Promote continuous learning, CPD, and awareness of industry and technical advancements.


**Your Skills And Experience**
* Degree in Architecture, Engineering, or Master Planning.
* Proven experience in a senior leadership role with at least 5 years in the Middle East.
* Project management qualification (e.g., PMP) or significant project delivery experience.
* Professional accreditation from a recognised organisation.
* Strong technical background in multidisciplinary building and infrastructure design.
* Proven experience in strategic project delivery and team leadership, including managing remote teams.
* Excellent communication skills, capable of engaging with senior clients and collaborators.
* Understanding of Middle East policies and regulations.
* Experience in managing multidisciplinary LDC projects, overseeing financial and technical performance, and creating and managing programmes.
* Experience in developing long term relationships with clients and collaborators, and leading fee estimates, proposals, and negotiating terms and conditions.
* Familiarity with Project Management information systems (e.g., Aconex).


**What We Offer You**
* Bring your knowledge and expertise to one of the world’s most respected consultancies.
* Hybrid working arrangements
* Attractive salary and benefits package
* A strong commitment to your continuous development. Whatever stage in your career, we have a learning and development programme that will enable and empower you
* Entitlement to two memberships to professional bodies or subscriptions
* An international culture that wherever your career takes you at Buro Happold, you won’t be far from the exceptional.


**At Buro Happold, everyone else’s extraordinary is just our everyday.**
**Apply today and be a part of our legacy.**
**A place for everyone**
 Buro Happold values individual's flexible approaches to working patterns as an important part of the way you work and achieve balance. We welcome applications from those who are seeking flexibility in their careers.
   

  

 Our exceptional portfolio of projects is the result of the diversity of thought, identities, backgrounds and experiences that shape us. Appreciating each other’s differences is key, we want employees to feel they don’t have to mask elements of their identity to thrive.
   

  

 We are working to change the lack of representation of marginalised groups in the built environment and are particularly keen to hear from anyone who feels they are underrepresented in the industry. We have much to learn from one another. Embracing difference allows us to develop the most innovative and elegant solutions.
   

  

 Please let us know if there are any adjustments, we could make to the application process to make it easier and more comfortable for you. Contact recruitment@burohappold.com so we can work with you to support you throughout your application.

data.title: Drone Delivery Operation Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**【Job Responsibilities】**
**【Job Requirements】**
 JD Logistics is seeking a Drone Delivery Operations Manager to lead and execute our innovative drone delivery projects in Saudi Arabia. This role is ideal for professionals with strong experience in managing overseas drone operations and setting up
data.jd_text:
**【Job Responsibilities】**
**【Job Requirements】**
 JD Logistics is seeking a Drone Delivery Operations Manager to lead and execute our innovative drone delivery projects in Saudi Arabia. This role is ideal for professionals with strong experience in managing overseas drone operations and setting up large\-scale deployment plans. Key Responsibilities Research and analyze the business environment for drone delivery in the Saudi market, and conduct preliminary assessments of hardware/software product requirements. Collaborate with domestic teams to assist in defining detailed product requirements for hardware and software, and contribute to the development of overseas product solutions. Monitor and track Saudi civil aviation policies and regulations, and manage operational license applications. Participate in managing the development progress of overseas product solutions, adjust plans as needed, and track delivery timelines to ensure on\-time completion. Work with operations teams to design end\-to\-end solutions (including operational workflows) and implement localized deployment. Requirements Bachelor’s degree or higher; 5\+ years in drone operations, logistics management, or related fields. Proven experience in overseas drone operations and establishing flight routes. Strong understanding of regulatory frameworks, particularly in the Middle East. Excellent project management, problem\-solving, and cross\-functional collaboration skills. Customer\-focused mindset with strong communication and high resilience under pressure. Fluency in English and Mandarin is mandatory; Arabic proficiency is a plus.
   

  

 【
 **About JD.com】**
 JD.com (NASDAQ: JD and HKEX: 9618\), also known as JINGDONG, has evolved from a pioneering e\-commerce platform into a leading technology and service provider with supply chain at its core. Renowned for its supply chain innovation and excellence, JD.com has expanded into sectors including retail, technology, logistics, healthcare, and more, aiming to transform traditional business models with cutting\-edge digital solutions. Ranked 47th on the Fortune Global 500, JD.com is China’s largest retailer by revenue. In 2023, JD.com reported revenues of US$152\.8 billion and served approximately 600 million active customers.
   

  

**【Our International Business】**
 We are dedicated to building a digitally intelligent, cross\-border supply chain and global retail infrastructure. Leveraging our global supply chain capabilities, JD.com continues to expand in markets where our competitive strengths shine. Currently, JD.com operates globally, with business activities in countries such as China, the U.S., U.K., Netherlands, France, Germany, Spain, Brazil, Hungary, Japan, South Korea, Australia, Thailand, Vietnam, Malaysia, Indonesia, Saudi Arabia, the UAE, and many others, reaching customers in every corner of the world.

data.title: Director - Financial Planning and Analysis (RES7)
data.raw_snippet:
We are seeking an experienced
 **Director \- Residential FP\&A** 
 to establish and lead the financial planning and analysis function for a newly established Residential subsidiary within a large\-scale Saudi giga‑project.
   

  

 This role will play a critical part in setting up the financial fou
data.jd_text:
We are seeking an experienced
 **Director \- Residential FP\&A** 
 to establish and lead the financial planning and analysis function for a newly established Residential subsidiary within a large\-scale Saudi giga‑project.
   

  

 This role will play a critical part in setting up the financial foundations of a newly formed residential platform while operating within the governance, funding, and reporting architecture of an existing giga‑project.
   

  

 The role will act as a key financial interface between the Residential Business Unit, Corporate Finance, and regulatory stakeholders.
   

  

 The Director will be responsible for designing and embedding best\-in\-class financial planning, forecasting and reporting processes for a large\-scale residential portfolio.
   

  

 The role requires a hands\-on leader with deep real estate/development experience, capable of building financial discipline, enabling informed decision\-making, and ensuring strong financial governance across complex, multi\-year projects.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**FP\&A leadership**
* Lead the FP\&A function for the Residential Business Unit and the newly established residential operating subsidiary
* Enhance and manage the budgeting, forecasting, and management reporting frameworks for residential development projects within a giga‑project environment
* Develop and embed financial governance frameworks, controls, and reporting standards aligned with Corporate Finance, Board, and investment committee requirements
* Ensure financial structures, controls, and reporting are fit for purpose for the residential business unit
* Act as the primary financial counterpart to Corporate Finance, Treasury, Internal Audit, and External Auditors for residential activities.


**Financial planning and portfolio oversight**
* Prepare and maintain consolidated financial forecasts for the residential portfolio, including capex planning and cash flow projections.
* Monitor financial performance across residential projects and provide variance analysis against approved business plans.
* Manage portfolio‑level cash flow planning, funding requirements, and liquidity forecasts, with specific focus on off‑plan sales and escrow funding dynamics
* Produce regular financial reports and dashboards for senior leadership and investment committees.


**Escrow Management, Audit, and Regulatory Compliance (REGA / WAFI)**
* Establish, oversee, and govern escrow account structures for off‑plan residential sales in full compliance with REGA and WAFI regulations.
* Coordinate with banks, escrow trustees, legal advisors, and Corporate Treasury on escrow account setup, usage rules, drawdown mechanisms, and reporting
* Ensure accurate tracking and reconciliation of escrow inflows, permitted outflows, and balances at project and portfolio level
* Lead the preparation of escrow\-related reporting and submissions required by REGA and other relevant authorities
* Act as the primary finance lead for all internal and external audits related to escrow accounts, residential projects, and the residential subsidiary
* Ensure robust audit trails, documentation standards, and financial controls are in place to support regulatory reviews and statutory audits


**Business partnering with development teams**
* Partner closely with development, commercial, and sales teams to support financial decision‑making across the full residential development lifecycle
* Provide financial insights on development projects through the development stage gate lifecycle and support feasibility studies
* Align cashflow forecasts to residential projects progress and revised development programs


**Systems and process development**
* Lead the implementation of FP\&A tools, financial models, and reporting systems to support residential portfolio and subsidiary monitoring
* Support integration with corporate finance systems, including SAP FICO, ensuring residential and escrow transactions are accurately reflected
* Contribute to the development of data visualization and performance dashboards (e.g., Power BI) for executive and regulatory reporting
* Drive continuous improvements in reporting efficiency, automation, data quality, and analytical depth.


**Leadership**
* Build, lead, and scale a high‑performing FP\&A team as the residential platform grows.
* Establish a high‑accountability culture with strong technical rigor, commercial mindset, and compliance awareness.


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or a related field
* CPA or equivalent qualification is essential.
* 12\-15\+ years of experience in financial planning and analysis, development finance, or project finance within the real estate sector.
* Strong experience working on large\-scale real estate developments, ideally with projects exceeding $ 1B in capex.
* Experience working with regional real estate developers in the Middle East is required.
* Proven track record of building financial processes and systems in a new or evolving organization.
* Strong financial modeling skills and advanced Excel proficiency.
* Experience with ERP systems such as SAP FICO; familiarity with Power BI or similar visualization tools is a plus.
* Exposure to feasibility modeling tools such as Estate Master is advantageous.
* Strong communication skills and ability to work effectively with senior stakeholders in an international environment

data.title: Senior Account Manager, Project specific
data.raw_snippet:
About the Role:
   

  

 Role Overview
   

  

 The
 **Senior Account Manager** 
 is responsible for the day\-to\-day on the ground project coordination to help deliver a long\-term large scale digital project.
   

  

 This role will be embedded with the client team and act as a primary on\-the\
data.jd_text:
About the Role:
   

  

 Role Overview
   

  

 The
 **Senior Account Manager** 
 is responsible for the day\-to\-day on the ground project coordination to help deliver a long\-term large scale digital project.
   

  

 This role will be embedded with the client team and act as a primary on\-the\-ground point of coordination in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. The Senior Account Manager will work closely with our client’s internal departments and teams to gather feedback to communicate with the rest of the Journey team. The Senior Account Manager is responsible for delivering large and small scale projects according to brief, timeline and budget alongside developing strong relationships with the client team.
   

  

 Due to the nature of the work, the ideal candidate has experience supporting capital projects within cultural institutions and understands how creative work integrates into longer construction and institutional timelines.
   

  

**The Project**
 This giga\-project is a landmark destination city built around the philosophy of the “Power of Play,” integrating entertainment, sports, and culture at unprecedented scale within a livable urban environment. Spanning a wide range of districts and planned to support 500,000 residents, it brings together world\-class attractions, major global events, and diversified leisure offerings while contributing to broader national transformation ambitions.
   

  

 This Next\-Gen Visualisation programme supports this vision by establishing a scalable digital production ecosystem—including a continuously updatable Unreal Engine “Marketing Twin”—that enables consistent, high\-quality storytelling across multiple stakeholders. This platform integrates asset governance, real\-time workflows, and creative guidelines to ensure the digital representation of the city evolves in parallel with its physical development and can be used reliably by internal and external partners.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 The essential functions include, but are not limited to:
   

  

**Project Co\-ordination \& Delivery**
* Manage day\-to\-day delivery of multiple phases of a large project, ensuring alignment with approved scope, schedule, and budget
* Act as a central coordination point between client teams, internal studio teams, and external partners
* Translate client discussions and decisions into clear actions, timelines, and responsibilities
* Track milestones, dependencies, and approval across all workstreams
* Responsible for project budget of £10m\+
* Develop and maintain project schedules aligned with capital project phases and client milestones
* Proactively identify, assess, and manage risks related to schedule, budget, scope, and coordination


**Client \& Stakeholder Management**
* Liaise directly with client stakeholders to drive discussions to resolution
* Serve as a consistent point of contact for designated projects
* Attend and support client meetings, workshops, and site walks
* Build trusted relationships through clarity, reliability, and proactive communication


**Candidate Qualifications \& Skills:**
**Required**
* Arabic speaking
* 5\+ years experience in an account management role within a creative, cultural, architectural, or production environment
* Experience managing complex and high\-profile projects
* Strong understanding of schedules, budgets, and dependency management
* Experience working alongside or supporting capital projects or long\-term institutional initiatives
* Experience with project management tools / software
* Strong verbal and written communication skills (Arabic and English)
* Organized and efficient
* Experience with Google Suite
* Advanced Microsoft Office Suite
* Willingness to travel


**Desirable**
* Experience working with clients in the museums, cultural institutions, theme park, public\-facing capital projects
* Saudi National
* Familiarity with digital or interactive software development
* PMP or PRINCE2 but not essential


**Contract Type:** 
 Full time, Fixed Term Contract \- 6 months
   

  

**Location:** 
 this role is based in Riyadh, working remotely with the wider Journey Studios
   

  

 Salary Pay Range
   

  

 ر.س330,000—ر.س405,000 SAR
   

  

**About Journey**
 The Multidimensional Experience Agency
   

  

 Journey is a global design and innovation agency shaping the future through multidimensional experiences (MDX) that connect people, brands, and culture.
   

  

 Our layered MDX approach crafts story\-driven, sensory\-rich engagement across physical, immersive, digital, and virtual spaces—fuelled by creative and technological innovation.
   

  

 Born from a legacy of pioneering studios, Journey blends strategic thinking with deep creative expertise to deliver solutions across industries.
   

  

 Journey’s MDX approach fuels growth and forges lasting value for audiences and partners, by creating cultural connections that resonate with impact.
   

  

 Start your journey here www.journey.world

data.title: Project Construction Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Who We Are**
 JINGDONG Property (JD Property) is JD.com’s fast\-growing infrastructure investment and asset management platform. We develop and manage logistics parks, business parks, data centres, and other essential facilities that power JD.com’s wider supply\-chain ecosystem. By combining strat
data.jd_text:
**Who We Are**
 JINGDONG Property (JD Property) is JD.com’s fast\-growing infrastructure investment and asset management platform. We develop and manage logistics parks, business parks, data centres, and other essential facilities that power JD.com’s wider supply\-chain ecosystem. By combining strategic investment with deep insight into merchandise and logistics flows, we support the growth of sectors including e\-commerce, retail, manufacturing, and beyond.
   

  

**Our Global Reach**
 JINGDONG Property is rapidly expanding worldwide, with more than 50 overseas infrastructure projects across eight countries, including Indonesia, Vietnam, Singapore, the UK, the Netherlands, Germany, Japan, and the UAE. We are building a modern global logistics infrastructure network that strengthens JD.com’s international supply\-chain ecosystem and supports broader global trade and cooperation.
   

  

 Learn more about who we are and what we do: https://jdp.com.cn/about
   

  

**What We Offer**
 Joining JD Property means helping build the infrastructure that keeps global commerce moving. You’ll take on meaningful challenges, learn from experienced teams, and contribute to projects that shape long\-term impact. With a competitive salary, great locations, and a supportive, people\-first culture, you’ll have the space to grow and thrive in a fast\-evolving environment.
   

  

**About The Team**
 You’ll be joining the JINGDONG Property team, which values collaboration, ownership, and a commitment to delivering high\-quality results in a fast\-paced, dynamic environment.
   

  

* Construction Quality and Safety Supervision: Oversee civil construction quality and safety measures per national standards and design drawings. Inspect acceptance and process standards of concealed work to ensure compliance with technical specifications and safety goals.
* Schedule Management: Prepare individual schedules for civil engineering projects. Monitor construction progress dynamically, resolving critical issues affecting timelines to ensure on\-schedule advancement.
* Technical Data and Drawing Management: Organize drawing reviews and technical disclosures. Verify construction technical data (e.g., quantities, reports, drawings) for accuracy and compliance.
* Site Coordination and Resource Integration: Coordinate on\-site work among supervision, contractors, and suppliers. Resolve cross\-disciplinary conflicts and review safety plans to maintain a standardized and orderly construction environment.
* Cost and Contract Management: Participate in technical bid preparation, contract drafting, and quantity reviews. Control construction costs by reviewing change orders and visas to avoid unnecessary expenditures.
* Acceptance and Documentation Management: Organize project section acceptance. Prepare weekly/monthly reports and meeting minutes to ensure complete and traceable construction documentation.


*At JINGDONG Property, we’re committed to building a diverse and inclusive workplace where everyone can thrive. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and make all employment decisions without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, disability, age, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic.*
**Ready to apply?**
 Take the next step in your career, apply now and explore the opportunities we have to offer.

data.title: Software Engineering Director
data.raw_snippet:
This is the general track for Engineering Director at Canonical, apply here if you are confident to run a project which spans teams and time zones, hiring and managing engineering managers and staff engineers.
   

  

 Canonical's largest software products are built by multiple teams working togeth
data.jd_text:
This is the general track for Engineering Director at Canonical, apply here if you are confident to run a project which spans teams and time zones, hiring and managing engineering managers and staff engineers.
   

  

 Canonical's largest software products are built by multiple teams working together under a single director of engineering. Once you have passed the first round of interviews we will discuss specific software products which would be a good fit for your interests.
   

  

 We believe that open source is just starting to transform the tech sector and enterprise compute. Our goal is to make open source easier, more reliable and more secure for deployment and development. We strive to be the provider of 'most software to most companies'. To deliver on that ambition, our engineers are carefully selected from the applicants across the globe. We select for brilliance and motivation to take open source to the next level. Our engineering directors set the pace and the direction to help teams achieve more than they realised they could, and feel proud of the result.
   

  

 Even though this is a senior management position, managing managers, we expect Engineering Directors to be outstanding developers with the confidence to lead by example across the full range of activities in their teams. You need to understand what great code looks like in the language and genre of your product \- whether that is a web service, or a system daemon, or a desktop application, or a distributed system. You'll need to know how to drive testing and benchmarking to improve the clarity in your teams around quality and performance. You'll also need to be confident to set and defend high expectations of work ethic, consistency, focus and learning.
   

  

 We have director level roles across a wide range of engineering domains, including:
   

  

* Python and Golang
* C / C\+\+ / Rust
* Data infrastructure
* HTML / CSS / JavaScript / Typescript / React
* Flutter
* Distro packaging and systems
* SAAS and web microservices
* Kernel
* Servers
* Graphics, Browser and Desktop
* Silicon enablement and embedded devices
* Product Security


 If your domain of expertise isn't listed above, yet you feel it's relevant to Canonical, then feel free to apply anyway. We will route you to the most suitable team.
   

  

 Location: The role is remote, with positions available in all time zones. It includes a requirement for global travel for twice per year, for trips up to two weeks long.
   

  

 What you'll do
   

  

* Lead multiple teams of engineers, ranging from graduate to senior
* Develop your engineering managers and maintain Canonical culture
* Hire staff level engineers for specific roles like performance and quality
* Coach, mentor, and offer career development feedback
* Identify and measure indicators of team health and productivity
* Ensure rounded delivery including community participation and docs
* Implement disciplined engineering processes and defend them
* Set and measure progress against benchmark goals for speed and efficiency
* Represent your product to stakeholders, partners, and customers
* Develop and evangelise great engineering and organisational practices
* Plan and manage progress on agreed goals and projects
* Be an active part of the leadership team, collaborating with other leaders
* Collaborate with leads for related or dependent products


 What we're looking for in you
   

  

* An exceptional academic track record from both high school and university
* Undergraduate degree in Computer Science or STEM, or a compelling narrative about your alternative path
* Extensive management experience and confidence to set high expectations
* Outstanding Linux based software engineering track record
* Drive and a track record of going above\-and\-beyond expectations
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English
* Public speaking and presentation skills
* A love of developing and growing people and a track record of it
* Experience in leading, coaching and mentoring software developers
* Organised and able to ensure your team delivers timely, high quality results
* Well\-organised, self\-starting and able to deliver to schedule
* Professional manner interacting with colleagues, partners, and community
* You have advanced expertise in your own domain
* You are knowledgeable and passionate about software development
* You have solid experience working in an agile development environment
* You have a demonstrated drive for continual learning
* Builds trust, relationships and confidence
* Result\-oriented, with a personal drive to meet commitments
* Ability to travel twice a year, for company events up to two weeks each


**Additional Skills We Value**
* Experience in a developer advocacy or community role
* Open source community engagement and leadership
* Ops and system administration experience
* Performance engineering and security experience


 What we offer you
   

  

 We consider geographical location, experience, and performance in shaping compensation worldwide. We revisit compensation annually (and more often for graduates and associates) to ensure we recognise outstanding performance. In addition to base pay, we offer a performance\-driven annual bonus. We provide all team members with additional benefits, which reflect our values and ideals. We balance our programs to meet local needs and ensure fairness globally.
   

  

* Distributed work environment with twice\-yearly team sprints in person
* Personal learning and development budget of USD 2,000 per year
* Annual compensation review
* Recognition rewards
* Annual holiday leave
* Maternity and paternity leave
* Employee Assistance Programme
* Opportunity to travel to new locations to meet colleagues
* Priority Pass, and travel upgrades for long haul company events


**About Canonical**
 Canonical is a pioneering tech firm at the forefront of the global move to open source. As the company that publishes Ubuntu, one of the most important open source projects and the platform for AI, IoT and the cloud, we are changing the world on a daily basis. We recruit on a global basis and set a very high standard for people joining the company. We expect excellence \- in order to succeed, we need to be the best at what we do. Canonical has been a remote\-first company since its inception in 2004\. Working here is a step into the future, and will challenge you to think differently, work smarter, learn new skills, and raise your game.
   

  

 Canonical is an equal opportunity employer
   

  

 We are proud to foster a workplace free from discrimination. Diversity of experience, perspectives, and background create a better work environment and better products. Whatever your identity, we will give your application fair consideration.

data.raw_snippet:
