data.raw_snippet:
**Lalamove** 
 is disrupting the logistics industry by connecting customers and drivers directly through our technology. We offer customers a lightning fast and convenient way to book delivery and moving services whether they are at their home, at work or on the go. People talk about O2O, we live it
data.jd_text:
**Lalamove** 
 is disrupting the logistics industry by connecting customers and drivers directly through our technology. We offer customers a lightning fast and convenient way to book delivery and moving services whether they are at their home, at work or on the go. People talk about O2O, we live it!
   

  

 Currently, Lalamove is a leading global on\-demand delivery platform with millions of delivery partners serving millions of orders everyday.
   

  

 With 1600\+ employees spread across SEA, INDIA, LATAM, TURKEY, UAE and GERMANY; our company has reached unicorn status in 2018, is well funded by prominent VCs and has kept growing at tremendous speed since.
   

  

 Our strength lies in our internal values, namely
 **Passion** 
 in serving local communities, empowering SMEs and our driver partners,
 **Execution** 
 and
 **Grit** 
 because that is how we differentiate ourselves by never giving up and striving for excellence, and
 **Humility** 
 \- awareness in ourselves to learn from others and never stop improving.
   

  

 At Lalamove, we strongly believe in the power of community. Millions of drivers and customers use our technology every day to connect with one another and move things that matter. Delivery is what we do best and we ensure it is always fast and simple. Since 2013, we have tackled the logistics industry head on to find the most innovative solutions for the world’s delivery needs.
   

  

 Our vision is to bring communities closer and make city life easier by allowing fast and convenient circulation of goods. We realise this vision with a ‘glocal’ approach, building a robust operations team to adapt our product to local networks of businesses and delivery contractors. At the same time, we have ambition to build an international brand by establishing an even more global presence.
   

  

 As part of our plan to achieve this ambition we will be entering the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, starting with Riyadh and seeking a Sales Associate based in Riyadh.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Sales and lead sourcing: Acquire and onboard business users by maintaining a healthy pipeline of leads as well as developing and taking care of professional relationships
* Salesmanship: Must have vast experience in sales in KSA, familiarity with the local market, and know how to prospect and qualify leads, build relationships and follow up on new business opportunities.
* Business development: Develop new business opportunities by establishing a strong working relationship with local partners.
* Sales operations: Ensure that the standard operating procedures and policies are implemented in a timely and accurate manner.
* Brand Ambassador: Become the face of Lalamove when engaging local partners to promote our services and values.


**What You'll Need**
* Minimum 2 years relevant sales working experience in KSA (startup or logistics industry is a plus).
* Bachelor's degree Business, Finance or related discipline from a reputable institution.
* Excellent problem solving, presentation and negotiation skills.
* Willingness to roll up your sleeves and take accountability.
* Must have excellent presentation and communications skills and be fluent in English, Arabic is a plus.
* Proficiency in CRM programs is a plus.
* Charming personality to build and maintain personal relationships.
* Autonomous and adaptable to cope with an ever\-changing working environment.
* Can\-do attitude and grit to make things happen, to identify and leverage new opportunities.
* Must have a valid driving license and car.


 To all candidates\- Lalamove respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data.
   

  

 This Notice will inform you how we will use your personal data, explain your privacy rights and the protection you have by the law when you apply to join us. Please take time to read and understand this Notice. Candidate Privacy Notice: https://www.lalamove.com/en\-sa/candidate\-privacy\-notice
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

**Public Policy Associate Director**

 Riyadh

**About Astrazeneca**
 AstraZeneca is a global, science\-led, patient\-focused biopharmaceutical company that focuses on the discovery, development, and commer
data.jd_text:
**JOB TITLE**
**Public Policy Associate Director**
**Job Location:** 
 Riyadh
   

  

**Reports To:** 
 Corporate Affairs Director
   

  

**About Astrazeneca**
 AstraZeneca is a global, science\-led, patient\-focused biopharmaceutical company that focuses on the discovery, development, and commercialisation of prescription medicines for some of the world’s most serious diseases. But we’re more than one of the world’s leading pharmaceutical companies.
   

  

**Site Description**
***AstraZeneca is experiencing a significant transformation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, driven by a commitment to advancing healthcare, innovation, and sustainable growth. Building on our global legacy, AZ KSA is rapidly evolving its operations to better serve patients, collaborate with healthcare stakeholders, and contribute to the ambitious goals outlined in the Saudi Vision 2030\. We are investing in talent, digital solutions, and new ways of working; all designed to enhance our impact on patient outcomes and reinforce our leadership in therapeutic areas. This dynamic environment calls for visionary, agile professionals who thrive in change and are motivated to help shape the future of healthcare in KSA.***
**Role Summary**
 The
 **Public Policy Associate Director** 
 is responsible for shaping, executing, and advancing AstraZeneca’s policy and advocacy strategy in support of the business unit’s portfolio and objectives. Reporting to the Gulf Corporate Affairs Director, this leadership role focuses on analyzing and influencing the external policy environment, identifying opportunities and risks, and guiding the organization’s engagement with critical stakeholders. The position works cross\-functionally with commercial, medical, regulatory, and government affairs colleagues to support patient access, drive business priorities, and ensure alignment with AstraZeneca’s mission and values.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Develop and maintain a deep understanding of the policy landscape affecting AstraZeneca’s disease products, anticipating emerging trends and regulatory changes.
* Monitor relevant legislation, regulations, and advocacy activities to ensure compliance and proactively address potential risks to the business unit’s interests.
* Lead the design, implementation, and evaluation of public policy and advocacy projects that advance therapeutic access, reimbursement, and innovation for the respective therapy area(s).
* Assess and grow internal policy shaping capabilities, with a particular focus on ensuring alignment between national priorities and our therapy area\-specific objectives.
* Ensuring KSA policy strategies are aligned with AstraZeneca’s global policy framework and contribute to broader corporate affairs strategy and must wins.
* Build and sustain relationships with key external stakeholders, including policymakers, senior government officials, patient advocacy groups, medical societies, NGOs, and industry associations.
* Serve as a strategic advisor to cross\-functional teams, ensuring alignment between policy priorities and business goals. Act as a subject matter expert for policy\-related input into brand plans, regulatory submissions, market access, and lifecycle management.
* Develop impactful policy position statements, white papers, briefings, and other communication materials for internal and external audiences.
* Track and report key policy and advocacy outcomes, supporting continuous improvement in strategy and execution.


**Essential For The Role**
* Bachelor’s degree in Public Health, Pharmacy, Life Sciences, or a related discipline required; Master’s degree in Public Policy, Health Economics, or a relevant field strongly preferred.
* Minimum of 3 years’ experience in healthcare policy, government affairs, or advocacy roles, with proven success in the pharmaceutical, biotech, or healthcare sector.
* Experience influencing public policy at national and/or international levels, including shaping legislative frameworks.
* Strong knowledge of regulatory and reimbursement environments relevant to AstraZeneca’s therapy areas.
* Familiarity with market access, pricing, and reimbursement challenges in innovative therapeutics.
* Exceptional analytical, interpersonal, and communication skills. Demonstrated ability to manage complex projects and lead cross\-functional initiatives.
* Strategic thinker, results\-oriented, and adept at navigating ambiguous and evolving policy environments.
* Ability to represent AstraZeneca externally with credibility and impact.
* High agility in stakeholder management and consensus\-building across diverse groups.


**Why AstraZeneca?**
 At AstraZeneca we’re dedicated to being a Great Place to Work. Where you are empowered to push the boundaries of science and unleash your entrepreneurial spirit. There’s no better place to make a difference to medicine, patients, and society. An inclusive culture that champions diversity and collaboration, and always committed to lifelong learning, growth, and development. We’re on an exciting journey to pioneer the future of healthcare.
   

  

**So, what’s next?**
* Are you already imagining yourself joining our team? Good, because we can’t wait to hear from you.
* Are you ready to bring new ideas and fresh thinking to the table? Brilliant! We have one seat available, and we hope it’s yours.


**Where can I find out more?**
 Our Social Media, Follow AstraZeneca on LinkedIn
   

  

 Follow AstraZeneca on Facebook
   

  

 Follow AstraZeneca on Instagram
   

  

**Date Posted**
 03\-Apr\-2026
   

  

**Closing Date**
 14\-Apr\-2026
   

  

 AstraZeneca embraces diversity and equality of opportunity. We are committed to building an inclusive and diverse team representing all backgrounds, with as wide a range of perspectives as possible, and harnessing industry\-leading skills. We believe that the more inclusive we are, the better our work will be. We welcome and consider applications to join our team from all qualified candidates, regardless of their characteristics. We comply with all applicable laws and regulations on non\-discrimination in employment (and recruitment), as well as work authorization and employment eligibility verification requirements.

data.jd_text:
**المسمى الوظيفي: مدير تطوير الأعمال** 




**القسم: إدارة الاستثمار** 




**التبعية الإدارية: مدير الاستثمار** 









  





**الهدف العام للوظيفة:** 




 تحديد وتطوير الفرص الاستثمارية من خلال إعداد الدراسات المالية ودراسات الجدوى العقارية، وتحليل أفضل استخدام للأصول العقارية، بما يحقق تعظيم العوائد الاستثمارية وتحقيق النمو المستدام للمحفظة الاستثمارية.
 








  





**المهام والمسؤوليات الأساسية:** 




**1\. إعداد الدراسات المالية ودراسات الجدوى العقارية:** 



* إجراء التحليلات المالية والتقييمات الاقتصادية لدراسة جدوى المشاريع العقارية والاستثمارية.
* تحديد أفضل استخدام للأصول العقارية بناءً على التحليل السوقي والتوجهات الاستثمارية.
* تطوير النماذج المالية لمختلف المشاريع الاستثمارية وتقييم العوائد والمخاطر المرتبطة بها.
* إعداد التقارير والتوصيات الاستثمارية وعرضها على مدير الاستثمار للإقرار.



**2\. استكشاف وتقييم الفرص الاستثمارية:** 



* تحليل السوق العقاري والقطاعات الاستثمارية لتحديد فرص النمو والاستثمار.
* البحث عن فرص استثمارية جديدة تساهم في تعزيز قيمة الأصول وزيادة العائد على الاستثمار.
* دراسة الاتجاهات الاقتصادية والعقارية التي تؤثر على قرارات الاستثمار.



**3\. تنسيق وإدارة المشاريع الاستثمارية:** 



* العمل مع الإدارات المالية والقانونية لضمان توافق الاستثمارات مع الأنظمة والتشريعات.
* التنسيق مع الجهات الخارجية مثل المستشارين الماليين والمطورين العقاريين لتقييم وتنفيذ المشاريع.
* المساهمة في تطوير استراتيجيات الاستثمار وتحليل المخاطر بالتعاون مع مدير الاستثمار.



**4\. إعداد التقارير وتقديم التوصيات:** 



* تقديم دراسات الجدوى والتوصيات الاستثمارية لمدير الاستثمار لضمان اتخاذ قرارات مستنيرة.
* إعداد العروض التقديمية والتقارير الدورية حول أداء المشاريع الاستثمارية وفرص التوسع.
* متابعة تنفيذ المشاريع الاستثمارية وضمان تحقيق الأهداف المالية المخطط لها.








  





**المؤهلات والخبرات المطلوبة:** 



* درجة البكالوريوس في إدارة الأعمال، المالية، الاقتصاد، أو تخصص ذو صلة.
* خبرة لا تقل عن سنتين في تطوير الأعمال، الاستثمار العقاري، أو التحليل المالي.
* معرفة قوية بإعداد دراسات الجدوى العقارية والتحليل المالي للمشاريع الاستثمارية.
* إتقان برامج التحليل المالي مثل Excel والنمذجة المالية وأدوات التقييم العقاري.
* مهارات قوية في البحث والتحليل واتخاذ القرارات الاستثمارية.
* الإلمام بالأنظمة والتشريعات العقارية والاستثمارية.








  





**الجدارات (الكفاءات) المطلوبة:** 




**جدارات فنية:** 



* التحليل المالي والاستثماري: القدرة على تقييم المشاريع واتخاذ قرارات استثمارية مستندة إلى بيانات.
* إعداد دراسات الجدوى: تحليل وتقييم الفرص الاستثمارية بناءً على أفضل استخدام للأصول.
* التخطيط الاستراتيجي: المساهمة في وضع استراتيجيات استثمارية تدعم أهداف الشركة.




























**جدارات إدارية وشخصية:** 



* مهارات التفاوض: القدرة على التفاوض مع الشركاء والمستثمرين لتحقيق أفضل الصفقات.
* اتخاذ القرار وحل المشكلات: القدرة على تقديم حلول مبتكرة لدعم تطوير الأعمال والاستثمارات.
* إدارة الوقت والتنظيم: القدرة على العمل على مشاريع متعددة بكفاءة.
* العمل تحت الضغط: القدرة على العمل في بيئة ديناميكية واتخاذ قرارات سريعة ومدروسة.








  





**العلاقات الوظيفية:** 




**الداخلية:** 



* التعاون مع الإدارات المالية، القانونية، وإدارة المخاطر لضمان تنفيذ المشاريع بفعالية.
* تقديم التقارير والدراسات لمدير الاستثمار لمراجعتها واعتمادها.



**الخارجية:** 



* التواصل مع المستثمرين، البنوك، المطورين العقاريين، والمستشارين الماليين.
* التنسيق مع الجهات التنظيمية لضمان الامتثال للأنظمة العقارية والاستثمارية.








  





**مؤشرات الأداء الرئيسية (KPIs):** 



* عدد الدراسات المالية ودراسات الجدوى التي تم إعدادها والموافقة عليها.
* نسبة المشاريع الاستثمارية الناجحة مقارنة بالفرص المدروسة.
* العائد على الاستثمار (ROI) للأصول التي تم تطويرها بناءً على توصياته.
* جودة ودقة التقارير والتوصيات المقدمة لمدير الاستثمار.

 The Director of Business Development for CX Solutions is pivotal in driving regional expansion for the Group's digital unit. This role focuses on bridging technology and business needs, enhancing customer communications, and fostering strategic relationships.
   

  

 Main Responsibilities:
   

  

 Lead the design process from business/client requirements to technical specifications and deliver comprehensive solutions.
   

  

* Coordinate technical activities between product management and delivery teams.

 Other Details
   

  

 This role is part of a dynamic and rapidly evolving digital landscape and offers opportunities for significant regional impact in customer experience solutions.

data.title: Enterprise Account Executive
data.raw_snippet:
Creatio is a global vendor of an AI\-native platform to automate workflows and CRM with no\-code and a maximum degree of freedom. Our platform combines an AI\-first architecture, composable no\-code tools, and enterprise\-grade governance to help organizations build and scale faster.
   

  

 We’re
data.jd_text:
Creatio is a global vendor of an AI\-native platform to automate workflows and CRM with no\-code and a maximum degree of freedom. Our platform combines an AI\-first architecture, composable no\-code tools, and enterprise\-grade governance to help organizations build and scale faster.
   

  

 We’re proud to be recognized by top industry analysts as a Leader and Strong Performer in multiple Gartner and Forrester reports.
   

  

 In 2025, Creatio was named to Inc.’s Best Workplaces list, recognizing our commitment to employee wellbeing and a strong workplace culture.
   

  

 For the role of
 **Enterprise Account Executive (KSA)** 
 , we are seeking an experienced field sales professional to help us scale the number of Enterprises that use the Creatio platform. Candidates must have experience building and developing a territory to high performance within an innovative SaaS technology provider. Successful candidates will help to build a portfolio of business within the top target enterprises in their territory. Successful candidates will need to drive their own activity and build a funnel while being supported by the broader Creatio organization of diverse and executive, product, and technical teams.
   

  

 The role is based in
 **Riyadh (KSA)** 
 and will report to the Regional Sales Director MEA (based in Dubai).
   

  

 Our targets are ambitious, and we are seeking engaging, collaborative, successful Enterprise Account Executives who have the skills, experience, and track record to make an immediate impact. We’re fast\-paced, innovative, and collaborative. We pursue excellence in everything and have a lot of fun along the way.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Deliver against revenue targets and all key performance metrics.
* Generate new business opportunities on an assigned territory, manage pipeline, opportunities, forecasting, and other items related to a normal outside sales function.
* Manage the end\-to\-end enterprise sales process and resource to create and execute winning solution sales strategies.
* Establish relationships with VP/C\-level buyers (Business and IT).
* Develop and orchestrate sales presentations and product demonstrations.
* Focus on new logo acquisition and manage relationships with the existing accounts to identify opportunities for cross and up\-sales.
* Ability to work with all customer functions including executive\-level personnel, various customer stakeholders, architecture, operations, design, vendor management, innovation, sourcing, and customer procurement.


**Desired Skills And Experience**
* Minimum 5 years of experience working within enterprise SaaS platform sales to large enterprises
* Proven track record of meeting quarterly and annual targets
* Deep understanding of executive\-level Enterprise and/or Global Account sales and methodologies
* Superb written and verbal communications and organizational skills
* 4\-year degree required, with technical curiosity and desire to learn
* Experience with CRM/BPM software space is strongly preferred
* Fluency in English and native Arabic


**What You Should Expect From Us**
* The award\-winning product (a Leader in Gartner Quadrants) to be proud of.
* Focus on making our clients successful (NPS score – 42%).
* Dedicated leadership with open doors.
* Steady stream of inbound leads (though we expect you to generate your own leads as well).
* Collaborative environment where everybody is happy to help.
* A remote\-first hybrid model: while giving plenty of space for concentration and personal working habits, we encourage regular meetings in one of our five hubs worldwide.
* Culture of genuine care, ownership, dedication, and high standards (learn more here).
* A vibrant corporate life: enjoy the opportunity to explore your teammates' cultures in online and offline events, participate in sports competitions, enjoy art master classes, and create your new favorite memories at our parties.
* Creatio offers all team members competitive pay.
* Paid leave options for life\-qualifying events, sicknesses, etc.

data.title: Senior  Director  Medical Affairs
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
 We are a research\-driven biopharmaceutical company. Our mission is built on the simple premise that if we “follow the science” that great medicines can make a significant impact to our world. We believe that a research\-driven enterprise dedicated to world\-class science can su
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 We are a research\-driven biopharmaceutical company. Our mission is built on the simple premise that if we “follow the science” that great medicines can make a significant impact to our world. We believe that a research\-driven enterprise dedicated to world\-class science can succeed by inventing medicine and vaccine innovations that make a difference for patients across the globe.
   

  

 Our Medical Affairs team advances patient care by engaging in scientific exchange with external medical experts and industry professionals ensuring the scientific value of our products is realized. We engage and train internal employees to ensure that they thoroughly comprehend the science behind the medicine and review further unmet medical needs to bolster collaboration and further differentiate our portfolio.
   

  

 As the Country Medical Director (CMD) and Senior Medical Leader for our company in Saudi Arabia, you will lead the Medical Affairs organization and serve as the primary country\-level contact for Medical Affairs. In this role, you will develop and execute the Medical Affairs strategy for the country, build and sustain a high\-performing, highly compliant Medical Affairs organization, manage our full portfolio and allocate resources to balance global and local priorities; represent the research arm of the company or Medical Affairs on the country Leadership Team and in cross\-functional collaborations with our Research \& Development Division, Human Health, and other functions; communicate the country’s accomplishments, opportunities, and needs to regional and global stakeholders; and represent our company externally in activities requiring the leadership and expertise of the country’s Senior Medical Leader.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
**Leadership of the Medical Affairs Organization**
* People
+ Proactively manage and develop talent, whilst identifying new opportunities vs. emerging needs by reallocating resources, upskilling the team and recruiting
+ Create an empowering, compliant, collaborative, and innovation\-focused work environment
+ Build a culture of quality and compliance through training, oversight, and collaboration


* Country Medical Affairs Plans (CMAPs)
+ Strategically develop, execute, and deliver CMAPs, including tactical deliverables for each therapeutic area, such as post\-licensure research, publication plans, investigator\-initiated studies, and other knowledge transfer activities
+ Ensure alignment of the CMAPs with global strategy and adherence to all relevant regulations, Policies and Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs)
+ Manage the country\-developed Protocol Concept Sheets (PCS), obtain regional and global approvals for new local data generation activities, and manages their execution

* Medical Affairs Management
+ Provide oversight to the country medical information team, establish processes and systems to ensure that medical information requests (MIRs) from healthcare professionals are addressed in a timely manner and in alignment with the global scientific response documents and training materials
+ Manage approved operating administrative (e.g., salaries \& travel) and life cycle management budget (e.g., advisory boards, local data generation, etc.)
+ Oversees all activities of local medical department employees
+ Oversees inspections and inspections audits, answering inquiries by health authorities, ethical committees, and internal auditors in conjunction with Regulatory, Pharmacovigilance (PV) and Global Clinical Trial Operations (GCTO)


**Collaboration With Key Internal Stakeholders**
 You will represent Medical Affairs in cross\-functional leadership teams and collaborations and advocate for the interests of the country with regional and global colleagues
   

  

* Country (or Cluster) Leadership Team
+ Represents Medical Affairs and is the “medical voice” in the country executive management team


* Global Clinical Development (GCD), Global Clinical Trial Operations (GCTO), and Global Clinical Scientific Affairs (GCSA)
+ Support GCTO when requested
+ Manage the submission and our roles in the conduct of investigator\-initiated studies
+ Lead country review of Compassionate Use Requests and Pre\-License Patient Access (PLPA) programs and facilitates Chief Medical Officer (CMO) approval of these requests

* Outcomes Research (OR), Market Access, Regulatory Affairs, HH, and Policy
+ Interact with OR, Market Access, and Global Medical Affairs experts to develop and manage observational, real\-world effectiveness and epidemiologic studies
+ Collaborate with OR, market access, regulatory and commercial colleagues by providing scientific expertise and managing the medical aspects of submissions for regulatory, reimbursement or tenders for our company’s entire portfolio of medicines and vaccines
+ Provide medical expertise to the commercial product teams, ensuring the scientific and medical value of our company’s products across all therapy areas


**Engagement With Key External Stakeholders**
* Serves as external interface with key stakeholders, insurers/government leaders, selected professional societies, medical\-scientific institutions, and the broader scientific community to lead and execute the medical research and implementation strategy for our company’s innovative medicines, ensuring that the medical community is appropriately engaged with the information they need to support patient care needs (e.g., scientific advisory boards, scientific leader (SL) engagements, webinars, and presentations)
* Collaborates with OR, Market Access, and Commercial colleagues to engage payers, policymakers, and other decision makers in support of our company’s innovative portfolio of medicines and vaccines
* Develops and/or fosters relationships with external stakeholders to ensure that robust local insights from health care providers (HCPs) and patients are gathered and integrated into local, regional, and/or global strategies, plans, and tactics, enabling the generation of data needed by payers, physicians, and patients to properly understand and value our innovative medicines and vaccines
* Participates in outcomes research/health economics engagements with national payers, Health Technology Assessment (HTA) or regulatory agencies, in coordination with OR, Market Access, and Commercial colleagues
* Provides scientific subject matter expertise for media relations and public affairs to country Communications, Corporate/External Affairs, and Public Relations teams and serves as official spokesperson for scientific matters


**What You Will Need**
* MD or equivalent degree
* Fluent in English; Arabic proficiency is preferred. Global biopharmaceutical industry experience of 5 years and above, in clinical development and/or medical affairs with demonstrated track record of success
* People\-management experience of 3 years and above.
* Demonstrated organizational skills, including ability to set goals and align priorities


**Required Skills**
 Biopharmaceuticals, Cross\-Functional Teamwork, Executive Leadership, Leadership, Medical Affairs, People Management, Stakeholder Engagement
   

  

**Preferred Skills**
 Current Employees apply HERE
   

  

 Current Contingent Workers apply HERE
   

  

**Search Firm Representatives Please Read Carefully**
 Merck \& Co., Inc., Rahway, NJ, USA, also known as Merck Sharp \& Dohme LLC, Rahway, NJ, USA, does not accept unsolicited assistance from search firms for employment opportunities. All CVs / resumes submitted by search firms to any employee at our company without a valid written search agreement in place for this position will be deemed the sole property of our company. No fee will be paid in the event a candidate is hired by our company as a result of an agency referral where no pre\-existing agreement is in place. Where agency agreements are in place, introductions are position specific. Please, no phone calls or emails.
   

  

**Employee Status**
 Regular
   

  

**Relocation**
 No relocation
   

  

**VISA Sponsorship**
 No
   

  

**Travel Requirements**
 10%
   

  

**Flexible Work Arrangements**
 Not Applicable
   

  

**Shift**
 Not Indicated
   

  

**Valid Driving License**
 No
   

  

**Hazardous Material(s)**
 n/a
   

  

**Job Posting End Date**
 04/7/2026

By understanding, respecting, and honouring the needs of our emplo
data.jd_text:
At AlixPartners, we solve the most complex and critical challenges by moving quickly from analysis to action when it really matters; creating value that has a lasting impact on companies, their people, and the communities they serve. By understanding, respecting, and honouring the needs of our employees, clients, and communities, AlixPartners actively promotes an inclusive environment. We strongly believe in the value that diversity brings to our experiences and are committed to the perpetual enhancements of initiatives, policies, and practices. We hold ourselves accountable by providing the space for authenticity, growth, and equity for everyone.
   

  

 AlixPartners has embraced a hybrid work model to provide flexibility and support our employees’ work\-life integration. Our hybrid model combines a mix of in\-person (at client site or AlixPartners office) and remote working. Travel is part of this position, but the frequency may vary based on client, team, and individual circumstances.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
 The Performance Improvement practice is experiencing significant growth. Here you will be able to seize a unique opportunity to truly develop your long\-term career objectives. Our clients are top\-tier, household brands from a diverse range of sectors. We also advise a number of the leading private equity firms, supporting them on accelerating value creation within their portfolio companies, as well as on transaction\-related matters.
   

  

 This Vice President role is a permanent position located in Riyadh and reports to a Director.
   

  

* A crucial component of our specialist teams working on projects across a range of industries including Retail, Energy, Real Estate, Investment Funds, Aerospace \& Defence, etc.
* Support end\-to\-end delivery of performance improvement projects, including operational diagnostics, supply\-chain optimisation, cost\-reduction initiatives, and financial modelling to quantify impact and support decision\-making


 This description is not designed to encompass a comprehensive listing of required activities, duties or responsibilities.
   

  

**What You’ll Need**
* Master’s degree with evidence of strong academic success. Degree(s) in Business, Finance, Engineering (or foreign equivalent) preferable
* 5\-8 years of Consulting experience in a top tier international Consulting firm
* A broad range of functional expertise across supply chain, large transformations, financial modelling and pricing
* Strong knowledge of Excel and PowerPoint
* Willingness to travel across the GCC for client engagements
* You will hold valid residency for Saudi Arabia, or be able to obtain such, (administrative support will be provided by AlixPartners to obtain permits); ability to obtain work permit to travel and work across EU
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English, Arabic is advantageous
* Willingness to work outside of normal business hours, and in particular as unique projects/needs arise.
* Ability to work full time in an office and remote environment; physically able to sit/stand at a computer and work in front of a computer screen for significant portions of the workday
* Must become familiar with, and promote and abide by, our Core Values as defined by the AlixPartners’ Code of Conduct and foster an inclusive environment with people at all levels of an organisation


 Office Location: KAFD, Riyadh
   

  

 Working hours: 8:30am – 5:30pm, Sunday to Thursday, hybrid model
   

  

*The firm offers market\-leading benefits that provide flexible options to support our employee’s needs, you can read more about the AlixPartners benefits here.*
*This advert will be removed once a suitable candidate has been identified.*
*AlixPartners is an equal opportunity employer.*

data.title: QNB3662 - Associate Strategy PMO (Qatarization)
data.raw_snippet:
**About QNB**
 Established in 1964 as the country’s first Qatari\-owned commercial bank, QNB Group has steadily grown to become the largest bank in the Middle East and Africa (MEA) region.
   

  

 QNB Group’s presence through its subsidiaries and associate companies extends to more than 31 countri
data.jd_text:
**About QNB**
 Established in 1964 as the country’s first Qatari\-owned commercial bank, QNB Group has steadily grown to become the largest bank in the Middle East and Africa (MEA) region.
   

  

 QNB Group’s presence through its subsidiaries and associate companies extends to more than 31 countries across three continents providing a comprehensive range of advanced products and services. The total number of employees is more than 28,000 serving up to 20 million customers operating through 1,000 locations, with an ATM network of 4,300 machines.
   

  

 QNB has maintained its position as one of the highest rated regional banks from leading credit rating agencies including Standard \& Poor’s (A), Moody’s (Aa3\) and Fitch (A\+). The Bank has also been the recipient of many awards from leading international specialised financial publications.
   

  

 Based on the Group’s consistent strong financial performance and its expanding international presence, QNB currently ranks as the most valuable bank brand in the Middle East and Africa, according to Brand Finance Magazine.
   

  

 QNB Group has an active community support program and sponsors various social, educational and sporting events.
   

  

**Job Purpose Summary**
 Support the Strategy PMO (Senior) Managers in managing, monitoring, steering, and tracking projects in order to ensure implementation and successful completion within the defined time, budget, and scope. Support in the preparation of management information reports on all planned and ongoing projects on a continuous and ad hoc basis as directed. Assist in the day\-to\-day operations of the Group Project Management Office (PMO) for all planned, ongoing, and ad hoc projects in QNB. Assist in rolling out and championing the overall project management methodology, processes, procedures, tools and templates to manage the overall project portfolio within QNB Group Learn and acquire knowledge of comprehensive project management methodology and the associated standards, tools, templates and processes
   

  

**Essential Duties \& Responsibilities By Dimensions**
* Shareholder \& Financial:
* Assist in reporting against Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) to successfully monitor and track the Group’s portfolio of on\-going projects.
* Implements KPI’s and best practices for Associate Strategy PMO.
* Promote cost consciousness and efficiency and enhance productivity, to minimise cost, avoid waste, and optimise benefits for the bank.
* Customer (Internal \& External):
* Assist within the Group PMO in all project related matters (e.g., collection of data, liaison with project managers) and reporting of projects with regards Group PMO standards, processes, tools and templates
* Maintain issue/ risk logs, project plans, preparation of reporting, communication within the project team, and project meetings
* Support and manage the smooth planning, running and follow up of Group PMO meetings where necessary and act as an ambassador for the Group PMO in customer facing meetings and communication, promoting the professionalism and best practices of the Group PMO
* Support in the preparation of management information reports on all planned and ongoing projects on a continuous and ad hoc basis as directed
* Support in rolling\-out the new project management methodology within QNB Group where necessary \- Build and maintain strong and effective relationships with other related departments
* Internal (Processes, Products, Regulatory):
* Assist and support in the maintenance and development of Group PMO documentation, including processes and policies
* Support the day\-to\-day internal operational Group PMO processes as directed by the Strategy PMO (Senior) manager(s) and VP, Strategy PMO
* Assist in the maintenance of the inventory of projects including all related and necessary documentation and information within the appropriate Group PMO tools
* Regularly update project information through the preparation of project status reports, using a fact driven approach aligned against the original project scope, plan and objectives
* Support in the preparation of management information reports on all planned and ongoing projects on a continuous and ad hoc basis as directed
* Support the (Senior) Strategy PMO manager(s) and VP, Strategy, PMO as requested with additional mandates, and other ad hoc requests as necessary
* Participate and support in the set up and running of relevant project/ team meetings as and when required
* Support the development of training material and the rollout of training sessions to project managers
* Learning \& Knowledge:
* Possess a basic understanding of Project Management theory and practice
* Identify areas for professional and self\-development \- Strive to learn project management methodology


**Education/Experience Requirements**
* Bachelor degree from leading academic institution with focus on business administration, finance or science
* Fresh Qatari graduates, no previous experience required.
* Basic understanding of project methodology and approach, e.g., Prince II and/ or PMP is an advantage, as is any certification
* Proven academic track record or some work experience in a strategy consulting environment, or a similar environment of a well renowned international financial services related institution
* High degree of methodological\-conceptual skills \- Well\-developed numerical, analytical and evaluation skills


 Note: you will be required to attach the following:
   

  

* Resume/CV
* Copy of Passport or QID
* Copy of Education Certificate

 Lead a team of the Project Services staff to provide Cost Management, Budget Control, Planning and scheduling, Contracts, Procurement, Accounts Payable, Document Control, Project Reporting and general administrative services with focus on the successful MM EPIC Project execution on time, within budget and in accordance with the project requirements.

**Description**
 The air cargo industry is entering an accelerated phase of change and transformation. From digitalizing the end\-to\-end value chain, to fortifying a true e\-commerce experience, to the launch of digital freight marketplaces, and much more. As the world’s largest global air cargo carrier, Qatar Airways is leading this change. To support our vision, we are looking for talents – the bold, the imaginative and the change\-maker. All of who will support Qatar Airways Cargo’s position as a true leader in the air freight industry. If you want to make an impact, to grow your experience and to challenge your comfort zone, then join us at Qatar Airways Cargo and be part of our passionate team.
   

  

 As the business expands, we are pleased to announce an incredibly exciting opportunity to be part of Qatar Airways Cargo’s Business Insights team in Doha as the Head of Cargo Business insights
   

  

**About The Role**
 In this role, you will be responsible for leading the development, planning and implementation of data strategy by providing analytics and governance to maximize revenue and profit generation across the regions and ensure achievement of budget targets. You will manage a central team which provides insightful analytics to key stakeholders across all regions covering commercial, operations and revenue management to ensure data driven decisions are made to achieve business objectives.
   

  

 As part of your role, your additional responsibilities will include the following:
   

  

**Strategic**
* Define and execute the Cargo Business Insights strategy aligned with the overall Cargo and Corporate Planning strategy
* Act as the senior commercial insights partner to Cargo leadership, providing fact based recommendations on revenue performance, market dynamics, and strategic initiatives


**Business Insights**
* Oversee the analysis of cargo revenue, yield, volume, capacity, load factors, customer segments, and product performance at network, regional, POS, and route levels
* Lead competitive and market intelligence, including market share, pricing dynamics, trade flows, macro economic and geo political impacts on air cargo
* Ensure insights are clearly communicated to senior management through executive ready dashboards, reports, and presentations
* Provide insights to Chief Cargo Officer and VP Corporate Planning and BI on daily basis on commercial performance of the airline highlighting challenges and opportunities by looking at both flown and forward data


**Forecasting, Budgeting and Planning**
* Own and govern the cargo revenue forecasting framework, ensuring accuracy, transparency, and timely updates
* Lead the analytical input into the annual budget and long term planning cycles, including scenario analysis and risk/opportunity identification
* Partner closely with Revenue Management, Network Planning, Sales, and Finance to align assumptions and outcomes


**Stakeholder Management \& Communication**
* Translate complex analysis into clear, concise commercial narratives tailored to different audiences
* Lead executive forums, commercial reviews, and strategic decision making processes with robust insights


**Team Leadership \& Capability Building**
* Lead, develop, and inspire a global team of Business Insights managers, analysts, and specialists


**Be part of an extraordinary story**
 Your skills. Your imagination. Your ambition. Here, there are no boundaries to your potential and the impact you can make. You’ll find infinite opportunities to grow and work on the biggest, most rewarding challenges that will build your skills and experience. You have the chance to be a part of our future, and build the life you want while being part of an international community.
   

  

 Our best is here and still to come. To us, impossible is only a challenge. Join us as we dare to achieve what’s never been done before.
   

  

 Together, everything is possible
   

  

 Qualification
   

  

**About You**
* Bachelor’s degree with a minimum of 10 years of job\-related experience, preferably within the cargo airline or freight forwarding environment.
* Strong understanding of airline cargo economics, commercial KPIs, and how they interrelate to impact airline performance.
* Ability to design and interpret complex analytical models using tools such as Python, R, SQL, and BI platforms (Power BI, Tableau, Qlik), including forecasting, demand modeling, pricing elasticity, and network performance analysis.
* Proficiency in analyzing global cargo trends, trade lane performance, macroeconomic indicators, and competitor capacity using tools such as Seabury, WorldACD, and IATA data, translating insights into strategic recommendations.
* High\-level knowledge of cargo operations and supply chain processes.
* Strong stakeholder management and influence skills, including engagement with C\-suite and commercial leadership teams.
* Excellent spoken and written English communication skills.
* Ability to perform effectively in a high\-pressure, fast\-paced environment.
* Strategic thinker with strong analytical capabilities.
* Strong problem\-solving abilities with a solution\-focused mindset.
* Highly motivated and committed to delivering quality results.


**About Qatar Airways Group**
 Our story started with four aircraft. Today, we deliver excellence across 12 different businesses coming together as one. We’ve grown fast, broken records, and set trends that others follow. We don’t slow down due to fear of failure. Instead, we dare to achieve what’s never been done before.
   

  

 So whether you’re creating a unique experience for our customers or innovating behind the scenes, every person contributes to our proud story. A story of spectacular growth and determination. Now is the time to bring your best ideas and passion to a place where your ambition will know no boundaries, and be part of a truly global community.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 If you’re ready to join a progressive team and have a challenging and rewarding career, then apply now by uploading your CV and completing our quick application form.
   

  

 https://aa115\.taleo.net/careersection/QA\_External\_CS/jobapply.ftl?lang\=en\&job\=232384

data.jd_text:
**Commercial Director**
 Doha Golf Club – Doha, Qatar
   

  

**Position Overview**
 The Commercial Director is responsible for leading the commercial strategy and revenue growth of Doha Golf Club by maximizing the value of its assets, partnerships, and customerexperience offerings. The role will oversee all revenue generating functions including membership, hospitality, events, partnerships, sponsorships, retail, and commercial leasing, while supporting the club’s strategic transformation into a multi\-sport, lifestyle, and tourism destination operating year\-round.
   

  

 The Commercial Director will work closely with the General Manager, Board, and key stakeholders to drive sustainable financial performance, expand the club’s market reach, and position Doha Golf Club as a premier destination for sports, leisure, and community engagement in Qatar.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Commercial Strategy \& Revenue Growth**
* Develop and implement the club’s commercial strategy aligned with long\-term growth objectives.
* Identify and activate new revenue streams including hospitality, sports facilities, retail, events, tourism partnerships, and land utilization opportunities.
* Drive membership growth, retention, and premium member experiences.
* Optimize pricing strategies, packages, and offerings to maximize revenue across all business units.


**Partnerships, Sponsorships \& Business Development**
* Secure and manage strategic partnerships, sponsorships, and commercial colla


 borations.
   

  

* Develop relationships with corporates, institutions, hospitality brands, sports or


 ganizations, and tourism stakeholders.
   

  

* Structure and negotiate commercial agreements, joint ventures, and long\-term leasing opportunities.Events, Hospitality \& Destination Programming
* Lead the commercial development of sports tournaments, corporate events, entertainment programming, and lifestyle experiences.
* Position the club as a year\-round destination for sports, leisure, and community engagement.
* Develop partnerships with hospitality operators, event organizers, and tourism bodies.


**Asset \& Land Commercialization**
* Identify opportunities to activate underutilized land and facilities through commercial developments, partnerships, or events.
* Support projects related to sports academies, wellness, hospitality, and destinat


 ion experiences.
   

  

* Ensure optimal return on investment (ROI) from club assets.


 Financial Performance \& Reporting
   

  

* Manage revenue targets, budgets, and commercial performance metrics.
* Provide regular financial forecasts, performance analysis, and strategic recommendations to senior management and the board.
* Monitor profitability across business units and identify opportunities for optimization.


**Marketing, Branding \& Customer Experience**
* Work with marketing teams to strengthen the club’s brand positioning locally and internationally.
* Ensure the club delivers premium customer experiences aligned with its positioning as a flagship golf and lifestyle destination.
* Support initiatives that enhance community engagement and tourism appeal.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Hospitality Management, Sports


 Management, or a related field.
   

  

**Experience**
* 10\+ years of senior commercial leadership experience, preferably within:
* Hospitality
* Sports and leisure
* Destination developmento Private clubs or golf operations
* Luxury lifestyle sectors
* Proven experience in:
* Revenue growth and commercial strategy
* Sponsorship and partnership development
* Large\-scale events and hospitality operations
* Negotiation and contract management


**Key Competencies**
* Strategic thinking and commercial acumen
* Strong leadership and stakeholder management
* Business development and partnership negotiation
* Financial and operational management
* Customer\-centric mindset
* Ability to operate in a dynamic, high\-profile environment


**Key Success Indicators**
* Growth in commercial revenue streams
* Expansion of strategic partnerships and sponsorships
* Increased membership engagement and visitor footfall
* Successful activation of events, hospitality, and lifestyle offerings
* Enhanced asset utilization and enterprise value


**Reporting Structure**
**Reports to: General Manager**
**Strategic Impact**
 The Commercial Director will play a critical role in supporting Doha Golf Club’s transformation into a leading multi sport, lifestyle, and tourism destination, ensuring sustainable growth and long\-term value creation.

data.jd_text:
**Primary Purpose Of The Job**
 Lead and supervise the Project Services team in delivering comprehensive Cost Estimation, Cost Monitoring and Control (including budget management), Planning and Scheduling, Invoice Processing and Monitoring, and Document Control services. Ensure all activities support the successful execution of projects on schedule, within budget, and in full alignment with project requirements. Promote and uphold the highest standards of Quality, Health, Safety, and Environment (QHSE) in strict compliance with the QHSE Management System.
   

  

**Required Experience And Skills**
* Minimum of 15 years’ relevant experience in the Oil \& Gas industry with an IOC, NOC, EPIC contractor, or major Oil \& Gas company, focused on large\-scale project execution. At least 5 of those years must be in a Head or Lead Project Control Engineer role within an IOC/NOC or EPIC contractor environment.
* Proficient, hands\-on experience with planning and scheduling software including Primavera P6, P6 Analytics, Primavera Risk Analysis, MS Project, MS Office, and SAP.
* Demonstrated expertise in Cost Monitoring, Cost Control, and Reporting processes.
* Proven capability in implementing industry best practices along with company systems, standards, and processes.
* Experience supporting the development of project execution strategies, engineering workflows, project management processes, and detailed project execution plans.
* Strong familiarity with activities related to engineering, procurement, fabrication, installation, commissioning, and start\-up of major onshore projects.
* Possesses strong management, communication, conflict resolution, and presentation skills.


**Educational Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in an Engineering discipline from a recognized university; a higher academic qualification is considered an advantage.
* Membership in a recognized professional engineering association or institution is required.
* Project Management Professional (PMP) certification or equivalent is an added advantage.

data.title: Qatar Country Representative
data.raw_snippet:
**COMPANY DESCRIPTION:** 




 Amideast is an American non\-profit organization established in 1951 and headquartered in Washington, D.C., with country offices and programs in the Middle East and North Africa region and beyond. Amideast provides transformational education, training, testing, and exc
data.jd_text:
**COMPANY DESCRIPTION:** 




 Amideast is an American non\-profit organization established in 1951 and headquartered in Washington, D.C., with country offices and programs in the Middle East and North Africa region and beyond. Amideast provides transformational education, training, testing, and exchanges that enable individuals, companies, and international partners to better address 21st\-century challenges at home and abroad. For more information, visit us at www.amideast.org.
 



  





**POSITION DESCRIPTION:** 




 We are seeking a creative, forward\-thinking, and organized professional to represent Amideast in the State of Qatar. The preferred candidate will be currently based in Qatar and have existing professional contacts in the Qatari business, academic, and philanthropic communities. You will assist in establishing and overseeing the local operations of Amideast, develop and maintain relationships with key partners and stakeholders especially from the business and academic communities, and ensure compliance with local regulations. The position will report to the Vice President of Development and External Engagement at Amideast Headquarters in the US, will represent the organization at events, and will spearhead new business and program initiatives. The Qatar Country Representative will also be responsible for monitoring market trends, identifying growth opportunities, and troubleshooting operational challenges. This position requires a balance of demonstrated strategic thinking, marketing and outreach experience, hands\-on program and personnel management skills, and an entrepreneurial mindset.
 



  





**RESPONSIBILITIES:** 




*Strategic Leadership and Planning:* 



* Develop and implement strategies for business growth by creating marketing plans and outreach activities that align with Amideast’s overall mission and objectives in Qatar
* Identify new programming opportunities and areas where the organization can demonstrate its value and relevance to Qatar business, academic, youth, and government sectors
* Identify potential risks and develop strategies to mitigate them



*Stakeholder Engagement and Representation:* 



* Build and maintain strong relationships with key stakeholders, including business, academic, and government officials, partner organizations, donors, and community leaders
* Represent the organization at meetings, conferences, and other events, advocating for its mission and work
* Establish and maintain relationships with government representatives and policymakers to advocate for the organization's goals and ensure compliance with local regulations
* Ensure effective communication and collaboration amongst Amideast’s country office, Headquarters, and external stakeholders



*Program Management and Operations:* 



* Overseeing project implementation, as required, to ensure that projects are implemented effectively and efficiently, meeting agreed\-upon goals and objectives
* Managing the country office budget and financial resources, ensuring compliance with relevant regulations and policies
* Oversee administrative, logistical, security, and risk management functions for the country office
* Ensure the country office complies with all relevant local regulations, policies, and procedures



*Human Resources Management:* 



* Provide leadership and guidance to staff, as required



*Reporting and Communication:* 



* Prepare regular reports and updates on program activities, outcomes, and challenges
* Communicate effectively with stakeholders, both internally and externally, to share information and build support for the organization’s work



  





**QUALIFICATIONS AND SKILLS:** 



* A minimum of a BA/BS degree in a related field (Master’s degree preferred)
* Experience working for, or strong knowledge of, non\-profit organizations in the international education or development field
* A minimum of 5 years of relevant marketing and sales experience in Qatar
* An established network of active professional contacts in Qatar in the corporate, government, and academic sectors
* Experience developing detailed market analyses and associated business plans
* Dependable team player who can perform regular, detail\-oriented duties while also being proactive and offering creative ideas for effective and engaging communication
* Self\-starter with the ability to take initiative, meet deadlines, and multi\-task in a dynamic and fast\-paced environment
* Current residency in Qatar strongly preferred
* Fluency in Arabic strongly preferred



  





**WORK ENVIRONMENT:** 




 The incumbent in this position will work in a professional office environment and will utilize the following equipment when working from an Amideast office or remote home office (on a hybrid basis):
 


* Computer (laptop or desktop)
* Printer/Photocopier/Scanner/Fax
* Telephone



  





 The physical demands and work environment that have been described is representative of those an employee encounters while performing the essential functions of this position. Reasonable accommodations may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform the essential functions in accordance with local requirements.
 



  





 This position description is an overview of the major functions and requirements of this position. This document is not intended to be an exhaustive list encompassing every duty and requirement of the position; the Employee’s Manager may assign other duties as related or as otherwise deemed appropriate and necessary within the general scope, without the need for additional compensation.
 



  





 Amideast is an equal opportunity employer and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local laws.
 



  





 Positions that involve interaction with children will be required to read, acknowledge, and comply with and attend special training in accordance with the Child Protection and Safeguarding policy. All Amideast representatives must comply with the Code of Conduct and all applicable organizational policies which include but are not limited to, Anti\-Human Trafficking and Prevention of Sexual Exploitation and Abuse.

data.title: Quality Expert
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose:** 




  





 The Quality Expert is responsible for developing, implementing, and monitoring the Quality Management System (QMS) in accordance with international standards such as ISO 9001 and Business Continuity standards such as ISO 22301\. The role focuses on improving service qu
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose:** 




  





 The Quality Expert is responsible for developing, implementing, and monitoring the Quality Management System (QMS) in accordance with international standards such as ISO 9001 and Business Continuity standards such as ISO 22301\. The role focuses on improving service quality, enhancing operational efficiency, and increasing taxpayer and stakeholder satisfaction.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




 • Develop and update quality policies, procedures, and frameworks in line with international standards and best practices.
 



 • Oversee the implementation of the Quality Management System across departments and ensure compliance.
 



 • Lead initiatives aimed at improving customer experience and the quality of services provided to taxpayers and stakeholders.
 



 • Plan and conduct internal quality audits and follow up on findings and corrective actions.
 



 • Support the implementation and activation of Business Continuity Management (BCM) and crisis management plans.
 



 • Coordinate with internal and external stakeholders to ensure readiness for quality certifications and accreditation.
 



 • Monitor quality performance indicators and recommend continuous improvement initiatives.
 



  





**Qualifications and Experience:** 




 • Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Quality Management, Public Administration, or a related field.
 



 • Proven experience in implementing ISO standards, particularly ISO 9001 and ISO 22301\.
 



 • Experience in government service improvement or public service quality management is preferred.
 



 • Professional certifications in Quality Management or Business Continuity (such as ISO Lead Auditor, CQI, or similar) are an advantage.
 



 • Strong analytical, documentation, and stakeholder coordination skills.

data.jd_text:
* Project Planning \& Execution
+ Develop project execution plans, schedules, budgets, and resource requirements.
+ Manage end\-to\-end execution of substation projects (EHV/HV substations, 220 kV \& above).
+ Ensure compliance with Oil \& Gas facility regulations, HSE requirements, and quality standards.
+ Proficiency in Primavera P6 / MS Project for project scheduling.
+ Leadership \& Coordination
- Lead multidisciplinary project teams including engineers, supervisors, subcontractors, and vendors.
- Liaise with client representatives, consultants, and internal stakeholders for approvals and progress updates.
- Supervise installation, testing, and commissioning of substation equipment (GIS/AIS, transformers, protection \& control systems, switchgear, SCADA, etc.).
- Technical \& Contractual Management
* Review and validate electrical designs, drawings, and technical specifications.
* Ensure compliance with IEC, IEEE, ANSI, and Oil \& Gas industry standards.
* Administer contract terms, manage claims, variations, and resolve disputes with stakeholders.
* Financial \& Resource Control
+ Monitor project costs, cash flow, invoicing, and profitability.
+ Optimize resource utilization (manpower, materials, equipment).
+ Coordinate procurement of long\-lead items and critical equipment.
+ HSE \& Quality Assurance
- Implement stringent HSE management systems in compliance with Oil \& Gas safety standards.
- Ensure QA/QC procedures are followed at all stages of project execution.
- Conduct risk assessments, safety audits, and quality inspections.
- Reporting \& Documentation
* Prepare project progress reports, dashboards, and presentations for senior management and clients.
* Maintain proper documentation of engineering, construction, and commissioning records.
* Ensure project close\-out, handover, and warranty obligations are fulfilled.

Ensure the team is aligned to quality acceptance by customers for all deliverables up to and including ‘first bill check’. Guide and drive the team towards efficiently conducting status updates/reviews with all stakeholders.

* Ensure correctness, completeness, and quality of all project documentation across the portfolio is maintained. Achieve 100% performance on all project milestones and KPI’s (Time, Quality and Budget) across the portfolio
* Perform Business Process Improvement using various business consulting tools and methodologies.
* Contribute towards building a world class delivery function. Be a key stakeholder in all the key enterprise sales, pre\-sales, delivery processes and support internal teams in budget preparation and new hiring in Project Management function.
* Liaise with the Enterprise teams in EBU as part of a matrix management structure, ensuring the Enterprise objectives are aligned and delivered through the delivery of successful customer projects in a timely manner.
* Lead and oversee key enterprise customer projects in Qatar and Middle East, delivering the Enterprise products and services to target customers within an agreed time.
* Monitor the implementation process and ensure periodic reviews with stakeholders to ensure improvements can implemented through cross\-functional engagements. Be part of the revenue planning team in terms of providing revenue forecast, landscaping to ensure revenue run rate is maintained.

* Act as role model in Sales, Project Management and Service management, and leadership. Demonstrate best practice in analytical decision\-making and communication of recommendations.
* Challenge current Vodafone practices, where this is in the best interests of the Group work with passion and conviction. Support and groom the team on stakeholder management be it internal or external, best practices to make them effective in their day\-to\-day work.
* Transform the effectiveness and efficiency of Vodafone’s Enterprise delivery model, through
   

  

 organizational innovations such as outsourcing key work packages to SME’s, innovative works methods
* Be a key stakeholder in enterprise partnerships. Work with Enterprise Marketing/Products/Pre\-Sales teams to bring Vodafone Groups delivery best practices to Vodafone Qatar.
* Perform any additional project, task or activities assigned/delegated by the Line Manager.


* Bachelor’s degree in IT/ telecommunication/ Electricals or equivalent
* Minimum 15 years of relevant project management experience in IT/telecommunications and in Enterprise Markets \& Customers, preferably in the telecommunications sector.
* Knowledge of Project Management tools and industry best practices.
* Team player, strong influence and relationship management skills, customer\-centric.
