data.title: Project Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Summary**
 We are seeking a results\-driven Project Manager to lead, plan, and monitor projects from initiation through completion. The role requires strong expertise in project planning, procurement processes, performance monitoring, and reporting. The ideal candidate will ensure projects are
data.jd_text:
**Job Summary**
 We are seeking a results\-driven Project Manager to lead, plan, and monitor projects from initiation through completion. The role requires strong expertise in project planning, procurement processes, performance monitoring, and reporting. The ideal candidate will ensure projects are delivered on time, within scope, and aligned with organizational objectives while maintaining high standards of quality and compliance.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Develop and monitor procurement plans and prepare detailed project schedules, including timelines, milestones, and deliverables.
* Provide senior management with regular updates on project progress, including weekly and monthly reports.
* Prepare quarterly administrative reports covering procurement plans and the status of all ongoing projects.
* Establish key performance indicators (KPIs), assess project performance, identify deviations, and recommend corrective actions and improvement initiatives.
* Prepare data\-driven reports, including tables, charts, and dashboards, to clearly communicate project progress and performance.
* Ensure all projects are initiated as planned or ahead of schedule where possible.
* Monitor team performance and ensure all project tasks are executed efficiently and effectively.
* Support market research activities, including data collection, benchmarking, and comparative analysis.
* Develop and standardize processes, procedures, and templates using smart tools, and present them for management approval and team adoption.
* Track project timelines and proactively address risks, delays, and bottlenecks.
* Lead knowledge transfer initiatives and provide training to team members on project management methodologies and best practices.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Economics, Finance, Supply Chain Management, or a related field.
* Professional certification in Project Management (PMP or PRINCE2\) is required.
* Additional certifications such as Certified Professional in Procurement, CPE, or AICP are considered an advantage.


**Experience**
* 5–7 years of proven experience in project management, including end\-to\-end project delivery.
* Strong experience in preparing professional reports and presentations.
* Solid understanding of government financial regulations, particularly tendering and procurement laws and executive regulations.
* Experience in government procurement cycles, financial analysis, feasibility studies, market studies, and budgeting.
* Proven ability to manage multiple tasks under pressure and meet tight deadlines.
* Prior experience in government or semi\-government consulting environments is an advantage.


**Core Competencies \& Skills**
* Strong project management, planning, and scheduling capabilities.
* Expertise in setting, monitoring, and evaluating operational performance indicators (KPIs).
* Advanced analytical and financial modeling skills.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills; Arabic is mandatory, with strong proficiency in English.
* High\-level report writing and documentation skills, with the ability to clearly present project status, challenges, and recommendations.
* Strong presentation skills, particularly in Arabic, with the ability to communicate complex concepts effectively.
* Ability to prioritize tasks, manage multiple projects, and meet deadlines.
* Strong training and knowledge transfer capabilities.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, financial modeling, and professional presentation tools.


**Behavioral Competencies \& Work Conditions**
* Demonstrates professionalism, integrity, and strict confidentiality.
* Shows strong commitment, discipline, and accountability in all responsibilities.
* Works collaboratively and provides objective guidance to improve team performance and workflow.
* Complies with organizational policies, procedures, and management directives.
* Commits to official working hours and maintains a high standard of workplace conduct.
* Develops and implements on\-the\-job training plans to ensure effective knowledge transfer and team readiness.
* Fluent in Arabic (spoken and written) with strong proficiency in English.
* Possesses a good understanding of technical project terminology, including systems, networks, and engineering\-related concepts, particularly in construction environments.

data.title: EOI - Project Control Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
 Wood is accepting expressions of interest for a Project Control Manager to join our team in Qatar.
   

  

 Project Control Manager leads the cost; planning, scheduling and risk assessment support to assignments / project teams and clients, typically on projects of moderate siz
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 Wood is accepting expressions of interest for a Project Control Manager to join our team in Qatar.
   

  

 Project Control Manager leads the cost; planning, scheduling and risk assessment support to assignments / project teams and clients, typically on projects of moderate size and complexity. Oversees the set up and running of all required project controls systems, tools and interfaces to allow successful management and reporting of the project costs, schedule and risks on projects and specific assignments. Responsible for managing a team of project control resources in support of project delivery excellence
   

  

 The role interfaces with a number of key stakeholders across the project and wider business. Primary focal point for the Project Manager, Client or Project Team for all matters relating to project costs, schedules and risk; and resources requirements. Develops and implements the project control execution plan for projects of moderate size and complexity
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Act as the focal point with the client and any contractor Project Controllers as appropriate to ensure costs and progress are reported accurately, ensure alignment with the project reporting requirements and ensure timely and accurate cost and progress reporting
* Monitor overall project / assignment progress status, achievement and non\-achievement of major milestones and analyse and forecast performance in relation to plan
* Identification, monitoring and reporting against the project critical path providing early warning to the Project Manager of any potential slippages
* Identifies and establishes the communications interfaces essential for the delivery of cost, planning, scheduling and risk deliverables and services
* Report project status and KPI to management
* Develops the project Work Breakdown Structure?
* Manage the implementation of the cost and planning control structures in alignment with the project Work Breakdown Structure
* Manage and oversee the project work approval process in terms of accurate cost code allocation and initial budget set\-up and approvals
* Timely control and forecasting of budgets and ensure that the impact of all change requests are properly assessed and included in the budget and schedules if applicable
* Accountable for accuracy and timeliness of S\-curves and histograms produced by team
* Accountable for delivery and ongoing maitenance of the projects fully resourced, logic linked Gantt Charts within preferred planning software to the agreed project and programme requirements
* Accountable for providing analysis of current and future resource needs for the project and programme to the Project Manager
* Manages and oversees the recovery process followig identified slippages or significant float erosion
* Responsible for timely and accurate development and issuing of project change orders / variations in accordance with contract / assignment change notifications
* Promote the project change management system and facilitate assurance activities to ensure the process is adhered to
* Serve as Chair for ongoing internal team and client team Project Controls meetings (Cost, Schedule and Progress).
* Oversee the preparation of proposal schedules and CTR packs
* Lead cost and schedule risk analysis workshops / sessions both internally and with clients
* Ensure risk is managed and monitored at project level in line with local standards and processes
* Ensure Project Controls processes and procedures are accurate, that the project controls team are familiar with them and comply with their requirements
* Responsible for ensuring that projects are managed effectively to ensure delivery in a manner which meets quality, time and budget specifications
* Accountable for the accuracy and completeness of all cost, planning and risk deliverables prior to issue to internal or external customer
* Responsible for ensuring all project specific control tools and systems are set up and functioning adequately
* Manage the workload, performance and development of the project controls team. Provides constructive feedback and coaching.
* Responsible for ensuring project control staff are competent to carry out assigned work
* Reviews contractual obligations and ensures that cost control activities are performed in accordance with the contractual agreements and the Client’s requirements
* Ensuring that lessons learned are captured and implemented in support of continuous improvement
* Motivates project control team to meet project aims; promotes communication and teamwork within group and project.


**Qualifications**
* B.S. or equivalent degree
* Minimum of 15\+ years relevant experience in major Brownfield oil \& gas projects, including at least five (5\) years in similar position
* Pre\-FEED, FEED experience
* Typically requires a minimum of eight (8\) years of relevant industry experience, with at least six (6\) years in project control positions.
* Excellent client service focus
* Exceptional organisational skills and able to multi\-task"
* Working knowledge of risk management processes and techniques and experience in facilitating Risk workshops with project / assignment teams
* Advanced Working Knowledge of relevant software tools such as Microsoft Project and Primavera


**About Us**
 Wood is a global leader in consulting and engineering, helping to unlock solutions to critical challenges in energy and materials markets. We provide consulting, projects and operations solutions in 45 countries, employing around 25,000 people. www.woodplc.com
   

  

**Diversity Statement**
 We are an equal opportunity employer that recognises the value of a diverse workforce. All suitably qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment on the basis of objective criteria and without regard to the following (which is a non\-exhaustive list): race, colour, age, religion, gender, national origin, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, protected veteran status, or other characteristics in accordance with the relevant governing laws.

data.title: Project & Business Risk Manager (Regional)
data.raw_snippet:
**Building on our past. Ready for the future**
 Worley is a global professional services company of energy, chemicals and resources experts. We partner with customers to deliver projects and create value over the life of their assets. We’re bridging two worlds, moving towards more sustainable energy
data.jd_text:
**Building on our past. Ready for the future**
 Worley is a global professional services company of energy, chemicals and resources experts. We partner with customers to deliver projects and create value over the life of their assets. We’re bridging two worlds, moving towards more sustainable energy sources, while helping to provide the energy, chemicals and resources needed now.
   

  

****Major Accountabilities Of Position****
* To be responsible for establishing clear expectations of Business and Project Risk Management within LGCA region in terms of process, procedure, deliverables etc. and support from an implementation perspective.
* To be responsible for ensuring consistent Project Team application of the development, maintenance and monitoring of all Project Risk Management activities and associated documents across relevant scope(s).
* To be responsible for establishing, monitoring and maintenance of Business Risk Management activities with LGCA.
* Responsible Line Manager for Project Risk Management Professionals in region.


****Key Aims And Objectives:****
* Ensure LGCA Regional projects pro\-actively establish and maintain Risk Management activities on projects as necessary.
* Drive development and delivery of pre\-award project risk management requirements for project proposals.
* Delivery of a range of Risk Management services to Project teams post award, facilitating the identification and analysis of risks on projects at all stages as required, interpreting risk outputs, and communicating to relevant stakeholders as appropriate and business requires.
* Supporting Risk Management professionals within LGCA region and development of strategy for long term learning and career development.
* Support in conducting Business Risk for all the locations in LGCA region and maintaining of Business Risk register.


****Prime Responsibilities And Duties:****
* To be fully conversant with the application and use of Worley Risk Management suite of tools and chosen software applications.
* To prepare, update and maintain project Risk Management activities, throughout the project lifecycle and across the Risk


**Management Process:**
* To ensure the timely issue of accurate, updated Risk Management Plans and associated documents at the agreed intervals.
* To provide guidance to Project personnel in defining Risk Management objectives based on project objectives and support application of the risk process.
* To utilise several risk identification techniques in order to facilitate risk identification sessions.
* To develop and implement risk assessment criteria as part of a project risk register.
* To assist Risk Owners with the selection of appropriate risk response strategies and development of action plans to address identified risks.
* To assist project or functional personnel in the familiarisation and consistent application of Risk Management software tools and associated process.
* To facilitate Risk workshops and develop project Risk Registers which act as repositories for all risk related information.
* To conduct Cost / Schedule Risk Analysis Workshop sessions, facilitating workshops and facilitating workshops building bespoke models and interpreting associated outputs for communication / review.


**Major Accountabilities Of Position**
* To educate, support and encourage managers and business units in the use of quantitative and decision analysis on proposals / projects where applicable.
* Initiate and scope out regional RM business development opportunities and manage execution with input from regional and global risk teams.
* To promote good working relations within the internal and external teams.
* Provide guidance, support, and leadership to Project disciplines in project risk management activities.
* Monthly WPR attendance and input where required.
* Present and provide training on a range of RM topics to internal / external audiences.
* Monthly Regional level RM performance dashboard with critical analysis.


****Allied Occasional Duties:****
* To present to external audiences on a range of Risk Management related topics
* Ongoing presentation or support to wider network of practicing Risk Management professionals.
* Engage with wider Business and Project Delivery function in corporate initiatives / support Global Project Controls in Risk Management activities.


****Essential Qualifications/training:****
* Higher National Diploma / Advanced Diploma etc. (in relevant discipline).
* Recognised Risk Management qualification (e.g., IRM International Certificate in Risk Management or equivalent in experience).


****Desirable Qualifications/training:****
* BA or BSc degree (min. 2:1\) in Risk Management, alternative subjects considered can include: Project Management, Engineering, other analytical disciplines.


****Essential Experience:****
* Previous Project Risk Management experience across various projects (minimum circa 15\+ years).
* Specialist knowledge in Risk Management software (i.e., MCS software) and experience with quantitative cost \& schedule risk analysis.
* Demonstrable involvement / history in the relevant project industry and / or cross\-over experience from a comparable technical industry.
* Experience in analytical quantitative risk methods.
+ Montecarlo simulations / 3\-point analysis
+ Pertmaster, PRA


****Desirable Experience:****
* Extensive working Risk related knowledge of the Worley industry / business line.
* Knowledge of various industry Risk Management software / applications available.
* Experience in internal project delivery processes and procedures (e.g., Worley Project Delivery suite).


****Personal Qualities, Aptitudes And Skills****
* Ability to work as lead member of a team.
* Good communicator.
* Demonstrate confident presentation skills and embrace opportunities to educate others on Risk related topics.
* Confident and appropriately assertive to lead group workshops on a range of Risk Management activities.
* General risk awareness with a demonstrable interest in wider Risk Management topics / issues.
* Willingness to learn and continually improve across all business sectors.


**Competencies \- Generic**
* Sound computer skills (standard Microsoft Office applications).
* Ability to timely deliver to both given and self\-imposed deadlines and delegate tasks to junior personnel.
* Ability to communicate effectively with people at all levels within the organisation.
* Demonstrates team leadership skills and takes a lead in training and ongoing development of junior team members.
* Demonstrates good safety awareness and sets an appropriate example to others.


**Competencies \- Technical**
* Excellent facilitation skills and ability to guide the conversation.
* Capable of communicating with project teams, third parties \& clients to meet internal and client requirements across multiple projects with several different clients concurrently.
* Capable of identifying and providing qualitative inputs to Risk Management related process initiatives.
* Ability to build constructive relationships, allowing the discussion and resolution of any risk related issues.
* Highly experienced in qualitative measuring risks, facilitating analysis, plus evaluation of specific threats and opportunities.
* Strong competency in modelling quantitative (cost \& schedule) risks and evaluation of analysis output using industry risk analysis tools.
* Able to provide constructive challenge to project teams to ensure all risks are addressed appropriately and provide support to junior team members with this.


**Moving forward together**
 We’re committed to building a diverse, inclusive and respectful workplace where everyone feels they belong, can bring themselves, and are heard. We provide equal employment opportunities to all qualified applicants and employees without regard to age, race, creed, color, religion, sex, national origin, ancestry, disability status, veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, citizenship status or any other basis as protected by law.
   

  

 We want our people to be energized and empowered to drive sustainable impact. So, our focus is on a values\-inspired culture that unlocks brilliance through belonging, connection and innovation.
   

  

 And we're not just talking about it; we're doing it. We're reskilling our people, leveraging transferable skills, and supporting the transition of our workforce to become experts in today's low carbon energy infrastructure and technology.
   

  

 Whatever your ambition, there’s a path for you here. And there’s no barrier to your potential career success. Join us to broaden your horizons, explore diverse opportunities, and be part of delivering sustainable change.

 Unspecified
   

  

**Senior Manager, FlightSense Program Management (Hybrid) based in Doha**
 The Senior Manager, FlightSense™ Program Management owns the execution of the FlightSense™ agreement with the customer and is the main focal both internally and externally. This includes building and maintaining strong relationships with the customer and ensuring Collins Aerospace delivers to the contractual, financial, and operational performance of the program.
   

  

 FlightSense™ is a premier repair services business aerospace flight hour programs at Collins focused on supporting our customers with best\-in\-class performance and a superior customer experience.
   

  

**Primary Responsibilities:**
* Central single point of contact for the contract both externally to the customer and internally with aftermarket team (Repair, Technical, Finance, Management).
* Track overall Customer Support Level (CSL) to the customer for the FlightSense contract, in addition to all Collins commercial repairs.
* May include connecting with specific sites to ensure recovery plans executed and are realistic in terms of recovery to CSL requirements.
* Own the overall Estimate At Completion (EAC) financial performance for adherence to original business plan.
* Review monthly/quarterly cost data, reliability trends, effects of improvement activities and customer fleet/flying projections to update future forecast model predictions in EAC financial model.
* Lead any performance penalty or contractual alignment discussions, internally as well as with the customer.
* Support customer technical review discussions, with guidance from the Collins product owners, to agree on service bulletin incorporation, chargeable quote disputes and other items.


**Basic Qualifications:**
* Typically requires a University Degree or equivalent experience and minimum 10 years prior relevant experience or an Advanced Degree in a related field and minimum 7 years of experience or in absence of a degree, 14 years of relevant experience.


**Preferred Qualifications:**
* Experience leveraging strong financial acumen and / or experience with financial modeling.
* Demonstrated track record of conflict / issue resolution on difficult problems.
* Experience with commercial airframe components


 This position may involve access to export\-controlled information and hardware where an export license would be required for compliance with applicable laws and regulations. Employment will be subject to satisfactory security checks, export license approval, and if required, completion of a non\-disclosure agreement.
   

  

 Collins Aerospace, an RTX Company, is a leader in technologically advanced and intelligent solutions for the global aerospace and defense industry. Collins Aerospace has the capabilities, comprehensive portfolio and expertise to solve customers’ toughest challenges and to meet the demands of a rapidly evolving global market.
   

  

 We make modern flight possible for millions of travelers and our military every second. Our major product lines are on\-board virtually every aircraft flying. Be it keeping passengers safe with our emergency power generation systems or creating a positive in\-flight experience through reliable cabin pressure controls and quieter engines, Power \& Controls focuses on delivering a best\-in\-class experience to our customers. We hire the top people in the industry. Their ideas drive our performance, and their integrity keeps our customers happy. Join us as we take flight!
   

  

**WE ARE REDEFINING AEROSPACE.**
 Please consider the following role type definitions as you apply for this role.
   

  

**Onsite:** 
 Employees who are working in Onsite roles will work primarily onsite. This includes all production and maintenance employees, as they are essential to the development of our products.
   

  

**Hybrid:** 
 Employees who are working in Hybrid roles will work regularly both onsite and offsite. Ratio of time working onsite will be determined in partnership with your leader.
   

  

**Remote:** 
 Employees who are working in Remote roles will work primarily offsite (from home). An employee may be expected to travel to the site location as needed.
   

  

*Regardless of your role type, collaboration and innovation are critical to our business and all employees will have access to digital tools so they can work with colleagues around the world – and access to Collins sites when their work requires in\-person meetings.*
 Nothing matters more to Collins Aerospace than our strong ethical and safety commitments.
   

  

 At Collins, the paths we pave together lead to limitless possibility. And the bonds we form – with our customers and with each other \-\- propel us all higher, again and again.
   

  

 Apply now and be part of the team that’s redefining aerospace, every day.
   

  

*RTX adheres to the principles of equal employment. All qualified applications will be given careful consideration without regard to ethnicity, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation or identity, national origin, age, disability, protected veteran status or any other characteristic protected by law.*
**Privacy Policy and Terms:**
 Click on this link to read the Policy and Terms

**How You’ll Make An Impact**

data.jd_text:
**The opportunity**
 To ensure customer satisfaction through effective project management and delivering results from order entry to project commissioning that ensure repeatable customer business.
   

  

**How You’ll Make An Impact**
* Leading the successful execution of High Voltage Orders booked in UAE.
* Monitor and achieve importance KPIs including Revenue, Cash Flow, Inventory, On\-time Delivery, Customer Satisfaction, etc.
* Ensure that all order execution related activities are performed in accordance with Hitachi Energy policy, contractual agreements, quality standards, health, safety and environment requirements, financial targets as well as schedule commitments.
* Build up strong relations with customers and manage customer satisfaction by on time execution of projects.
* Project reviews with factory management and factory Project Managers to ensure contract fulfilment.
* Take an active role in identifying risks, negotiating and resolving escalated issues especially those raised by the customer.
* To ensure that the portfolio of projects follows good methodology and execution practices in accordance with internal standard procedures, and that projects are closed as per contracts entered with customers.
* Lead the coordination of any customer request whether they are related to execution or additional requests to projects which lead for additional sales.
* Responsible for ensuring compliance with applicable external and internal regulations, procedures, and guidelines.
* Living Hitachi Energy core values of safety and integrity, which means taking responsibility for your own actions while caring for your colleagues and the business.


**Your background**
* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in engineering, or equivalent with strong technical background
* Experience in High Voltage Industry with exposure to Project Management in Qatar.
* Project Executed in under EPC added advantage
* Possess strong leadership skills and ability to lead the team and convince stakeholders in the interest of the project.
* Ability to work under pressure to deliver the projects with time, cost, and quality.
* Experience of SAP or another ERP platform knowledge is an advantage.
* Strong attention to detail, ensuring accuracy and quality in project deliverables.
* Capability to develop work practices and to take lessons learned and implement them into the processes.
* Ability to adapt to changing priorities and work under tight deadlines and excellent collaboration and work with cross functional and cross\-cultural team.
* Analytical and problem\-solving mindset, with the ability to identify and mitigate risks and challenges.
* Proficiency in both spoken \& written and English is required.


 Hitachi Energy is a global technology leader in electrification, powering a sustainable energy future through innovative power grid technologies with digital at the core. Over three billion people depend on our technologies to power their daily lives.
   

  

 With over a century in pioneering mission\-critical technologies like high\-voltage, transformers, automation, and power electronics, we are addressing the most urgent energy challenge of our time – balancing soaring electricity demand, while decarbonizing the power system.
   

  

 Headquartered in Switzerland, we employ over 50,000 people in 60 countries and generate revenues of around $16 billion USD. We welcome you to apply today.

data.title: Project Manager - Offshore
data.raw_snippet:
**Building on our past. Ready for the future**
 Worley is a global professional services company of energy, chemicals and resources experts. We partner with customers to deliver projects and create value over the life of their assets. We’re bridging two worlds, moving towards more sustainable energy
data.jd_text:
**Building on our past. Ready for the future**
 Worley is a global professional services company of energy, chemicals and resources experts. We partner with customers to deliver projects and create value over the life of their assets. We’re bridging two worlds, moving towards more sustainable energy sources, while helping to provide the energy, chemicals and resources needed now.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Plans, directs, supervises, and controls the execution of all business, technical, fiscal, and administrative functions of the assigned program, project, or subtask. Acts as the Company representative with the customer and selected suppliers during the program execution. Negotiates changes to the scope of work with the customer. Assists business development in understanding customer issues and business plans in order to market and secure new/additional work.
* Establishes the program requirements for all areas of the program, and monitors the draft and final deliverables for adherence to these criteria. Assigns responsibility to executing project plans for key subordinates and assesses how to utilize their qualifications and strengths.
* Provides input to performance reviews and development plans for subordinates. Promotes technical excellence as well as the improvement of the Quality Improvement Process. Mobilizes Company resources, through effective liaison with support departments, other offices, or subsidiaries, to create project teams capable of completing effective, quality work. Works with individual lead discipline engineer to develop budgets, schedules and plans for the various elements of a project. Ensures that the project meets or exceeds goals established in these plans.
* Monitors and reports to management on the progress of all project activity within the program, including significant milestones, and any conditions which would affect project cost or schedule. Works with individual lead discipline to devise and execute action plans to rectify potential cost overruns or delays, or to accommodate significant changes to the scope of work. Advises the customer and Company management of any such changes.
* Oversees establishment of Work Plan, Health and Safety Plan, Quality Assurance/Quality Control Plan and other documents for hazardous waste work. May participate in negotiations with regulatory agencies and in public meetings in support of customers. Completes other responsibilities associated with the position as may be appropriate


**HSE Management**
* Work with project manager(s) and other team members to visibly support and comply to the One\-Way program and ensure that HSE requirements are followed by all project participants


**Customer Relationships**
* Establish and maintain good working relationships throughout the project and post completion
* Identify, document and communicate the customer requirements
* Ensure effective management of multiple stakeholders


**Commercial Management**
* Ensure effective management of WorleyParsons/Customer contract, including delivery of the budget gross margin.


**Scope Management**
* Ensure effective handover from Business Development Group
* Ensure a clear definition of scope
* Ensure compliance with requirements of the contract
* Apply an effective change control process
* Manage and monitor project performance on an ongoing basis to identify issues and opportunities early and take pre\-emptive action.
* Effectively manage project interfaces, including use of High Value Engineering centres


**Time Management**
* Manage the planning of all scope elements of the project.
* Develop resource \& financial requirements from the project plan.
* Manage the design, procurement and construction activities to meet the project schedule.
* Monitor the key reports and the development of corrective action plans.
* Ensure timely and effective documentation turnover and project close\-out.


**Cost Control**
* Ensure that all estimates which are prepared for the project are accurate project estimates.
* Ensure that all proper and accurate cost reports are provided for control of the project.
* Monitor and control all cost aspects of the project to forecast costs, obtain approvals, identify trends and take action to avoid cost overruns and take advantage of opportunities.


**Quality Management**
* Ensure the project quality requirements are properly defined and fully implemented.
* Ensure the right systems are in place and that these are applied on the project.
* Ensure compliance with WorleyParsons policies and procedures.
* Implement as part of the project a lessons learned program on the project consistent with WP requirements.


**Team Management**
* Define roles and responsibilities and provide clear and focused leadership for the project team to create a vision for project success and a strategy to fit that vision


**Communications Management**
* Ensure effective communications with the project team.
* Document communication requirements.
* Ensure accurate, timely \& effective progress reporting to the Customer and internally to WorleyParsons management.
* Ensure ongoing monitoring of the communication network between project staff, the customer and third parties and introduction of changes where required.


**Risk Management**
* Identify project risks and opportunities.
* Monitor closure of all identified risks and opportunities.
* Maintain the risk management focus throughout the project duration


**Design Management**
* Set clear objectives for the design team.
* Ensure design team are aware of, and are complying with, customer's Basis of Design and applicable regulations and codes.
* Monitor design activities, inter\-discipline data flow and communications


**Procurement/Subcontracts Management**
* Set clear objectives for the procurement and subcontracts team.
* Assess procurement process throughout the project to ensure goods meet specification and are delivered on time and are within budget.


**Construction Management**
* Set clear objectives for the Construction team.
* Monitor the Construction Management function to ensure safe delivery of the project within cost and schedule objectives


**Education – Qualifications, Accreditation, Training**
* Full\-Time Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering from an accredited university
* Chartered Professional Engineer (CPEng) status or undertaking the same will be an advantage.


**Industry Specific Experience**
* Prior experience must include significant project experience and successful project management.
* Vast relevant experience in a supervisory and/or project management role including technical expertise.
* Mandatory experience in FEED and Detail Design for large Offshore Brownfield Projects.


**HSE Capability**
* Maintain HSE focus with the team to ensure OHSE requirements.
* Demonstrate behaviour and business practices commensurate with a culture of world’s best health, safety and environmental performance.
* Demonstrate a visible and active commitment to:
+ Personal well\-being;
+ Healthy and safe workplaces and activities; and
+ Continuously improve Worley health, safety and environmental performance.
+ Identify and report work hazards and incidents.


**Moving forward together**
 We’re committed to building a diverse, inclusive and respectful workplace where everyone feels they belong, can bring themselves, and are heard. We provide equal employment opportunities to all qualified applicants and employees without regard to age, race, creed, color, religion, sex, national origin, ancestry, disability status, veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, genetic information, marital status, citizenship status or any other basis as protected by law.
   

  

 We want our people to be energized and empowered to drive sustainable impact. So, our focus is on a values\-inspired culture that unlocks brilliance through belonging, connection and innovation.
   

  

 And we're not just talking about it; we're doing it. We're reskilling our people, leveraging transferable skills, and supporting the transition of our workforce to become experts in today's low carbon energy infrastructure and technology.
   

  

 Whatever your ambition, there’s a path for you here. And there’s no barrier to your potential career success. Join us to broaden your horizons, explore diverse opportunities, and be part of delivering sustainable change.

* 10–15\+ years in Program/Project Management

* Strong knowledge of SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics, Salesforce, etc.
* Experience working with system integrators and global delivery teams
* PMP / PRINCE2 certification (preferred)



  





**Key Skills** 



* Leadership and stakeholder management
* Strategic thinking with strong execution focus
* Risk and financial management
* Agile, Waterfall, and hybrid delivery methodologies
* Change management and business transformation expertise

data.title: Project Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
**Remarkable people, trusted by clients to design and advance the world**
 This role will be responsible of the safe and effective delivery of assigned medium/large project or projects within an overall portfolio of brownfield modifications for client onshore facilities and offsh
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
**Remarkable people, trusted by clients to design and advance the world**
 This role will be responsible of the safe and effective delivery of assigned medium/large project or projects within an overall portfolio of brownfield modifications for client onshore facilities and offshore platforms, including large production and processing complexes within an Engineering and Procurement services contracting model. To effectively undertake Project Management duties, in line with the “Wood way”, to lead and direct the successful delivery of each project, from early solution development through Detailed Design Engineering, Procurement and the preparation of projects for the Construction, Completions and Commissioning phase (by others), followed by the successful completion of the project Close Out phase, post\-handover to Operations. Demonstrate delivery excellence for assigned projects, in line with relevant Wood and contract specific Project Management processes and procedures, as well as in accordance with the Contract Execution Plan (and where applicable, Project Execution Plan). Provide certainty and confidence to the client and Wood project sponsor, that each project is being delivered safely with a strong focus on effort optimization, cost efficiency \& control, risk management, schedule adherence and stakeholder management. Ensure delivery of assigned project and/or projects within the agreed commercial framework, taking measures to manage financial threats/opportunities to the client and Wood throughout. Ensure a full understanding of, and compliance with, the terms and conditions of the agreed EPs framework agreement reimbursable contract, in all aspects of delivering the work.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Project Execution**
* Responsible for project HSSEQ leadership, ensuring a program of initiatives and a suitable auditing schedule is established and followed to ensure that HSSE and quality management issues are proactively addressed throughout project delivery.
* Categorize assigned projects into the appropriate Tier in line with Wood’s Right Size Solutions procedure, using the right people, tiering tools, etc. to assess and adopt the corresponding right sized (tiered/scaled) approach to ensure efficient and effective delivery, commensurate with the size and complexity of each project scope of work.
* Create Interface Management Plans and use interface registers as applicable depending on project size/tier in line with Wood and contract specific procedures.
* Responsible for the framing of project scopes of work, per phase, and facilitating the preparation of distinct CTRs, cost estimates, achievable delivery schedules, inclusive of suitable growth \& contingency allowances depending on the level of scope definition and uncertainty per stage, then gaining client approval, reviewing contractual stipulations in client issued Purchase Orders and managing the successful execution of work under the terms of the contract for the agreed scope.
* Assist the Portfolio Delivery Manager with overall contract Profit \& Loss, by delivering assigned projects within the agreed (and realistic) cost and schedule promises, ensuring Wood’s commercial and financial framework is understood and complied with, to ensure contractual liability risks are managed carefully, project benefits are realized, and overhead costs are minimized throughout project delivery.
* Provide input into annual budget and forecast determinations, ensure the timely and correct allocation of costs to each project, ensure the on\-time completion of weekly timecards, facilitate weekly client review and approval of hours booked per project in support of avoiding delays with accounts payable/billing and cash collection.
* Organize the project team, define individual responsibilities and motivate team members towards successful achievement of specified project goals, particularly through regular project meetings.
* Identify and communicate project team objectives in accordance with the contract terms, scope of work and corporate policy.
* Delegate work to project team members in a manner that encourages individual responsibility and provides opportunities for growth.
* Provide leadership and direction to ensure stakeholder interfaces are managed effectively.
* Coordinate the development of project delivery schedules and master deliverables register (MDR), including the clear identification of schedule critical path, delivery KPIs, project key milestones and realistic activity duration estimates per phase.
* Ensure that compliance with applicable technical specifications, client discipline engineering standards and the required quality standards of engineering documents, equipment packages and materials of construction is fully understood and complied with by the Engineering Team for the agreed scope of work being delivered per project.
* Identify and communicate potential scope changes to the client sponsor as early as possible, agree the adoption or exclusion in principle for each then, if to be pursued, follow up with a formal Change Request to confirm the extent of the change in scope, schedule, cost \& risk impact, obtaining written client approval and an accompanying PO amendment, prior to execution of the amended scope.
* Pursue and develop opportunities for innovation, such as digitalization and the use of applicable new technology where economically and technically viable, utilize Wood’s work share and global engineering centres (GEC) where appropriate, to bring efficiency and optimum value to Wood and the client.
* Actively seek out opportunities for cost and schedule savings wherever possible to optimize customer value on every project.
* Ensure project reporting of progress, productivity and delivery predictability is provided weekly per project and checked for accuracy/correctness before going live on internal and external (visible to client) project dashboards.
* Ensure the consistent set up and use of project document folders, the development and regular updating/issuance of project minutes of kick off/progress meetings, project action trackers with key decision log, project risk register in ProRisk with SMART risk mitigation actions assigned that are reviewed regularly for effectiveness and ensure the timely closure of actions and risks throughout the delivery of each project.
* Guide and direct a multidiscipline project team, which may include/involve external specialists and staff from multiple offices and sites.
* Facilitate the set\-up (if not already in place) and adoption of effective information management systems / applications as applicable to suit various life phases of projects and manage information management within the project team, whilst always maintaining confidentiality of Wood and client data.
* Participate in project assurance activities, peer reviews, and lead lessons learnt reviews/adoption at appropriate (start and end of) project stages.
* Attend to and resolve conflicts, challenges and problems related to a large multi\-cultural and multi\-disciplined workforce.
* Participate in/lead Design Reviews, 3D Model Reviews, Value Engineering, Risk Management workshops, Constructability Reviews, HAZOPs/HAZIDs/LOPAs/SIL Assessments/PHSERs/IPRs etc., as applicable.
* Ensure Technical Evaluation of Bids, Issuance of Bid Technical Clarifications, Technical Evaluation Reports and Recommendations are undertaken by competent project team personnel in line with project schedules and budgets to meet Wood and client specifications.


**Leadership**
* Lead by example in all aspects of project delivery in line with Wood policies, procedures, standards of ethical conduct/behaviour, avoiding conflicts of interest and in compliance with the applicable country’s laws and policies.
* Coach and mentor others, empowering team members to make decisions within established parameters and competency levels.


**Designing the future. Transforming the world**
 Reflecting The Market Focus For The Office In Both Brownfield And Green Field Opportunities, Multi\-skilled Personnel Are Sought, In Particular Those With Experience In
   

  

 Onshore Oil and Gas
   

  

 Offshore Oil and Gas
   

  

**What We Can Offer**
* Meaningful and interesting projects delivered to leaders of industry across oil and gas and emerging energy sectors
* Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion; we are an organisation actively committed to diversity and inclusion across our busiess with employee networks committed to giving all employees a voice
* Competitive salary with regular salary reviews to ensure we are rewarding at the right level in line with the market
* Life Insurance; Provides payment of 2 x Base Salary (up to a maximum of QAR 1 million) upon death
* End of Service Gratuity; In line with Qatar Labor Law, upon completion of 1 years’ service employees are eligible for an End of Service benefit of three weeks for every year of service.
* Medical Insurance: Ensures cover (up to a maximum of QAR 250,000 per person, per year) is available should you require treatment. Pre\-existing and/or chronic conditions are covered up to QAR 10,000\.
* Employee Assistance Programme: Allows you to feel comfortable knowing that you or your immediate family members can confidentially discuss any work or personal issues that are an inevitable part of life. The programme helps support your mental, physical, social \& financial well\-being.
* Professional Memberships; One professional membership, registration, subscription, certification and/or license cost per annum for all active Wood employees. The membership must be relevant to the role you are currently employed in or be part of a development plan. Reimbursement should be claimed via the expenses procedure system, with supporting evidence.
* Global connections: join experts around the world who are at the leading edge of our industry, shaping the standards of our profession


**Qualifications**
**What makes you remarkable?**
 At Wood, we are committed to equal opportunities and welcome all talented individuals to consider joining our team. So even if you don't match every statement below but feel you have some of the experience, knowledge or skills needed for this role, we encourage you to apply. It will take all of us working together to deliver solutions to the world’s most critical challenges.
   

  

* BSc or equivalent degree in an Engineering discipline from an accredited University, is required.
* Project Management Professional (PMP), Associate in Project Management (APM) or equivalent certification, is preferred.
* Minimum of fifteen (15\) years’ relevant experience in medium/large Brownfield oil \& gas projects, including at least five (5\) years in a similar position, is preferred, but not necessarily essential.


**Knowledge, Skills And Experience**
* Demonstrable ability to manage EPC, EPs and/or EPCM contracts for offshore and onshore Brownfield Oil \& Gas projects for major Oil \& Gas companies.
* Specific experience in the GCC region for renowned clients is preferred, but not necessarily essential.
* Positive personality, ability, and experience to drive, manage, direct and guide the team to achieve project objectives.
* Thorough understanding of project management techniques and practices.
* Experience of developing and implementing project measures of success/benefits/business priorities.
* High level of professional competence and management skills to motivate the team to achieve high quality performance during project execution.
* Demonstrable experience in stakeholder management, including implementation of Interface Management Plans and effective creation/management of interface register/actions.
* Thorough knowledge of project success and benefits management.
* Demonstrable ability to drive cash flow management as well as projection/forecast of cost at completion.
* Demonstrable experience of HSSEQ, commercial, schedule and technical risk management.
* Good knowledge of contracting models, conditions, types and their suitability in different situations.
* Demonstrable ability to deliver effective project initiation on multi\-phase projects and produce project execution plans.
* Experienced in using common estimating techniques to derive estimates of project cost and schedule.
* Experience of implementing successful project performance improvement activities and techniques for recovering poor performance.
* Understands the information management requirements in each project phase (including handover to Operations, technical \& commercial close out and final handover to client), internal (contractual, statutory) and asset (customer) documentation, as well as Intellectual Property/confidentiality.
* An awareness of international and company quality assurance standards.
* Knowledge of commercial and contract conditions applicable to the procurement of various types of goods and services.


**Desired Personal Attributes**
* Safety focused, with an uncompromising approach to HSSEQ risk management. Places the welfare of internal, sub\-contractor and customer employees, property \& equipment, reputation and the environment at the top of the agenda.
* Passionately pursues and supports, demonstrates and embeds Wood values.
* Pragmatic approach with ability to balance commerciality with operational project excellence.
* A motivated self\-starter, who can encourage and motivate others, who is able to use own initiative and act autonomously to make appropriate decisions within circle of competence, but also knows when escalation is required.
* Strong team builder capable of identifying and adopting best practices, engendering a spirit of cooperation and energizing people towards optimum performance enabling cross functional best practice.
* Able to motivate, engage and influence a diverse group of people, many without a direct reporting relationship.
* Customer focused – develops sincere and open relationships with customers, current and potential; constantly striving to exceed expectations and add value. Able to develop and maintain strong customer relationships, including ability to influence appropriately.
* Ability to effectively manage resources (direct report personnel, Wood/client owned equipment, materials etc.)
* Flexible to respond and adapt to changing internal and external context/business environment.
* Decisive, with ability to make considered decisions and follow through, ensuring learning is captured and shared.
* Strong negotiation skills and ability to handle sensitive communications.
* Critical thinker with problem solving abilities.
* Excellent verbal, written and presentational communication skills.


**About Us**
 Wood is a global leader in consulting and engineering, helping to unlock solutions to critical challenges in energy and materials markets. We provide consulting, projects and operations solutions in 45 countries, employing around 25,000 people. www.woodplc.com
   

  

**Diversity Statement**
 We are an equal opportunity employer that recognises the value of a diverse workforce. All suitably qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment on the basis of objective criteria and without regard to the following (which is a non\-exhaustive list): race, colour, age, religion, gender, national origin, disability, sexual orientation, gender identity, protected veteran status, or other characteristics in accordance with the relevant governing laws.

data.title: Senior Project Manager - Offshore
data.raw_snippet:
**Building on our past. Ready for the future**
 Worley is a global professional services company of energy, chemicals and resources experts. We partner with customers to deliver projects and create value over the life of their assets. We’re bridging two worlds, moving towards more sustainable energy
data.jd_text:
**Building on our past. Ready for the future**
 Worley is a global professional services company of energy, chemicals and resources experts. We partner with customers to deliver projects and create value over the life of their assets. We’re bridging two worlds, moving towards more sustainable energy sources, while helping to provide the energy, chemicals and resources needed now.
   

  

**Responsibilities:\-**
* Leads budgeting and manages project operations to the budget. Controls project staffing levels, organizational structure, and monitors project discipline structures.
* Ensures project work and team activities meet all health, safety, environmental, and security requirements.
* To plan, co\-ordinate and manage the design, procurement, construction and commissioning of assigned projects, including taking a leadership role in the preparation of proposals.
* To ensure clear agreement of client objectives and that these are met or exceeded
* To achieve or better the budgeted gross margin.
* Effective management of Worley/Client contract, including delivery of the budget gross margin.
* Manage and monitor project performance on an ongoing basis to identify issues and opportunities early and take pre\-emptive action.
* Effectively manages project interfaces, including use of High Value Engineering centres.
* Develop resource \& financial requirements from the project plan.
* Manage the design, procurement and construction activities to meet the project schedule.
* Project Manager ownership of the project schedule.
* Routine monitoring of the key reports and development of corrective action plans.
* Monitoring and control of all cost aspects of the project to forecast costs, obtain approvals, identify trends and take action to avoid cost overruns and take advantage of opportunities.
* Provide clear and focused leadership for the project team to create a vision for project success and a strategy to fit that vision.
* Assess procurement process throughout the project to ensure goods meet specification, are delivered on time and are within budget.
* Monitor the Construction Management function to ensure safe delivery of the project within cost and schedule objectives.


**Quality Assurance**
* Responsible for working within the provisions and guidelines of the Quality Assurance systems.
* Work with project managers/project engineers to ensure all projects are set up and executed in full compliance with all the requirements of the Worley Project Management Process (WPMP) and General Management System (EMS) using consistent approaches, Work Breakdown Structures, work methodologies and reporting systems.
* Monitors the closure of all identified risks and opportunities.


**Safety**
* Responsible for personal safety safe working practices. Understand and follow OH\&S procedures
* Promoting health, safety and environmental awareness.


**Education – Qualifications, Accreditation, Training**
* Full\-Time Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering from an accredited university.
* Chartered Professional Engineer (CPEng) status or undertaking the same will be an advantage


**Industry Specific Experience**
* Prior experience must include significant project experience and successful project management.
* Vast relevant experience in a supervisory and/or project management role including technical expertise.
* Strong experience in Offshore experience on Brownfield projects.
* Mandatory experience in Pre\-FEED and FEED phase


**HSE Capability**
* Maintain HSE focus with the team to ensure OHSE requirements.
* Demonstrate behavior and business practices commensurate with a culture of world’s best health, safety and environmental performance.
* Demonstrate a visible and active commitment to:
+ personal well\-being;
+ healthy and safe workplaces and activities; and
+ continuously improve Worley health, safety and environmental performance.
+ Identify and report work hazards and incidents


**IT Skills**
* MS Office Suite


**People Skills**
* Able to work in diverse team.
* Able to make difficult decisions and lead and manage others in changing business conditions.
* Highly effective people management skills such as leadership, team, interpersonal, coaching, mentoring and supervisory skills. Must be able to build, motivate, develop and manage an effective team.

data.title: ASST. MANAGER,  PROJECT ENGINEERING
data.raw_snippet:
**Primary Purpose Of The Job**
 The Assistant Manager, Project Engineering is responsible for delivering comprehensive technical support across all project phases, with a key focus on the execution and completion of Engineering, Procurement, Installation, Pre‑Commissioning, and handover deliverables
data.jd_text:
**Primary Purpose Of The Job**
 The Assistant Manager, Project Engineering is responsible for delivering comprehensive technical support across all project phases, with a key focus on the execution and completion of Engineering, Procurement, Installation, Pre‑Commissioning, and handover deliverables. The role ensures seamless coordination among all project interfaces and disciplines, driving timely, cost‑effective, and compliant design delivery in accordance with project goals, contractual requirements, and industry best practices. The position may also serve as the Project Manager’s delegate during periods of absence.
   

  

**Required Experience And Skills**
* Minimum of 12 years’ experience in project engineering and design development within power generation, transmission, and distribution projects.
* Preference will be given to candidates with experience at the electrical engineering discipline head level.
* Strong understanding of power generation, transmission, and distribution systems, including grid integration, system interfaces, and technical dependencies.
* Experience in renewable energy projects is an added advantage.
* Proven experience managing power projects on behalf of a client or asset owner, preferably within the Middle East region.
* Demonstrated ability to manage projects subject to stringent government regulatory approvals.
* Membership in a recognized project management institution is considered advantageous.
* Demonstrated mastery\-level proficiency in all project management lifecycle stages, including initiation, feasibility studies, concept development and optimization, engineering definition, construction, operational readiness, commissioning, and project close‑out.
* Familiarity with GCOC requirements and the legal framework for managing contractual scopes of work.
* Proficiency in project management tools and the Microsoft Office Suite.
* Strong capability in managing project budgets, schedules, and contractual obligations.
* Ability to analyze complex project challenges and lead the development of effective solutions.
* Excellent communication, reporting, presentation, and team‑building skills, including the ability to facilitate and manage meetings effectively.


**Educational Qualifications**
* Degree in Engineering from a recognized university. Master’s degree will be preferred.

data.title: Cognitive AI Project Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Title:** 
 Cognitive AI Project Manager
   

  

**Job Description**
 The Cognitive AI Project Manager is responsible for planning, coordinating, and delivering the Cognitive AI program of work within TASMU 2\.0, ensuring multi\-vendor teams deliver agreed scope, milestones, and acceptance out
data.jd_text:
**Job Title:** 
 Cognitive AI Project Manager
   

  

**Job Description**
 The Cognitive AI Project Manager is responsible for planning, coordinating, and delivering the Cognitive AI program of work within TASMU 2\.0, ensuring multi\-vendor teams deliver agreed scope, milestones, and acceptance outcomes on time and within governance. The role manages dependencies across platform foundations (multicloud, security, data, integration, observability), vendor build streams (inference, RAG/KB, fine\-tuning, MCP, analytics), and operational readiness activities (SLOs, runbooks, ITSM/SIEM integration). The Project Manager drives program cadence, RAID management, stakeholder communications, and contractual deliverables, ensuring solutions are production\-ready, compliant, and ready for adoption by TASMU customers.
   

  

**Duties And Responsibilities**
* Own end\-to\-end delivery plan: milestones, workstreams, resource plan, budget tracking, and integrated master schedule.
* Manage multi\-vendor delivery execution: workstream coordination, dependency mapping, and delivery governance (weekly cadence, steering inputs).
* Maintain RAID (risks, assumptions, issues, dependencies) register and drive mitigation/closure with accountable owners.
* Ensure delivery aligns to TASMU architecture/security/data governance gates (design reviews, approvals, exception handling).
* Coordinate acceptance management: definition of completion criteria, evidence collection, test plans, and sign\-off processes (KPIs/SLOs).
* Drive operational readiness: ITSM integration, monitoring/observability onboarding, SIEM logging, DR planning, and L1/L2/L3 handover.
* Manage change control: scope baseline, CR process, impact analysis, and stakeholder approvals.
* Run stakeholder communication: status reporting, executive summaries, action tracking, and escalation management.
* Coordinate vendor deliverables for documentation and enablement (IaC repos, runbooks, training materials, release notes).
* Support procurement/commercial governance: align delivery artefacts to contract schedules, SLAs, and service support obligations.


**Skills \& Abilities**
* Strong project management capability in complex, multi\-vendor technology programs with governance and contractual delivery. Ability to manage technical dependencies across cloud, AI, data, security, and operations workstreams.
* Skilled in planning, scheduling, and delivery control (critical path, earned progress, milestone tracking).
* Strong RAID, change management, and stakeholder communication skills, including executive\-level reporting.
* Understanding of cloud\-native delivery practices (agile \+ DevSecOps, IaC/GitOps, environments, release management).
* Ability to drive outcomes through influence and structured governance, not just task tracking.


**Potential Background**
* 7\+ years in project/program management delivering enterprise platforms or cloud/data/AI initiatives.
* Demonstrated experience coordinating multiple SIs/vendors and managing acceptance criteria and contractual deliverables.
* Experience working in regulated environments (government, telco, critical infrastructure) with security/compliance gates.
* Familiarity with cloud landing zones, Kubernetes platforms, observability, and ITSM/SIEM integration is preferred.
* Experience with hybrid delivery methods (waterfall governance \+ agile execution) and release\-to\-production processes.
* Certifications preferred: PMP/PRINCE2, Agile/Scrum, ITIL awareness (optional).


 Skills: scrum,budget tracking,devsecops,stakeholder,slas,itil awareness,iac/gitops,itsm/siem,cloud,cr process,data,ai initiatives,prince2,pmp,agile,raid

 This role involves leading the project team from initiation to completion, ensuring that project objectives are met within scope, time, cost, and quality constraints. The project manager is responsible for planning, implementing, and monitoring all aspects of the project, managing resources, coordinating team members and consultants, maintaining documentation, tracking KPIs and expenditures, resolving issues and risks, and ensuring adherence to project methodology. The role also includes visiting project sites, optimizing performance, setting realistic deadlines, and delivering projects according to a standardized management framework while enhancing stakeholder satisfaction.
 


* Planning, implementing and monitoring the project

* Review and manage all project documentation, status reports, and statistics for administration and regulatory purpose

* Monitor adherence to project methodology to provide quality results
* Visit project sites to evaluate progress, identify challenges and resolve issues

 :
 



 Bachelor’s Degree plus Project related courses/certificate.

 7 years of project related experience out of which 2 years managing projects. Have a background in healthcare (preferably with clinical background nursing/medical/allied healthcare). Candidates should have previous experience in hospital management

**🛠 What You’ll Get Your Hands On**

data.jd_text:
**🚀 Welcome to Your Next Adventure!**
**🛠 What You’ll Get Your Hands On**
* Lead end\-to\-end project management for Snoonu’s TDG\-funded Autonomous Robotics and Logistics Intelligence Platform, ensuring delivery of technical milestones, validation outcomes, and reporting requirements.
* Own project planning and execution across multiple work packages, coordinating timelines, dependencies, and deliverables across AI, robotics hardware, embedded systems, cloud engineering, QA, and operations teams.
* Build and maintain the master project schedule, ensuring clear milestone tracking aligned with TRL advancement targets and pilot demonstration readiness.
* Drive cross\-functional coordination and integration planning across subsystems (perception, control, fleet orchestration, optimization engine, HMI, cloud\-edge architecture).
* Monitor progress through defined KPIs and performance metrics, proactively identifying issues, blockers, and risks that may impact delivery timelines or research outputs.
* Manage project governance, including weekly progress reviews, technical check\-ins, risk reviews, documentation tracking, and follow\-up on actions to ensure execution discipline.
* Support stakeholder engagement and coordination with external partners, including regulators, academic collaborators, and ecosystem stakeholders (e.g., QCAA, MOT, universities, and innovation partners).
* Ensure correct documentation and reporting of technical deliverables, validation evidence, and R\&D outputs required for grant compliance, audits, and internal leadership updates.
* Coordinate pilot readiness activities, including resource allocation, operational planning, safety preparation, test execution scheduling, and contingency planning.
* Drive continuous improvement in project execution practices by implementing structured workflows, clear communication channels, and effective prioritisation across teams.


**🧙‍♂️ The Magic You Bring**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Project Management, Computer Science, or a related field.
* A Master’s degree is a plus.
* Strong leadership and organisational skills with the ability to coordinate multiple teams and stakeholders.
* Excellent communication skills with the ability to translate complex engineering work into clear milestones and actionable plans.
* High ownership mindset, proactive problem\-solving approach, and strong follow\-through.
* Ability to work effectively in fast\-paced R\&D environments with evolving requirements and iterative delivery cycles.
* Strong stakeholder management skills, with confidence working with technical teams, executives, and external entities.
* Proven experience managing technical or R\&D projects involving software and hardware integration
* Strong understanding of Agile and structured delivery methodologies (Scrum, Kanban, milestone\-based execution).
* Experience managing cross\-functional engineering workflows, including planning, execution tracking, and delivery reporting.
* Familiarity with the engineering development cycles, including prototyping, integration testing, pilot deployment, and validation.
* Competence using project management and documentation tools (e.g., Jira, Confluence, Notion, MS Project, or similar tools).
* Experience managing projects involving robotics, IoT, AI/ML systems, or fleet/logistics platforms is a strong advantage.
* Awareness of compliance\-driven execution (documentation, evidence tracking, audit readiness) is an advantage.


**Inside Snoonu’s Universe**
 Snoonu is Qatar’s homegrown Super App, reinventing daily life with blazing\-fast delivery, shopping, and more – all in one place. Powered by tech, driven by a global team, and obsessed with making life easier.
   

  

**The Dream We’re Chasing**
 To be the first Qatari Ultra App that propels the region and its community through innovation and technology. We have global ambitions where what we do surpasses norms and limitations every time.
   

  

**The Quest We’re On**
 To radically transform how people live by leveraging technology to connect them with endless possibilities.
   

  

**Our Everyday Superpowers**
**👥 Be Customer Obsessed** 
 : “Focus on the customer and all else will follow.”
   

  

**💪 Act with Integrity:** 
 “We are honest, ethical, and trustworthy in everything we do.”
   

  

**🧪 Be Curious and Creative:** 
 “We constantly innovate and create solutions to bring a lasting positive impact.”
   

  

**🏅Lead by Example and Take Ownership:** 
 “Be the change you want to see and take ownership.”
   

  

**🚀 Work Smart and Deliver Results** 
 : “You can do more by doing less, better, and faster.”
   

  

**👨‍💼 It's All About People:** 
 “Be a team player; together we are stronger.”
   

  

**Perks \& Worklife Magic At Snoonu**
**🌐 Global Vibes** 
 – Collaborate with a worldwide crew.
   

  

**🧠 Brain Boosters** 
 – Learning budgets, access to courses, and tools for your growth.
   

  

 🚒
 **Builder’s Playground** 
 – Own your tasks, own your path! We’re big on autonomy.
   

  

 🏝️
 **Flexible Time Off**

 🛠️

**Great Place to Work® Certified**
 We’re certified as a Great Place to Work®, a recognition that celebrates a culture we’ve built together where people come first, always. This certification reflects our commitment to creating a workplace where everyone feels valued, empowered, and inspired to do their best work.
   

  

**Certified for Excellence**
