data.jd_text:
****Overview****
 University of Doha for Science and Technology (UDST) was officially established by the Emiri Decision No13 of 2022, and it is the first national university specializing in academic applied, technical, and professional education in the State of Qatar. UDST has over 70 bachelor's and master's degree programs, diplomas, and certificates. The university houses 5 colleges: The College of Business, the College of Computing and Information Technology, the College of Engineering and Technology, the College of Health Sciences, and the College of General Education, in addition to specialized training centers for individuals and companies. UDST is recognized for its student\-centered learning and state\-of\-the\-art facilities. Its world\-renowned faculty and researchers work on developing the students’ skills and help raise well\-equipped graduates who proudly serve different sectors of the economy and contribute to achieving human, social, and economic development goals nationally and internationally.
   

  

 With more than 700 staff and over 8,000 students, UDST is the destination of choice for applied and experiential learning. The University is recognized for its student\-centered learning and state\-of\-the\-art facilities. Our faculty are committed to delivering pedagogically\-sound learning experiences that incorporate innovative learning technologies. Our aim is to enhance students’ skills and help develop talented graduates who can effectively contribute to a knowledge\-based economy and make Qatar’s National Vision 2030 a reality.
   

  

 Our eligible employees enjoy competitive compensation and benefits, in accordance with applicable UDST policies. These benefits include:
   

  

* Generous academic annual leave
* Tax free salary
* Fully furnished upmarket accommodation (inclusive of utilities: water \& electricity)
* Annual flights for spouse and 3 children (up to 18 years old)
* Children’s education allowance
* Relocation/Shipping allowance
* Professional development opportunities
* International health insurance
* In\-house immigration services (to help you through the residency process)
* Full access to our recreational facilities
* Research and professional development support


 The College of Computing and Information Technology invites applications for the position Assistant/ Associate Professor in Information Technology. Exceptional candidates at the rank of Full Professor would also be considered.
   

  

****Responsibilities****
 The primary role of the faculty members at the College of Computing and IT is to promote high\-quality innovative learning, applied research, and service. Besides, he/she should collaborate with the Head of Department, Dean, and the colleagues to achieve the college's mission, mentor junior colleagues, and teaching assistants, and support the department and the college with several administrative and academic services.
   

  

 Reporting to the Department Head, the successful candidate will be responsible for the development, delivery and evaluation of a broad range of courses. Particular areas of interest include Computer Systems, Network Systems and Administration, SDN, Cloud and Edge Computing; but candidates with strong expertise in other related areas will also be considered.
   

  

 Other duties include evaluation of student progress and management of resources of the learning environment. The successful candidate will liaise with industry and other educational institutions; participate in industry advisory committees and coordinate, manage and control projects within the specified program area. Faculty members will keep course portfolio documents required for accreditation processes and engage in instructional development/improvement plans. All employees are expected to contribute to professional and community life within the university and beyond.
   

  

****Qualifications****
**Education and Experience Requirements**
 Faculty members will be placed in the appropriate rank based on their education and experience (academic and/or industry). The broad criteria are provided below.
   

  

**Education**
 PhD in a computing field such as Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Information Technology, or closely related field from an internationally recognized university with an undergraduate degree from an accredited university.
   

  

**For Assistant Professor**
****Experience****
* A minimum of 3 years teaching experience in a post\-secondary, adult training or industry training environment, along with preferably 3 years of employment experience as a practitioner/professional within the relevant discipline.
* A distinguished research record and international reputation evidenced by high quality publications in top tier journals.
* Excellent record of supervising high caliber research students.
* Demonstrated leadership in building engagement and partnership with the profession and industry.


****Preferred Qualifications****
* Professional Certifications in Computing and Information Technology.
* Diploma in Education (e.g. Post\-secondary Education, Adult Education or Vocational Education) is preferred.
* 6\+ years of employment experience as a practitioner/professional within the relevant discipline.
* Teaching experience in post\-secondary, adult training, or industry training environment.
* Experience in leadership and innovation in technology\-based projects.


**For Associate Professor**
****Experience****
* A minimum of 8 years teaching experience in a post\-secondary, adult training or industry training environment, along with preferably 3 years of employment experience as a practitioner/ professional within the relevant discipline.
* A distinguished research record and international reputation evidenced by high quality publications in top tier journals.
* Excellent record of supervising research students.
* Demonstrated leadership in building engagement and partnership with the profession and industry.


****Preferred Qualifications****
* Professional Certifications in Computing and Information Technology.
* Diploma in Education (e.g. Post\-secondary Education, Adult Education or Vocational Education) is preferred.
* 10\+ years of employment experience as a practitioner/professional within the relevant discipline.
* Teaching experience in post\-secondary, adult training, or industry training environment.
* Experience in leadership and innovation in technology\-based projects.


****Other Required Skills:****
* A thorough knowledge and work experience in different areas of Computing and IT systems.
* Commitment to applied and experiential learning as a pedagogy and a key feature of UDST’s mandate.
* Ability to design, develop, deliver, and evaluate authentic learning experiences and assessments. These should incorporate contemporary tools and resources to maximize content learning in context, and to develop the knowledge, skills, competences and attitudes identified in program outcomes.
* Digital literacy and demonstrated fluency in technology systems, and an ability to model and facilitate use of current and emerging digital tools to support research and learning.
* Demonstrated ability to develop technology\-enriched learning environments that enable students to be active participants in their own learning.
* Commitment to the effectiveness, vitality, and self\-renewal of the teaching profession through self\-driven continuous professional development and life\-long learning.
* Effective oral and written communication skills.
* Collaborative and collegial spirit and a demonstrated ability to establish rapport with learners, colleagues, sponsor\-employers, and members of the community.
* Ability to initiate applied research projects.


****How To Apply****
 Applicants must meet all essential qualifications in order to be shortlisted for the position; other qualifications may be a deciding factor in selection. Qualifications and experience will be assessed through your application, which may include but not be limited to curricula vitae, mock lectures , motivation letter, references, teaching dossiers and sample publications. It is the applicant’s responsibility to provide appropriate examples that illustrate how s/he meets each requirement. Failing to do so could result in the application being rejected. We thank all applicants for applying for the role; only those selected for further consideration will be contacted.

Besides, he/she should collaborate with the Head of Department, Dean, and the colleagues to achieve the college's mission, mentor junior colleagues, and teaching assistants, and support the department and the college with several administrative and academic services.
   

  

 Reporting to the Department Head, the successful candidate will be responsible for the development, delivery and evaluation of a broad range of courses within Digital Communications and Media Production. Other duties include evaluation of student progress and management of resources of the learning environment. The successful candidate will liaise with media industry and other educational institutions; participate in industry advisory committees and coordinate, manage and control projects within the specified program area. Faculty members will keep course portfolio documents required for accreditation processes and engage in instructional development/improvement plans. All employees are expected to contribute to professional and community life within the university and beyond.
   

  

****Qualifications****
**Education and Experience Requirements**
 Faculty members will be placed in the appropriate rank based on their education and experience (academic and/or industry). The broad criteria are provided below.
   

  

**Education**
 PhD in Digital Communication and/or Media Production or a related field of study from an internationally recognized university with an undergraduate degree from an accredited university.
   

  

**For Assistant Professor**
****Experience****
* A minimum of 3 years teaching experience in a post\-secondary, adult training or industry training environment, along with preferably 3 years of employment experience as a practitioner /professional within the relevant discipline.
* A distinguished research record and international reputation evidenced by high quality publications in top tier journals.
* Excellent record of supervising high caliber research students.
* Demonstrated leadership in building engagement and partnership with the profession and industry.


****Preferred Qualifications****
* Professional Certifications in Computing and Information Technology.
* Diploma in Education (e.g. Post\-secondary Education, Adult Education or Vocational Education) is preferred.
* 6\+ years of employment experience as a practitioner/professional within the relevant discipline.
* Experience in leadership and innovation in technology\-based projects.


**For Associate Professor**
****Experience****
* A minimum of 8 years teaching experience in a post\-secondary, adult training or industry training environment, along with preferably 3 years of employment experience as a practitioner/ professional within the relevant discipline.
* A distinguished research record and international reputation evidenced by high quality publications in top tier journals.
* Excellent record of supervising research students.
* Demonstrated leadership in building engagement and partnership with the profession and industry.


****Preferred Qualifications****
* Professional Certifications in Digital Communication / Media Production.
* Diploma in Education (e.g. Post\-secondary Education, Adult Education or Vocational Education) is preferred.
* 10\+ years of employment experience as a practitioner/professional within the relevant discipline.
* Teaching experience in post\-secondary, adult training, or industry training environment.
* Experience in leadership and innovation in technology\-based projects.


****Other Required Skills:****
* Commitment to applied and experiential learning as a pedagogy and a key feature of UDST’s mandate.
* Ability to design, develop, deliver, and evaluate authentic learning experiences and assessments. These should incorporate contemporary tools and resources to maximize content learning in context, and to develop the knowledge, skills, competences and attitudes identified in program outcomes.
* Digital literacy and demonstrated fluency in technology systems, and an ability to model and facilitate use of current and emerging digital tools to support research and learning.
* Demonstrated ability to develop technology\-enriched learning environments that enable students to be active participants in their own learning.
* Commitment to the effectiveness, vitality, and self\-renewal of the teaching profession through self\-driven continuous professional development and life\-long learning.
* Effective oral and written communication skills.
* Collaborative and collegial spirit and a demonstrated ability to establish rapport with learners, colleagues, sponsor\-employers, and members of the community.
* Ability to initiate applied research projects.


****How To Apply****
 Applicants must meet all essential qualifications in order to be shortlisted for the position; other qualifications may be a deciding factor in selection. Qualifications and experience will be assessed through your application, which may include but not be limited to curricula vitae, mock lectures, motivation letter, references, teaching dossiers and sample publications. It is the applicant’s responsibility to provide appropriate examples that illustrate how s/he meets each requirement. Failing to do so could result in the application being rejected. We thank all applicants for applying for the role; only those selected for further consideration will be contacted.

data.raw_snippet:
****Overview****
 University of Doha for Science and Technology (UDST) was officially established by the Emiri Decision No13 of 2022, and it is the first national university specializing in academic applied, technical, and professional education in the State of Qatar. UDST has over 70 bachelor's and
data.jd_text:
****Overview****
 University of Doha for Science and Technology (UDST) was officially established by the Emiri Decision No13 of 2022, and it is the first national university specializing in academic applied, technical, and professional education in the State of Qatar. UDST has over 70 bachelor's and master's degree programs, diplomas, and certificates. The university houses 5 colleges: The College of Business, the College of Computing and Information Technology, the College of Engineering and Technology, the College of Health Sciences, and the College of General Education, in addition to specialized training centers for individuals and companies. UDST is recognized for its student\-centered learning and state\-of\-the\-art facilities. Its world\-renowned faculty and researchers work on developing the students’ skills and help raise well\-equipped graduates who proudly serve different sectors of the economy and contribute to achieving human, social, and economic development goals nationally and internationally.
   

  

 With more than 700 staff and over 8,000 students, UDST is the destination of choice for applied and experiential learning. The University is recognized for its student\-centered learning and state\-of\-the\-art facilities. Our faculty are committed to delivering pedagogically\-sound learning experiences that incorporate innovative learning technologies. Our aim is to enhance students’ skills and help develop talented graduates who can effectively contribute to a knowledge\-based economy and make Qatar’s National Vision 2030 a reality.
   

  

 Our eligible employees enjoy competitive compensation and benefits, in accordance with applicable UDST policies. These benefits include:
   

  

* Generous academic annual leave
* Tax free salary
* Fully furnished upmarket accommodation (inclusive of utilities: water \& electricity)
* Annual flights for spouse and 3 children (up to 18 years old)
* Children’s education allowance
* Relocation/Shipping allowance
* Professional development opportunities
* International health insurance
* In\-house immigration services (to help you through the residency process)
* Full access to our recreational facilities
* Research and professional development support


 The College of Computing and Information Technology (CCIT) invites applications for the position of Assistant/Associate Professor in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence . Exceptional candidates at the rank of Full Professor would also be considered.
   

  

**Your Commitment**
 The primary role of the faculty members at the College of Computing and IT is to promote high\-quality applied learning, innovative research, and service. Besides, he/she should collaborate with the college management and the rest of faculty to achieve the college's mission, deliver academic programs, pursue research, and engage in several administrative and academic services.
   

  

 Reporting to the Department Head, the successful candidate will be responsible for the development, delivery and evaluation of a broad range of courses within Data Science and Artificial Intelligence. Particular areas of interest include Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Visualization and Intelligent Interaction, Industrial and Business Analytics, IoT Software and Systems, and IoT Intelligence and Automation, but candidates with strong expertise in other areas related to Data Science and Artificial Intelligence will also be considered. Other duties include evaluation of student progress and management of resources of the learning environment. The successful candidate will liaise with industry and other educational institutions; participate in industry advisory committees and coordinate, manage and control projects within the specified program area. Faculty members will keep course portfolio documents required for accreditation processes and engage in instructional development/improvement plans. All faculty are expected to contribute to professional and community life within the university and beyond.
   

  

****Responsibilities****
**Education and Experience Requirements**
 Faculty members will be placed in the appropriate rank based on their education and experience (academic and/or industry). The broad criteria are provided below.
   

  

**Education**
 PhD and a Master's degrees in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence or closely related field from an internationally recognized university with an undergraduate degree from an accredited university.
   

  

**For Assistant Professor**
****Experience****
* A minimum of 3 years teaching experience in a post\-secondary, adult training or industry training environment, along with preferably 3 years of employment experience as a practitioner/professional within the relevant discipline.
* An active research agenda evidenced by high\-quality publications in top tier journals and conference proceedings.
* Demonstrated leadership in building engagement and partnership with the profession and industry.


****Preferred Qualifications****
* Professional Certification in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence.
* Diploma in Education (e.g., Post\-secondary Education, Adult Education, and Vocational Education) is preferred.
* 6\+ years of employment experience as a practitioner/professional within the relevant discipline.
* Experience in leadership and innovation in technology\-based projects.


**For Associate Professor**
****Experience****
* A minimum of 8 years teaching experience in a post\-secondary, adult training or industry training environment, along with preferably 3 years of employment experience as a practitioner/professional within the relevant discipline.
* A distinguished research record and international reputation evidenced by high quality publications in mainly top tier journals.
* Excellent record of supervising research students.
* Demonstrated leadership in building engagement and partnership with the profession and industry.


****Preferred Qualifications****
* Professional Certification in Data Science and Artificial Intelligence.
* Diploma in Education (e.g., Post\-secondary Education, Adult Education, and Vocational Education) is preferred.
* 10\+ years of employment experience as a practitioner/professional within the relevant discipline.
* Teaching experience in post\-secondary, adult training, or industry training environment.
* Experience in leadership and innovation in technology\-based projects.


****Other Required Skills:****
* A thorough knowledge and work experience in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing, Statistical Learning and Modeling, and IoT applications. Candidates with strong expertise in other areas of Data Science and Artificial Intelligence will be considered as well.
* Commitment to applied and experiential learning as a pedagogy and a key feature of UDST’s mandate.
* Ability to design, develop, deliver, and evaluate authentic learning experiences and assessments. These should incorporate contemporary tools and resources to maximize content learning in context, and to develop the knowledge, skills, competences and attitudes identified in program outcomes.
* Digital literacy and demonstrated fluency in technology systems, and an ability to model and facilitate use of current and emerging digital tools to support research and learning.
* Demonstrated ability to develop technology\-enriched learning environments that enable students to be active participants in their own learning.
* Commitment to the effectiveness, vitality, and self\-renewal of the teaching profession through self\-driven continuous professional development and life\-long learning.
* Effective oral and written communication skills.
* Collaborative and collegial spirit and a demonstrated ability to establish rapport with learners, colleagues, sponsor\-employers, and members of the community.
* Ability to initiate applied research projects.


****How To Apply****
 Applicants must meet all essential qualifications in order to be shortlisted for the position; other qualifications may be a deciding factor in the selection. Qualifications and experience will be assessed through your application, which may include but not be limited to curricula vitae, mock lectures, motivation letter, references, teaching dossiers and sample publications. It is the applicant’s responsibility to provide appropriate examples that illustrate how s/he meets each requirement. Failing to do so could result in the application being rejected. We thank all applicants for applying for the role; only those selected for further consideration will be contacted.

data.raw_snippet:

 We are looking for a seasoned Head of Product to lead our Operations \& Logistics teams. This role focuses on developing innovative customer, merchant, and courier support services, while also driving logistics and delivery efficiency. You will play a critical
data.jd_text:
**🚀 Welcome to Your Next Adventure!**
 We are looking for a seasoned Head of Product to lead our Operations \& Logistics teams. This role focuses on developing innovative customer, merchant, and courier support services, while also driving logistics and delivery efficiency. You will play a critical role in optimizing operational processes, ensuring that our logistics solutions set new standards for speed, reliability, and customer satisfaction.
   

  

**🛠 What You’ll Get Your Hands On**
* Leadership and Strategy: Lead the Operations \& Logistics product teams, establishing a clear vision and ensuring that all initiatives align with Snoonu’s strategic goals.
* Roadmap and OKRs Management: Develop and oversee comprehensive roadmaps for the logistics and operations teams, focusing on initiatives that drive value for both the business and customers. Track and evaluate progress through Objectives and Key Results (OKRs).
* Coaching and Mentoring: Foster a culture of growth by coaching a team of Product Managers, helping them refine their skills and progress in their careers at Snoonu.
* Stakeholder Collaboration: Collaborate closely with cross\-functional stakeholders to translate operational and business challenges into actionable product roadmaps, ensuring all teams are aligned and updated.
* Technical Collaboration: Partner with engineering and technology leaders to expedite the development and deployment of key logistics and operational features, balancing speed with quality.
* Efficiency and Innovation: Streamline internal processes to boost operational efficiency, drive scalability, and encourage innovation within product development.


**🧙‍♂️ The Magic You Bring**
* Experience: 5\+ years in product management, with specific expertise in logistics, operations, or delivery services.
* Leadership Skills: Proven experience managing and leading high\-performing product teams.
* Agile Expertise: Strong foundation in Agile practices and Scrum methodologies to manage fast\-paced product cycles.
* Analytical Skills: Deep proficiency in data analysis and reporting, with the ability to draw actionable insights and make data\-driven decisions.
* Adaptability: Thrives in fast\-moving, unstructured environments and excels at managing dynamic challenges.
* Organizational Skills: Excellent prioritization and time management skills to handle multiple projects simultaneously.
* Communication Skills: Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to simplify complex concepts for diverse audiences.
* Educational Background: Degree in Engineering, Management, Logistics, Economics, Finance, or a related field.
* Problem\-Solving: Demonstrated problem\-solving capability with a strategic mindset and innovative approach.
* Language Proficiency: Fluency in English is essential.


**✨ Bonus Points If You Have**
* Proficiency in Arabic is a plus.


**Inside Snoonu’s Universe**
 Snoonu is Qatar’s homegrown Super App, reinventing daily life with blazing\-fast delivery, shopping, and more – all in one place. Powered by tech, driven by a global team, and obsessed with making life easier.
   

  

**The Dream We’re Chasing**
 To be the first Qatari Ultra App that propels the region and its community through innovation and technology. We have global ambitions where what we do surpasses norms and limitations every time.
   

  

**The Quest We’re On**
 To radically transform how people live by leveraging technology to connect them with endless possibilities.
   

  

**Our Everyday Superpowers**
**👥 Be Customer Obsessed** 
 : “Focus on the customer and all else will follow.”
   

  

**💪 Act with Integrity:** 
 “We are honest, ethical, and trustworthy in everything we do.”
   

  

**🧪 Be Curious and Creative:** 
 “We constantly innovate and create solutions to bring a lasting positive impact.”
   

  

**🏅Lead by Example and Take Ownership:** 
 “Be the change you want to see and take ownership.”
   

  

**🚀 Work Smart and Deliver Results** 
 : “You can do more by doing less, better, and faster.”
   

  

**👨‍💼 It's All About People:** 
 “Be a team player; together we are stronger.”
   

  

**Perks \& Worklife Magic At Snoonu**
**🌐 Global Vibes** 
 – Collaborate with a worldwide crew.
   

  

**🧠 Brain Boosters** 
 – Learning budgets, access to courses, and tools for your growth.
   

  

 🚒
 **Builder’s Playground** 
 – Own your tasks, own your path! We’re big on autonomy.
   

  

 🏝️
 **Flexible Time Off** 
 – We take recharging seriously. Generous leave and wellness policies.
   

  

 🛠️
 **Agile Everything** 
 – Scrum isn’t a buzzword here. It’s how we roll, from product to ops.
   

  

**Great Place to Work® Certified**
 We’re certified as a Great Place to Work®, a recognition that celebrates a culture we’ve built together where people come first, always. This certification reflects our commitment to creating a workplace where everyone feels valued, empowered, and inspired to do their best work.
   

  

**Certified for Excellence**
 Our ISO 9001:2015 and ISO 45001:2018 certifications demonstrate our dedication to world\-class quality and a safe, supportive workplace, reinforcing our promise to deliver exceptional service while prioritizing the wellbeing of our people.
   

  

**Beyond the Code: Giving Back Matters**
 We don’t just build apps. We’re committed to doing business sustainably and giving back to the community that fuels us. From eco\-conscious practices to CSR projects, we’re always finding ways to do better—and we invite you to be a part of that mission.
   

  

**Diversity Isn’t Just a Buzzword**
 At Snoonu, fairness and inclusion are the foundation of everything we do. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity workplace that welcomes people from every walk of life. Be bold. Be you. Thrive here.
   

  

**Let’s Build the Future Together**
 Apply now to join a team where your contributions spark a change and your voice is heard. Let’s make some magic together.
   

  

 Stay in the loop—connect with us on LinkedIn!

data.raw_snippet:

**Job Title: Tax Analyst**




**Department: Advance Tax Rulings Section, Tax Policy Department** 




**Role purpose** 




 To deliver high\-quality technical analysis, research, and drafting that supports timely and consistent Advance Tax Ruling (ATR) dec
data.jd_text:
**Tax Analyst \& Senior Tax Analyst**




**Job Title: Tax Analyst**




**Department: Advance Tax Rulings Section, Tax Policy Department** 




**Role purpose** 




 To deliver high\-quality technical analysis, research, and drafting that supports timely and consistent Advance Tax Ruling (ATR) decisions. The postholder will contribute to the full case lifecycle, ensuring analytical accuracy, procedural consistency and effective collaboration across technical and operational teams.
 



  





**Key responsibilities** 



1. **Technical support and drafting**


* Analyze ruling applications and supporting documentation to identify key issues.
* Research and interpret tax legislation, regulations, guidance, and relevant case law.
* Draft rulings, issue lists, and technical memoranda under the supervision of the Senior Tax Analyst.
* Prepare concise and well\-referenced summaries and comparative analyses.



  




1. **Case execution and collaboration**


* Coordinate with the Case Manager in ensuring completeness, document version control, and adherence to deadlines.
* Liaise with applicants to clarify information requests and coordinate responses for additional documentation.
* Prepare ruling case packs, meeting minutes, and decision logs for Senior Tax Analyst review.



  




1. **Quality and knowledge management**


* Apply approved templates, citations, and style guides consistently.
* Maintain and tag technical materials for future reference in the knowledge base.
* Track similar rulings to promote consistency and identify emerging policy trends.



  





**Skills and Experience:** 




**Essential** 



* A certified Bachelor’s Degree in a relevant field, such as Law, Accounting, Taxation, Finance, Economics, Public Administration.
* Minimum of four years of experience in tax advisory, tax administration, or tax policy.
* Strong understanding of domestic tax laws, regional tax frameworks, and administrative practice.
* Proven analytical and legal interpretation skills and attention to detail.
* Demonstrated ability to work collaboratively with legal, policy or audit teams.
* Strong written and verbal communication in Arabic and proficiency in English.



  





**Desirable** 



* Professional certifications such as CPA, ADIT, or CTA.
* Exposure to project management and information security basics.



  





**Core competencies** 



* Analytical rigor and research discipline.
* Clear and concise drafting with accurate citation.
* Proactive communication and effective team collaboration.
* Professional judgment, integrity and confidentiality.
* Reliability and adaptability under pressure and shifting priorities.



  





  





**Job Title: Senior Tax Analyst**




**Department: Advance Tax Rulings Section, Tax Policy Department** 




**Role purpose** 




 The Senior Tax Analyst is responsible for leading the technical review and drafting of Advance Tax Rulings (ATRs), ensuring accuracy, consistency, and alignment with Qatari tax law and procedural standards. The postholder provides expert analysis, mentors junior analysts, and contributes to the quality, efficiency, and integrity of the rulings process
 



  





**Key responsibilities** 



1. **Technical analysis and drafting**


* Lead the technical assessment of ruling applications, ensuring comprehensive analysis of facts and evidence.
* Interpret legislation, executive regulations, guidance, and relevant case law to support conclusions with validation and clear rationale.
* Draft technically sound high quality rulings and supporting memoranda, articulating options, risks, and impact of precedents.
* Identify information gaps and frame targeted clarification questions for applicants.



  




1. **Collaboration and review**


* Work closely with the Case Manager to ensure completeness, accuracy and adherence to case milestones.
* Coordinate with Legal Counsel, Audit, Policy, and Transfer Pricing specialists on cross\-functional cases.
* Review, augment and consolidate the draft work produced by Tax Analysts into a single structured package for Legal Counsel and Head of Section feedback.



  




1. **Hearings and stakeholder engagement**


* Participate in technical discussions, hearings and briefings, presenting findings clearly and objectively.
* Lead the preparation and delivery of concise technical briefings to the Head of Section .
* Contribute to controlled publication and redaction where applicable.



  




1. **Quality, governance, and improvement**


* Apply approved templates, citation standards, and documentation protocols consistently.
* Monitor the consistency of treatment across similar rulings to ensure fairness and legal soundness.
* Recommend updates to guidance materials, FAQs, and procedural templates based on case experience and emerging issues.



  





**Skills and Experience:** 




**Essential** 



* A certified Bachelor’s Degree in a relevant field, such as Law, Accounting, Taxation, Finance, Economics, and Public Administration.
* Minimum seven years of experience in tax advisory, tax administration, or tax policy.
* In\-depth knowledge of domestic tax laws and related regulations, regional tax frameworks, international standards, and administrative practice.
* Strong legal interpretation and analytical skills with the ability to frame issues logically and persuasively.
* Excellent drafting ability, including clear reasoning and defensible conclusions.
* Strong written and verbal communication skills in Arabic with proficiency in English.
* Demonstrated experience working collaboratively with legal, policy or audit teams.



  





**Desirable** 



* CPA, ADIT, CTA, or an equivalent.



  





**Core competencies** 



* Technical depth with pragmatic judgment.
* Structured thinking and precision in drafting.
* Coaching and mentoring of junior staff.
* Integrity, confidentiality, and professional independence.
* Effective time management and Service Level Agreement discipline.

data.title: Project Director – Aviation
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
 WSP in the Middle East is currently hiring for a Project Director – Aviation to join our team in Dammam, Eastern Province, KSA.
   

  

 The Project Director holds full accountability for the successful delivery of a major aviation programme within the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia,
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 WSP in the Middle East is currently hiring for a Project Director – Aviation to join our team in Dammam, Eastern Province, KSA.
   

  

 The Project Director holds full accountability for the successful delivery of a major aviation programme within the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, with a strong emphasis on airport design modernisation and infrastructure enhancement. This senior leadership role provides strategic direction to multi ‑ disciplinary teams, ensures strict alignment with client and contractual expectations, and represents WSP at the highest levels with authorities, stakeholders, and executive decision ‑ makers. The position carries responsibility for the complete spectrum of project performance, including schedule management, technical delivery, quality assurance, risk mitigation, and commercial governance.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Strategic Leadership \& Governance**
* Provide strategic direction and leadership to all project teams operating on\-site and across remote support functions.
* Establish and maintain a strong governance framework ensuring clarity of roles, responsibilities, reporting lines, and escalation protocols.
* Drive a culture of delivery excellence, safety, compliance, and continuous improvement.


**Client \& Stakeholder Management**
* Serve as the primary point of contact for the client, ensuring transparent communication, alignment on objectives, and proactive issue resolution.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with senior client representatives, aviation authorities, regulatory bodies, and key external stakeholders.
* Represent WSP in high\-level steering committees, progress reviews, and commercial discussions.


**Project Delivery \& Execution**
* Lead the overall delivery of the aviation project from initiation to handover, ensuring compliance with contractual, technical, and statutory requirements.
* Oversee planning, design, construction, and commissioning phases, ensuring deliverables meet required standards.
* Monitor schedule performance, identify critical paths, and implement recovery plans when required.


**Quality Assurance \& Technical Oversight**
* Ensure adherence to WSP quality frameworks, aviation standards, and global best practice.
* Drive technical excellence across all engineering, design, and operational workstreams.
* Review and validate key technical submissions, design packages, and project deliverables.


**Risk, Safety \& Compliance**
* Establish and manage a robust risk management strategy, covering technical, commercial, operational, and external risks.
* Champion a strong safety culture, ensuring compliance with HSE regulations and WSP safety principles.
* Implement proactive measures to mitigate project risks and ensure long\-term programme stability.


**Commercial, Financial \& Contract Management**
* Provide oversight of all commercial activities including contract performance, change management, claims avoidance, and budget control.
* Ensure financial integrity through accurate forecasting, cost monitoring, and commercial reporting.
* Lead commercial negotiations where required, safeguarding WSP’s contractual and financial position.


**Team Leadership \& People Management**
* Lead, mentor, and develop a high\-performing multi\-disciplinary project team.
* Ensure optimal resource planning, performance management, and succession planning.
* Promote collaboration across WSP teams in KSA, the UAE, and global support offices.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Construction Management, Aviation Management, or related discipline (Master’s preferred).
* 20\+ years of experience in project and programme delivery, with significant exposure to large\-scale aviation, airports, or complex infrastructure programmes.
* Proven track record in leading multi\-billion SAR aviation or transport projects in the Middle East (KSA experience preferred).
* Strong background in PMC/consultancy environments with familiarity in contract administration (FIDIC or similar).


**Technical \& Leadership Competencies**
* Deep understanding of aviation standards, airport systems, airside/landside operations, and regulatory frameworks.
* Exceptional stakeholder management and executive communication skills.
* Strong commercial acumen with experience managing large budgets and complex contracts.
* Ability to lead diverse teams across multiple geographies and disciplines.

data.jd_text:
**Hiring for OCA GLOBAL** 




  





**Job Summary:** 




 We are seeking a commercially driven and technically strong leader to establish and scale our MEP Commissioning \& Technical Services division in Saudi Arabia. The role is accountable for business development, operational delivery, team leadership, and divisional P\&L performance, covering Mechanical, Electrical, and Testing \& Balancing (TAB) services.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Establish and grow the MEP Commissioning division in the Saudi market.
* Develop and convert sales pipeline with major contractors and consultants.
* Lead technical execution of MEP commissioning, TAB, and electrical testing (LV/MV systems).
* Manage and mentor engineers and technicians.
* Oversee proposals, pricing, and contract negotiations.
* Ensure compliance with international standards and client/consultant requirements.
* Drive divisional revenue, cost control, and margin performance.



  





**Mandatory Requirements:** 



* Bachelor’s degree in mechanical or electrical engineering.
* 10–15 years of commissioning experience with leadership exposure.
* Strong background in HVAC, TAB, and electrical testing.
* Proven experience in Saudi Arabia market.
* Experience in budgeting, cost control, and project profitability.



  




* **Preferred Certifications (Advantage):**
* Certified Commissioning Professional (CCP)
* ISO 9001 Lead Auditor
* NEBOSH / IOSH
* Certified Energy Manager (CEM)

data.title: Regional Commercial Director
data.raw_snippet:
About the Role
   

  

  

  

 Future Pipe Industries is seeking an experienced Regional Commercial Director to lead and coordinate sales and commercial activities across the Middle East and North Africa region. In this role, you will translate the global commercial strategy into regional executio
data.jd_text:
About the Role
   

  

  

  

 Future Pipe Industries is seeking an experienced Regional Commercial Director to lead and coordinate sales and commercial activities across the Middle East and North Africa region. In this role, you will translate the global commercial strategy into regional execution plans, driving revenue growth, market expansion, and profitability. You will serve as the key link between global commercial leadership and regional sales teams, overseeing pipeline management, strategic account development, and the successful execution of key commercial opportunities.
   

  

  

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

  

  

 •        Regional Commercial Strategy Execution: Translate the global commercial strategy into regional sales plans aligned with FPI's business goals, and coordinate commercial initiatives across MENA markets to ensure consistent execution.
   

  

 •        Regional Sales Performance Management: Oversee and monitor the performance of General Manager Sales roles across MENA, reviewing pipeline development, sales forecasts, and key project opportunities to ensure targets are met.
   

  

 •        Strategic Accounts \& Major Projects: Support negotiation and closure of major regional contracts and strategic projects, while maintaining strong relationships with key clients, consultants, contractors, and partners.
   

  

 •        Market Expansion: Identify new business opportunities and sectors within the MENA region, and support market entry strategies and expansion initiatives in emerging markets.
   

  

 •        Commercial Governance \& Risk Management: Ensure adherence to company policies on pricing strategy, contract governance, and commercial risk management. Monitor margin performance and enforce commercial discipline across regional operations.
   

  

 •        Leadership \& Team Development: Provide leadership, guidance, and coaching to General Manager Sales and regional sales teams. Support talent development, succession planning, and capability building across the regional sales organization.
   

  

  

  

 Qualifications \& Experience
   

  

  

  

 •        Bachelor's Degree in Engineering or a relevant commercial discipline
   

  

 •        15\+ years of experience in sales or commercial roles within an industrial or infrastructure environment
   

  

 •        Minimum 8\-10 years of leadership experience in sales or commercial management
   

  

 •        Experience managing commercial operations across multiple MENA markets
   

  

 •        Strong background in industrial projects, EPC contractors, or infrastructure sectors
   

  

  

  

 Job\-Specific Skills
   

  

  

  

 •        Strong understanding of regional industrial markets and the competitive landscape
   

  

 •        Excellent negotiation and relationship management skills
   

  

 •        Ability to lead and coordinate multi\-country commercial teams
   

  

 •        Strategic thinking and strong commercial acumen

data.jd_text:
**Job Title: Compact Core Project Manager** 




**Experience: 8\+yrs** 




  





 The Compact Core Project Manager is responsible for the successful delivery of compact core network solutions (typically LTE/5G core\-in\-a\-box or virtualized core platforms). This role ensures efficient deployment, integration, and optimization of core network elements, particularly for enterprise, private networks, and remote or rapid\-deployment scenarios.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




 • Lead end\-to\-end delivery of compact core network projects
 



 • Define project scope, timelines, budget, and resource allocation
 



 • Manage deployment of compact/virtualized core solutions, including:
 



 o EPC (Evolved Packet Core)
 



 o 5G Core (5GC) components
 



 o Private LTE/5G networks
 



 • Coordinate with core network engineers, RAN teams, and IT/cloud specialists
 



 • Oversee system integration with:
 



 o Radio Access Network (RAN)
 



 o Transmission/backhaul networks
 



 o OSS/BSS platforms
 



 • Manage installation, configuration, testing, and commissioning
 



 • Ensure compliance with telecom standards and cybersecurity requirements
 



 • Identify and mitigate risks, issues, and dependencies
 



 • Manage vendors, system integrators, and third\-party partners
 



 • Provide progress reports to stakeholders and ensure customer satisfaction
 



  





**Required Qualifications** 




 • Bachelor’s degree in Telecommunications, Computer Engineering, IT, or related field
 



 • Proven experience in telecom project management, especially in core networks
 



 • Strong understanding of LTE/5G core architecture and virtualization (NFV/Cloud)
 



 • Project management certification (PMP, PRINCE2\) preferred
 



  





**Key Skills** 




 • Core network technologies (EPC, 5GC)
 



 • Virtualization and cloud platforms (NFV, containers, Kubernetes)
 



 • IP networking and telecom protocols
 



 • Project planning and lifecycle management
 



 • Stakeholder and vendor coordination
 



 • Risk and change management
 



 • Strong communication and leadership skills

data.jd_text:
**Job Title: Microwave Project Manager** 




  





**Experience: 8\+ Years** 




  





**Location : Al Khobar** 




  





**Job Description:** 




 The Microwave Project Manager is responsible for planning, executing, and delivering
 **microwave transmission and backhaul projects** 
 . This includes managing the deployment of point\-to\-point and point\-to\-multipoint microwave links used in telecom networks, ensuring reliable connectivity, timely delivery, and compliance with technical and regulatory standards.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of microwave network projects
* Define project scope, timelines, budgets, and resource plans
* Manage deployment of:
* Point\-to\-point microwave links
* IP/MPLS backhaul integration
* Transmission upgrades and expansions
* Coordinate with RF planning, transmission, civil, and field teams
* Oversee site acquisition, surveys, and line\-of\-sight (LOS) analysis
* Manage tower construction, antenna installation, and alignment
* Ensure proper integration with core and access networks
* Monitor project risks, issues, and performance
* Manage vendors, subcontractors, and equipment suppliers
* Ensure compliance with regulatory authorities (e.g., spectrum licensing)
* Provide regular status reports to stakeholders and clients



  





**Required Qualifications** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Telecommunications, Electronics, or related field
* Proven experience in telecom project management, especially transmission/microwave
* Strong understanding of microwave technologies and network architecture
* Project management certification (PMP, PRINCE2\) preferred



  





**Key Skills** 



* Microwave transmission systems (e.g., SDH, IP, hybrid networks)
* RF planning and link budgeting
* Project planning and execution
* Stakeholder and vendor management
* Risk and issue management
* Budget and cost control
* Strong leadership and communication



  





  





**About CLPS RiDiK:** 




 RiDiK is a global technology solutions provider and a subsidiary of CLPS Incorporation (NASDAQ: CLPS), delivering cutting\-edge end\-to\-end services across banking, wealth management, and e\-commerce. With deep expertise in AI, cloud, big data, and blockchain, we support clients across Asia, North America, and the Middle East in driving digital transformation and achieving sustainable growth. Operating from regional hubs in 10 countries and backed by a global delivery network, we combine local insight with technical excellence to deliver real, measurable impact. Join RiDiK and be part of an innovative, fast\-growing team shaping the future of technology across industries.
 



  





 We will review applications on a rolling basis until 9th April 2026 and early submissions are encouraged. Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Thank you for your understanding.

data.title: Work Winning Project Manager (Aviation)
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
 WSP in the Middle East are seeking an experienced Work Winning Project Manager with an Aviation focus to be based in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. This role plays a critical part in securing new aviation sector opportunities by managing the full work\-winning lifecycle — from early oppo
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 WSP in the Middle East are seeking an experienced Work Winning Project Manager with an Aviation focus to be based in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. This role plays a critical part in securing new aviation sector opportunities by managing the full work\-winning lifecycle — from early opportunity identification through to successful bid submission and commercial close.
   

  

 The Aviation Work Winning Project Manager manages the entire lifecycle of aviation sector prospects — from Expression of Interest through proposal development, submission, and commercial negotiation. They coordinate technical, financial, and strategic inputs to produce high\-quality, competitive submissions. The role ensures alignment with aviation sector strategy, client expectations, and internal governance, while also tracking pipeline performance and supporting sector leadership in securing new aviation opportunities.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Work Winning \& Bid Management**
* Manage end\-to\-end EOI, prequalification, and tender submissions for aviation sector opportunities.
* Develop and implement bid strategies aligned with sector priorities, client drivers, and competitive positioning.
* Lead proposal planning, scheduling, and governance reviews to ensure timely and compliant submissions.


**Stakeholder \& Input Coordination**
* Coordinate inputs from technical leads, commercial teams, finance, legal, and leadership to produce cohesive submissions.
* Facilitate bid workshops, strategy sessions, and reviews with senior stakeholders.
* Act as the central point of contact for all bid\-related communications and actions.


**Commercial \& Quality Oversight**
* Support development of commercial models, pricing strategies, and risk assessments in collaboration with finance and leadership.
* Ensure proposals meet client requirements, internal quality standards, and governance approvals.
* Drive clarity, consistency, and high presentation standards across all submission documents.


**Pipeline \& Strategy Support**
* Maintain oversight of the aviation opportunity pipeline, tracking bid status, win/loss outcomes, and key metrics.
* Provide regular pipeline updates, dashboards, and insights to Aviation Sector Leadership.
* Support post\-bid reviews, lessons learned, and continuous improvement of work\-winning processes.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Architecture, Construction Management, Business, or a related discipline.
* 10\+ years’ experience in work winning, bid management, or business development within the aviation or infrastructure sector.
* Proven track record of managing complex, multi\-disciplinary bids from EOI through to contract award.
* Experience working within consultancy / professional services environments (Middle East experience strongly preferred).


**Skills \& Competencies**
* Strong understanding of aviation clients, procurement models, and tendering processes.
* Excellent stakeholder management, coordination, and communication skills.
* Strong commercial awareness and ability to manage competing priorities under tight deadlines.
* High attention to detail with strong written and presentation skills.

data.title: Compliance Project Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Compliance Project Manager in Saudi Arabia.**
 This role offers the opportunity to lead compliance initiatives while managing projects from inception to completion in a dynamic, fast\-paced environm
data.jd_text:
**This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Compliance Project Manager in Saudi Arabia.**
 This role offers the opportunity to lead compliance initiatives while managing projects from inception to completion in a dynamic, fast\-paced environment. You will oversee programs that ensure adherence to laws, regulations, and internal policies, translating complex compliance requirements into actionable project plans. The position combines strategic oversight with hands\-on execution, enabling measurable impact on operational excellence, risk mitigation, and organizational integrity. You will collaborate closely with stakeholders across functions, monitor project progress and compliance metrics, and ensure high\-quality outcomes that meet both regulatory and operational standards. This role is ideal for a detail\-oriented, proactive professional who thrives in remote\-first and cross\-functional settings, and who takes pride in delivering excellence while maintaining compliance integrity.
   

  

**Accountabilities**
* Lead the design, implementation, and management of compliance programs, translating regulatory requirements into structured project plans
* Oversee project timelines, resources, and deliverables, ensuring successful completion of compliance initiatives
* Monitor compliance metrics, audit completion, and training participation to drive measurable outcomes
* Conduct risk assessments, identify compliance gaps, and implement corrective actions to mitigate risks
* Collaborate closely with cross\-functional teams, serving as the liaison between compliance, project stakeholders, and department heads
* Maintain high standards of quality, ethics, and operational excellence while achieving project objectives


**Requirements**
* Proven experience in compliance management, project management, or related fields with emphasis on risk mitigation and operational execution
* Familiarity with compliance frameworks and certifications (ISO27001 or similar) preferred
* Strong technical proficiency with modern project and collaboration tools such as Google Docs, Zapier, Linear, or equivalents
* Exceptional organizational skills, analytical thinking, and meticulous attention to detail
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English
* Ability to prioritize multiple initiatives, adapt to changing requirements, and work effectively in a remote\-first environment
* Professional demeanor, proactive mindset, and commitment to delivering high\-quality, compliant outcomes


**Benefits**
* Opportunity to lead critical compliance projects and drive organizational impact
* Collaborative and supportive remote\-first work environment
* Exposure to cross\-functional teams and senior stakeholders
* Career growth and skill development in compliance and project management
* Regular team activities and opportunities to contribute to organizational culture
* Comprehensive onboarding and structured ramp\-up period
* Flexible working arrangements and emphasis on work\-life balance


 Why Apply Through Jobgether?
   

  

 We use an AI\-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top\-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
   

  

 We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
   

  

 Why Apply Through Jobgether?
   

  

 Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre\-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

You will work closely with product, engineering, operations, and business stakeholders to ensure programs are delivered on time, aligned with company goals, and executed with excellence. This role requires strong program delivery discipline, cross\-functional leadership, and the ability to drive clarity and alignment in fast\-moving environments.

* Communicate progress, priorities, and issues clearly to executives and partner teams.
* Collaborate with product and engineering leaders to align execution with strategic goals.
* Promote strong coordination between distributed teams and ensure operational alignment.
* Continuously improve program management processes, tools, and governance.





 ﻿

* Demonstrated experience managing large or cross\-functional programs from initiation to completion.
* Strong communication, stakeholder management, and facilitation skills.
* Advanced proficiency in Excel and experience using data analytics for decision\-making, reporting, and tracking program performance
* Proven ability to operate in ambiguous and fast\-paced environments.

data.raw_snippet:
The client is headquartered in Saudi Arabia and is looking to hire a Project Manager \- BMS for their team at Dammam.
 



  





 Client is seeking an experienced and results\-driven Project Manager to lead and manage Building Management System (BMS) projects from initiation through completion. Th
data.jd_text:
The client is headquartered in Saudi Arabia and is looking to hire a Project Manager \- BMS for their team at Dammam.
 



  





 Client is seeking an experienced and results\-driven Project Manager to lead and manage Building Management System (BMS) projects from initiation through completion. The ideal candidate will have a strong engineering background, proven project management experience, and the ability to coordinate multidisciplinary teams to deliver BMS solutions safely, on time, within budget, and to the required quality standards.
 



  





 The Project Manager will be responsible for planning, execution, monitoring, and successful delivery of BMS projects, while maintaining strong communication with clients, consultants, subcontractors, suppliers, and internal teams.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities:
 



  




* Lead the end\-to\-end execution of BMS projects, including planning, scheduling, procurement coordination, installation, testing, commissioning, and handover.
* Manage project scope, timelines, budgets, risks, and resources to ensure successful delivery.
* Coordinate with clients, consultants, contractors, OEMs, and internal engineering and service teams.
* Review project specifications, drawings, and technical requirements to ensure compliance with client and contract expectations.
* Prepare and monitor project schedules, progress reports, cost reports, and resource plans.
* Ensure all project activities are executed in accordance with company quality, safety, and operational procedures.
* Oversee subcontractors and vendors to ensure timely and quality delivery of materials and services.
* Conduct project meetings and provide regular updates to stakeholders on progress, issues, and mitigation plans.
* Manage change orders, variations, claims, and documentation throughout the project lifecycle.
* Support site teams during installation, testing, integration, and commissioning of BMS systems.
* Ensure proper project documentation, including method statements, submittals, approvals, as\-built drawings, and handover documents.
* Maintain strong client relationships and ensure high levels of customer satisfaction.
* Identify opportunities for process improvement and contribute to the continuous enhancement of project delivery practices.



  





 Minimum Requirements:
 



  




* Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering or Electronics Engineering.
* Minimum 10 years of relevant experience in project management, preferably in BMS, HVAC controls, automation, or related building systems.
* PMP certification is mandatory.



  





  





 Preferred Qualifications:
 



  




* Strong knowledge of Building Management Systems, HVAC controls, energy management, and integrated building automation solutions.
* Experience working with BMS platforms, field devices, controllers, and system integration.
* Good understanding of project contracts, commercial terms, budgeting, and cost control.
* Familiarity with relevant industry standards, safety regulations, and commissioning practices.
* Strong leadership, communication, negotiation, and stakeholder management skills.
* Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities in a fast\-paced environment.
* Proficiency in project management tools and Microsoft Office applications.



  





  





 Key Competencies:
 



  




* Project planning and execution
* Team leadership
* Client and stakeholder management
* Risk management
* Budget and cost control
* Problem\-solving and decision\-making
* Technical coordination
* Communication and reporting



  





  





 What Success Looks Like in This Role:
 



  




* Projects delivered on time, within budget, and to the required quality standards
* High client satisfaction and strong repeat business relationships
* Effective coordination across engineering, procurement, site, and commissioning teams
* Strong compliance with safety, quality, and contractual requirements

data.title: Project Manager - Fit Out
data.raw_snippet:
Job Purpose
 



 The Projects Manager will execute fast\-track fit\-out projects for retail stores, F\&B outlets, hotels, and commercial offices. Working independently, he/she will be responsible for the overall planning, coordination, and management of multiple projects by leading multi\-disciplin
data.jd_text:
Job Purpose
 



 The Projects Manager will execute fast\-track fit\-out projects for retail stores, F\&B outlets, hotels, and commercial offices. Working independently, he/she will be responsible for the overall planning, coordination, and management of multiple projects by leading multi\-disciplinary teams including subcontractors through project activities to meet client requirements and complete projects successfully, safely, within quality, within budget and on\-time.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities Areas
 



 The PM oversees the overall management of projects and client servicing on behalf of the Company, encompassing the following functions:
 



 1\. Project Management:
 



 • Review tender programmes and convert them into construction programmes, including defining the client’s direct procurement requirements and client meetings calendar
 



 • Specify project objectives and plans including site set\-up, planning and logistics. Delineation of scope, budgeting, scheduling, setting performance requirements, selection of project sub\-contractors and allocating internal resources (e.g., QA/QC, Health and Safety and MEP Management)
 



 • Set targets for procurement packages and vet sub\-contractors’ tenders
 



 • Decide on purchasing requirements (whether within or outside subcontractors’ remit)
 



 • Ensure projects teams have sufficient resources, equipment, and labour. Plan into order to meet the project timescales and quality requirements
 



 • Attend all site meetings with client and/or consultants as Company representative
 



 • Approve interim payments for subcontractors and their final accounts • Approve the Company’s interim valuations before submission to our client/consultant
 



 • Liaise and cooperate with in\-house departments such as joinery manufacturing in Bahrain
 



 • Maximise resource efficiency (e.g., labour, materials, and equipment)
 



  





 2\. Performance Management:
 



 • Oversee the construction sites and associated site teams, and the management of vendors and trade subcontractors
 



 • Maintain accurate records of construction progress across all projects and report to senior management on a weekly basis
 



 • Ensure good communication between the Company and clients at all times
 



 • Be responsible for health and safety on all sites under his management
 



 • Ensure workers follow Company procedures
 



 • Manage the rectification process on\-time and on\-budget
 



 • Compile and submit Operations and Maintenance (O\&M) manuals to the clients upon project completion
 



 • Manage close out procedure for all projects in accordance with contractual obligations and to high quality standards thereby compelling clients to give a positive review or testimonial
 



  





 Candidate Requirements
 



 • The Projects Manager (PM) should have worked with reputable fit\-out contracting companies in the Middle East for at least 7\-8 years
 



 • Minimum of 10 years’ total work experience in the same field
 



 • Very strong technical, execution and commercial abilities with sound knowledge of the woodworking business particularly the technical aspects relating to joinery and good manufacturing practices of timber, veneers, hardware, etc
 



 • Proven track record as a successful leader at senior management level within the fit\-out industry • A very good knowledge of latest developments in the fit\-out market. The candidate should be well\-versed with the current trends and news influencing market and be able to suggest ideas to boost the Company’s industry presence and build our brand
 



 • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills and the ability to work successfully in a multinational market environment
 



  





 Shortlisted candidate will be contacted.

 This is a hands\-on Project Manager role within the IT function, focused on delivering critic
data.jd_text:
**IT Project Manager** 




  





 Join an established insurance organisation where technology delivery directly impacts business performance, customer experience, and regulatory compliance.
 



  





 This is a hands\-on Project Manager role within the IT function, focused on delivering critical initiatives across the business. If you enjoy structure, accountability, and driving projects from idea through to implementation, this is a strong platform to grow your impact.
 



  





**The Role:** 




 As Project Manager, you’ll take ownership of projects from conception to completion. You’ll work closely with business users, IT teams, and external vendors to ensure delivery is on time, within scope, and within budget.
 



  





 You’ll sit within the IT Project Management function, reporting to the Assistant Manager, and play a key role in coordinating cross\-functional initiatives across the organisation.
 



  





 This role suits someone who is organised, proactive, and comfortable operating in a structured, regulated environment.
 



  





**What You’ll Be Doing:**

 • 3–5 years of experience managing IT or technology\-related projects.

 • Confident stakeholder management skills across technical and non\-technical teams.

**What’s in It for You:**

**Next Steps:** 




 If you’re currently managing IT projects and looking to take ownership in a structured insurance environment, this could be the right move.
 



  





 Send your CV or get in touch in confidence to learn more.
 



  





 nineDots is Bahrain's only specialist technology \& outsourcing recruitment agency advertising this role on behalf of our client.

 As a Project Manager, th
data.jd_text:
**Role Summary**
 The candidate should be a natural leader and have worked with reputable joinery manufacturing companies and the interiors industry (similar to Havelock One) for the last 8 years with experience in managing customs and retail installation projects.
   

  

 As a Project Manager, the person must be self\-driven with a high responsibility level; capable of effectively launching and managing multiple projects of different sizes from award of project and through the different stages of implementation to handover independently. Versatile and adaptive management of internal and external stakeholders is key. Communication skills are very important for the role, and the successful candidate will be a natural communicator and good articulator in both oral and written English.
   

  

 The profile will be a naturally dependable member of the leadership team that is able to bring about improvement and measurable positive changes in output and efficiency over time.
   

  

 The profile will be a team player, able to identify strengths and weaknesses in a situation and bring out the best of people in challenging situations.
   

  

**Role Description**
**Project Kick\-off** 
**:**
* Set up a kick\-off meeting with relevant internal Havelock One departments and the appointed fit\- out team. Where necessary, coordinate with the general contractor team to align project scope, timeline, and expectations


**Site Assessment**
* If needed to be able to conduct initial site visits, perform surveys, take photographs, identify loading zones, and provide feedback to the Setting Out Manager (SOM) regarding any crucial dimensions or site\-specific considerations


**Technical Expertise**
* Utilize hands\-on experience or expertise to carry out the setting out/marking of joinery equipment on\-site if needed
* Coordinate and address any technical queries posed by the client or general contractor team during the project kick\-o? and the Mw manufacturing cycle
* Coordinate and address any technical queries posed by the client or general contractor team during


 MW installation by thoroughly understanding the MW equipment throughout its lifecycle.
   

  

**Project Management**
* and the project's work schedule, preferably using MS Projects, to ensure timelines are met
* Generate daily/weekly site progress reports, including necessary photos, and submit them to the Project Manager (PM) and SOM for review
* Manage multiple projects at various stages of development, independently prioritizing and executing tasks to meet deadlines and achieve objectives
* Proactively manage ongoing projects, taking initiatives on tasks without requiring constant supervision or follow\-ups


**Communication And Coordination**
* Maintain effective communication and coordination with fit\-out teams, factory personnel, and clients/client representatives daily. Relay any discrepancies to the line manager for quick resolution
* Observe the installation process first\-hand and report to the setting out team any adjustments needed to the MW equipment to facilitate future fit\-out installations
* Demonstrate high self\-confidence and clear self\-expression during client interactions, negotiations with client demands appropriately and handling high\-pressure situations with composure
* Effectively coordinate with fit\-out teams, considering the full project scope when assigning tasks, and providing direct responses to on\-site queries and issues


**Travel And Flexibility**
* Willingness to travel to countries in the MENA region and beyond. Adapt to flexible working hours, including weekends, depending on travel and site plans as required


**Experience**
**Candidate Requirements**
* Minimum of five to eight years similar experience in a joinery manufacturing companies with experience in managing hospitality and entertainment projects


**Skills**
* Proficient in verbal and written English
* Ability to work with AutoCAD, Excel, Word, and MS Projects
* Strong customer service skills, ensuring client satisfaction and addressing concerns promptly


**Attributes**
* Sound knowledge of fabrication procedures and a wide understanding of joinery materials including timber, boards, veneers, laminates, hardware, fabrics, glass, stone, lighting etc are vital
* An individual with high responsibility levels who takes ownership of matters, has good planning \& time management capabilities, effective communicator and basically a flexible individual who can take decisions and make things happen in a large setup
* Excellent organizational and time\-management skills
* Strong problem\-solving abilities and attention to detail
* Ability to work independently as well as part of a team
* Strong interpersonal skills to effectively liaise with diverse stakeholders
* Self\-driven with a strong internal drive to achieve goals and tackle challenges head\-on without the need for external motivation
* Intrinsically motivated, consistently seeking out new opportunities for growth and improvement
* Excel at managing multiple tasks simultaneously, ensuring that each receives the attention and e?ort needed to succeed
* Ability to plan thoroughly, considering potential consequences and the bigger picture
* Capacity to follow clear instructions and ensure the correct implementation on\-site

data.title: Chef Tournant
data.raw_snippet:
**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES** 



* Directs, coaches, supports, supervises, and evaluates (with the Sous Chef) all direct reports.
* Must have excellent food knowledge and a full understanding of culinary terms.
* Must be able to read, understand, follow, and prepare company recipes by maintaining the qu
data.jd_text:
**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES** 



* Directs, coaches, supports, supervises, and evaluates (with the Sous Chef) all direct reports.
* Must have excellent food knowledge and a full understanding of culinary terms.
* Must be able to read, understand, follow, and prepare company recipes by maintaining the quality and consistency in taste according to the instructions provided by the corporate office.
* Must be proficient in completing tasks, work efficiently and productively.
* Must be able to work in any section of a kitchen.
* Coordinate and supervise all team members assigned to their section, assign and delegate tasks accordingly.
* Undertake recipe reviews daily. Maintain recipe folders in immaculate condition.
* Responsible for follow\-through on any request within the area of responsibility received from the direct supervisor or manager on duty; this may include show plates, food samples and random food tastings.
* Control production levels and recommend ideas for improvements and better cost controlling.
* Prepare daily electronic food requisitions needed for his section production and countercheck deliveries for its accuracy; Report any discrepancies to his immediate supervisor.
* Must be able to oversee any main section (Sauce, Entremetier, Fish, Roast, Outlet CDP, Tournant and Cold Kitchen) and its entire food production.
* Maintain and ensure that Public Health are followed according to company standards and expectation (referring to US, Anvisa, Shipsan, Canadian, Australian etc.) and always followed within his section.
* Ensures that the HACCP program is carried out correctly.
* Maintains their assigned area in preparation for announced or unannounced United States Public Health type inspection either done by the Food \& Beverage Director or the actual inspectors.
* Reports for duty at assigned times, follows their supervisor’s instructions, and ensures that personal appearance, uniform, and personal hygiene are in accordance with the company’s rules and regulations.



  





**QUALIFICATIONS AND EDUCATION** 



* A minimum of 5 years in an upscale hotel, resort, cruise ship or convention banqueting service and at least 2 years as Chef Tournant (shipboard experience preferred).
* A culinary school degree is required.
* Very strong management skills in a multicultural and dynamic environment.
* Very strong communication, problem solving, decision making, and interpersonal skills.
* Superior customer service, teambuilding, and conflict resolution skills.
* Knowledge of the principles and processes for providing personalized services including needs assessment techniques, quality service standards, alternative delivery systems, and guest satisfaction evaluation techniques.
* Strong planning, coaching, organizing, staffing, controlling, and evaluating skills.
* Intermediate computer software skills required.
* Possess a good understanding of basic accounting principles such as numbering flow, “Debits/Credits”, adjusting entries and corrections.
* Ability to write reports and business correspondence and to establish a good rapport with the ship’s Senior Officers and the corporate office.
