data.jd_text:
**Job Title:** 
 Proposal Specialist
 



**Reports To:** 
 Group Director \- Sales
 



**Location** 
 : Dubai
 



  





**About j. awan \& partners** 




 At
 **j. awan \& partners** 
 , we believe in “challenging the status quo every day”, delivering seamless excellence to our customers across the world. We challenge the status quo by making tailor\-made solutions to meet the specific requirements of our client’s business interests and delivering our solutions to their needs with effective simplicity. We understand that time is precious and as such our tailor\-made solutions are simple to understand, simple to embed and simple to use.
 



  





 We are a fast\-growing international Governance, Risk and Compliance (GRC) Consultancy with our headquarters in the Dubai International Finance Centre (DIFC). We also have our own Technology company creating bespoke cutting edge RegTech solutions. Our business presence covers multiple jurisdictions with offices in the UAE, KSA, UK \& Ireland, Singapore, Porto, Pakistan, Qatar and now in South Africa. We provide Regulatory Governance, Risk, Compliance, Finance, Recruitment and Technology services (the “Services”) to a large number of clients including global, regional and local financial services institutions, governments and other industry partners.
 **As part of our global expansion plan, we are now looking for an ambitious and agile professional with a strong background in proposal writing to join our growing team.** 




  





  





**Mission / Purpose of the Role** 




 We are looking for someone who can take charge of the full proposal lifecycle, from gathering inputs across teams to crafting compelling, tailored responses that demonstrate our value proposition. You will work closely with business development, compliance, risk, legal, PMO, and product teams to ensure every submission is strategic, polished, and on time.
 



  





**12–18 Month Mission Outcomes (“What Success Looks Like”)** 




  





**Deliver timely, accurate, and strategic proposals across all client types.** 




***Success metrics / measures:***



* Timely RFP/RFI submissions.
* Ensure consistent alignment across BD, compliance, legal, product, and delivery teams.
* Positive stakeholder collaboration feedback.



  





**Create and maintain a centralized, high\-quality proposal content library.** 




***Success metrics / measures:***



* Repository updated quarterly with 100% accuracy.



  





**Improve pitch deck quality and relevance for enterprise prospects.** 




***Success metrics / measures:***



* Increased conversion from pitch to next\-stage conversations.



  





**Strengthen proposal lifecycle visibility and tracking.** 




***Success metrics / measures:***



* Proposal tracker maintained with real\-time accuracy



  





**Key Accountabilities** 




  





**RFP \& RFI Ownership** 




**Key responsibilities** 



* Lead end\-to\-end development of proposals, bids, tenders, RFIs, and RFPs.
* Coordinate with cross\-functional teams to ensure accurate, client\-specific responses.
* Track timelines, manage inputs, and ensure timely delivery under tight SLAs.



**Success indicators** 



* Timely submissions made.
* Zero missing or inaccurate sections in submissions.
* Positive feedback achieved.



  





**Enterprise Pitch Deck Creation** 




**Key responsibilities** 



* Craft and tailor compelling pitch decks for enterprise prospects across JAP’s consulting services and azakaw’s RegTech solutions.
* Collaborate with business development leads to ensure each deck resonates with the client’s pain points and industry priorities.



**Success indicators** 



* Pitch decks delivered within required timelines.
* Increased engagement metrics from prospects.



  





**Knowledge Base \& Content Repository** 




**Key responsibilities** 



* Build and maintain a central content library (past RFIs/RFPs, decks, case studies, bios).
* Update materials regularly with delivery, product, and sales teams.
* Standardize reusable content while ensuring accuracy.



**Success indicators** 



* Repository updated quarterly.
* Reduced turnaround time for proposals.



  





**Pre\-Sales Communication \& Coordination** 




**Key responsibilities** 



* Act as the communication bridge across departments during pre\-sales.
* Facilitate consistent internal communication throughout the proposal lifecycle.
* Maintain version control, stakeholder alignment, and timely responses across teams.



**Success indicators** 



* Zero missed handoffs.
* Smooth internal coordination throughout the proposal lifecycle.



  





**Project Management \& Execution** 




**Key responsibilities** 



* Maintain a proposal pipeline tracker across RFIs, RFPs, bids, and pitch timelines.
* Assign tasks, manage internal deadlines, and escalate delays as needed.
* Support BD and PMO by ensuring proposals move quickly through internal review cycles.
* Flag bottlenecks across BD, compliance, and delivery.



**Success indicators** 



* Tracker accuracy maintained.
* Reduction in proposal cycle delays.
* Proposal reviews follow a smooth process and targets are achieved.



  





**Role\-Specific Competencies** 




  




* Exposure to compliance, risk, or SaaS/RegTech platforms is highly desirable.
* Experience handling RFPs from regulated industries (e.g., finance, fintech, crypto, DNFBPs) is a major plus.
* Ability to manage multiple projects under tight timelines.
* Comfortable working in Google Workspace, PowerPoint, and project tracking tools.
* Proficiency in PowerPoint and Google Workspace for content creation and version control.



  





**Skills and Knowledge** 




  




* Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.
* Strong organizational and time management skills.
* Analytical mindset with capability to translate technical input into clear client value.
* Attention to accuracy, formatting, and brand alignment.
* Adaptable and proactive approach to problem\-solving.



  





**Education and Experience** 




  




* Education: Master’s degree in communications, marketing, or sales.
* Experience: 3–5\+ years in proposal writing, business development enablement, or pre\-sales (preferably in consulting, SaaS, or B2B services).
* Certifications: Proposal or project management certification preferred (e.g., APMP)



  





**Culture \& Values Alignment** 




  




* Embrace curiosity, innovation, and a growth mindset.
* Demonstrate resilience and adaptability in a fast\-paced, evolving environment.
* Exhibit professionalism and discretion in handling confidential information.
* Embody
 **j. awan \& partners** 
 values of Integrity, Innovation, Collaboration, and Excellence.



  





**Rewards \& Growth** 




  




* Competitive salary and performance\-based bonus.
* Health and insurance coverage.
* Annual learning and development budget for certifications and professional growth.
* Clear career progression pathways within the HR and L\&D leadership track.
* Opportunity to work on global projects across multiple jurisdictions.

data.title: Program Management Officer (PMO) – Binance Card
data.raw_snippet: Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300\+ million people in 100\+ countries for our industry\-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and
data.jd_text:
Binance is a leading global blockchain ecosystem behind the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume and registered users. We are trusted by 300\+ million people in 100\+ countries for our industry\-leading security, user fund transparency, trading engine speed, deep liquidity, and an unmatched portfolio of digital\-asset products. Binance offerings range from trading and finance to education, research, payments, institutional services, Web3 features, and more. We leverage the power of digital assets and blockchain to build an inclusive financial ecosystem to advance the freedom of money and improve financial access for people around the world.
   

  

 We are seeking a highly analytical and execution\-driven PMO to support the launch, scaling, and optimization of the Binance Card program within Binance.
   

  

 This role will play a critical part in vendor evaluation, financial planning, lifecycle management, and strategic growth. You will work cross\-functionally with Product, Finance, Compliance, Marketing, and external partners to ensure the card program is commercially viable, operationally efficient, and positioned for long\-term growth.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Card Vendor Assessment \& Management**
* Identify, evaluate, and onboard card program vendors (issuers, processors, program managers)
* Lead RFP/RFI processes, commercial negotiations, and contract structuring
* Assess vendors across capabilities, pricing, compliance readiness, and scalability
* Define and monitor vendor KPIs and SLAs
* Manage ongoing vendor performance and optimization


**Financial Planning \& P\&L Ownership**
* Build and maintain detailed financial models for the Binance Card program
* Partner with Finance to develop and manage end\-to\-end P\&L
* Forecast revenues (interchange, FX spreads, fees, partnerships)
* Analyze cost drivers (scheme fees, processing, fraud losses, rewards)
* Track actuals vs forecast and drive cost optimization initiatives
* Support pricing, incentives, and rewards strategy


**Growth Strategy \& Commercial Expansion**
* Define and execute growth strategies in collaboration with internal stakeholders such as Marketing, Product, and Data teams to own and optimize the \*\*end\-to\-end card lifecycle


**Card Scheme Relationship Management**
* Manage strategic relationships with global card networks such as Visa and Mastercard
* Ensure compliance with scheme rules, regulations, and program requirements
* Negotiate commercial terms (incentives, rebates)
* Coordinate scheme approvals, certifications, and audits
* Collaborate on joint initiatives (marketing campaigns, product enhancements)


**Program Management \& Governance**
* Drive end\-to\-end program execution, timelines, and milestones
* Maintain program roadmap and governance framework
* Identify risks and implement mitigation strategies
* Ensure alignment across Product, Tech, Compliance, Legal, and Operations
* Provide regular reporting and insights to senior leadership


**Strategic Analysis \& Market Intelligence**
* Conduct market benchmarking for crypto and fintech card programs
* Analyze competitor products, pricing, and rewards structures
* Evaluate new business models and partnership opportunities


**Requirements**
* Proven enterprise\-level business development experience with the ability to engage and negotiate with C\-suite stakeholders and manage complex, multi\-party partnerships.
* Strong existing network within PSPs, acquirers, payment processors, or financial institutions in the target region.
* Demonstrated ability to operate in regulated environments and navigate compliance and reputational considerations when structuring partnerships.
* Commercially mature, resilient, and execution\-driven, with the ability to build momentum in high\-growth, expansion\-focused environments rather than relying on established infrastructure.
* Strong analytical mindset with the ability to interpret merchant performance data and translate insights into scalable partnership strategies.
* Fluency in English and Spanish is required to be able to coordinate with overseas partners and stakeholders. Additional languages would be an advantage.


**Why Binance**
* Shape the future with the world’s leading blockchain ecosystem
* Collaborate with world\-class talent in a user\-centric global organization with a flat structure
* Tackle unique, fast\-paced projects with autonomy in an innovative environment
* Thrive in a results\-driven workplace with opportunities for career growth and continuous learning
* Competitive salary and company benefits
* Work\-from\-home arrangement (the arrangement may vary depending on the work nature of the business team)


 Binance is committed to being an equal opportunity employer. We believe that having a diverse workforce is fundamental to our success.
   

  

*By submitting a job application, you confirm that you have read and agree to our* 
***Candidate Privacy Notice***
*.*
 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

data.title: Head of Clinical Applications
data.raw_snippet:
**Position Overview:** 




  





 The Head of Clinical Applications is a senior technical leadership role accountable for the end\-to\-end ownership, governance, and strategic evolution of the Oracle Health (Cerner) Millennium clinical platform, Revenue Cycle Management payment and its integrated
data.jd_text:
**Position Overview:** 




  





 The Head of Clinical Applications is a senior technical leadership role accountable for the end\-to\-end ownership, governance, and strategic evolution of the Oracle Health (Cerner) Millennium clinical platform, Revenue Cycle Management payment and its integrated application ecosystem. This includes Rhapsody, Synapse RIS, FiveFaces Patient Portal, AI clinical initiatives (eg Ambient Listening, Diagnostic AI) and all relevant clinical applications across the organisation.
 



  





 The role combines deep Millennium platform expertise with enterprise integration architecture capability, providing authoritative leadership across clinical application delivery, HL7/FHIR interoperability, ambient AI adoption, charging, patient billing and clinical data integrity.
 



 The Head of Clinical Applications guides multi\-disciplinary teams of analysts, engineers, and informatics specialists \- serving as the primary bridge between clinical requirements, integration architecture, and digital transformation strategy \- ensuring the organisation's clinical technology landscape is safe, high\-performing, and continuously advancing.
 



  





**Key Accountabilities:** 




  





**Clinical Application Ownership \& Cerner Millennium Platform Leadership** 



* Lead the end\-to\-end ownership, governance, and strategic roadmap for the Oracle Health (Cerner) Millennium platform, including all clinical and operational modules across inpatient, ambulatory, and perioperative workflows
* Serve as the organisation's principal subject matter expert on Cerner Millennium architecture, configuration standards, domain model, and release management \- providing authoritative technical guidance to clinical informatics, IT, and executive stakeholders
* Drive platform optimisation, build governance, and clinical content standardisation across all Millennium domains including PowerChart, FirstNet, SurgiNet, PharmNet, Revenue Cycle, and Results Review



  





**Integration Architecture \& Interoperability Strategy** 



* Architect and govern the end\-to\-end HL7 and FHIR integration landscape connecting Cerner Millennium to downstream clinical, operational, and analytics systems \- including PACS, LIS, MDI/BMDI, pharmacy inpatient and retail, RCM billing solutions and third\-party SaaS solutions
* Lead the design, implementation, and operational governance of the enterprise integration engine (Rhapsody/Mirth), establishing interface standards, message routing logic, and transformation frameworks
* Drive FHIR R4 adoption strategy including SMART on FHIR application enablement, clinical API governance, and interoperability roadmap aligned with regulatory requirements (DHA, MOH, NABIDH)



  





**Clinical Applications Team Leadership \& Capability Development** 



* Lead, mentor, and develop a multi\-disciplinary team of clinical application analysts, integration engineers, informatics specialists, and build configuration resources
* Establish team operating models, delivery frameworks, and competency standards that elevate the organisation's internal Millennium and integration capability



  





  





**Revenue Cycle Integration \& Clinically\-Driven Charging** 



* Oversee governance and optimisation of clinically\-driven charging workflows within Cerner Millennium, ensuring accurate charge capture is embedded at the point of care across inpatient, ambulatory, and procedural settings
* Lead the integration architecture between Millennium Revenue Cycle and downstream RCM platforms including patient billing, claims processing, and payer adjudication systems — ensuring clean, real\-time data flow that minimises revenue leakage and billing exceptions
* Partner with Finance, Clinical Coding, and RCM operational leads to align system configuration with coding standards (ICD\-10, CPT, DRG), pre\-authorisation workflows, and payer contract logic



  





**Digital Clinical Innovation \& Ambient AI** 



* Guide the evaluation, piloting, and enterprise deployment of emerging clinical technologies including ambient AI documentation, agentic clinical workflows, and AI\-assisted clinical decision support
* Oversee the integration of ambient intelligence tools with Cerner Millennium, including real\-time write\-back architectures, NLP\-to\-structured\-data pipelines, and clinician\-facing AI interfaces



  





  





**Clinical Informatics \& Analytics Enablement** 



* Partner with clinical and operational leadership to design and deliver Cerner\-native and downstream analytics capabilities including Millennium reporting, Oracle ADW/OAC integration, and SAP BusinessObjects clinical datasets
* Lead the PACS and diagnostic imaging platform integration strategy, ensuring seamless clinical workflow across radiology, cardiology, and allied health image management



  





**Stakeholder Engagement \& Clinical Partnership** 



* Serve as the primary technology interface for clinical department heads, nursing informatics leads, and medical directors \- translating clinical requirements into platform architecture and build decisions
* Represent clinical applications and integration at board, committee, and executive governance forums, providing clear articulation of platform health, roadmap, and risk


- 


  





**Vendor \& Contract Management** 



* Own the strategic relationship with Oracle Health, managing support escalations, product advisory engagement, and contract performance against SLAs
* Govern third\-party clinical application vendor relationships including integration engine, ambient AI, CDS, PACS, and specialty application suppliers



  





  





**Performance, Governance \& Risk Management** 



* Define and monitor KPIs for clinical application availability, integration pipeline health, Millennium platform performance, and service desk resolution quality
* Establish and chair clinical application governance committees, change advisory boards, and platform steering groups
* Implement risk frameworks for clinical application dependencies, integration failure modes, and Millennium upgrade readiness
* Report on platform health, programme delivery, and innovation pipeline to executive leadership and the Board of Directors



  





  





**Education \& Qualification, Experience, Training \& Knowledge** 




**Education** 



* Bachelor's degree in Health Informatics, Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related clinical or technical field; advanced degree (MBA, MSc Health Informatics) preferred
* 8\+ years of progressive experience in clinical applications management, healthcare IT, or health informatics \- with demonstrable depth in Oracle Health (Cerner) Millennium platform ownership
* 5\+ years in a senior leadership role with direct responsibility for clinical application teams, integration architecture, or health IT programme delivery



  





**Cerner Millennium \& Integration Expertise (Essential)** 



* Deep, hands\-on expertise across Cerner Millennium clinical and operational domains \- including PowerChart, FirstNet, SurgiNet, PharmNet, Revenue Cycle, and Results Review
* Proven experience as a Millennium integration architect or senior build lead, with direct accountability for HL7 interface design, domain model governance, and cross\-system integration
* Demonstrated experience with enterprise integration engines (Rhapsody, Mirth, Rhapsody/Mirth equivalents) including interface build, monitoring, and operational governance
* Strong understanding of FHIR R4, SMART on FHIR, and CDS Hooks frameworks within the Oracle Health ecosystem



  





**Clinical Informatics \& Analytics** 



* Understanding of clinical data standards (HL7 v2, FHIR R4, SNOMED CT, LOINC, ICD\-10\) and their application within Millennium and downstream analytics platforms
* Experience with clinical analytics platforms (Oracle ADW, OAC, SAP BusinessObjects, or equivalent) integrated with Millennium data feeds
* Knowledge of PACS and diagnostic imaging integration within the Millennium clinical workflow



  





**Regulatory \& Governance Knowledge** 



* Familiarity with UAE healthcare regulatory frameworks \- DHA, HAAD/DoH, MOH \- and their implications for clinical application governance and data exchange
* Understanding of NABIDH interoperability standards and their technical implementation within the Cerner ecosystem is highly desirable

data.title: Growth Strategy Director
data.raw_snippet:
**Solutions Director**
 Middle East \& Africa
   

  

 The architect of Globant's growth narrative in the Middle East. A singular owner of the end\-to\-end opportunity — from sensing a client's ambition to presenting a winning, AI\-powered solution that makes Globant the partner of choice.
data.jd_text:
**Solutions Director**
 Middle East \& Africa
   

  

 The architect of Globant's growth narrative in the Middle East. A singular owner of the end\-to\-end opportunity — from sensing a client's ambition to presenting a winning, AI\-powered solution that makes Globant the partner of choice.
   

  

**01** 
**Role at a Glance**
**LOCATION**
**Dubai / Riyadh**
**REPORTING TO**
**CSO**
**JOB FAMILY**
**Growth**
**SENIORITY**
**Director**
**02** 
**Core Responsibilities**
 ◎
 **Define the North Star**
 Set a clear, ambitious vision for each opportunity — one that aligns Globant's capabilities with the client's transformation agenda and positions us as a long\-term strategic partner rather than a vendor.
   

  

 ◎
 **Craft the Winning Strategy** 
**AI\-Enhanced**
 Build the "Why We Win" narrative — leveraging AI\-powered competitive intelligence tools and market\-sensing frameworks to articulate a differentiated, evidence\-backed strategy for each pursuit.
   

  

 ◎
 **Design the Solution** 
**AI\-Enhanced**
 Architect end\-to\-end solutions that integrate Globant's studios, GX capabilities, and emerging AI/GenAI offerings — translating business problems into a coherent technology and experience blueprint tailored to the client's context.
   

  

 ◎
 **Understand the Opportunity Deeply**
 Conduct rigorous discovery — mapping the client's strategic priorities, stakeholder landscape, budget cycles, and competitive dynamics. Identify unarticulated needs and translate them into addressable business opportunities.
   

  

 ◎
 **Implement the Strategy**
 Orchestrate the internal pursuit team across Studios, GX, Finance, Legal, and executive sponsors — ensuring the strategy translates flawlessly into the proposal, commercial model, and delivery commitment.
   

  

 ◎
 **Day\-to\-Day Cross\-Studio Leadership**
 Partner daily with technology studios, GX teams, and regional delivery leads — acting as the connective tissue between disciplines to develop integrated, world\-class solutions on time and at quality.
   

  

 ◎
 **Craft a Compelling Story** 
**AI\-Enhanced**
 Write and structure executive\-level narratives — using AI\-assisted content tools and storytelling frameworks — that make the complex feel inevitable and the proposal feel personal. Every slide, word, and visual earns its place.
   

  

 ◎
 **Prepare and Deliver the Pitch**
 Lead the full proposal presentation — owning rehearsals, Q\&A preparation, and live delivery. Coach internal contributors and ensure executive coherence across the entire pitch experience.
   

  

**03** 
**Expanding Globant's Regional Footprint**
 ◎
 **Market Positioning \& Offering Elevation** 
**AI\-Enhanced**
 Continuously refine Globant's go\-to\-market positioning for MEA — identifying which AI, cloud, experience, and industry propositions resonate with Saudi Vision 2030, UAE Centennial 2071, and other national agendas.
   

  

 ◎
 **Value Proposition Design**
 Build, iterate, and codify reusable value propositions by vertical (BFSI, Government, Energy, Retail, Healthcare) — making it faster and more compelling to respond to future opportunities.
   

  

 ◎
 **AI\-First Solution Strategy** 
**AI\-Enhanced**
 Embed AI and GenAI capabilities (agentic workflows, intelligent automation, LLM\-powered products) into every solution design — positioning Globant as the partner that leads with AI, not just applies it.
   

  

 ◎
 **Executive Relationship Cultivation**
 Build trusted C\-suite relationships with key accounts and prospects in the region — acting as a thought partner before, during, and after the bid to open doors that cannot be unlocked through RFP responses alone.
   

  

 ◎
 **Win/Loss Intelligence** 
**AI\-Enhanced**
 Synthesize outcomes from every bid — using AI\-assisted debrief tools — to build an institutional knowledge base that sharpens competitive positioning, pricing strategy, and future pursuit quality.
   

  

 ◎
 **Ecosystem \& Partner Strategy**
 Map and activate the regional partner ecosystem (hyperscalers, system integrators, government entities, accelerators) to co\-create solutions that amplify Globant's reach and credibility in MEA.
   

  

 ◎
 **Thought Leadership \& Brand Amplification**
 Represent Globant at regional forums, GITEX, Seamless, and industry events — publishing and presenting insights that build brand authority and generate inbound opportunities.
   

  

**04** 
**How Success Is Measured**
 The Solutions Director is evaluated on pursuit quality, win velocity, and the strategic lift of Globant's positioning in MEA.
   

  

**Win Rate**
 Bid conversion %
   

  

**Pipeline Influenced**
 ACV from pursuits
   

  

**Proposal Quality**
 Exec \& client NPS
   

  

**Time\-to\-Proposal**
 Pursuit velocity
   

  

**Footprint Growth**
 New logo \& expansion
   

  

**AI Penetration**
 AI\-led deal share
   

  

**05** 
**What We're Looking For**
**▸ 10\+ Years in Tech Consulting / IT Services**
 Proven track record in pre\-sales, solutioning, or business development at a global technology services firm.
   

  

**▸ MEA Market Fluency**
 Deep understanding of GCC enterprise dynamics, procurement cycles, and cultural business norms across UAE, KSA, and the broader region.
   

  

**▸ AI \& Digital Native Mindset**
 Hands\-on familiarity with AI, GenAI, and digital transformation solution architectures — not just at the buzzword level.
   

  

**▸ Executive Communication**
 Exceptional written and verbal communication — can present with conviction to a C\-suite audience and adapt the story on the fly.
   

  

**▸ Cross\-functional Orchestrator**
 Comfortable leading without direct authority — can align diverse studios, GX, and delivery teams toward a unified pursuit goal.
   

  

**▸ Commercial Acumen**
 Experience shaping commercial models, pricing strategy, and deal structures for complex, multi\-phase technology engagements.
   

  

**▸ Bi\-lingual Advantage**
 Arabic language proficiency is a meaningful differentiator for building trust with government and enterprise stakeholders.
   

  

**▸ Industry Depth (at least one)**
 BFSI, Government \& Public Sector, Energy \& Utilities, Retail, or Healthcare in the MEA context.
   

  

**06** 
**Why This Role, Why Now**
 The Middle East is at an inflection point — national transformation agendas, sovereign AI investments, and enterprise digitization are creating a once\-in\-a\-generation opportunity for a partner with Globant's profile. The Solutions Director will not inherit a mature playbook; they will write it — shaping how Globant competes, wins, and grows in one of the world's most strategically significant technology markets.
   

  

*"This is not a role for someone who executes a process. It's for someone who builds the process — and keeps reinventing it."*

data.jd_text:
**Description and Requirements**
**"At BMC trust is not just a word \- it's a way of life!"** 
**Description And Requirements**
**Hybrid**
**This Is Helix. Powered by You.**
 At
 **BMC Helix** 
 , we don’t do ordinary. We’re the
 **AI\-native engine** 
 behind the world’s most forward\-thinking IT organizations, helping them focus on what matters most. What are we passionate about? We're here to reset the economics of enterprise IT and help others realize the ROI of AI.
   

  

 We are a mix of
 **curious minds, creative thinkers, and courageous builders** 
 who believe tech should change the game—not just play it. We celebrate wins, support each other, and laugh a lot.
   

  

 We are the change makers. With decades of leadership and established trust in IT service and operations management, we’re scaling with purpose—through organic innovation, strategic acquisitions, and relentless R\&D. Our open\-first
 **Agentic AI platform** 
 empowers autonomous agents to drive real outcomes with speed, accountability, and precision.
   

  

 We are laser\-focused on delivering real value to our customers by accelerating innovation and the application of applying agentic AI in digital service and operations management for IT organizations around the world.
   

  

 The BMC Helix Project Architect performs a lead role in assessing and analysing capabilities, business and technical requirements, and Customer business drivers. The Architect develops, as necessary, solution architecture and program definitions. In addition, the Architect determines Customer environmental and personnel suitability, readiness to proceed, and provides best practice recommendations. The Architect provides engagement stability by leveraging extensive technical and leadership experiences.
   

  

 As a Subject Matter Expert, the Architect’s guidance may cover implementation approaches, strategy, integration, deployment, and adoption of best practices to ensure Customer success. The Architect role serves as a senior coach, mentor, and technical leader for members of the project team and Consultants.
   

  

**Key Accountabilities**
* Provides thought leadership and actionable guidance to during the sales process to setup a successful customer conversion and value realization roadmap
* Shares knowledge and experience with peers by contributing best practice templates and examples for the following delivery artifacts:
+ Conversion Methodology Presentation
+ Conversion Agendas
+ Conversion Analysis templates
+ Architectures Design Documents
+ Test Plans
+ Deployment Plan


**The Architect's Primary Responsibilities For The Role Are**
* Responsible for leading and/or participating in small teams comprised of BMC, partner and customer resources at client sites to deliver required outcomes and produce additional business with BMC Helix clients
* Create and maintain conversion projects artifacts
* Establish conditions of satisfaction and success factors with the Customer early in the sales cycle and ensure those are reviewed and maintained periodically through the sales lifecycle
* Development and maintenance of relationships with Conversion code programmers via weekly status calls
* Manage transition from Sales to Delivery Team
* Comprehensive review and clarification of SOW prior to deal closures
* Technical lead rescuing at risk or endangered projects in conjunction with Sales, Support \& R\&D
* Includes plan for communication and collaboration among the Customer Team, Account Team, Pre\-Sales, Services Sales, and the PMO
* Ensure all internal BMC Helix stakeholders are kept well informed on the engagement
* Improve the quality and efficiency of the solutions delivered to BMC Helix clients as a means to improve BMC Helix business margins
* Establish and lead conversion scoping meetings including preparation of materials and working with Customer, Sales team and other key stakeholders to review key conversion analysis information
* Precise project communications (to PMO and other internal stakeholders)
* Review of BMC Helix SOW scoping with the Customer
* Use your knowledge and skillset to create or improve processes and or code programs which assist with the deliverables associated with a competitive replacement sales opportunity or conversion project


**Success Behaviours**
* An individual contributor that:
+ Has the ability to work independently and provide quality output with minimal supervision/direction
+ Understand how to apply technology to improve the operational effectiveness or efficiency of specific IT functions or applications
+ Understand enterprise scale, integrated applications from a process/business perspective
+ Understands and can articulate how the BMC Helix solutions align to the Customer's needs
+ Receives positive Customer feedback from BMC Helix leadership, teams, peers, and sales groups
+ Cultivates satisfied, repeat Customers
+ Is seen by Customer's and peers as a trusted advisor, using best practices to make prescriptive recommendations that support the achievement of business goals

* Written and verbal communication skills at all levels of project team engagement and with the Customer C\-level executives \- advanced level
* Presentation skills to enable facilitation of workshops and meetings \- advanced level
* Communicates and orchestrates actions effectively for project success (e.g. proactively mitigates risks before issues impact the project)
* Leadership and mentoring / coaching skills \- advanced level
* Organization and planning skills \- advanced level
* Time Management \- advanced level
* Escalates appropriately for issues impacting sales opportunities, project delivery or Customer satisfaction, following process and policy
* Builds and maintains strong relationships with internal and external key stakeholders
* Continuously improves own skills and proactively seeks new learning and engagement opportunities
* Identifies new or emergent business opportunities with Customers and works with Account team for follow up
* Contributes to BMC knowledge through participation in internal initiatives
* Executes projects in compliance with the processes and standards of BMC Helix
* Excellence delivery methodology
* Fulfils all Ethics and Compliance training/testing requirements to protect BMC Helix interests and assets at all times


**Qualifications /Experience/Certifications**
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent
* Fluent in Arabic and English
* 10(\+) years of technical IT experience that includes:
+ 7(\+) years BMC Remedy / Helix ITSM product line experience
+ 5(\+) years deploying enterprise management software solutions

* ITIL v3 Foundation
* Must be familiar with other IT management technologies and have a working knowledge of ITOM
* Non\-BMC Helix skills in technical areas which support the deployment and integration of BMC based solutions, including (intermediate to advanced level):
+ Advanced OS
+ DB
+ Storage
+ Virtual

* Additional experiences include:
+ Engagement leader
+ 3(\+) projects as technical lead
+ 3(\+) production solutions implemented
+ 3(\+) deployment(s) across Dev, UAT \& Prod for full project life\-cycle
+ Multiple 6(\+) month engagements or experience in a project for the entire project lifecycle
+ Technical lead rescuing at risk or endangered projects in conjunction with Sales, Support, R\&D


**Why Work Here? Because You’ll Matter.**
 We’re not hiring for roles—we’re hiring for
 **impact** 
 . At Helix, you’ll solve hard problems, build smart solutions, and work with people who challenge and champion you. You’ll see your ideas come to life—and your work make a difference.
   

  

 We believe in
 **trust, transparency, and grit** 
 . Our culture is inclusive, flexible, and built for people who want to stretch themselves \- and support others doing the same. Whether you’re remote or in\-office, you’ll find space to show up fully and contribute meaningfully. You won’t be boxed in—you’ll be backed up.
   

  

**Make Your Mark At Helix**
 If Helix excites you but you're unsure if you meet every qualification,
 **apply anyway** 
 . We value diverse perspectives and believe the best ideas come from everywhere.
   

  

**EEOC Statement**
 Helix is committed to equal opportunity employment regardless of race, age, sex, creed, color, religion, citizenship status, sexual orientation, gender, gender expression, gender identity, national origin, disability, marital status, pregnancy, disabled veteran or status asa protected veteran. If you need a reasonable accommodation for any part of the application and hiring process, visit the accommodation request page.
   

  

 BMC Software maintains a strict policy of not requesting any form of payment in exchange for employment opportunities, upholding a fair and ethical hiring process.

data.jd_text:
**Overview**
 GovCIO is currently hiring for Project Control Specialist to directly support program management. This position will be located in Al\-Udeid AFB, Doha, QA and will be a fully onsite position.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 The contractor shall establish a contractor resourced PMO. This PMO shall encompass all operations necessary to execute a dynamic, large\-scale, multi\-functional program. Develop and maintain standard business practices necessary to execute the CTSS\-V Program. Create a comprehensive, proactive, integrated management structure that focuses on meeting or exceeding government requirements and ensures compliance with mandatory, statutory and regulatory requirements. The contractor shall:
   

  

* Provide administration and management for this IDIQ and all awarded TOs;
* Provide on\-site personnel and services necessary to support integration, installation, operations and maintenance (O\&M), and sustainment of COMM/IT support at TO specified locations CONUS and OCONUS;
* Ensure all contractor personnel supporting CTSS\-V are executing the Program with the proper knowledge, resources, and skillsets necessary to meet the IDIQ and TO requirements;
* Comply with the IDIQ SOW, awarded TOs, applicable instructions, authorities, foreign clearance guidance, regulations and associated processes;
* Comply with host nation labor laws and country\-specific rules for entering, exiting, working in and transiting foreign countries;
* Demonstrate ongoing awareness and knowledge, and maintain the ability and processes, to apply applicable guidance and regulations related to performing OCONUS while ensuring no delay or lapse in contract performance;
* Develop, provide and maintain an enduring Management and Staffing Plan for the duration of this contract. (Deliverable: Management and Staffing Plan)


 \#ctss
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Required Skills and Experience:
   

  

 Bachelor's with 5 \- 8 years (or commensurate experience)
   

  

 Clearance Required: Secret
   

  

 Experience working in direct support of the program/project manager relating to management and administrative information and activities, such as budgeting, manpower, and resource planning and reporting
   

  

**5 Years’ Experience With**
* preparing and analyzing documents/tasks and developing complex project schedules for tracking resources and other management activities
* performing complex evaluations of existing procedures, processes, techniques, models, and/or systems related to management problems or contractual issues, which would require a report and recommend solution
* developing work breakdown structures, charts, tables, graphs, and diagrams to assist in analyzing problems and trend analysis


**Preferred Skills And Experience**
 Top Secret
   

  

 Pending contract award\- Proposal
   

  

 ctss
   

  

 \#NSS
   

  

 \#AR
   

  

 \#tm
   

  

 \#TMK
   

  

**Company Overview**
 GovCIO is a team of transformers\-\-people who are passionate about transforming government IT. Every day, we make a positive impact by delivering innovative IT services and solutions that improve how government agencies operate and serve our citizens.
   

  

 But we can't do it alone. We need great people to help us do great things \- for our customers, our culture, and our ability to attract other great people. We are changing the face of government IT and building a workforce that fuels this mission. Are you ready to be a transformer?
   

  

**What You Can Expect**
**Interview \& Hiring Process**
 If you are selected to move forward through the process, here’s what you can expect:
   

  

- During the Interview Process

* Virtual video interview conducted via video with the hiring manager and/or team
* Camera must be on
* A valid photo ID must be presented during each interview
* During the Hiring Process
+ Enhanced Biometrics ID verification screening
+ Background check, to include:
- Criminal history (past 7 years)
- Verification of your highest level of education
- Verification of your employment history (past 7 years), based on information provided in your application


**Employee Perks**
**Benefits**
 At GovCIO, we consistently hear that meaningful work and a collaborative team environment are two of the top reasons our employees enjoy working here. In addition, our employees have access to a range of perks and benefits to support their personal and professional well\-being, beyond the standard company offered health benefits, including:
   

  

* Employee Assistance Program (EAP)
* Corporate Discounts
* Learning \& Development platform, to include certification preparation content
* Training, Education and Certification Assistance\*
* Referral Bonus Program
* Internal Mobility Program
* Pet Insurance
* Flexible Work Environment
* Available to full\-time employees


 Our employees’ unique talents and contributions are the driving force behind our success in supporting our customers, which ultimately fuels the success of our company. Join us and be a part of a culture that invests in its people and prioritizes continuous enhancement of the employee experience.
   

  

**We are an Equal Opportunity Employer.** 
 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, disability, or status as a protected veteran. EOE, including disability/vets.
   

  

**Posted Pay Range**
 The posted pay range, if referenced, reflects the range expected for this position at the commencement of employment, however, base pay offered may vary depending on multiple individualized factors, including market location, job\-related knowledge, skills, education, experience, and internal equity. The total compensation package for this position may also include other compensation elements, to be discussed during the hiring process. If hired, employee will be in an “at\-will position” and the GovCIO reserves the right to modify base salary (as well as any other discretionary payment or compensation program) at any time, including for reasons related to individual performance, GovCIO or individual department/team performance, and market factors.
   

  

 Posted Salary Range: USD $90,000\.00 \- USD $93,000\.00 /Yr.

data.title: PMO Analyst
data.raw_snippet:
Role Overview
 



 The PMO Analyst will support and oversee venue technology project management, operations, and maintenance activities. This role provides analytical insights, drives process optimization, and facilitates effective communication across technical teams, stakeholders, and external pa
data.jd_text:
Role Overview
 



 The PMO Analyst will support and oversee venue technology project management, operations, and maintenance activities. This role provides analytical insights, drives process optimization, and facilitates effective communication across technical teams, stakeholders, and external partners. The objective is to enhance project delivery, optimize resource utilization, reduce system and service interruptions, and strengthen risk management and reporting within the Venue Technology function.
 



 Key Responsibilities
 



 Project Monitoring \& Reporting
 


* Develop and maintain dashboards and regular reports covering project progress, risks, issues, dependencies, resource utilization, and budget performance.
* Analyze project and operational data to identify trends, risks, and improvement opportunities; present insights to stakeholders.
* Monitor system alerts, response times, and corrective actions taken by operations and maintenance teams to minimize downtime and service disruptions.
* Oversee venue technology system health checks, including preventive and corrective maintenance activities and periodic performance testing.



 Resource \& Financial Management
 


* Collaborate with project and operations managers to forecast resource requirements and align activity schedules across projects and venues.
* Optimize resource utilization and recommend adjustments to schedules and operational plans.
* Track project progress against payment milestones to ensure alignment with planned cash flow and budgets.



 Stakeholder \& Vendor Management
 


* Act as a central coordination point between project teams, stakeholders, senior management, and external partners.
* Prepare and deliver clear project status updates, risk assessments, and mitigation plans.
* Liaise with third\-party vendors and service providers, escalating issues when required to ensure service continuity and performance.
* Monitor vendor performance against SLAs and contractual obligations in coordination with service leads.



 Event Operations Coordination
 


* Coordinate and communicate event technology requirements, timelines, resources, and bump\-in/bump\-out activities.
* Provide regular, structured updates to stakeholders highlighting progress, risks, issues, and next steps.
* Ensure consistent and effective communication across all teams involved in event technology delivery.



 Qualifications \& Experience
 



 Experience
 


* Minimum 10\+ years of experience in IT, with strong exposure to project management and technology operations.
* Proven experience in venue technology operations, including building management systems, AV, ELV, or similar environments.



 Education
 


* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field.



 Certifications
 


* PMP or equivalent project management certification (preferred).



 Skills \& Competencies
 


* Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret complex data and operational trends.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills across technical and non\-technical audiences.
* Solid understanding of project management methodologies and IT operations management.
* Ability to operate in high\-pressure, event\-driven environments.



 Language
 


* Arabic speaking is an advantage

data.jd_text:
**Role –** 
 Lead Consultant
   

  

**Technology** 
 – ERP Finance Fusion
   

  

**Location** 
 – Muscat, Oman
   

  

**Business Unit** 
 – ORC
   

  

**Compensation –** 
 Competitive (including bonus)
   

  

**Job Description**
 We are seeking a highly experienced Oracle Fusion Finance Lead/Principal Consultant to oversee and drive end ‑ to ‑ end implementation and support of key Fusion Financials modules, including General Ledger (GL), Accounts Payable (AP), Accounts Receivable (AR), Fixed Assets (FA), Cash Management (CM), Expense Management, Tax, Revenue Management Cloud Services (RMCS), Projects and Advanced Collections. The consultant will work closely with Finance leadership, business SMEs, and cross ‑ functional teams to define solution architecture, lead workshops, guide functional consultants, ensure seamless module integration, and provide expert oversight for project execution. This role requires strong command over financial processes, statutory and compliance requirements, and the ability to independently lead discussions with the customer.
   

  

**Your role**
 In the role of a Lead or Principal consultant, you will serve to facilitate Finance Functional role with below responsibilities as followed.
   

  

* Lead end\-to\-end delivery of Oracle Fusion Finance modules: GL, AP, AR, FA, CM, Expense Management, Tax, Revenue Management Cloud Services (RMCS), Projects and Advanced Collections (if applicable).
* Conduct requirements workshops with customer business users and senior office, Finance Controllers, AP/AR teams, Treasury, and Audit teams.
* Translate business processes into future\-state Fusion Finance architecture.
* Prepare solution designs, BRDs/MD50s, test scripts, and configuration documents


**Responsibilities**
* Module Configuration \& Functional Expertise
+ Configure Fusion Financial modules based on global design principles and local statutory needs.
+ Manage Chart of Accounts (CoA), ledgers, legal entities, accounting rules, subledger configurations, and tax setups.
+ Support period close processes, reconciliations, journals, allocations, and intercompany flows.
+ Drive setup for bank accounts, cash pooling, payment formats, and treasury workflows.

* Finance Integrations \& Reporting
+ Provide functional leadership for integrations with Payroll, Procurement \& SCM, Treasury systems, Banking interfaces, and third\-party invoicing platforms.
+ Collaborate with technical teams on FBDI/HDL\-based loads, OIC/REST API integrations, and OTBI/BI Publisher reports.
+ Lead financial data validation, reconciliation, and cutover activities.

* Project Governance \& Customer Engagement
+ Independently handle client discussions, workshops, and solution walkthroughs.
+ Partner with PMO on planning, RAIDs (Risks, Assumptions, Issues, Dependencies), and status reporting.
+ Manage functional consultants working across different finance modules.
+ Ensure compliance with audit, internal controls, and statutory requirements .

* Testing, Rollout \& Support
+ Lead SIT, UAT, regression testing, and hypercare support.
+ Drive quarter\-end and year\-end support readiness.
+ Own issue triaging, resolution management, and continuous improvements.
+ Guide business users on new features and quarterly Fusion Cloud updates .

* Required Skills \& Experience
+ 10–15 years of experience in Oracle ERP implementations; 6\+ years in Oracle Fusion Cloud.
+ Strong expertise in at least 4–5 Finance modules (GL, AP, AR, FA, CM, Taxes, Revenue Management Cloud Services (RMCS), Projects, Expenses).
+ Deep knowledge of Subledger Accounting (SLA), multi\-ledger architecture, and cross\-module flows.
+ Hands\-on experience in finance data migration (FBDI uploads, opening balances, historical data, EBS to Cloud).
+ Experience with Oracle Cloud implementation methodologies
+ Experience in Telecommunications sector
+ Strong understanding of statutory reporting, localization, and period close processes.
+ Ability to lead functional teams and coordinate with technical architects.
+ Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.


**Preferred**
* Should be excellent planner when it comes to perform release planning and other delivery planning.
* Should have excellent problem\-solving skills
* Experience in GCC/Middle East finance regulatory environments.
* Exposure to enterprise multi\-company, multi\-country rollouts.
* Familiarity with integrations involving banks, treasury systems, and procurement.
* Experience in onsite–offshore delivery models.


**Personal**
 Besides the professional qualifications of the candidates, we place great importance in addition to various forms personality profile. These include:
   

  

* Strong analytical ability and business acumen.
* Excellent leadership, communication, and consulting presence.
* Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
* High accountability and delivery focus.


**Why Infosys**
 Infosys is a global leader in next\-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in more than 50 countries to navigate their digital transformation.
   

  

 With over four decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of global enterprises, we expertly steer our clients through their digital journey. We do it by enabling the enterprise with an AI\-powered core that helps prioritize the execution of change. We also empower the business with agile digital at scale to deliver unprecedented levels of performance and customer delight. Our always\-on learning agenda drives their continuous improvement through building and transferring digital skills, expertise, and ideas from our innovation ecosystem.
   

  

 “All aspects of employment at Infosys are based on merit, competence and performance. We are committed to embracing diversity and creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Infosys is proud to be an equal opportunity employer.”

* Provide functional leadership for integrations with Payroll, Procurement \& SCM, Treasury systems, Banking interfaces, and third\-party invoicing platforms.
* Collaborate with technical teams on FBDI/HDL\-based loads, OIC/REST API integrations, and OTBI/BI Publisher reports.
* Lead financial data validation, reconciliation, and cutover activities.
* **Project Governance \& Customer Engagement**
* Independently handle client discussions, workshops, and solution walkthroughs.
* Partner with PMO on planning, RAIDs (Risks, Assumptions, Issues, Dependencies), and status reporting.
* Manage functional consultants working across different finance modules.
* Ensure compliance with audit, internal controls, and statutory requirements.
* **Testing, Rollout \& Support**
* Lead SIT, UAT, regression testing, and hypercare support.
* Drive quarter\-end and year\-end support readiness.
* Own issue triaging, resolution management, and continuous improvements.
* Guide business users on new features and quarterly Fusion Cloud updates.
* **Required Skills \& Experience**
* 10–15 years of experience in Oracle ERP implementations; 6\+ years in Oracle Fusion Cloud.
* Strong expertise in at least 4–5 Finance modules (GL, AP, AR, FA, CM, Taxes, Revenue Management Cloud Services (RMCS), Projects, Expenses).
* Deep knowledge of Subledger Accounting (SLA), multi\-ledger architecture, and cross\-module flows.
* Hands\-on experience in finance data migration (FBDI uploads, opening balances, historical data, EBS to Cloud).
* Experience with Oracle Cloud implementation methodologies
* Experience in Telecommunications sector
* Strong understanding of statutory reporting, localization, and period close processes.
* Ability to lead functional teams and coordinate with technical architects.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.



  





**Preferred** 




  




* Should be excellent planner when it comes to perform release planning and other delivery planning.
* Should have excellent problem\-solving skills
* Experience in GCC/Middle East finance regulatory environments.
* Exposure to enterprise multi\-company, multi\-country rollouts.
* Familiarity with integrations involving banks, treasury systems, and procurement.
* Experience in onsite–offshore delivery models.



  





**Personal** 




  





 Besides the professional qualifications of the candidates, we place great importance in addition to various forms personality profile. These include:
 


* Strong analytical ability and business acumen.
* Excellent leadership, communication, and consulting presence.
* Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.
* High accountability and delivery focus.



  





**Why Infosys** 




  





 Infosys is a global leader in next\-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in more than 50 countries to navigate their digital transformation.
 



 With over four decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of global enterprises, we expertly steer our clients through their digital journey. We do it by enabling the enterprise with an AI\-powered core that helps prioritize the execution of change. We also empower the business with agile digital at scale to deliver unprecedented levels of performance and customer delight. Our always\-on learning agenda drives their continuous improvement through building and transferring digital skills, expertise, and ideas from our innovation ecosystem.
 



  





 “All aspects of employment at Infosys are based on merit, competence and performance. We are committed to embracing diversity and creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Infosys is proud to be an equal opportunity employer.”

data.search_title: "Fakeeh Care" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**Description**
 Key Responsibilities and Duties: 1\. Oversees personnel within the Safety Unit, ensuring alignment with Fakeeh Care policies, safety objectives, and performance expectations. 2\. Reviews, updates, and develops safety policies, procedures, and manuals to ensure compliance with Ministry of Interior (MOI) regulations, other relevant safety standards, and to proactively address safety risks, including emergency procedures and the Emergency Disaster Manual. 3\. Conducts regular inspections and audits Fakeeh Healthcare facility, documenting findings and ensuring that corrective actions are implemented to address any non\-compliance. 4\. Investigates and analyzes safety\-related incidents, provides recommendations for preventive measures, and implements corrective actions to mitigate future risks. 5\. Ensures the facility adheres to all relevant regulations, codes, and standards, including compliance with local Civil Defense and health \& safety requirements. 6\. Prepares and delivers regular safety presentations and reports to line manager, ensuring clear communication of safety concerns, incidents, and compliance status. 7\. Plans, executes, and evaluates emergency drills. Develops action plans to address any findings, ensuring ongoing preparedness for any emergency scenario. 8\. Develops and delivers safety awareness lectures and training programs for staff, residents, and visitors to maintain a high level of safety consciousness. 9\. Trains new staff on safety protocols and procedures, ensuring they are well\-prepared to follow established safety guidelines. 10\. Actively participates in safety\-related meetings and committees, collaborating with interdisciplinary teams to integrate safety into daily operations. 11\. Conducts comprehensive risk assessments for Fakeeh Healthcare facility, identifying potential hazards and preparing action plans to mitigate risks and ensure a safe environment. 12\. Leads safety\-related projects, ensuring compliance with Civil Defense regulations and accreditation standards.13\. Manages the Safety Unit’s budget and staffing needs, ensuring that resources are allocated efficiently to support all safety operations and initiatives. 14\. Other duties as assigned within the scope of the job.
   

  

**Requirements**
 Skills and Abilities: \- Excellent analytical and problem\-solving abilities. \- Strong organizational skills and attention to detail. \- In\-depth knowledge of local regulations, SASO standards, and compliance requirements. \- Strong leadership and interpersonal skills, with the ability to train and motivate staff.
   

  

 Experience: Minimum of 5 years of experience in safety field
   

  

 Education: Bachelor’s degree in engineering
   

  

 Language: Proficiency in both Arabic and English for effective communication
   

  

 Licenses / Certifications: NEBOSH and / or IOSH

data.search_title: "Careem" ("Chief Technology Officer" OR CTO OR "Chief Information Officer" OR CIO OR "Head of Technology" OR "IT Director" OR "Head of IT" OR "Chief Digital Officer" OR CDO OR "VP Digital Transformation" OR "Head of Business Excellence" OR PMO OR transformation OR director)
data.jd_text:
**About the Company**
 Careem is building the Everything App for the greater Middle East — making it easy to move around, order food and groceries, manage payments, and more. Our purpose is simple: to simplify and improve people’s lives and build an awesome organisation that inspires.
   

  

 Since 2012, Careem has enabled earnings for over 2\.5 million Captains, simplified the lives of more than 70 million customers, and built a platform where the region’s best talent and entrepreneurs thrive. We operate in 70\+ cities across 10 countries, from Morocco to Pakistan.
   

  

***We’re now entering our next chapter — one powered by AI. We’re looking for AI talent: curious problem\-solvers who know how to apply AI to build tools, automate workflows, and create real impact. Whether it’s streamlining operations, enhancing customer experience, or reimagining internal systems — we want people who can make Careem work smarter and move faster.***
****About the role****
 Careem’s mission includes simplifying and improving the lives of people across our region — and Care plays a vital role in making that mission real. As part of the Care Analytics, Automation, and Project Management team, you’ll use data and technology to enhance how we serve our customers, captains, and partners. From supporting building automation that reduces effort, to driving analytics that uncover experience gaps, you’ll help shape systems that create impact across the region.
   

  

 This is a hands\-on role within Care where you’ll program manage automation solutions , deliver data\-driven insights, and manage impactful projects. In this hands\-on position you’ll manage data\-led and AI\-powered initiatives in Care, support in automating workflows, optimizing performance, getting in\-depth data analytics and managing projects that transform how we serve our users, alongside a talented team that’s driving meaningful change.
   

  

****What you’ll do****
* Program manage the end\-to\-end automation program roadmap for Careem Care: including but not limited to self\-service flows, AI\-driven triage, proactive notifications, and escalation automation
* Partner with business and care leads across verticals (Food, Quik, Pay, etc.) to analyze contact drivers, disposition trends, and pain points to identify automation and process improvement opportunities.
* Collaborate with Care and org\-wide Engineering, Product, verticals, data science, and Operations to program manage and support roll out AI\-enabled solutions that enhance care efficiency and quality of delivery
* Drive change management to ensure successful adoption of automation tools across Careem’s regional care teams.
* Support building care strategy across verticals , closely liaising with functional teams
* Lead cross\-functional projects, managing dependencies, timelines, and risks while maintaining strong stakeholder communication.
* Localize and roll out solutions tailored and compliant to each market (UAE, Jordan, KSA)
* Explore and pilot emerging AI/ML technologies (e.g., NLP, conversational AI, RPA) to enhance Careem’s automation capabilities.
* Build clear documentation of systems, workflows, and success metrics to support scalability and transparency.
* Work with real\-world data and translate it into features, signals, and insights
* Improve the way we serve and monitor machine learning models
* Contribute to a strong team culture of learning, iteration, and accountability
* Track performance metrics (contact rate, deflection rate, NPS/CSAT, automation accuracy, FCR) and provide insights and recommendations for continuous improvement
* Translate insights into data\-backed actions in coordination with the respective teams
* Champion a “Care\-First Automation” culture — leveraging technology to elevate the customer experience, not just reduce costs.


****What you need****
**Must\-haves**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, or a related technical field
* 6\+ years of experience working with machine learning program management, analytics in any form\- ideally in tech, e\-commerce, or service excellence organizations.
* Solid Python skills, especially with libraries like pandas, NumPy, and scikit\-learn
* A strong grasp of ML fundamentals like classification, regression, cross\-validation, and evaluation metrics
* Familiarity with at least one ML framework such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, or XGBoost
* Advanced analytical capability: proficiency in SQL, Excel, Power BI / Tableau, or other BI tools.
* Proven track record of translating data insights into business strategy and measurable impact.
* Advanced analytical capability: proficiency in SQL, Excel, Power BI / Tableau, or other BI tools \- ability to translate complex data into simple narratives.
* Familiarity with CRM and Care platforms (Zendesk, Salesforce, or equivalent) and workflow automation tools.


**Nice\-to\-haves**
* Exposure to deep learning techniques in call center
* Experience working with large datasets using Spark, Hive, and cloud tools
* Familiarity with model deployment and monitoring workflows (Airflow, MLflow, etc.)
* Interest in solving real operational challenges for customers, captains and partners
* A GitHub profile or project portfolio that shows what you’ve built.


**What You’ll Get**
* A chance to work on AI problems, data\-analytics at regional scale that improve lives and drive real business outcomes
* A smart, motivated team that values learning and practical impact
* Flexibility to work remotely, with strong support for collaboration and ownership
* A front\-row seat to how AI is transforming mobility, delivery, and digital services in emerging markets


**What We’ll Provide You**
 We offer colleagues the opportunity to drive impact in the region while they learn and grow. As a full time Careem colleague, you will be able to:
   

  

* Work and learn from great minds by joining a community of inspiring colleagues.
* Put your passion to work in a purposeful organisation dedicated to creating impact in a region with a lot of untapped potential.
* Explore new opportunities to learn and grow every day.
* Work 4 days a week in office \& 1 day from home, and remotely from any country in the world for 30 days a year with unlimited vacation days per year. (If you are in an individual contributor role in tech, you will have 2 office days a week and 3 to work from home.)
* Access to healthcare benefits and fitness reimbursements for health activities including gym, health club, and training classes.

data.jd_text:
**About the Company**
 Careem is building the Everything App for the greater Middle East — making it easy to move around, order food and groceries, manage payments, and more. Our purpose is simple: to simplify and improve people’s lives and build an awesome organisation that inspires.
   

  

 Since 2012, Careem has enabled earnings for over 2\.5 million Captains, simplified the lives of more than 70 million customers, and built a platform where the region’s best talent and entrepreneurs thrive. We operate in 70\+ cities across 10 countries, from Morocco to Pakistan.
   

  

***We’re now entering our next chapter — one powered by AI. We’re looking for AI talent: curious problem\-solvers who know how to apply AI to build tools, automate workflows, and create real impact. Whether it’s streamlining operations, enhancing customer experience, or reimagining internal systems — we want people who can make Careem work smarter and move faster.***
 Careem “Tenants” is on a mission to make the “Everything App” become reality by expanding the breadth of services that Careem offers to its customers, with an initial focus on Car Rental and Home Services, through partnering with external partners and offering their services on the Everything App. We’re in the early stages of scaling up third\-parties’ operated services in Dubai, and we look to solve problems while collaborating with our partners in order to achieve our ambitious growth goals in this burgeoning space.
   

  

 As a
 *Senior Commercial Executive* 
 , you’ll be responsible for bringing data orientation into decision\-making across functions and topics within Tenants. This is a unique role with the opportunity to create genuine impact for the lives of everyday people in our region.
   

  

*Our ideal candidate is someone that excels at working and analyzing data, makes data\-driven recommendations and that relentlessly focuses on customers and desires to understand their current \& future needs and behaviors. Moreover, our candidate will be able to build a fast\-paced understanding of both the online car rental market, as well as online on demand home services.*
**What You’ll Do**
* Business Growth: develop and implement plans to drive revenue growth and identify upsell and cross\-sell opportunities to maximize verticals’ value.
* Business Operations: coordinate with partners’ Ops team to ensure smooth daily activities and bookings fulfillment; monitor and manage partners’ performance, addressing any issues proactively.
* Be the custodian of the key business metrics and analyses that powers business decisions
* Structure the analyses needed to answer key business questions, and perform analyses and derive commercial insights
* Drive business growth through supporting product funnel, business performance analysis
* Translate data into insights in clear, concise and actionable presentations/reports to support interaction with partners and guide business decision
* Designing, optimize \& automate dashboards and reports to serve day\-to\-day data and analytics requests, and support monitoring business\-impacting KPIs which support the decision\-making process
* Be the custodian of data health\-checks and data\-sanitization


**What You Will Need**
* Strong presentation skills and an ability to communicate complex findings to various audiences in a clear manner both written and verbally
* Stakeholder management as well as tasks organizational skills, to navigate complex priorities across multiple services served
* Proficient in SQL and Tableau or equivalent visualization tool
* Hands on experience with Python
* Excellent attention to details, and organization skills.
* Ability to create and maintain relationships with partners
* Strong problem solving skills with good hands on analyzing data


**What We’ll Provide You**
 We offer colleagues the opportunity to drive impact in the region while they learn and grow. As a full time Careem colleague, you will be able to:
   

  

* Work and learn from great minds by joining a community of inspiring colleagues.
* Put your passion to work in a purposeful organisation dedicated to creating impact in a region with a lot of untapped potential.
* Explore new opportunities to learn and grow every day.
* Work 4 days a week in office \& 1 day from home, and remotely from any country in the world for 30 days a year with unlimited vacation days per year. (If you are in an individual contributor role in tech, you will have 2 office days a week and 3 to work from home.)
* Access to healthcare benefits and fitness reimbursements for health activities including gym, health club, and training classes.
